   PATCH ESTHETIQUE LEGACY (desactive volontairement)
   Un commentaire casse contenait autrefois une balise de fermeture
   parasite qui coupait la feuille de style principale : tout le CSS
   qui suivait etait alors silencieusement ignore par le navigateur.
   Le HTML est desormais valide. Ce bloc reste INERTE via media="not all"
   pour ne PAS modifier l'apparence actuelle de l'outil.
   Pour le reactiver un jour : remplacer media="not all" par media="all".
========================================================== -->

<script>
/* V5.9 CORRECTION — supprime tout pavé de code CSS/JS affiché par erreur dans le body */
(function(){
  function looksLikeRogueCode(txt){
    if(!txt) return false;
    const t = txt.trim();
    if(t.length < 20) return false;
    return (
      t.includes('!important') ||
      t.includes('@media') ||
      t.includes('grid-template') ||
      t.includes('max-width') ||
      t.includes('PATCH SAFE') ||
      t.includes('V5.9 STUDIO PATCH') ||
      t.includes('function(') ||
      t.includes('document.querySelector')
    );
  }

  function cleanupRogueCode(){
    try{
      const app = document.querySelector('.app');

      Array.from(document.body.childNodes).forEach(node=>{
        if(node === app) return;

        if(node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && looksLikeRogueCode(node.textContent)){
          node.remove();
          return;
        }

        if(node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE){
          const tag = node.tagName ? node.tagName.toLowerCase() : '';

          if(tag !== 'script' && tag !== 'style' && tag !== 'link'){
            const txt = node.textContent || '';
            const rect = node.getBoundingClientRect ? node.getBoundingClientRect() : {height:0};

            if(looksLikeRogueCode(txt) && rect.height < 260){
              node.remove();
            }
          }
        }
      });

      // sécurité : si un bloc de code a été inséré juste avant le header visuellement
      const topbar = document.querySelector('.topbar');
      if(topbar && topbar.previousSibling && topbar.previousSibling.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE){
        if(looksLikeRogueCode(topbar.previousSibling.textContent)) topbar.previousSibling.remove();
      }

    }catch(e){
      console.warn('cleanup rogue code failed', e);
    }
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', cleanupRogueCode);
  }else{
    cleanupRogueCode();
  }

  setTimeout(cleanupRogueCode, 50);
  setTimeout(cleanupRogueCode, 300);
})();
</script>

function freshDataForTab(tab){
  switch(tab){
    case 'consigne': return {title:'', author:'', date:'', intro:'', footer:'SOYEZ INFORMÉ', posts:[]};
    case 'provisoire': return {title:'Consigne provisoire', author:'', date:'', serie:'', intro:'', footer:'SOYEZ INFORMÉS', posts:[makeShortPost()]};
    case 'bonnes': return {title:'Bonnes pratiques', zone:'', author:'', date:'', intro:'', footer:'BONNES PRATIQUES À RESPECTER', items:[makeGoodPractice()]};
    case 'maintenance': return makeMaintenanceDefault();
    case 'diagnostic': return makeDiagnosticDefaultV59();
    case 'securite': return makeSecurityDefault();
    case 'fiche': return {
      number:'001', date:'', machine:'', gmao:'', brandType:'', material:'', epi:'', qualification:'', machinePhotos:[], machinePhoto:'',
      risks:[makeRisk()],
      accident:"En cas d'accident, alerter un secouriste du travail et/ou le chef d'équipe et/ou le Team Leader.",
      incendie:"En cas d'incendie, alerter le chef d'équipe et/ou le Team Leader.",
      accidentIcon: defaultState.fiche.accidentIcon,
      fireIcon: defaultState.fiche.fireIcon
    };

    case 'securite': return {title:'Consigne sécurité', subtitle:'', author:'', date:'', machinePhotos:[], machinePhoto:'', blocks:[makeSafetyBlock()], footer:'SOYEZ INFORMÉS'};
    default: return {};
  }
}
function newCurrentDocument(){
  if(state.active==='archives') return alert('Choisis d’abord un type de document.');
  state.currentArchiveId = null;
  state[state.active] = freshDataForTab(state.active);
  persist();
  render();
}

function loadState(){
  try{
    const raw = localStorage.getItem('acs_reboot_v1');
    if(!raw) return structuredClone(defaultState);
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    return mergeDefaults(structuredClone(defaultState), parsed);
  }catch(e){
    return structuredClone(defaultState);
  }
}
function mergeDefaults(base, src){
  if(Array.isArray(base)) return Array.isArray(src)? src : base;
  if(typeof base === 'object' && base){
    for(const k of Object.keys(base)){
      base[k] = mergeDefaults(base[k], src && k in src ? src[k] : undefined);
    }
    if(src && typeof src==='object'){
      for(const k of Object.keys(src)) if(!(k in base)) base[k]=src[k];
    }
    return base;
  }
  return src === undefined ? base : src;
}
function persist(){
  try{
    const slim = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state));
    slim.archives = [];
    localStorage.setItem('acs_reboot_v1', JSON.stringify(slim));
  }catch(err){
    console.warn('Sauvegarde locale impossible, probablement quota images atteint. La session reste modifiable.', err);
    window.__persistWarningShown = window.__persistWarningShown || false;
    if(!window.__persistWarningShown){
      window.__persistWarningShown = true;
      setTimeout(()=>alert("Les images sont nombreuses/lourdes : la sauvegarde automatique locale peut être limitée, mais tu peux continuer à modifier et exporter en PDF/JSON."), 50);
    }
  }
}
function escapeHtml(s=''){ return String(s).replace(/[&<>\"]/g,m=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;'}[m])); }
function fileToDataUrl(file){
  return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onerror = reject;
    reader.onload = () => {
      const original = reader.result;
      if(!file || !String(file.type||'').startsWith('image/')) return resolve(original);
      const img = new Image();
      img.onload = () => {
        try{
          const max = 1400;
          let w = img.naturalWidth || img.width;
          let h = img.naturalHeight || img.height;
          const ratio = Math.min(1, max / Math.max(w,h));
          w = Math.round(w * ratio);
          h = Math.round(h * ratio);
          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
          canvas.width = w;
          canvas.height = h;
          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
          ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
          ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);
          ctx.drawImage(img,0,0,w,h);
          resolve(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.82));
        }catch(e){
          resolve(original);
        }
      };
      img.onerror = () => resolve(original);
      img.src = original;
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}
function stripHtml(html=''){ const d=document.createElement('div'); d.innerHTML=html; return d.textContent||d.innerText||''; }
function getLogoForTab(tabId){
  return (state.logos && state.logos[tabId]) ? state.logos[tabId] : '';
}
function chooseLogoForTab(tabId){
  const input = document.getElementById('logoInput');
  if(!input) return;
  input.dataset.targetTab = tabId;
  input.click();
}

function ensureLogo(){
  const top = document.getElementById('topLogoBox');
  const lg = getLogoForTab(state.active);
  top.innerHTML = lg ? `<img src="${lg}" alt="logo">` : '<span class="muted">Logo</span>';
}

        <span style="color:#0b7cff">LABO</span>.DOC
      </span>

        ⊞ Pictos<input id="pictoFolderV1" type="file" webkitdirectory directory multiple style="display:none">
      </label>
      <button id="previewBtnV1" style="border-radius:9px;padding:6px 11px;font-size:.8rem;background:#111827;border:1px solid #111827;color:#fff;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif">▶ Prévisualiser</button>
      <button id="newBtnV1" style="border-radius:9px;padding:6px 11px;font-size:.8rem;background:#fff;border:1px solid #d0d5dd;color:#243044;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif">⊕ Nouveau</button>
      <button id="saveBtnV1" style="border-radius:9px;padding:6px 11px;font-size:.8rem;background:#111827;border:1px solid #111827;color:#fff;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif">⊙ Sauvegarder</button>
    </div>
  </div>`;

  host.innerHTML = headerHTML + TABS.map(t=>{
    const isActive = state.active === t.id;
    const subs = (t.sub && t.sub.length && isActive) ? `<div class="tab-submenu">${t.sub.map(s=>`<button class="tab-sub-btn" data-anchor="${s.anchor}">${s.label}</button>`).join('')}</div>` : '';
    return `<div class="tab-wrap ${isActive?'tab-wrap-active':''}"><button class="tab-btn ${isActive?'active':''}" data-tab="${t.id}">${t.label}</button>${subs}</div>`;
  }).join('');
  host.querySelectorAll('[data-tab]').forEach(btn=>btn.onclick=()=>{
    const target = btn.dataset.tab;
    if(state.currentArchiveId && target !== 'archives'){
      const item = (state.archives||[]).find(x=>x.id===state.currentArchiveId);
      if(!item || item.type !== target) state.currentArchiveId = null;
    }
    state.active = target;
    persist();
    render();
  });
  host.querySelectorAll('[data-anchor]').forEach(btn=>btn.onclick=e=>{
    e.stopPropagation();
    const anchor = btn.dataset.anchor;
    const el = document.getElementById(anchor);
    if(el){
      el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'});
      // brief highlight
      el.classList.add('nav-anchor-flash');
      setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('nav-anchor-flash'), 900);
    }
  });

  /* ── Wiring boutons volet 1 ── */
  const _wire = (v1id, origId) => {
    const v1 = document.getElementById(v1id);
    const orig = document.getElementById(origId);
    if(v1 && orig) v1.onclick = () => orig.click();
  };
  _wire('previewBtnV1','previewBtn');
  _wire('newBtnV1','newBtn');
  _wire('saveBtnV1','saveBtn');
  const v1pf = document.getElementById('pictoFolderV1');
  const origpf = document.getElementById('pictoFolder');
  if(v1pf && origpf){
    v1pf.onchange = function(){
      // Clone the file list to the original input and trigger its change event
      const dt = new DataTransfer();
      Array.from(this.files).forEach(f => dt.items.add(f));
      origpf.files = dt.files;
      origpf.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles:true}));
    };
  }

  /* ── Sync horloge volet 1 ── */
  if(!window._v1ClockInterval){
    window._v1ClockInterval = setInterval(()=>{
      const src = document.getElementById('os-clock');
      const dst = document.getElementById('os-clock-v1');
      if(src && dst) dst.textContent = src.textContent;
      const src2 = document.getElementById('os-doc-label');
      const dst2 = document.getElementById('os-doc-label-v1');
      if(src2 && dst2) dst2.textContent = src2.textContent;
    }, 500);
  }
}

function richToolbar(targetId){
  return `<div class="rich-toolbar noprint">
    <button type="button" class="mini-btn" onclick="formatCmd('bold','${targetId}')"><b>B</b></button>
    <button type="button" class="mini-btn" onclick="formatCmd('italic','${targetId}')"><i>I</i></button>
    <button type="button" class="mini-btn" onclick="formatCmd('underline','${targetId}')"><u>U</u></button>
    <button type="button" class="mini-btn" onclick="formatCmd('hiliteColor','${targetId}','#fff176')">Surligner</button>
    <input type="color" value="#111111" onchange="formatCmd('foreColor','${targetId}', this.value)" title="Couleur texte">
    <select onchange="formatFontSize('${targetId}', this.value)"><option value="">Taille</option><option>2</option><option>3</option><option>4</option><option>5</option><option>6</option><option>7</option></select>
  </div>`;
}
window.formatCmd = function(cmd,id,val=null){
  const el = document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return; el.focus(); document.execCommand(cmd,false,val); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input')); currentEditor = id;
}
window.formatFontSize = function(id,val){
  if(!val) return; const el=document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return; el.focus(); document.execCommand('fontSize',false,'7');
  el.querySelectorAll('font[size="7"]').forEach(f=>{ f.removeAttribute('size'); f.style.fontSize = ({'2':'12px','3':'14px','4':'16px','5':'18px','6':'22px','7':'28px'})[val] || '16px'; });
  el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input')); currentEditor=id;
}
function bindRich(id,getter){
  const el=document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return;
  el.addEventListener('focus', ()=> currentEditor=id);
  el.addEventListener('input', ()=>{ getter(el.innerHTML); persist(); updatePreview(); });
}

function render(){
  if(!TABS.some(t=>t.id===state.active)) state.active='consigne';
  ensureLogo();
  renderTabs();
  document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  const activePanel=document.getElementById('panel-'+state.active); if(activePanel) activePanel.classList.add('active');
  renderConsigne();
  renderMaintenance();
  renderFiche();
  renderSecurite();
  if(typeof renderDiagnosticV59 === 'function') renderDiagnosticV59();
  renderArchives();
  updatePreview();
}


function normalizePhotosArray(obj, singleKey='photo', multiKey='photos'){
  if(!obj) return;
  if((!obj[multiKey] || !obj[multiKey].length) && obj[singleKey]){
    const raw = obj[singleKey];
    if(Array.isArray(raw)) obj[multiKey] = raw;
    else obj[multiKey] = [raw];
  }
  if(!Array.isArray(obj[multiKey])) obj[multiKey] = [];
  obj[multiKey] = obj[multiKey].map(p=>{
    if(typeof p === 'string') return {src:p, caption:''};
    return {src:p?.src||'', caption:p?.caption||''};
  }).filter(p=>p.src);
}
function normalizeMainPhotos(obj, singleKey='machinePhoto', multiKey='machinePhotos'){
  if(!obj) return;
  if((!obj[multiKey] || !obj[multiKey].length) && obj[singleKey]){
    obj[multiKey] = [typeof obj[singleKey]==='string' ? {src:obj[singleKey], caption:''} : obj[singleKey]];
  }
  if(!Array.isArray(obj[multiKey])) obj[multiKey] = [];
  obj[multiKey] = obj[multiKey].map(p=> typeof p === 'string' ? {src:p, caption:''} : {src:p?.src||'', caption:p?.caption||''}).filter(p=>p.src);
}

function makeConsigneStep(){ return {title:'', text:'', photo:'', photos:[], warning:''}; }
function ensureConsigneV4(){
  const d = state.consigne || (state.consigne={});
  d.headerTitle = d.headerTitle ?? 'INFO ATELIER';
  d.headerSubtitle = d.headerSubtitle || 'INFORMER • STANDARDISER • SÉCURISER';
  d.title = d.title ?? '';
  d.displayTitle = d.displayTitle ?? d.title ?? '';
  d.subtitle = d.subtitle ?? '';
  d.sector = d.sector ?? '';
  d.poste = d.poste ?? '';
  d.author = d.author ?? '';
  d.date = d.date ?? '';
  d.typeConsigne = d.typeConsigne ?? d.level ?? '';
  d.level = d.typeConsigne; // compatibilité anciens JSON
  d.tagLabel = d.tagLabel || 'SOYEZ INFORMÉ';
  d.objectif = d.objectif ?? d.intro ?? '';
  if(!Array.isArray(d.retenir)) d.retenir = [];
  if(!Array.isArray(d.mainPhotos)) d.mainPhotos = [];
  if(d.machinePhoto && !d.mainPhotos.length) d.mainPhotos.push({src:d.machinePhoto, caption:''});
  if(!Array.isArray(d.steps) || !d.steps.length){
    d.steps = (d.posts||[]).map((p,i)=>({title:p.name||('Étape '+(i+1)), text:stripHtml(p.text||''), photo:(p.photos&&p.photos[0]&&p.photos[0].src)||'', warning:''}));
    if(!d.steps.length) d.steps=[makeConsigneStep()];
  }
  (d.steps||[]).forEach((st,idx)=>{
    if(!st || typeof st !== 'object') d.steps[idx] = st = makeConsigneStep();
    if(!Array.isArray(st.photos)) st.photos = [];
    if(st.photo && !st.photos.length) st.photos.push(st.photo);
    if(st.image && !st.photos.length) st.photos.push(st.image);
    st.photos = st.photos.map(p => {
      if(typeof p === 'string') return p;
      if(p && typeof p === 'object') return p.src || p.data || p.url || '';
      return '';
    }).filter(Boolean);
    st.photo = st.photos[0] || '';
    st.title = st.title || 'Préparer';
    st.text = st.text || '';
    st.warning = st.warning || '';
  });
  if(!Array.isArray(d.safetyRisks)) d.safetyRisks=[];
  if(!Array.isArray(d.epi)) d.epi=[];
  if(!Array.isArray(d.keyPoints)) d.keyPoints=[];
  if(!Array.isArray(d.qualityChecks)) d.qualityChecks=[];
  d.specialTitle = d.specialTitle || 'CAS PARTICULIERS';
  d.specialText = d.specialText ?? '';
  d.specialImage = d.specialImage ?? '';
  d.doubtText = d.doubtText ?? '';
  return d;
}
function ncLinesToHtml(lines){ return (lines||[]).filter(x=>String(x||'').trim()).map(x=>'<li>'+escapeHtml(x)+'</li>').join(''); }
function ncTextToHtml(txt){ return escapeHtml(txt||'').split(/\n+/).filter(Boolean).join('<br>'); }
function ncField(path,value){ const d=ensureConsigneV4(); d[path]=value; persist(); updatePreview(); }

Le champ reste librement modifiable.</div></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Rédacteur</label><input id="nc-author" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.author||'')}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Date</label><input id="nc-date" type="date" value="${escapeHtml(d.date||'')}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Cartouche information</label><input id="nc-tagLabel" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.tagLabel||'SOYEZ INFORMÉ')}"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="nc-sec-trame" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="nc-editor-grid-2" style="margin-top:12px">
      <div class="field"><label>Photo principale</label><label class="file-btn">Charger photo<input class="hidden" type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="setConsigneMainPhoto(this.files[0])"></label><div class="nc-img-preview">${main?`<img src="${main}">`:'Photo principale'}</div></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Objectif</label><textarea id="nc-objectif">${escapeHtml(d.objectif||'')}</textarea></div>
    </div>
    <div id="nc-sec-contenu" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="grid-4" style="margin-top:14px">
      <div class="block"><div class="subband">À retenir <button type="button" class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addConsigneListItem('retenir')">+</button></div><div class="nc-mini-list">${d.retenir.map((x,i)=>`<div class="nc-list-row"><input type="text" value="${escapeHtml(x)}" oninput="updateConsigneArray('retenir',${i},this.value)"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeConsigneArray('retenir',${i})">×</button></div>`).join('')}</div></div>
      <div class="block"><div class="subband">Sécurité <button type="button" class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addConsigneListItem('safetyRisks')">+</button></div><div class="nc-mini-list">${d.safetyRisks.map((x,i)=>`<div class="nc-list-row"><input type="text" value="${escapeHtml(x)}" oninput="updateConsigneArray('safetyRisks',${i},this.value)"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeConsigneArray('safetyRisks',${i})">×</button></div>`).join('')}</div></div>
      <div class="block"><div class="subband">Points clés <button type="button" class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addConsigneListItem('keyPoints')">+</button></div><div class="nc-mini-list">${d.keyPoints.map((x,i)=>`<div class="nc-list-row"><input type="text" value="${escapeHtml(x)}" oninput="updateConsigneArray('keyPoints',${i},this.value)"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeConsigneArray('keyPoints',${i})">×</button></div>`).join('')}</div></div>
      <div class="block"><div class="subband">Contrôle qualité <button type="button" class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addConsigneListItem('qualityChecks')">+</button></div><div class="nc-mini-list">${d.qualityChecks.map((x,i)=>`<div class="nc-list-row"><input type="text" value="${escapeHtml(x)}" oninput="updateConsigneArray('qualityChecks',${i},this.value)"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeConsigneArray('qualityChecks',${i})">×</button></div>`).join('')}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div id="nc-sec-mode" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="nc-step-addbar">
      <div><div class="subband" style="margin:0;background:transparent;color:#075aa8;padding:0">⚙ Mode opératoire</div><div class="hint">Chaque étape est affichée en ligne pour rester lisible et simple à compléter.</div></div>
      <button type="button" class="yellow" onclick="addConsigneStepV4()">+ Ajouter une étape</button>
    </div>
    <div id="nc-steps-editor" class="nc-steps-editor-wrap">${d.steps.map((st,i)=>{
      const photos = ((st.photos&&st.photos.length)?st.photos:(st.photo?[st.photo]:[]));
      return `<div class="nc-step-editor" id="nc-step-editor-${i}">
        <div class="nc-step-row">
          <div class="nc-step-index">${i+1}</div>
          <div class="field"><label>Titre</label><input type="text" value="${escapeHtml(st.title||'')}" oninput="updateConsigneStepV4(${i},'title',this.value)"></div>
          <div class="field nc-step-photo-area"><label>Photo(s)</label><div class="nc-editor-photo-grid">${photos.map((ph,pi)=>`<div class="nc-editor-photo-card"><img src="${ph}"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" title="Supprimer la photo" onclick="removeConsigneStepPhoto(${i},${pi})">×</button></div>`).join('') || '<div class="nc-photo-empty">▧ Aucune photo</div>'}</div><label class="nc-step-upload-btn">+ Ajouter photo(s)<input class="hidden" type="file" accept="image/*" multiple onchange="addConsigneStepPhotos(${i},this.files)"></label></div>
          <div class="field nc-text-field"><label>Texte</label><textarea placeholder="Décrire l’étape..." oninput="updateConsigneStepV4(${i},'text',this.value)">${escapeHtml(st.text||'')}</textarea></div>
          <div class="field nc-alert-field"><label>Alerte / point rouge</label><textarea placeholder="Point d’attention facultatif..." oninput="updateConsigneStepV4(${i},'warning',this.value)">${escapeHtml(st.warning||'')}</textarea></div>
          <div class="nc-step-actions"><button type="button" class="danger nc-step-delete" onclick="removeConsigneStepV4(${i})">Supprimer</button></div>
        </div>
      <div class="nc-step-add-inline">
        <button type="button" class="nc-step-add-btn" onclick="addConsigneStepAfterV4(${i})">+ Ajouter une étape ici</button>
      </div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('')}</div>
    <div class="nc-form-bottom">
      <div class="field"><label>EPI spécifiques</label><textarea id="nc-epi">${escapeHtml((d.epi||[]).join('\n'))}</textarea><div class="muted">Une ligne par EPI spécifique. Le picto est choisi automatiquement selon le nom saisi : lunettes, gants, manchette, bouchons, casque, masque, chaussures, visière...</div></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Cas particuliers</label><textarea id="nc-specialText">${escapeHtml(d.specialText||'')}</textarea><label class="file-btn" style="margin-top:8px">Image cas particulier<input class="hidden" type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="setConsigneSpecialImage(this.files[0])"></label></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Pied de page “En cas de doute”</label><input id="nc-doubtText" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.doubtText||'')}"></div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  ['headerTitle','headerSubtitle','displayTitle','subtitle','sector','poste','author','date','tagLabel','objectif','specialText','doubtText'].forEach(k=>{ const el=document.getElementById('nc-'+k); if(el) el.oninput=e=>{ d[k]=e.target.value; if(k==='displayTitle') d.title=e.target.value; if(k==='typeConsigne') d.level=e.target.value; persist(); updatePreview(); }; });
  const typeSelect=document.getElementById('nc-typeConsigne-select');
  const typeInput=document.getElementById('nc-typeConsigne');
  if(typeSelect && typeInput){
    typeSelect.onchange=e=>{
      if(!e.target.value) return;
      d.typeConsigne=e.target.value;
      d.level=e.target.value;
      typeInput.value=e.target.value;
      persist();
      updatePreview();
    };
    typeInput.oninput=e=>{
      d.typeConsigne=e.target.value;
      d.level=e.target.value;
      if(typeSelect) typeSelect.value = Array.from(typeSelect.options).some(o=>o.value===e.target.value) ? e.target.value : '';
      persist();
      updatePreview();
    };
  }
  const epi=document.getElementById('nc-epi'); if(epi) epi.oninput=e=>{ d.epi=e.target.value.split(/\n+/).map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean); persist(); updatePreview(); };
}
window.setConsigneMainPhoto = async(file)=>{ if(!file) return; const d=ensureConsigneV4(); d.mainPhotos=[{src:await fileToDataUrl(file), caption:''}]; persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview(); }
window.setConsigneSpecialImage = async(file)=>{ if(!file) return; const d=ensureConsigneV4(); d.specialImage=await fileToDataUrl(file); persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview(); }
window.addConsigneListItem = (key)=>{ const d=ensureConsigneV4(); if(!Array.isArray(d[key])) d[key]=[]; d[key].push(''); persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview(); }
window.updateConsigneArray = (key,i,v)=>{ const d=ensureConsigneV4(); d[key][i]=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeConsigneArray = (key,i)=>{ const d=ensureConsigneV4(); d[key].splice(i,1); persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview(); }
window.addConsigneStepV4 = ()=>{
  const d=ensureConsigneV4();
  d.steps.push(makeConsigneStep());
  persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview();
  setTimeout(()=>{ const editors=document.querySelectorAll('.nc-step-editor'); const last=editors[editors.length-1]; if(last) last.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'}); },50);
}
window.addConsigneStepAfterV4 = (i)=>{
  const d=ensureConsigneV4();
  d.steps.splice(i+1, 0, makeConsigneStep());
  persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview();
  setTimeout(()=>{ const el=document.getElementById('nc-step-editor-'+(i+1)); if(el) el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'}); }, 80);
}
window.removeConsigneStepV4 = (i)=>{
  const d=ensureConsigneV4();
  d.steps.splice(i,1);
  if(!d.steps.length) d.steps.push(makeConsigneStep());
  persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview();
}
window.updateConsigneStepV4 = (i,k,v)=>{
  const d=ensureConsigneV4();
  if(!d.steps[i]) d.steps[i]=makeConsigneStep();
  d.steps[i][k]=v;
  persist(); updatePreview();
}
window.setConsigneStepPhoto = async(i,file)=>{
  if(!file) return;
  const d=ensureConsigneV4();
  if(!d.steps[i]) d.steps[i]=makeConsigneStep();
  const src=await fileToDataUrl(file);
  d.steps[i].photos=[src];
  d.steps[i].photo=src;
  persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview();
}
window.addConsigneStepPhotos = async(i,files)=>{
  if(!files || !files.length) return;
  const d=ensureConsigneV4();
  if(!d.steps[i]) d.steps[i]=makeConsigneStep();
  if(!Array.isArray(d.steps[i].photos)) d.steps[i].photos=[];
  for(const file of files){ d.steps[i].photos.push(await fileToDataUrl(file)); }
  d.steps[i].photo=d.steps[i].photos[0]||'';
  persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview();
  setTimeout(()=>{ const el=document.getElementById('nc-step-editor-'+i); if(el) el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'}); },50);
}
window.removeConsigneStepPhoto = (i,pi)=>{
  const d=ensureConsigneV4();
  if(!d.steps[i]) d.steps[i]=makeConsigneStep();
  if(!Array.isArray(d.steps[i].photos)) d.steps[i].photos=[];
  d.steps[i].photos.splice(pi,1);
  d.steps[i].photo=d.steps[i].photos[0]||'';
  persist(); renderConsigne(); updatePreview();
}

function renderProvisoire(){
  const p = document.getElementById('panel-provisoire'); if(!p) return; const d=state.provisoire; (d.posts||[]).forEach(post=>normalizePhotosArray(post));
  p.innerHTML = `<div class="sheet narrow">
    <div class="band yellow-accent">⚡ Consigne Provisoire</div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="margin:10px 0 12px"><button type="button" class="file-btn" onclick="chooseLogoForTab('provisoire')">Changer logo pour cet onglet</button></div>
    <div class="grid-4">
      <div class="field"><label>Titre</label><input id="p-title" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.title)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Série / référence</label><input id="p-serie" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.serie)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Rédacteur</label><input id="p-author" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.author)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Date</label><input id="p-date" type="date" value="${escapeHtml(d.date)}"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-top:12px"><label>Introduction</label>${richToolbar('p-intro')}<div id="p-intro" class="rich" contenteditable="true">${d.intro||''}</div></div>
    <div class="subband">📌 Postes</div>
    <div>${d.posts.map((post,i)=>`<div class="step">
      <div class="step-head"><div class="step-badge">${escapeHtml(post.name||('Action '+(i+1)))}</div><button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeShortPost(${i})">Supprimer</button></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Action à réaliser</label><input type="text" value="${escapeHtml(post.name)}" oninput="updateShortPost(${i},'name',this.value)"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Texte</label>${richToolbar('p-post-'+i)}<div id="p-post-${i}" class="rich" contenteditable="true">${post.text||''}</div></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Photos liées</label><label class="file-btn">Ajouter photo(s)<input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple class="hidden" onchange="addShortPhotos(${i}, this.files)"></label></div>
      <div class="photo-grid">${(post.photos||[]).map((ph,j)=>`<div class="photo-card"><img src="${ph.src}"><textarea placeholder="Légende" oninput="updateShortPhotoCaption(${i},${j},this.value)">${escapeHtml(ph.caption||'')}</textarea><button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeShortPhoto(${i},${j})">Suppr.</button></div>`).join('')||'<div class="empty">Aucune photo.</div>'}</div>
    </div>`).join('')}</div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:12px"><button type="button" class="yellow" onclick="addShortPost()">+ Ajouter poste à la suite</button></div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-top:12px"><label>Texte de fin</label>${richToolbar('p-footer')}<div id="p-footer" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${d.footer||''}</div></div>
  </div>`;
  ['title','serie','author','date'].forEach(k=>document.getElementById('p-'+k).oninput=e=>{ d[k]=e.target.value; persist(); updatePreview(); });
  d.posts.forEach(post=>normalizePhotosArray(post)); bindRich('p-intro',v=>{d.intro=v;persist();updatePreview();}); bindRich('p-footer',v=>{d.footer=v;persist();updatePreview();}); d.posts.forEach((post,i)=> bindRich('p-post-'+i,v=>{ post.text=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }));
}
window.addShortPost = ()=>{ state.provisoire.posts.push(makeShortPost()); persist(); renderProvisoire(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeShortPost = (i)=>{ state.provisoire.posts.splice(i,1); if(!state.provisoire.posts.length) state.provisoire.posts.push(makeShortPost()); persist(); renderProvisoire(); updatePreview(); }
window.updateShortPost = (i,k,v)=>{ state.provisoire.posts[i][k]=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }
window.addShortPhotos = async(i,files)=>{ for(const f of files){ if(!state.provisoire.posts[i].photos) state.provisoire.posts[i].photos=[]; state.provisoire.posts[i].photos.push({src:await fileToDataUrl(f), caption:''}); } persist(); renderProvisoire(); updatePreview(); }
window.updateShortPhotoCaption = (i,j,v)=>{ state.provisoire.posts[i].photos[j].caption=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeShortPhoto = (i,j)=>{ state.provisoire.posts[i].photos.splice(j,1); persist(); renderProvisoire(); updatePreview(); }

function renderBonnes(){
  const p=document.getElementById('panel-bonnes'); if(!p) return; const d=state.bonnes; (d.items||[]).forEach(it=>normalizePhotosArray(it));
  p.innerHTML = `<div class="sheet narrow"><div class="band yellow-accent">⭐ Bonnes pratiques</div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="margin:10px 0 12px"><button type="button" class="file-btn" onclick="chooseLogoForTab('bonnes')">Changer logo pour cet onglet</button></div>
    <div class="grid-4">
      <div class="field"><label>Titre</label><input id="b-title" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.title)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Zone / poste</label><input id="b-zone" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.zone)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Rédacteur</label><input id="b-author" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.author)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Date</label><input id="b-date" type="date" value="${escapeHtml(d.date)}"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-top:12px"><label>Intro</label>${richToolbar('b-intro')}<div id="b-intro" class="rich" contenteditable="true">${d.intro||''}</div></div>
    <div class="subband">🔁 Actions <button type="button" class="yellow" onclick="addGoodPractice()">+ Ajouter action</button></div>
    <div>${d.items.map((it,i)=>`<div class="step">
      <div class="step-head"><div class="step-badge">Action ${i+1}</div><button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeGoodPractice(${i})">Supprimer</button></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Action</label>${richToolbar('bp-action-'+i)}<div id="bp-action-${i}" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${it.action||''}</div></div>
      <div class="grid-2">
        <div class="field"><label>🔑 Point clé</label>${richToolbar('bp-point-'+i)}<div id="bp-point-${i}" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${it.point||''}</div></div>
        <div class="field"><label>🎯 Raison</label>${richToolbar('bp-raison-'+i)}<div id="bp-raison-${i}" class="rich" contenteditable="true">${it.raison||''}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="field"><label>Photos liées à l'action</label><label class="file-btn">Ajouter photo(s)<input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple class="hidden" onchange="addGoodPracticePhotos(${i}, this.files)"></label></div>
      <div class="photo-grid">${(it.photos||[]).map((ph,j)=>`<div class="photo-card"><img src="${ph.src}"><textarea placeholder="Légende" oninput="updateGoodPracticePhotoCaption(${i},${j},this.value)">${escapeHtml(ph.caption||'')}</textarea><button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeGoodPracticePhoto(${i},${j})">Suppr.</button></div>`).join('')||'<div class="empty">Aucune photo.</div>'}</div>
    </div>`).join('')}</div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:12px"><button type="button" class="yellow" onclick="addGoodPractice()">+ Ajouter pratique à la suite</button></div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-top:12px"><label>Texte de fin</label>${richToolbar('b-footer')}<div id="b-footer" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${d.footer||''}</div></div>
  </div>`;
  ['title','zone','author','date'].forEach(k=>document.getElementById('b-'+k).oninput=e=>{ d[k]=e.target.value; persist(); updatePreview(); });
  d.items.forEach(it=>normalizePhotosArray(it)); bindRich('b-intro',v=>{d.intro=v;persist();updatePreview();}); bindRich('b-footer',v=>{d.footer=v;persist();updatePreview();});
  d.items.forEach((it,i)=>{ bindRich('bp-action-'+i,v=>{it.action=v;persist();updatePreview();}); bindRich('bp-point-'+i,v=>{it.point=v;persist();updatePreview();}); bindRich('bp-raison-'+i,v=>{it.raison=v;persist();updatePreview();}); });
}
window.addGoodPractice = ()=>{ state.bonnes.items.push(makeGoodPractice()); persist(); renderBonnes(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeGoodPractice = (i)=>{ state.bonnes.items.splice(i,1); if(!state.bonnes.items.length) state.bonnes.items.push(makeGoodPractice()); persist(); renderBonnes(); updatePreview(); }
window.addGoodPracticePhotos = async(i,files)=>{ for(const f of files){ if(!state.bonnes.items[i].photos) state.bonnes.items[i].photos=[]; state.bonnes.items[i].photos.push({src:await fileToDataUrl(f), caption:''}); } persist(); renderBonnes(); updatePreview(); }
window.updateGoodPracticePhotoCaption = (i,j,v)=>{ state.bonnes.items[i].photos[j].caption=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeGoodPracticePhoto = (i,j)=>{ state.bonnes.items[i].photos.splice(j,1); persist(); renderBonnes(); updatePreview(); }

function normalizeMaintenanceData(){
  const d = state.maintenance || {};
  if(!d.rows && d.items){
    d.rows = (d.items||[]).map((it,i)=>makeMaintenanceRow(String(i+1).padStart(2,'0'), stripHtml(it.action||''), stripHtml(it.point||''), stripHtml(it.raison||''), ''));
  }
  const fresh = makeMaintenanceDefault();
  state.maintenance = Object.assign({}, fresh, d);
  if(!Array.isArray(state.maintenance.rows) || !state.maintenance.rows.length) state.maintenance.rows = fresh.rows;
  if(!Array.isArray(state.maintenance.epiImages)) state.maintenance.epiImages = [];
  state.maintenance.rows = state.maintenance.rows.map((r,i)=>Object.assign(makeMaintenanceRow(String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')), r||{}));
  state.maintenance.rows.forEach(r=>{
    if(!Array.isArray(r.illustrations)) r.illustrations = [];
    r.illustrations = r.illustrations.map(p=> (typeof p==='string') ? {src:p,w:100} : {src:(p&&p.src)||'', w:(p&&typeof p.w==='number'&&p.w>0)?p.w:100}).filter(p=>p.src);
    if(r.illustration){ r.illustrations.push({src:r.illustration,w:100}); r.illustration=''; }
  });
  return state.maintenance;
}


function normalizeBulletText(value){
  const lines = String(value||'').split(/\n/);
  return lines.map(line=>{
    const trimmed = line.trim();
    if(!trimmed) return '';
    return /^[-•]\s*/.test(trimmed) ? trimmed.replace(/^[-•]\s*/, '• ') : '• '+trimmed;
  }).join('\n');
}
function attachBulletTextarea(el, onChange){
  if(!el) return;
  const save = ()=>{ if(onChange) onChange(el.value); };
  const ensureFirstBullet = ()=>{
    if(el.value.trim() && !/^\s*[-•]\s*/.test(el.value)){
      const pos = el.selectionStart || el.value.length;
      el.value = normalizeBulletText(el.value);
      const npos = Math.min(el.value.length, pos + 2);
      el.setSelectionRange(npos, npos);
      save();
    }
  };
  el.addEventListener('focus', ensureFirstBullet);
  el.addEventListener('input', ()=>{
    if(el.value.trim()){
      const before = el.value;
      if(!/^\s*[-•]\s*/.test(before) || before.split(/\n/).some(l=>l.trim() && !/^[-•]\s*/.test(l.trim()))){
        const pos = el.selectionStart || before.length;
        el.value = normalizeBulletText(before);
        const delta = el.value.length - before.length;
        const npos = Math.max(0, Math.min(el.value.length, pos + delta));
        el.setSelectionRange(npos, npos);
      }
    }
    save();
  });
  el.addEventListener('keydown', (e)=>{
    if(e.key === 'Enter'){
      e.preventDefault();
      const start = el.selectionStart;
      const end = el.selectionEnd;
      const insert = '\n• ';
      el.value = el.value.slice(0,start) + insert + el.value.slice(end);
      const pos = start + insert.length;
      el.setSelectionRange(pos,pos);
      save();
    }
  });
  if(el.value.trim()) el.value = normalizeBulletText(el.value);
  save();
}

/* ── SVG Pictos EPI Bandeau Sécurité Maintenance ── */
function _epiSvgGants(){
  return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 36 36" width="36" height="36">
    <circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" fill="#0f3d8c"/>
    <!-- Gant de protection : main gauche vue de face -->
    <g fill="#fff">
      <!-- Paume -->
      <rect x="11" y="17" width="14" height="9" rx="2.5"/>
      <!-- Pouce -->
      <rect x="8" y="14" width="5" height="5" rx="2"/>
      <!-- Doigt index -->
      <rect x="11" y="10" width="3.2" height="8" rx="1.6"/>
      <!-- Doigt majeur -->
      <rect x="14.9" y="9" width="3.2" height="9" rx="1.6"/>
      <!-- Doigt annulaire -->
      <rect x="18.8" y="10" width="3.2" height="8" rx="1.6"/>
      <!-- Doigt auriculaire -->
      <rect x="22.7" y="11.5" width="2.8" height="7" rx="1.4"/>
      <!-- Manchette -->
      <rect x="11" y="24" width="14" height="4" rx="1.5"/>
    </g>
  </svg>`;
}
function _epiSvgLunettes(){
  return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 36 36" width="36" height="36">
    <circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" fill="#0f3d8c"/>
    <g fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2">
      <!-- Verre gauche -->
      <rect x="5" y="14" width="10" height="8" rx="3" stroke-width="2.2"/>
      <!-- Verre droit -->
      <rect x="21" y="14" width="10" height="8" rx="3" stroke-width="2.2"/>
      <!-- Pont central -->
      <path d="M15 18 Q18 16 21 18" stroke-width="2"/>
      <!-- Branche gauche -->
      <path d="M5 17 Q3 15 3 13" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <!-- Branche droite -->
      <path d="M31 17 Q33 15 33 13" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>
  </svg>`;
}
function _epiSvgChaussures(){
  return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 36 36" width="36" height="36">
    <circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" fill="#0f3d8c"/>
    <g fill="#fff">
      <!-- Semelle -->
      <rect x="6" y="24" width="24" height="3" rx="1.5"/>
      <!-- Tige chaussure -->
      <path d="M8 24 L8 16 Q8 12 13 12 L18 12 Q22 12 22 16 L22 20 L28 20 Q30 20 30 22 L30 24 Z" fill="#fff"/>
      <!-- Renfrot bout acier -->
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="21" rx="3.5" ry="2.5" fill="#c8d8f0"/>
      <!-- Lacet -->
      <path d="M13 13 Q15 15 17 13 Q19 15 21 13" fill="none" stroke="#0f3d8c" stroke-width="1.2"/>
    </g>
  </svg>`;
}
function _epiSvgBouchons(){
  return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 36 36" width="36" height="36">
    <circle cx="18" cy="18" r="18" fill="#0f3d8c"/>
    <g fill="#fff">
      <!-- Bouchon gauche (ovale) -->
      <ellipse cx="11" cy="19" rx="3.5" ry="6"/>
      <!-- Fil/arche reliant les deux bouchons par le dessus -->
      <path d="M11 13 Q18 8 25 13" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <!-- Bouchon droit (ovale) -->
      <ellipse cx="25" cy="19" rx="3.5" ry="6"/>
    </g>
  </svg>`;
}

function renderMaintenance(){
  const p=document.getElementById('panel-maintenance'); const d=normalizeMaintenanceData();
  p.innerHTML = `<div class="sheet narrow"><div class="band yellow-accent">🛠️ Maintenance 1er niveau — trame affichage atelier</div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="margin:10px 0 12px"><button type="button" class="file-btn" onclick="chooseLogoForTab('maintenance')">Changer logo pour cet onglet</button></div>
    <div id="m-sec-header" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="grid-4">

    <div class="block" style="margin-top:12px">
      <div class="subband">🧤 Pictos modifiables du bandeau titre / sécurité</div>
      <div class="muted" style="margin-bottom:8px">Charge ici les pictos du bandeau noir de Maintenance 1er Niveau. Tu peux en ajouter plusieurs, les supprimer et les adapter selon chaque machine.</div>
      <div class="toolbar"><label class="file-btn">+ Charger / modifier les pictos du bandeau<input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple class="hidden" onchange="addMaintenanceEpiImages(this.files)"></label></div>
      <div class="maint-epi-editor-grid">${(d.epiImages||[]).map((src,i)=>`<div class="maint-epi-editor-card"><img src="${src}"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeMaintenanceEpiImage(${i})">Suppr.</button></div>`).join('') || '<span class="empty">Aucun picto chargé : le bandeau utilisera les 4 pictos par défaut.</span>'}</div>
    </div>
    ${d.machineImage?`<div class="maint-v2-photo-preview"><img src="${d.machineImage}"></div>`:''}
    <div id="m-sec-rows" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="subband" style="margin-top:18px">📋 Contrôles à effectuer</div>
    <div>${d.rows.map((row,i)=>`<div class="maint-v2-editor-card">
      <div class="maint-v2-editor-head"><strong>Contrôle ${escapeHtml(row.number||String(i+1).padStart(2,'0'))}</strong><button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeMaintenanceRow(${i})">Supprimer</button></div>
      <div class="grid-2">
        <div class="field"><label>Numéro</label><input id="m-row-number-${i}" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(row.number||'')}"></div>

        <div class="field"><label>Contrôles à effectuer</label><textarea id="m-row-controls-${i}" class="bullet-textarea" placeholder="• Écrire un contrôle puis Entrée pour une nouvelle pastille">${escapeHtml(row.controls||'')}</textarea><div class="bullet-hint">Entrée = nouvelle pastille automatique</div></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Pourquoi</label><textarea id="m-row-why-${i}">${escapeHtml(row.why||'')}</textarea></div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-2" style="margin-top:10px">

        <div class="field"><label>Illustration(s)</label><label class="file-btn">+ Charger illustration(s)<input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple class="hidden" onchange="addMaintenanceRowImages(${i}, this.files)"></label>${(row.illustrations||[]).length?`<div class="maint-illus-editor-grid">${row.illustrations.map((ph,j)=>`<div class="maint-illus-editor-card"><div class="maint-illus-thumb"><img id="m-illus-thumb-${i}-${j}" src="${ph.src}" style="width:${ph.w||100}%"></div><div class="maint-illus-size"><span>Taille</span><input type="range" min="20" max="100" step="5" value="${ph.w||100}" oninput="setMaintenanceRowPhotoWidth(${i},${j},this.value)"><span id="m-illus-pct-${i}-${j}" class="maint-illus-pct">${ph.w||100}%</span></div><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeMaintenanceRowPhoto(${i},${j})">Suppr.</button></div>`).join('')}</div>`:'<div class="empty">Aucune illustration.</div>'}</div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('')}</div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:12px"><button type="button" class="yellow" onclick="addMaintenanceRow()">+ Ajouter un contrôle à la suite</button></div>
  </div>`;
  ['title','machine','subtitle','secteur','poste','duree','slogan','footer'].forEach(k=>{
    const el=document.getElementById('m-'+k); if(el) el.oninput=e=>{ d[k]=e.target.value; persist(); updatePreview(); };
  });
  d.rows.forEach((row,i)=>{
    ['number','title','why','risk'].forEach(k=>{
