window.addMaintenanceRow = ()=>{ const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); d.rows.push(makeMaintenanceRow(String(d.rows.length+1).padStart(2,'0'))); persist(); renderMaintenance(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeMaintenanceRow = (i)=>{ const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); d.rows.splice(i,1); if(!d.rows.length) d.rows.push(makeMaintenanceRow('01')); persist(); renderMaintenance(); updatePreview(); }
window.setMaintenanceRowImage = async(i,file)=>{ if(!file) return; const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); d.rows[i].illustration = await fileToDataUrl(file); persist(); renderMaintenance(); updatePreview(); }
window.clearMaintenanceRowImage = (i)=>{ const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); d.rows[i].illustration=''; persist(); renderMaintenance(); updatePreview(); }
window.addMaintenanceRowImages = async(i,files)=>{ if(!files||!files.length) return; const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); if(!Array.isArray(d.rows[i].illustrations)) d.rows[i].illustrations=[]; for(const f of files){ if(!f) continue; d.rows[i].illustrations.push({src: await fileToDataUrl(f), w:100}); } persist(); renderMaintenance(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeMaintenanceRowPhoto = (i,j)=>{ const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); if(Array.isArray(d.rows[i].illustrations)) d.rows[i].illustrations.splice(j,1); persist(); renderMaintenance(); updatePreview(); }
window.setMaintenanceRowPhotoWidth = (i,j,val)=>{ const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); const w=Math.max(20,Math.min(100,parseInt(val,10)||100)); if(d.rows[i].illustrations&&d.rows[i].illustrations[j]) d.rows[i].illustrations[j].w=w; persist(); const thumb=document.getElementById(`m-illus-thumb-${i}-${j}`); if(thumb) thumb.style.width=w+'%'; const pct=document.getElementById(`m-illus-pct-${i}-${j}`); if(pct) pct.textContent=w+'%'; updatePreview(); }
window.setMaintenanceMachineImage = async(file)=>{ if(!file) return; const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); d.machineImage = await fileToDataUrl(file); persist(); renderMaintenance(); updatePreview(); }
window.addMaintenanceEpiImages = async(files)=>{ const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); for(const f of files){ d.epiImages.push(await fileToDataUrl(f)); } persist(); renderMaintenance(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeMaintenanceEpiImage = (i)=>{ const d=normalizeMaintenanceData(); d.epiImages.splice(i,1); persist(); renderMaintenance(); updatePreview(); }
function maintenanceEpiHtml(){
  const d = normalizeMaintenanceData();
  const imgs = Array.isArray(d.epiImages) ? d.epiImages.filter(Boolean) : [];
  if(imgs.length){
    return imgs.map(src=>`<span class="maint-v2-epi"><img src="${src}"></span>`).join('');
  }
  return `<span class="maint-v2-epi">${_epiSvgGants()}</span><span class="maint-v2-epi">${_epiSvgLunettes()}</span><span class="maint-v2-epi">${_epiSvgChaussures()}</span><span class="maint-v2-epi">${_epiSvgBouchons()}</span>`;
}

function renderDiagnostic(){
  const p=document.getElementById('panel-diagnostic'); const d=state.diagnostic; (d.items||[]).forEach(normalizeDiagnosticPhotos);
  p.innerHTML = `<div class="sheet narrow"><div class="band yellow-accent">🧭 Aide au diagnostic</div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="margin:10px 0 12px"><button type="button" class="file-btn" onclick="chooseLogoForTab('diagnostic')">Changer logo pour cet onglet</button></div>
    <div id="d-sec-header" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="grid-4">
      <div class="field"><label>Titre du diagnostic</label><input id="d-title" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.title)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Zone / machine / poste</label><input id="d-zone" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.zone)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Rédacteur</label><input id="d-author" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.author)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Date</label><input id="d-date" type="date" value="${escapeHtml(d.date)}"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="d-sec-problem" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="field" style="margin-top:12px"><label>Problème rencontré</label>${richToolbar('d-problem')}<div id="d-problem" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${d.problem||''}</div></div>
    <div class="grid-2" style="margin-top:12px">
      <div class="field"><label>Symptômes observés</label>${richToolbar('d-symptoms')}<div id="d-symptoms" class="rich" contenteditable="true">${d.symptoms||''}</div></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Impact</label>${richToolbar('d-impact')}<div id="d-impact" class="rich" contenteditable="true">${d.impact||''}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div id="d-sec-steps" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="subband">🧪 Étapes de diagnostic</div>
    <div id="diagnostic-steps"></div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:12px"><button type="button" class="yellow" onclick="addDiagnosticStep()">+ Ajouter une étape à la suite</button></div>
    <div class="field" style="margin-top:12px"><label>Texte de fin</label>${richToolbar('d-footer')}<div id="d-footer" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${d.footer||''}</div></div>
  </div>`;
  ['title','zone','author','date'].forEach(k=>document.getElementById('d-'+k).oninput=e=>{ d[k]=e.target.value; persist(); updatePreview(); });
  bindRich('d-problem',v=>{d.problem=v;persist();updatePreview();}); bindRich('d-symptoms',v=>{d.symptoms=v;persist();updatePreview();}); bindRich('d-impact',v=>{d.impact=v;persist();updatePreview();}); bindRich('d-footer',v=>{d.footer=v;persist();updatePreview();});
  const host = p.querySelector('#diagnostic-steps');
  host.innerHTML = d.items.map((it,i)=>`<div class="step">
      <div class="step-head"><div class="step-badge" style="background:#111827;color:#fff">🔎 Étape ${i+1}</div><button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeDiagnosticStep(${i})">Supprimer</button></div>
      <div class="diagnostic-grid" style="margin-top:10px">
        <div class="field"><label>🔍 JE VÉRIFIE</label>${richToolbar('diag-check-'+i)}<div id="diag-check-${i}" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${it.check||''}</div></div>
        <div class="field"><label>🎯 CAUSE PROBABLE</label>${richToolbar('diag-cause-'+i)}<div id="diag-cause-${i}" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${it.cause||''}</div></div>
        <div class="field"><label>🛠 ACTION À FAIRE</label>${richToolbar('diag-action-'+i)}<div id="diag-action-${i}" class="rich" contenteditable="true">${it.action||''}</div></div>
        <div class="field"><label>⛔ J’ALERTE SI</label>${richToolbar('diag-alert-'+i)}<div id="diag-alert-${i}" class="rich" contenteditable="true">${it.alert||''}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="diagnostic-grid" style="margin-top:10px">
        <div class="field"><label>✅ SI OK</label>${richToolbar('diag-ok-'+i)}<div id="diag-ok-${i}" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${it.ok||''}</div></div>
        <div class="field"><label>❌ SI KO</label>${richToolbar('diag-ko-'+i)}<div id="diag-ko-${i}" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${it.ko||''}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="field"><label>Photos / visuels</label><label class="file-btn">Ajouter photo<input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple class="hidden" onchange="addDiagnosticPhotos(${i}, this.files); this.value=''"></label></div>
      <div class="photo-grid">${(it.photos||[]).length?it.photos.map((p,pi)=>{
        const src = (typeof p === 'string') ? p : p.src;
        const tag = (typeof p === 'object' && p && p.tag) ? p.tag : 'zone';
        return `<div class="photo-card diag-photo-card diag-${tag}">
          <img src="${src}">
          <select onchange="setDiagnosticPhotoTag(${i},${pi},this.value)" style="margin-top:8px;width:100%">
            <option value="ok"${tag==='ok'?' selected':''}>OK</option>
            <option value="nok"${tag==='nok'?' selected':''}>NOK</option>
            <option value="zone"${tag==='zone'?' selected':''}>Zone à contrôler</option>
          </select>
          <button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeDiagnosticPhoto(${i},${pi})" style="margin-top:8px">Suppr.</button>
        </div>`;
      }).join(''):'<div class="empty">Aucune photo.</div>'}</div>
    </div>`).join('');
  d.items.forEach((it,i)=>{
    bindRich('diag-check-'+i,v=>{it.check=v;persist();updatePreview();});
    bindRich('diag-cause-'+i,v=>{it.cause=v;persist();updatePreview();});
    bindRich('diag-action-'+i,v=>{it.action=v;persist();updatePreview();});
    bindRich('diag-alert-'+i,v=>{it.alert=v;persist();updatePreview();});
    bindRich('diag-ok-'+i,v=>{it.ok=v;persist();updatePreview();});
    bindRich('diag-ko-'+i,v=>{it.ko=v;persist();updatePreview();});
  });
}
window.addDiagnosticStep = ()=>{ state.diagnostic.items.push(makeDiagnosticStep()); persist(); renderDiagnostic(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeDiagnosticStep = (i)=>{ state.diagnostic.items.splice(i,1); if(!state.diagnostic.items.length) state.diagnostic.items.push(makeDiagnosticStep()); persist(); renderDiagnostic(); updatePreview(); }
window.addDiagnosticPhotos = async(i,files)=>{
  if(!files || !files.length) return;
  for(const file of files){
    const data = await fileToDataUrl(file);
    if(!state.diagnostic.items[i].photos) state.diagnostic.items[i].photos=[];
    state.diagnostic.items[i].photos.push({src:data, tag:'zone'});
  }
  persist(); renderDiagnostic(); updatePreview();
}
window.setDiagnosticPhotoTag = (i,pi,tag)=>{
  const current = state.diagnostic.items[i].photos[pi];
  if(typeof current === 'string'){
    state.diagnostic.items[i].photos[pi] = {src: current, tag};
  } else {
    state.diagnostic.items[i].photos[pi].tag = tag;
  }
  persist(); renderDiagnostic(); updatePreview();
}
window.removeDiagnosticPhoto = (i,pi)=>{
  state.diagnostic.items[i].photos.splice(pi,1);
  persist(); renderDiagnostic(); updatePreview();
}


function ensureFicheSecuriteMachine(){
  if(!state.fiche || typeof state.fiche !== 'object') state.fiche = {};
  const d = state.fiche;
  d.number = d.number || '001';
  d.date = d.date || '';
  d.machine = d.machine || '';
  d.gmao = d.gmao || '';
  d.brandType = d.brandType || '';
  d.material = d.material || '';
  d.epi = d.epi || '';
  d.qualification = d.qualification || '';
  d.machinePhoto = d.machinePhoto || '';
  if(!Array.isArray(d.machinePhotos)) d.machinePhotos = d.machinePhoto ? [{src:d.machinePhoto, caption:''}] : [];
  if(!Array.isArray(d.risks) || !d.risks.length) d.risks = [makeRisk()];
  d.risks = d.risks.map(r => ({
    task: r?.task || '',
    danger: r?.danger || '',
    gravity: r?.gravity || '',
    prevention: r?.prevention || '',
    picto: r?.picto || '',
    selected: Array.isArray(r?.selected) ? r.selected : []
  }));
  d.accident = d.accident || "En cas d'accident, alerter un secouriste du travail et/ou le chef d'équipe et/ou le Team Leader.";
  d.incendie = d.incendie || "En cas d'incendie, alerter le chef d'équipe et/ou le Team Leader.";
  d.accidentIcon = d.accidentIcon || '';
  d.incendieIcon = d.incendieIcon || '';
  return d;
}

function renderFiche(){
  const p=document.getElementById('panel-fiche'); const d=state.fiche; normalizeMainPhotos(d);
  p.innerHTML = `<div class="sheet"><div class="band yellow-accent">🦺 Fiches sécurité machine</div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="margin:10px 0 12px"><button type="button" class="file-btn" onclick="chooseLogoForTab('fiche')">Changer logo pour cet onglet</button></div>
    <div class="muted" style="margin-bottom:10px">Format visuel A4 pour affichage opérateur à proximité de la machine.</div>
    <div id="f-sec-photo" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="doc-card machine-layout">
      <div class="machine-photo-box">
        <div class="subband">📷 Photo machine</div>
        <div class="muted" style="margin-bottom:8px">Photo de la machine</div>
        <div class="machine-photo-main">${(d.machinePhotos||[]).length?`<div class="photo-grid">${d.machinePhotos.map((ph,j)=>`<div class="photo-card"><img src="${ph.src}"><textarea placeholder="Légende" oninput="updateMachinePhotoCaption(${j},this.value)">${escapeHtml(ph.caption||'')}</textarea><button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeMachinePhoto(${j})">Suppr.</button></div>`).join('')}</div>`:'<span class="muted">Aucune photo pour le moment</span>'}</div>
        <div class="toolbar" style="margin-top:10px"><label class="file-btn">+ Ajouter photo(s)<input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple class="hidden" onchange="addMachinePhotos(this.files)"></label></div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div id="f-sec-id" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="block machine-head">
          <div class="band band-inline fiche-machine-title" style="margin:0"><span>🛡️ FICHE SÉCURITÉ MACHINE</span><span class="num-badge">${escapeHtml(d.number||'001')}</span></div>
          <div class="grid-3" style="margin-top:12px">
            <div class="field"><label>N° fiche</label><input id="f-number" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.number)}" placeholder="Ex : 001"></div>
            <div class="field"><label>Date</label><input id="f-date" type="date" value="${escapeHtml(d.date)}"></div>
            <div class="field"><label>Machine</label><input id="f-machine" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.machine)}"></div>
            <div class="field"><label>N° GMAO</label><input id="f-gmao" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.gmao)}"></div>
            <div class="field"><label>Marque / Type</label><input id="f-brandType" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.brandType)}"></div>
            <div class="field"><label>Produit ou matériaux à utiliser</label><input id="f-material" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.material)}"></div>
            <div class="field"><label>EPI spécifique au poste</label><input id="f-epi" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.epi)}"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field" style="margin-top:12px"><label>Qualification et autorisation</label>${richToolbar('f-qualification')}<div id="f-qualification" class="rich single" contenteditable="true">${d.qualification||''}</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="f-sec-risks" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="block">
      <div class="subband">⚠️ Analyse des risques <button type="button" class="yellow" onclick="addRiskRow()">+ Ajouter un risque</button></div>
      <div class="muted" style="margin:8px 0 10px 0">Charge ton dossier <strong>pictos</strong> avec des noms de fichiers simples, par exemple : <em>coupure.png</em>, <em>ecrasement.png</em>, <em>risque electrique.png</em>.</div>
      <table class="risk-table"><thead><tr><th>Tâches exposant l'opérateur à un risque</th><th>Risque / dangers</th><th>Mesures de prévention / opérations ou procédures à respecter</th><th>Action</th></tr></thead><tbody>
      ${d.risks.map((r,i)=>`<tr>
        <td><textarea oninput="updateRisk(${i},'task',this.value)">${escapeHtml(r.task)}</textarea></td>
        <td>
          <select onchange="addRiskSelection(${i}, this.value)">
            <option value="">Choisir un risque…</option>
            ${Object.keys(state.pictos).sort((a,b)=>pictoLabel(a).localeCompare(pictoLabel(b),'fr')).map(name=>`<option value="${escapeHtml(name)}">${escapeHtml(pictoLabel(name))}</option>`).join('')}
          </select>
          <div style="margin-top:8px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px">${r.selected.map(name=>`<span class="risk-pill fiche-risk-pill">${state.pictos[name]?`<img src="${state.pictos[name]}" style="width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;min-height:18px;object-fit:contain;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;background:transparent">`:''}${escapeHtml(pictoLabel(name))} <button type="button" onclick="removeRiskSelection(${i},'${escapeHtml(name)}')">×</button></span>`).join('')||'<span class="empty">Aucun risque choisi.</span>'}</div>
        </td>
        <td>${richToolbar('risk-prev-'+i)}<div id="risk-prev-${i}" class="rich" contenteditable="true">${r.prevention||''}</div></td>
        <td><button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeRiskRow(${i})">Suppr.</button></td>
      </tr>`).join('')}
      </tbody></table>
    </div>

    <div id="f-sec-alerts" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="alert-box">
      <div class="alert-row">
        <div class="alert-icon">${d.accidentIcon?`<img src="${d.accidentIcon}">`:''}</div>
        <div>
          <div class="toolbar noprint" style="margin:0 0 8px 0"><label class="file-btn">Icône<input type="file" accept="image/*" class="hidden" onchange="uploadAlertIcon('accidentIcon', this.files[0])"></label></div>
          ${richToolbar('f-accident')}<div id="f-accident" class="rich single alert-text green" contenteditable="true">${d.accident||''}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="section-line"></div>
      <div class="alert-row">
        <div class="alert-icon">${d.incendieIcon?`<img src="${d.incendieIcon}">`:''}</div>
        <div>
          <div class="toolbar noprint" style="margin:0 0 8px 0"><label class="file-btn">Icône<input type="file" accept="image/*" class="hidden" onchange="uploadAlertIcon('incendieIcon', this.files[0])"></label></div>
          ${richToolbar('f-incendie')}<div id="f-incendie" class="rich single alert-text red" contenteditable="true">${d.incendie||''}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  ['number','date','machine','gmao','brandType','material','epi'].forEach(k=> document.getElementById('f-'+k).oninput=e=>{ d[k]=e.target.value; persist(); updatePreview(); });
  bindRich('f-qualification',v=>{d.qualification=v;persist();updatePreview();}); bindRich('f-accident',v=>{d.accident=v;persist();updatePreview();}); bindRich('f-incendie',v=>{d.incendie=v;persist();updatePreview();}); d.risks.forEach((r,i)=> bindRich('risk-prev-'+i,v=>{ r.prevention=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }));
}
window.addMachinePhotos = async(files)=>{ for(const f of files){ if(!state.fiche.machinePhotos) state.fiche.machinePhotos=[]; state.fiche.machinePhotos.push({src:await fileToDataUrl(f), caption:''}); } persist(); renderFiche(); updatePreview(); }
window.updateMachinePhotoCaption = (j,v)=>{ state.fiche.machinePhotos[j].caption=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeMachinePhoto = (j)=>{ state.fiche.machinePhotos.splice(j,1); persist(); renderFiche(); updatePreview(); }
window.addRiskRow = ()=>{ state.fiche.risks.push(makeRisk()); persist(); renderFiche(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeRiskRow = (i)=>{ state.fiche.risks.splice(i,1); if(!state.fiche.risks.length) state.fiche.risks.push(makeRisk()); persist(); renderFiche(); updatePreview(); }
window.updateRisk = (i,k,v)=>{ state.fiche.risks[i][k]=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }
window.addRiskSelection = (i,name)=>{ if(!name) return; if(!state.fiche.risks[i].selected.includes(name)) state.fiche.risks[i].selected.push(name); persist(); renderFiche(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeRiskSelection = (i,name)=>{ state.fiche.risks[i].selected = state.fiche.risks[i].selected.filter(x=>x!==name); persist(); renderFiche(); updatePreview(); }
window.uploadAlertIcon = async(key,file)=>{ if(!file) return; state.fiche[key]=await fileToDataUrl(file); persist(); renderFiche(); updatePreview(); }

function makeSecurityDefault(){
  return {
    title:'CONSIGNE SÉCURITÉ',
    subtitle:'À RESPECTER IMPÉRATIVEMENT',
    date:'',
    poste:'',
    equipment:'',
    localisation:'',
    dangerTitle:'SITUATION DANGEREUSE',
    dangerSubtitle:'Repérer la zone de danger',
    mainPhoto:'',
    photos:[],
    neverTitle:'NE JAMAIS',
    neverItems:['Mettre les mains dans la zone dangereuse','Retirer ou neutraliser une protection','Intervenir machine en marche'],
    mandatoryTitle:'OBLIGATOIRE',
    mandatoryItems:['Utiliser les protections prévues','Vérifier la zone avant intervention','Maintenir la zone propre et dégagée'],
    risks:['Coupure / sectionnement','Écrasement / pincement','Projection','Bruit','Chute de pièces'],
    epi:['Manchettes'],
    incident:['Stopper immédiatement la machine','Alerter le responsable','Ne pas redémarrer sans validation','Appliquer les premiers secours si nécessaire'],
    accidentText:'PRÉVENIR IMMÉDIATEMENT',
    emergencyNumber:'112',
    dejaTitle:'DÉJÀ ARRIVÉ !',
    dejaText:'Accident / presqu’accident déjà constaté dans l’atelier',
    footer:'LA SÉCURITÉ DÉPEND DE CHACUN, RESPECTONS CETTE CONSIGNE !'
  };
}
function ensureSecurityData(){
  const d = state.securite || (state.securite = makeSecurityDefault());
  const def = makeSecurityDefault();
  Object.keys(def).forEach(k=>{
    if(d[k]===undefined || d[k]===null || d[k]==='') d[k]=def[k];
    if(Array.isArray(def[k]) && !Array.isArray(d[k])) d[k]=def[k].slice();
  });
  if(!Array.isArray(d.cards) || !d.cards.length){
    d.cards = [
      {type:'never', title:d.neverTitle||'NE JAMAIS', items:Array.isArray(d.neverItems)?d.neverItems.slice():[]},
      {type:'mandatory', title:d.mandatoryTitle||'OBLIGATOIRE', items:Array.isArray(d.mandatoryItems)?d.mandatoryItems.slice():[]},
      {type:'risks', title:'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX', items:Array.isArray(d.risks)?d.risks.slice():[]}
    ];
  }
  if(!Array.isArray(d.photos)) d.photos = d.mainPhoto ? [d.mainPhoto] : [];
  d.photos=d.photos.filter(Boolean);
  if(d.mainPhoto && !d.photos.length) d.photos.push(d.mainPhoto);
  d.cards = d.cards.map(c=>({
    type:c?.type||'risks',
    title:c?.title || (c?.type==='never'?'NE JAMAIS':c?.type==='mandatory'?'OBLIGATOIRE':'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX'),
    items:Array.isArray(c?.items)?c.items:[]
  }));
  return d;
}
function secListEditor(key,label){
  const d=ensureSecurityData();
  return `<div class="field"><label>${label}</label><div class="sec-list">${(d[key]||[]).map((x,i)=>`<div class="sec-list-row"><input type="text" value="${escapeHtml(x)}" oninput="updateSecurityArray('${key}',${i},this.value)"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeSecurityArray('${key}',${i})">×</button></div>`).join('')}</div><button type="button" class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addSecurityArray('${key}')">+ Ajouter</button></div>`;
}

function secEpiEditor(){
  const d=ensureSecurityData();
  const options = Object.keys(state.pictos||{}).sort((a,b)=>pictoLabel(a).localeCompare(pictoLabel(b),'fr')).map(name=>`<option value="${escapeHtml(name)}">${escapeHtml(pictoLabel(name))}</option>`).join('');
  return `<div class="field">
    <label>EPI spécifiques</label>
    <div class="sec-epi-select-wrap">
      <select id="sec-epi-select">
        <option value="">Choisir un EPI / picto…</option>
        ${options}
      </select>
      <button type="button" class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addSecurityEpiFromSelect()">+ Ajouter</button>
    </div>
    <div class="muted">Charge d’abord ton dossier pictos, puis sélectionne les EPI à afficher.</div>
    <div class="sec-epi-pill-wrap">${(d.epi||[]).map((name,i)=>`<span class="sec-epi-pill">${state.pictos[name]?`<img src="${state.pictos[name]}">`:''}${escapeHtml(pictoLabel(name))}<button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeSecurityEpi(${i})">×</button></span>`).join('') || '<span class="empty">Aucun EPI spécifique sélectionné.</span>'}</div>
  </div>`;
}

function secCardEditor(ci,c){
  const typeOptions = [
    ['never','Ne jamais'],
    ['mandatory','Obligatoire'],
    ['risks','Risques principaux']
  ].map(([v,l])=>`<option value="${v}" ${c.type===v?'selected':''}>${l}</option>`).join('');

  const pictoOptions = Object.keys(state.pictos||{})
    .sort((a,b)=>pictoLabel(a).localeCompare(pictoLabel(b),'fr'))
    .map(name=>`<option value="${escapeHtml(name)}">${escapeHtml(pictoLabel(name))}</option>`)
    .join('');

  const itemsEditor = c.type === 'risks'
    ? `<div class="field" style="margin-top:10px">
        <label>Risques / dangers</label>
        <div class="sec-epi-select-wrap">
          <select id="sec-risk-select-${ci}">
            <option value="">Choisir un risque / picto…</option>
            ${pictoOptions}
          </select>
          <button type="button" class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addSecurityRiskFromSelect(${ci})">+ Ajouter</button>
        </div>
        <div class="muted">Charge d’abord ton dossier pictos, puis sélectionne les risques à afficher.</div>
        <div class="sec-epi-pill-wrap">${(c.items||[]).map((name,ii)=>`<span class="sec-epi-pill">${state.pictos[name]?`<img src="${state.pictos[name]}">`:''}${escapeHtml(pictoLabel(name))}<button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeSecurityCardItem(${ci},${ii})">×</button></span>`).join('') || '<span class="empty">Aucun risque sélectionné.</span>'}</div>
      </div>`
    : `<div class="field" style="margin-top:10px">
        <label>Lignes de l’encart</label>
        <button type="button" class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addSecurityCardItem(${ci})">+ Ajouter une ligne</button>
        <div class="sec-list" style="margin-top:10px">${(c.items||[]).map((x,ii)=>`<div class="sec-list-row"><input type="text" value="${escapeHtml(x)}" oninput="updateSecurityCardItem(${ci},${ii},this.value)"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeSecurityCardItem(${ci},${ii})">×</button></div>`).join('')}</div>
      </div>`;

  return `<div class="block">
    <div class="step-head"><strong>Encart ${ci+1}</strong><button type="button" class="danger" onclick="removeSecurityCard(${ci})">Supprimer</button></div>
    <div class="grid-2" style="margin-top:10px">
      <div class="field"><label>Type</label><select onchange="updateSecurityCard(${ci},'type',this.value)">${typeOptions}</select></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Titre affiché</label><input type="text" value="${escapeHtml(c.title||'')}" oninput="updateSecurityCard(${ci},'title',this.value)"></div>
    </div>
    ${itemsEditor}
  </div>`;
}

function renderSecurite(){
  const p=document.getElementById('panel-securite'); if(!p) return;
  const d=ensureSecurityData();
  p.innerHTML = `<div class="sheet narrow">
    <div class="band yellow-accent">🚨 Consigne sécurité visuelle</div>
    <div class="toolbar" style="margin:10px 0 12px"><button type="button" class="file-btn" onclick="chooseLogoForTab('securite')">Changer logo pour cet onglet</button></div>
    <div id="s-sec-header" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="sec-editor-grid">
      <div class="field"><label>Titre</label><input id="s-title" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.title)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Sous-titre</label><input id="s-subtitle" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.subtitle)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Date</label><input id="s-date" type="date" value="${escapeHtml(d.date)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Rédigé par</label><input id="s-author" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.author||'')}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Équipement / ligne / zone</label><input id="s-equipment" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.equipment)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Localisation</label><input id="s-localisation" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.localisation)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Titre situation dangereuse</label><input id="s-dangerTitle" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.dangerTitle)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Sous-titre situation</label><input id="s-dangerSubtitle" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.dangerSubtitle)}"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="s-sec-photo" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="grid-2" style="margin-top:12px">
      <div class="field"><label>Photos / zone de danger</label><label class="file-btn">+ Ajouter photo(s)<input class="hidden" type="file" accept="image/*" multiple onchange="addSecurityPhotos(this.files)"></label><div class="sec-photo-grid">${(d.photos||[]).map((ph,i)=>`<div class="sec-photo-card"><img src="${ph}"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" onclick="removeSecurityPhoto(${i})">Supprimer</button></div>`).join('') || '<div class="sec-mini-photo">Photo principale</div>'}</div></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Bas de page / slogan</label><textarea id="s-footer">${escapeHtml(d.footer)}</textarea></div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid-2" style="margin-top:12px">
      <div id="s-sec-cards" class="nav-section-anchor"></div><div class="field" style="grid-column:1 / -1"><label>Encarts sécurité modulables</label><button type="button" class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addSecurityCard()">+ Ajouter un encart</button>${(d.cards||[]).map((c,ci)=>secCardEditor(ci,c)).join('')}</div>
      ${secEpiEditor()}
      <div id="s-sec-bottom" class="nav-section-anchor"></div>${secListEditor('incident','Conduite à tenir')}
      <div class="field"><label>Accident / urgence</label><input id="s-accidentText" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.accidentText)}"><label>Numéro urgence</label><input id="s-emergencyNumber" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.emergencyNumber)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Encart déjà arrivé - titre</label><input id="s-dejaTitle" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(d.dejaTitle)}"><label>Texte</label><textarea id="s-dejaText">${escapeHtml(d.dejaText)}</textarea></div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  ['title','subtitle','date','author','equipment','localisation','dangerTitle','dangerSubtitle','footer','accidentText','emergencyNumber','dejaTitle','dejaText'].forEach(k=>{
    const el=document.getElementById('s-'+k); if(el) el.oninput=e=>{ d[k]=e.target.value; persist(); updatePreview(); };
  });
}
window.addSecurityArray = (key)=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); if(!Array.isArray(d[key])) d[key]=[]; d[key].push(''); persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }
window.updateSecurityArray = (key,i,v)=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); d[key][i]=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeSecurityArray = (key,i)=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); d[key].splice(i,1); persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }
window.addSecurityCard = ()=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); d.cards.push({type:'risks',title:'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX',items:['']}); persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeSecurityCard = (ci)=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); d.cards.splice(ci,1); persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }
window.updateSecurityCard = (ci,k,v)=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); d.cards[ci][k]=v; if(k==='type'){ d.cards[ci].title = v==='never'?'NE JAMAIS':v==='mandatory'?'OBLIGATOIRE':'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX'; } persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }
window.addSecurityCardItem = (ci)=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); d.cards[ci].items.push(''); persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }
window.updateSecurityCardItem = (ci,ii,v)=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); d.cards[ci].items[ii]=v; persist(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeSecurityCardItem = (ci,ii)=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); d.cards[ci].items.splice(ii,1); persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }
window.addSecurityRiskFromSelect = (ci)=>{
  const d=ensureSecurityData();
  const sel=document.getElementById('sec-risk-select-'+ci);
  const name=sel ? sel.value : '';
  if(!name) return;
  if(!Array.isArray(d.cards[ci].items)) d.cards[ci].items=[];
  if(!d.cards[ci].items.includes(name)) d.cards[ci].items.push(name);
  if(sel) sel.value='';
  persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview();
}

window.addSecurityEpiFromSelect = ()=>{
  const d=ensureSecurityData();
  const sel=document.getElementById('sec-epi-select');
  const name=sel ? sel.value : '';
  if(!name) return;
  if(!Array.isArray(d.epi)) d.epi=[];
  if(!d.epi.includes(name)) d.epi.push(name);
  if(sel) sel.value='';
  persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview();
}
window.removeSecurityEpi = (i)=>{
  const d=ensureSecurityData();
  if(Array.isArray(d.epi)) d.epi.splice(i,1);
  persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview();
}

window.setSecurityMainPhoto = async(file)=>{ if(!file) return; const d=ensureSecurityData(); d.mainPhoto=await fileToDataUrl(file); d.photos=[d.mainPhoto]; persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }
window.addSecurityPhotos = async(files)=>{ if(!files||!files.length) return; const d=ensureSecurityData(); for(const f of files){ d.photos.push(await fileToDataUrl(f)); } d.mainPhoto=d.photos[0]||''; persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }
window.removeSecurityPhoto = (i)=>{ const d=ensureSecurityData(); d.photos.splice(i,1); d.mainPhoto=d.photos[0]||''; persist(); renderSecurite(); updatePreview(); }

function secLines(items, cls=''){
  return `<ul class="${cls}">${(items||[]).filter(Boolean).map(x=>`<li>${escapeHtml(x)}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`;
}
function secRiskPictoLines(items){
  return `<ul>${(items||[]).filter(Boolean).map(x=>`<li>${state.pictos[x]?`<img src="${state.pictos[x]}" style="width:18px;height:18px;object-fit:contain;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:5px">`:''}${escapeHtml(pictoLabel(x))}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`;
}
function secEpiIcon(name){
  const n=String(name||'').toLowerCase();
  if(n.includes('lun')) return '👓';
  if(n.includes('audit')||n.includes('bouch')||n.includes('oreille')) return '🟦';
  if(n.includes('gant')) return '🧤';
  if(n.includes('manch')) return '🦾';
  if(n.includes('chauss')) return '👢';
  if(n.includes('casque')) return '⛑️';
  if(n.includes('masque')) return '😷';
  return '●';
}
function previewSecurite(){
  const d=ensureSecurityData();
  const logo=getLogoForTab('securite');
  const dateTxt = d.date ? new Date(d.date+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') : '';
  return `<div class="sec-a4">
    <div class="sec-top">
      <div class="sec-logo"><div class="sec-logo-inner">${logo?`<img src="${logo}">`:'<div class="sec-logo-fallback">LOGO<br>ENTREPRISE</div>'}</div></div>
      <div class="sec-title"><h1>${escapeHtml(d.title)}</h1><div>${escapeHtml(d.subtitle)}</div></div>
      <div class="sec-date"><b>DATE :</b><div class="line">${escapeHtml(dateTxt)}</div><b>RÉDIGÉ PAR :</b><div class="line">${escapeHtml(d.author||'')}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-meta">
      
      <div class="sec-meta-card"><div class="sec-meta-ico">▣</div><div><b>Équipement / ligne / zone</b><span>${escapeHtml(d.equipment)}</span></div></div>
      <div class="sec-meta-card"><div class="sec-meta-ico">📍</div><div><b>Localisation</b><span>${escapeHtml(d.localisation)}</span></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-main">
      <div class="sec-danger">
        <div class="sec-danger-head">📷 <div>${escapeHtml(d.dangerTitle)}<br><span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:800;text-transform:none">${escapeHtml(d.dangerSubtitle)}</span></div></div>
        <div class="sec-danger-photo">${(d.photos&&d.photos.length)?`<div class="sec-preview-photo-grid">${d.photos.map(ph=>`<div class="sec-preview-photo-cell"><img src="${ph}"></div>`).join('')}</div>`:'<div class="sec-photo-placeholder">Photo / zone dangereuse</div>'}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sec-side">
        ${(d.cards||[]).map(c=>{
          const head = c.type==='never' ? 'sec-head-red' : c.type==='mandatory' ? 'sec-head-blue' : 'sec-head-yellow';
          const icon = c.type==='never' ? '⛔' : c.type==='mandatory' ? '✅' : '⚠';
          const cls = c.type==='never' ? 'sec-x' : c.type==='mandatory' ? 'sec-ok' : '';
          return `<div class="sec-box"><div class="sec-box-head ${head}">${icon} ${escapeHtml(c.title||'')}</div><div class="sec-box-body">${c.type==='risks' ? secRiskPictoLines(c.items) : secLines(c.items,cls)}</div></div>`;
        }).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-epi"><div class="sec-epi-title">EPI<br>spécifiques</div><div class="sec-epi-items">${(d.epi||[]).filter(Boolean).map(x=>`<div class="sec-epi-item"><div class="sec-epi-icon">${state.pictos[x]?`<img src="${state.pictos[x]}">`:secEpiIcon(x)}</div>${escapeHtml(pictoLabel(x))}</div>`).join('')}</div></div>
    <div class="sec-bottom">
      <div class="sec-box sec-incident"><div class="sec-box-head sec-head-green">✚ Conduite à tenir</div><div class="sec-box-body"><ol>${(d.incident||[]).filter(Boolean).map(x=>`<li>${escapeHtml(x)}</li>`).join('')}</ol></div></div>
      <div class="sec-box sec-accident"><div class="sec-box-head sec-head-red">☎ En cas d’accident</div><div class="sec-box-body">${escapeHtml(d.accidentText)}<div class="sec-phone">${escapeHtml(d.emergencyNumber)}</div></div></div>
      <div class="sec-box sec-deja"><div class="sec-box-head sec-head-black">⚠ ${escapeHtml(d.dejaTitle)}</div><div class="sec-box-body">${escapeHtml(d.dejaText)}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-footer">⚠ ${escapeHtml(d.footer)} ⚠</div>
  </div>`;
}

function renderArchives(){
  const p=document.getElementById('panel-archives');
  const q = (state.archiveQuery||'').toLowerCase().trim();
  const f = state.archiveFilter||'all';
  const items = (state.archives||[]).filter(item=>{
    const okType = f==='all' ? true : item.type===f;
    const hay = `${item.title||''} ${(TABS.find(x=>x.id===item.type)||{}).label||''} ${item.createdAt||''} ${item.updatedAt||''}`.toLowerCase();
    const okQuery = !q || hay.includes(q);
    return okType && okQuery;
  });
  p.innerHTML = `<div class="sheet">
    <div class="band yellow-accent">📚 Archives documentaires</div>
    <div class="muted" style="margin-top:10px">Les archives complètes se conservent désormais via <b>JSON</b>. Elles restent consultables dans la session en cours, puis via <b>Importer bibliothèque JSON</b>.</div>
    <div class="grid-3" style="margin-top:12px">
      <div class="field"><label>Recherche</label><input id="archive-search" type="text" placeholder="Titre, type, date..." value="${escapeHtml(state.archiveQuery||'')}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Type</label>
        <select id="archive-filter">
          <option value="all"${(state.archiveFilter||'all')==='all'?' selected':''}>Tous les documents</option>
          ${TABS.filter(t=>t.id!=='archives').map(t=>`<option value="${t.id}"${state.archiveFilter===t.id?' selected':''}>${t.label}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="field" style="justify-content:end;display:flex;align-items:end"><button type="button" id="archive-clear-filter">Réinitialiser filtres</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="archive-grid" style="margin-top:16px">${items.length ? items.map(item=>`<div class="archive-card">
      <div class="archive-type">${escapeHtml(labelForType(item.type))}</div>
      <div class="archive-title">${escapeHtml(item.title||'Sans titre')}</div>
      <div class="archive-meta">Créé : ${escapeHtml(item.createdAt||'')}<br>Modifié : ${escapeHtml(item.updatedAt||'')}</div>
      <div class="archive-actions">
        <button type="button" class="primary" onclick="openArchive('${item.id}')">Ouvrir</button>
        <button type="button" onclick="duplicateArchive('${item.id}')">Dupliquer</button>
        <button type="button" class="danger" onclick="deleteArchive('${item.id}')">Supprimer</button>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('') : '<div class="empty">Aucun document archivé pour le moment.</div>'}</div>
  </div>`;
  const s = p.querySelector('#archive-search');
  const flt = p.querySelector('#archive-filter');
  const reset = p.querySelector('#archive-clear-filter');
  if(s) s.oninput = e=>{ state.archiveQuery = e.target.value; persist(); renderArchives(); };
  if(flt) flt.onchange = e=>{ state.archiveFilter = e.target.value; persist(); renderArchives(); };
  if(reset) reset.onclick = ()=>{ state.archiveQuery=''; state.archiveFilter='all'; persist(); renderArchives(); };
}
function labelForType(t){ return (TABS.find(x=>x.id===t)||{}).label || t; }
window.openArchive = (id)=>{ const item=state.archives.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!item) return; state.active=item.type; state.currentArchiveId=id; state[item.type]=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(item.data)); persist(); render(); }
window.duplicateArchive = (id)=>{ const item=state.archives.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!item) return; state.archives.unshift({id:crypto.randomUUID(), type:item.type, title:(item.title||'Sans titre')+' (copie)', createdAt:new Date().toLocaleString(), updatedAt:new Date().toLocaleString(), data:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(item.data))}); persist(); renderArchives(); }
window.deleteArchive = (id)=>{ if(!confirm('Supprimer ce document archivé ?')) return; state.archives = state.archives.filter(x=>x.id!==id); if(state.currentArchiveId===id) state.currentArchiveId=null; persist(); renderArchives(); }

function currentTitle(){
  switch(state.active){
    case 'consigne': return stripHtml(state.consigne.title);
    case 'provisoire': return stripHtml(state.provisoire.title||state.provisoire.serie);
    case 'bonnes': return stripHtml(state.bonnes.title);
    case 'maintenance': return stripHtml(state.maintenance.title);
    case 'diagnostic': return stripHtml(state.diagnostic.title || state.diagnostic.problem || 'Aide au diagnostic');
    case 'fiche': return stripHtml(state.fiche.machine || 'Fiche sécurité machine');
    case 'securite': return stripHtml(state.securite.title || state.securite.subtitle);
    default: return 'Document';
  }
}
function currentData(){ return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state[state.active])); }
function saveCurrent(){
  if(state.active==='archives') return alert('Choisis d’abord un type de document.');
  const now = new Date().toLocaleString();
  const title = currentTitle();
  const existing = state.currentArchiveId ? state.archives.find(x=>x.id===state.currentArchiveId) : null;
  if(existing && existing.type===state.active){
    existing.title = title;
    existing.updatedAt = now;
    existing.data = currentData();
  } else {
    const id = crypto.randomUUID();
    state.currentArchiveId = id;
    state.archives.unshift({id, type:state.active, title, createdAt:now, updatedAt:now, data:currentData()});
  }
  persist();
  renderArchives();
  alert('Document ajouté aux archives de la session. Pour le conserver durablement, clique sur « Exporter bibliothèque JSON ».' );
}

function renderDocHeader(title, metaLeft, rightHtml='', titleClass=''){
  const tabLogo = getLogoForTab(state.active);
  return `<div class="doc-header"><div><div class="doc-title-red ${titleClass}">${title}</div><div class="doc-meta">${metaLeft}</div></div><div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">${rightHtml}${tabLogo?`<div class="hero-image" style="width:170px;height:82px;border:none"><img src="${tabLogo}"></div>`:''}</div></div>`;
}
function photoBox(src, caption='', extraClass=''){
  return `<div class="photo-card ${extraClass||''}"><img src="${src}">${caption?`<div class="muted" style="margin-top:6px">${caption}</div>`:''}</div>`;
}


function ncNormalizeText(v){
  return String(v||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'');
}
function ncEpiType(name){
  const n=ncNormalizeText(name);
  if(/manchette|avant.?bras|manchon/.test(n)) return 'sleeve';
  if(/gant/.test(n)) return 'glove';
  if(/lunette|oeil|yeux/.test(n)) return 'glasses';
  if(/bouchon|oreille|auditif|auditive|casque anti bruit|anti.?bruit/.test(n)) return 'hearing';
  if(/chaussure|soulier|pied/.test(n)) return 'shoe';
  if(/casque/.test(n)) return 'helmet';
  if(/masque|respir|ffp|poussiere/.test(n)) return 'mask';
  if(/visiere|ecran facial|facial/.test(n)) return 'faceshield';
  if(/tablier/.test(n)) return 'apron';
  return 'default';
}
function ncEpiSvg(type){
  const svgs={
    glasses:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M10 34h15c4 0 7 3 7 7v2c0 5-4 9-9 9h-6c-5 0-9-4-9-9v-6c0-2 1-3 2-3z"/><path d="M54 34H39c-4 0-7 3-7 7v2c0 5 4 9 9 9h6c5 0 9-4 9-9v-6c0-2-1-3-2-3z"/><path d="M25 38c4-3 10-3 14 0"/><path d="M13 34l-5-9M51 34l5-9"/></svg>`,
    glove:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M23 31V14a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v16"/><path d="M33 31V12a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v23"/><path d="M43 35V18a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v20c0 13-8 21-21 21h-4c-10 0-17-7-17-17V28a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v12"/><path d="M21 33l-4-8a5 5 0 0 0-9 4l6 16"/></svg>`,
    sleeve:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M16 10h20l12 44H24L16 10z"/><path d="M17 10c6 4 13 4 20 0"/><path d="M24 54c8-4 16-4 24 0"/><path d="M29 18l8 28"/></svg>`,
    hearing:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M17 38V28a15 15 0 0 1 30 0v10"/><path d="M17 38h-4v15h7c3 0 5-2 5-5v-5c0-3-2-5-5-5h-3z"/><path d="M47 38h4v15h-7c-3 0-5-2-5-5v-5c0-3 2-5 5-5h3z"/><path d="M22 28a10 10 0 0 1 20 0"/></svg>`,
    shoe:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M13 35l16 8h17c7 0 12 4 12 10v3H8v-8c0-6 2-10 5-13z"/><path d="M13 35l3-18h13l7 21"/><path d="M22 43l4-7M30 43l4-7"/></svg>`,
    helmet:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M10 39a22 22 0 0 1 44 0"/><path d="M8 39h48v9H8z"/><path d="M32 17v22M22 20v19M42 20v19"/></svg>`,
    mask:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M16 26c10 6 22 6 32 0v12c0 9-7 16-16 16S16 47 16 38V26z"/><path d="M16 31l-8-5v15l8-4M48 31l8-5v15l-8-4"/><path d="M24 35h16M24 42h16"/></svg>`,
    faceshield:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M18 12h28v8H18z"/><path d="M21 20h22v22c0 7-5 13-11 16-6-3-11-9-11-16V20z"/><path d="M25 30h14"/></svg>`,
    apron:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M24 12h16l4 44H20l4-44z"/><path d="M24 12l-8 11M40 12l8 11M24 30h16"/></svg>`,
    default:`<svg viewBox="0 0 64 64"><path d="M32 8l22 10v13c0 14-9 24-22 29C19 55 10 45 10 31V18L32 8z"/><path d="M23 33l6 6 13-15"/></svg>`
  };
  return svgs[type]||svgs.default;
}
function ncEpiHtml(items){
  items=(items||[]).map(x=>String(x||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0,4);
  if(!items.length) return '<div style="font-size:9px;color:#667085;font-weight:700;margin-top:2mm">Aucun EPI spécifique indiqué.</div>';
  return `<div class="nc-epi">${items.map(x=>`<div class="nc-epi-item"><div class="nc-epi-icon">${ncEpiSvg(ncEpiType(x))}</div><div>${escapeHtml(x)}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
}

function ncConsigneTypeClass(value){
  const v=String(value||'').trim().toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g,'');
  if(v==='nouvelle consigne') return 'type-new';
  if(v==='bonnes pratiques' || v==='bonne pratique') return 'type-good';
  if(v==='consigne provisoire' || v==='consignes provisoires' || v==='consigne provisoires') return 'type-temp';
  if(v==='consigne qualite' || v==='consigne qualité' || v==='qualite' || v==='qualité') return 'type-quality';
  return 'type-custom';
}
function ncConsigneTypeLabel(value){
  return String(value||'').trim() || 'Type';
}
function previewConsigne(){
  const d=ensureConsigneV4();
  const logo=getLogoForTab('consigne');
  const main=d.mainPhotos[0]?.src||'';
  const steps=(d.steps||[]).slice(0,8);
  const cols=Math.max(1, Math.min(6, steps.length||1));
  const dateTxt = d.date ? new Date(d.date+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('fr-FR') : '';
  return `<div class="nc-a4">
    <div class="nc-top">
      <div class="nc-logo"><div class="nc-logo-inner">${logo?`<img src="${logo}" alt="Logo">`:'<div class="nc-logo-fallback">WIBAIE<small>PRODUCTION</small></div>'}</div></div>
      <div class="nc-titlebox"><div class="nc-infoicon">i</div><div><div class="nc-titlemain">${escapeHtml(d.headerTitle||'INFO ATELIER')}</div><div class="nc-subline">${escapeHtml(d.headerSubtitle||'INFORMER • STANDARDISER • SÉCURISER')}</div></div></div>
      <div class="nc-meta"><small>SECTEUR</small><b>${escapeHtml(d.sector||'')}</b></div>
      <div class="nc-meta"><small>POSTE</small><b>${escapeHtml(d.poste||'')}</b></div>
      <div class="nc-meta"><small>RÉDACTEUR</small><b>${escapeHtml(d.author||'')}</b></div>
      <div class="nc-meta"><small>DATE</small><b>${escapeHtml(dateTxt)}</b></div>
    </div>
    <div class="nc-blackbar" style="${!d.typeConsigne ? 'grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 38mm' : ''}">
      ${d.typeConsigne ? `<div class="nc-type-pill ${ncConsigneTypeClass(d.typeConsigne)}">${escapeHtml(ncConsigneTypeLabel(d.typeConsigne))}</div>` : ''}
      <div class="nc-hero-title"><h1>${escapeHtml(d.displayTitle||d.title||'')}</h1><div>${escapeHtml(d.subtitle||'')}</div></div>
      <div class="nc-tag ${ncConsigneTypeClass(d.typeConsigne)}"><span class="bulb">💡</span><span>${escapeHtml(d.tagLabel||'SOYEZ INFORMÉ')}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="nc-main">
      <div class="nc-main-photo">${main?`<img src="${main}">`:'<div class="nc-placeholder">Photo principale</div>'}</div>
      <div class="nc-objectif"><div class="nc-section-title"><span class="ico">◎</span> OBJECTIF</div><p>${ncTextToHtml(d.objectif||'')}</p><div class="nc-retain"><div class="nc-retain-title">À RETENIR</div><ul>${ncLinesToHtml(d.retenir)}</ul></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="nc-mode"><div class="nc-mode-head"><span class="gear">⚙</span> MODE OPÉRATOIRE</div><div class="nc-steps" style="--nc-cols:${cols}">${steps.map((st,i)=>`<div class="nc-step"><div class="nc-step-h"><div class="nc-num">${i+1}</div><div class="nc-step-title">${escapeHtml(st.title||'')}</div></div><div class="nc-step-img">${((st.photos&&st.photos.length)?st.photos:(st.photo?[st.photo]:[])).length?`<div class="nc-step-photo-grid">${((st.photos&&st.photos.length)?st.photos:(st.photo?[st.photo]:[])).map(ph=>`<img src="${ph}" style="display:block;width:auto;height:auto;max-width:100%;max-height:100%;object-fit:contain;object-position:center center;margin:auto;background:#eef2f7;">`).join('')}</div>`:'Illustration'}</div><div class="nc-step-textwrap"><div class="nc-step-txt">${ncTextToHtml(st.text||'')}</div>${st.warning?`<div class="nc-step-warn">⚠ ${ncTextToHtml(st.warning)}</div>`:''}</div></div>`).join('')}</div></div>
    <div class="nc-bottom-wrap">
    ${(ncConsigneTypeClass(d.typeConsigne)==='type-quality') ? '' : `<div class="nc-bottom">
      <div class="nc-card"><div class="nc-card-head nc-red">⚠ SÉCURITÉ</div><div class="nc-card-body"><b style="color:#c5161d">RISQUES IDENTIFIÉS</b><ul>${ncLinesToHtml(d.safetyRisks)}</ul><div style="height:1px;background:#efb4b4;margin:3mm 0"></div><b style="color:#c5161d">EPI SPÉCIFIQUES</b>${ncEpiHtml(d.epi)}</div></div>
      <div class="nc-card"><div class="nc-card-head nc-orange">🔑 POINTS CLÉS</div><div class="nc-card-body"><ul>${ncLinesToHtml(d.keyPoints)}</ul></div></div>
      <div class="nc-card"><div class="nc-card-head nc-green">☑ CONTRÔLE QUALITÉ</div><div class="nc-card-body">${(d.qualityChecks||[]).map(x=>`<div class="nc-check-row"><span class="nc-box"></span><span>${escapeHtml(x)}</span></div>`).join('')}</div></div>
      <div class="nc-card"><div class="nc-card-head nc-red">❗ ${escapeHtml(d.specialTitle||'CAS PARTICULIERS')}</div><div class="nc-card-body"><div class="nc-special">${d.specialImage?`<img src="${d.specialImage}">`:''}<div>${ncTextToHtml(d.specialText||'')}</div></div></div></div>
    </div>`}
    <div class="nc-footer"><span class="people">👥</span><div>EN CAS DE DOUTE<small>${escapeHtml(d.doubtText||'')}</small></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}
function previewProvisoire(){
  const d=state.provisoire; (d.posts||[]).forEach(post=>normalizePhotosArray(post));
  return `<div class="doc-outline">${renderDocHeader('CONSIGNE PROVISOIRE', `${escapeHtml(d.author||'')} ${d.date?'· '+escapeHtml(d.date):''}`)}<div class="doc-title-black" style="margin-top:10px;color:${'var(--red)'}">${escapeHtml(d.serie||d.title||'')}</div>${d.intro?`<div class="block">${d.intro}</div>`:''}${d.posts.map((post,i)=>`<div class="block"><div class="subband">📍 ${escapeHtml(post.name||('Action '+(i+1)))}</div><div>${post.text||''}</div>${(post.photos||[]).length?`<div class="photo-grid">${post.photos.map(ph=>photoBox(ph.src, escapeHtml(ph.caption||''))).join('')}</div>`:''}</div>`).join('')}<div class="doc-footer">${stripHtml(d.footer||'SOYEZ INFORMÉS')}</div></div>`;
}
function previewBonnes(){
  const d=state.bonnes; (d.items||[]).forEach(it=>normalizePhotosArray(it));
  return `<div class="doc-outline">${renderDocHeader('BONNES PRATIQUES', `${escapeHtml(d.zone||'')} ${d.author? '· '+escapeHtml(d.author):''} ${d.date?'· '+escapeHtml(d.date):''}`, '', 'doc-title-green')}<div class="doc-title-black doc-title-green" style="margin-top:10px">${escapeHtml(d.title||'')}</div>${d.intro?`<div class="block">${d.intro}</div>`:''}${d.items.map((it,i)=>`<div class="block"><div class="subband">⭐ Action ${i+1}</div><div style="font-weight:800;margin-bottom:8px">${it.action||''}</div><div class="grid-2"><div class="block" style="margin:0;background:#fff8dc"><strong>🔑 Point clé</strong><div style="margin-top:6px">${it.point||''}</div></div><div class="block" style="margin:0"><strong>🎯 Raison</strong><div style="margin-top:6px">${it.raison||''}</div></div></div>${(it.photos||[]).length?`<div class="photo-grid" style="margin-top:10px">${it.photos.map(ph=>photoBox(ph.src, escapeHtml(ph.caption||''))).join('')}</div>`:''}</div>`).join('')}<div class="doc-footer">${stripHtml(d.footer||'BONNES PRATIQUES À RESPECTER')}</div></div>`;
}
function maintenanceTextToHtml(txt){
  txt = escapeHtml(txt||'');
  const lines = txt.split(/\n+/).map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if(lines.some(l=>/^[-•]/.test(l))){
    return '<ul>'+lines.map(l=>'<li>'+l.replace(/^[-•]\s*/,'')+'</li>').join('')+'</ul>';
  }
  return lines.join('<br>');
}
function maintenanceCheckGrid(){
  const days=['LUN','MAR','MER','JEU','VEN','SAM'];
  return `<table class="maint-v2-checktable" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0">
    <tr><td class="shift-head"></td>${days.map(d=>`<th>${d}</th>`).join('')}</tr>
    <tr><th class="shift-label">M</th>${days.map(()=>'<td></td>').join('')}</tr>
    <tr><th class="shift-label">APM</th>${days.map(()=>'<td></td>').join('')}</tr>
    <tr><th class="shift-label">N</th>${days.map(()=>'<td></td>').join('')}</tr>
  </table>`;
}
function previewMaintenance(){
  const d=normalizeMaintenanceData();
  const logo = getLogoForTab('maintenance');
  return `<div class="maint-v2-sheet">
    <table class="maint-v2-head-table" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0">
      <tr>
        <td class="maint-v2-logo-cell"><div class="maint-v2-logo">${logo?`<img src="${logo}">`:'WIBAIE<br>PRODUCTION'}</div></td>
        <td class="maint-v2-title-cell"><div class="maint-v2-title"><div class="t1">${escapeHtml(d.title||'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIVEAU')}</div><div class="t2">${escapeHtml(d.machine||'')}</div><div class="t3">${escapeHtml(d.subtitle||'')}</div></div></td>

      </tr>
    </table>
    <table class="maint-v2-meta-table" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0"><tr>
      <td><span class="ico">▦</span><span><strong>SECTEUR</strong>${escapeHtml(d.secteur||'')}</span></td>
      <td><span class="ico">♟</span><span><strong>POSTE</strong>${escapeHtml(d.poste||'')}</span></td>
      <td><span class="ico">◷</span><span><strong>DURÉE</strong>${escapeHtml(d.duree||'')}</span></td>
    </tr></table>
    <table class="maint-v2-safety-table" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0"><tr>
      <td class="maint-v2-safety-left"><span class="tri">⚠️</span><span>${escapeHtml(d.footer||'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT !')}</span></td>
      <td class="maint-v2-safety-mid">${escapeHtml(d.slogan||'')}</td>
      <td class="maint-v2-epis">${maintenanceEpiHtml()}</td>

      <colgroup><col class="maint-v2-col-num"><col class="maint-v2-col-control"><col class="maint-v2-col-img"><col class="maint-v2-col-why"><col class="maint-v2-col-check"></colgroup>
      <thead><tr><th></th><th>CONTRÔLES À EFFECTUER</th><th>ILLUSTRATION</th><th>POURQUOI / RISQUES</th><th>JOURS À COCHER</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>${d.rows.map(row=>`<tr>
        <td class="maint-v2-num">${escapeHtml(row.number||'')}</td>
        <td><div class="maint-v2-row-title">${escapeHtml(row.title||'')}</div><div class="maint-v2-controls">${maintenanceTextToHtml(row.controls||'')}</div></td>
        <td><div class="maint-v2-illustration">${(row.illustrations&&row.illustrations.length)?row.illustrations.map(ph=>`<img src="${ph.src}" style="width:${ph.w||100}%">`).join(''):'Illustration'}</div></td>
        <td><div class="maint-v2-why">${maintenanceTextToHtml(row.why||'')}</div><div class="maint-v2-risk">${maintenanceTextToHtml(row.risk||'')}</div></td>
        <td class="maint-v2-check-cell">${maintenanceCheckGrid()}</td>
      </tr>`).join('')}</tbody>
    </table>
    <table class="maint-v2-bottom-table" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0"><tr>
      <td class="maint-v2-bottom-box"><div class="maint-v2-bottom-title">⚠ Anomalies constatées / actions à réaliser</div><div class="maint-v2-lines"><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div></div></td>
      <td class="maint-v2-bottom-box"><div class="maint-v2-bottom-title blue">Action réalisée</div><div class="maint-v2-action-list"><div><span class="maint-v2-square"></span>Correction immédiate</div><div><span class="maint-v2-square"></span>Demande d'intervention maintenance</div><div><span class="maint-v2-square"></span>Signalement chef d'équipe</div></div></td>
      <td class="maint-v2-bottom-box"><div class="maint-v2-bottom-title orange">Niveau de criticité (à cocher)</div><div class="maint-v2-critical-list"><div><span class="maint-v2-dot crit-red"></span>CRITIQUE — Arrêt machine immédiat</div><div><span class="maint-v2-dot crit-orange"></span>MAJEUR — Intervention rapide</div><div><span class="maint-v2-dot crit-yellow"></span>MINEUR — À surveiller</div><div><span class="maint-v2-dot crit-green"></span>OK — Conforme</div></div></td>
    </tr></table>
  </div>`;
}




function diagnosticPhotoBox(photo){
  const src = (typeof photo === 'string') ? photo : ((photo && photo.src) ? photo.src : '');
  const tag = (typeof photo === 'object' && photo && photo.tag) ? photo.tag : 'zone';
  const label = tag==='ok' ? 'OK' : tag==='nok' ? 'NOK' : 'Zone à contrôler';
  const cls = tag==='ok' ? 'diag-ok' : tag==='nok' ? 'diag-nok' : 'diag-zone';
  return `<div class="photo-card diag-photo-card ${cls}">
    <div class="diag-photo-label ${cls}">${label}</div>
    <img src="${src}">
  </div>`;
}

function previewDiagnostic(){
  const d=state.diagnostic; (d.items||[]).forEach(normalizeDiagnosticPhotos);
  const logo = getLogoForTab('diagnostic');
  const headerHtml = `<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin-bottom:6px;table-layout:fixed"><tr>
      <td style="vertical-align:top;padding:0">
        <div class="doc-title-red" style="margin:0;color:#8a5a00">AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC</div>
        <div class="doc-meta" style="margin-top:2px">${escapeHtml(d.zone||'')} ${d.author? '· '+escapeHtml(d.author):''} ${d.date?'· '+escapeHtml(d.date):''}</div>
      </td>
      <td style="width:120px;vertical-align:top;text-align:right;padding:0">${logo?`<img src="${logo}" style="display:inline-block;width:102px;height:auto;max-height:36px;object-fit:contain;border:1px solid #d7d9dd;border-radius:8px;padding:2px;background:#f7f7f7;vertical-align:top">`:''}</td>
    </tr></table>`;
  const itemsHtml = d.items.map((it,i)=>{
    const fields = [];
    if(it.check) fields.push(`<div class="block diagnostic-check" style="margin:0"><strong>🔍 JE VÉRIFIE</strong><div style="margin-top:4px">${it.check}</div></div>`);
    if(it.cause) fields.push(`<div class="block diagnostic-cause" style="margin:0"><strong>🎯 CAUSE PROBABLE</strong><div style="margin-top:4px">${it.cause}</div></div>`);
    if(it.action) fields.push(`<div class="block diagnostic-action" style="margin:0"><strong>🛠 ACTION À FAIRE</strong><div style="margin-top:4px">${it.action}</div></div>`);
    if(it.alert) fields.push(`<div class="block diagnostic-alert" style="margin:0"><strong>⛔ J’ALERTE SI</strong><div style="margin-top:4px">${it.alert}</div></div>`);
    if(it.ok) fields.push(`<div class="block diagnostic-ok" style="margin:0"><strong>✅ SI OK</strong><div style="margin-top:4px">${it.ok}</div></div>`);
    if(it.ko) fields.push(`<div class="block diagnostic-ko" style="margin:0"><strong>❌ SI KO</strong><div style="margin-top:4px">${it.ko}</div></div>`);
    return `<div class="diagnostic-stage">
      <div class="diagnostic-stage-head">
        <div class="diagnostic-stage-badge">🔎 ÉTAPE ${i+1}</div>
      </div>
      ${fields.length ? `<div class="diagnostic-grid">${fields.join('')}</div>` : ''}
      ${(it.photos||[]).length?`<div class="diagnostic-photo-grid">${it.photos.map(p=>diagnosticPhotoBox(p)).join('')}</div>`:''}
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  return `<div class="doc-outline diagnostic-doc">${headerHtml}
    <div class="doc-title-black" style="color:#8a5a00">${escapeHtml(d.title||'')}</div>
    <div class="block problem-box">
      <strong>Problème rencontré</strong><div style="margin-top:4px">${d.problem||''}</div>
      ${d.symptoms?`<div style="margin-top:8px"><strong>Symptômes observés</strong><div style="margin-top:4px">${d.symptoms}</div></div>`:''}
      ${d.impact?`<div style="margin-top:8px"><strong>Impact</strong><div style="margin-top:4px">${d.impact}</div></div>`:''}
    </div>
    ${itemsHtml}
    <div class="doc-footer">${stripHtml(d.footer||'AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC ATELIER')}</div>
  </div>`;
}


/* PATCH V2.7 — Fiche sécurité machine : rendu fiable des pictos risque + mesures prévention
   - Une seule source HTML pour preview et PDF.
   - Picto affiché en <img> + en background-image de secours pour html2canvas.
   - data-picto-src conservé pour reconstruction dans le clone PDF.
*/
function ficheRiskPillHtml(name){
  const rawName = String(name || '');
  const label = escapeHtml(pictoLabel(rawName));
  const src = (state.pictos && state.pictos[rawName]) ? String(state.pictos[rawName]) : '';
  const safeSrc = src ? escapeHtml(src) : '';
  const img = safeSrc
    ? `<img class="fiche-risk-img" src="${safeSrc}" alt="" loading="eager" decoding="sync" style="width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;min-height:18px;max-width:18px;max-height:18px;object-fit:contain;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;opacity:1;visibility:visible;background:transparent;margin-right:6px;">`
    : '';
  /* V2.9 : structure volontairement simple pour le PDF.
     Le texte est en dur dans le DOM, pas uniquement porté par le style/flex. */
  return `<span class="risk-pill fiche-risk-pill" data-risk-name="${escapeHtml(rawName)}" data-risk-label="${label}" data-picto-src="${safeSrc}" style="display:inline-block;white-space:nowrap;color:#111827!important;background:#ffffff!important;border:1px solid #cfd6df;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 10px;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;line-height:18px;min-height:26px;vertical-align:middle;">${img}<span class="fiche-risk-label" style="display:inline-block;color:#111827!important;opacity:1!important;visibility:visible!important;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;line-height:18px;vertical-align:middle;">${label}</span></span>`;
}
function syncFicheRichFields(){
  if(!state || state.active !== 'fiche') return;
  const d = ensureFicheSecuriteMachine();
  const q = document.getElementById('f-qualification'); if(q) d.qualification = q.innerHTML;
  const a = document.getElementById('f-accident'); if(a) d.accident = a.innerHTML;
  const inc = document.getElementById('f-incendie'); if(inc) d.incendie = inc.innerHTML;
  (d.risks||[]).forEach((r,i)=>{
    const prev = document.getElementById('risk-prev-'+i);
    if(prev) r.prevention = prev.innerHTML;
    const task = document.querySelector(`textarea[oninput="updateRisk(${i},'task',this.value)"]`);
    if(task) r.task = task.value;
  });
}

function previewFiche(){
  const d=ensureFicheSecuriteMachine();
  normalizeMainPhotos(d);
  // Photos machine sans caption ni bouton supprimer
  const machinePhotoHtml = (d.machinePhotos||[]).length
    ? `<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(${Math.min(d.machinePhotos.length,2)},1fr);gap:6px;width:100%;height:100%">${d.machinePhotos.map(ph=>`<img src="${ph.src}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:7px;display:block">`).join('')}</div>`
    : '<span class="muted">Aucune photo</span>';
  return `<div class="doc-outline"><div class="machine-layout"><div class="machine-photo-box"><div class="subband">📷 Photo machine</div><div class="machine-photo-main" style="height:220px;min-height:220px">${machinePhotoHtml}</div></div><div><div class="machine-head"><div class="band band-inline fiche-machine-title" style="margin:0"><span>🛡️ FICHE SÉCURITÉ MACHINE</span><span class="num-badge">${escapeHtml(d.number||'001')}</span></div><div class="fiche-id-title">Identification machine</div><div class="grid-3" style="margin-top:8px"><div><strong>Date</strong><div>${escapeHtml(d.date||'')}</div></div><div><strong>Machine</strong><div>${escapeHtml(d.machine||'')}</div></div><div><strong>N° GMAO</strong><div>${escapeHtml(d.gmao||'')}</div></div><div><strong>Marque / Type</strong><div>${escapeHtml(d.brandType||'')}</div></div><div><strong>Produit ou matériaux à utiliser</strong><div>${escapeHtml(d.material||'')}</div></div><div><strong>EPI spécifique au poste</strong><div>${escapeHtml(d.epi||'')}</div></div></div></div><div class="block"><strong>Qualification et autorisation</strong><div style="margin-top:8px">${d.qualification||''}</div></div></div></div>
      <div class="block"><div class="subband">⚠️ Analyse des risques</div><table class="risk-table"><thead><tr><th>Tâches exposant l'opérateur à un risque</th><th>Risque / dangers</th><th>Mesures de prévention / opérations ou procédures à respecter</th></tr></thead><tbody>${d.risks.map(r=>`<tr><td>${escapeHtml(r.task||'')}</td><td>${r.selected.map(name=>ficheRiskPillHtml(name)).join(' ')}</td><td><div class="fiche-risk-prevention">${r.prevention||''}</div></td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table></div>
      <div class="alert-box"><div class="alert-row"><div class="alert-icon">${d.accidentIcon?`<img src="${d.accidentIcon}">`:''}</div><div class="alert-text green">${d.accident||''}</div></div><div class="section-line"></div><div class="alert-row"><div class="alert-icon">${d.incendieIcon?`<img src="${d.incendieIcon}">`:''}</div><div class="alert-text red">${d.incendie||''}</div></div></div></div>`;
}
function syncMaintenanceFromEditor(){
  if(state.active !== 'maintenance') return;
  const d = normalizeMaintenanceData();
  ['title','machine','subtitle','secteur','poste','duree','slogan','footer'].forEach(k=>{
    const el = document.getElementById('m-'+k);
    if(el) d[k] = el.value;
  });
  d.rows.forEach((row,i)=>{
    ['number','title','controls','why','risk'].forEach(k=>{
      const el = document.getElementById(`m-row-${k}-${i}`);
      if(el) row[k] = el.value;
    });
  });
  persist();
}

function syncProvFromEditor(){
  if(state.active !== 'provisoire') return;
  const d = state.provisoire;
  ['title','serie','author','date'].forEach(k=>{ const el=document.getElementById('p-'+k); if(el) d[k]=el.value; });
  persist();
}
function syncBonnesFromEditor(){
  if(state.active !== 'bonnes') return;
  const d = state.bonnes;
  ['title','zone','author','date'].forEach(k=>{ const el=document.getElementById('b-'+k); if(el) d[k]=el.value; });
  persist();
}
function syncDiagFromEditor(){
  if(state.active !== 'diagnostic') return;
  const d = state.diagnostic;
  ['title','zone','author','date'].forEach(k=>{ const el=document.getElementById('d-'+k); if(el) d[k]=el.value; });
  persist();
}
function syncFicheFromEditor(){
  if(state.active !== 'fiche') return;
  const d = ensureFicheSecuriteMachine();
  ['number','date','machine','gmao','brandType','material','epi'].forEach(k=>{ const el=document.getElementById('f-'+k); if(el) d[k]=el.value; });
  syncFicheRichFields();
  persist();
}
function syncSecuriteFromEditor(){
  if(state.active !== 'securite') return;
  const d = ensureSecurityData();
  ['title','subtitle','date','author','equipment','localisation','dangerTitle','dangerSubtitle','footer','accidentText','emergencyNumber','dejaTitle','dejaText'].forEach(k=>{ const el=document.getElementById('s-'+k); if(el) d[k]=el.value; });
  persist();
}

function updatePreview(){
  if(state.active==='maintenance') syncMaintenanceFromEditor();
  if(state.active==='provisoire') syncProvFromEditor();
  if(state.active==='bonnes') syncBonnesFromEditor();
  if(state.active==='diagnostic') syncDiagFromEditor();
  if(state.active==='fiche') syncFicheFromEditor();
  if(state.active==='securite') syncSecuriteFromEditor();
  const host=document.getElementById('previewHost');
  host.classList.remove('consigne-preview','maintenance-preview','fiche-preview','securite-preview','diagnostic-preview');
  if(state.active==='consigne') host.classList.add('consigne-preview');
  if(state.active==='maintenance') host.classList.add('maintenance-preview');
  if(state.active==='fiche') host.classList.add('fiche-preview');
  if(state.active==='securite') host.classList.add('securite-preview');
  if(state.active==='diagnostic') host.classList.add('diagnostic-preview');
  let html='';
  switch(state.active){
    case 'consigne': html=previewConsigne(); break;
    case 'maintenance': html=previewMaintenance(); break;
    case 'fiche': html=previewFiche(); break;
    case 'securite': html=previewSecurite(); break;
    case 'diagnostic': html=previewDiagnosticV59(); break;
    case 'archives': html='<div class="empty">Ouvre un document archivé pour le prévisualiser.</div>'; break;
    default: state.active='consigne'; host.classList.add('consigne-preview'); html=previewConsigne(); break;
  }
  host.innerHTML = html;
}

function getExportPageClass(mode='generic'){
  if(state.active==='maintenance'){
    if(mode==='pdf') return 'maintenance-pdf';
    if(mode==='word') return 'maintenance-word';
    return 'maintenance-print';
  }
  if(state.active==='consigne'){
    if(mode==='pdf') return 'consigne-pdf';
    if(mode==='word') return 'consigne-word';
    return 'consigne-print';
  }
  if(state.active==='securite'){
    if(mode==='pdf') return 'securite-pdf';
    if(mode==='word') return 'securite-word';
    return 'securite-print';
  }
  if(state.active==='fiche'){
    if(mode==='pdf') return 'fiche-pdf';
    if(mode==='word') return 'fiche-word';
    return 'fiche-print';
  }
  if(state.active==='diagnostic'){
    if(mode==='pdf') return 'diagnostic-pdf';
    if(mode==='word') return 'diagnostic-word';
    return 'diagnostic-print';
  }
  return '';
}

  updatePreview();
  const title = currentTitle().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/gi,'_');

  let exportClass = getExportPageClass(mode);

function uint8ToBase64(bytes){
  let binary = '';
  const chunk = 0x8000;
  for(let i=0;i<bytes.length;i+=chunk){
    binary += String.fromCharCode.apply(null, bytes.subarray(i, i+chunk));
  }
  return btoa(binary);
}
function dataUrlToPart(src, idx){
  const m = /^data:([^;,]+)?(?:;charset=[^;,]+)?(;base64)?,(.*)$/i.exec(src||'');
  if(!m) return null;
  const mime = m[1] || 'application/octet-stream';
  const ext = (mime.split('/')[1] || 'bin').replace('jpeg','jpg').replace('+xml','');
  const location = `file:///C:/export/media/image${idx}.${ext}`;
  const base64 = m[2] ? m[3] : uint8ToBase64(new TextEncoder().encode(decodeURIComponent(m[3])));
  return {mime, location, base64};
}
function buildMhtmlFromHtml(exportHtml){
  const parser = new DOMParser();
  const doc = parser.parseFromString(exportHtml, 'text/html');
  const parts = [];
  let imgIndex = 1;
  doc.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(img=>{
    const src = img.getAttribute('src') || '';
    if(src.startsWith('data:')){
      const part = dataUrlToPart(src, imgIndex++);
      if(part){
        img.setAttribute('src', part.location);
        parts.push(part);
      }
    }
  });
  const finalHtml = '<!DOCTYPE html>\n' + doc.documentElement.outerHTML;
  const boundary = '----=_NextPart_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);
  const lines = [];
  lines.push('MIME-Version: 1.0');
  lines.push(`Content-Type: multipart/related; boundary="${boundary}"; type="text/html"`);
  lines.push('');
  lines.push(`--${boundary}`);
  lines.push('Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"');
  lines.push('Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64');
  lines.push('Content-Location: file:///C:/export/document.html');
  lines.push('');
  lines.push(uint8ToBase64(new TextEncoder().encode(finalHtml)));
  parts.forEach(part=>{
    lines.push(`--${boundary}`);
    lines.push(`Content-Type: ${part.mime}`);
    lines.push('Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64');
    lines.push(`Content-Location: ${part.location}`);
    lines.push('');
    lines.push(part.base64);
  });
  lines.push(`--${boundary}--`);
  return lines.join('\r\n');
}
function crc32(bytes){
  if(!window.__crcTable){
    const table = new Uint32Array(256);
    for(let n=0;n<256;n++){
      let c = n;
      for(let k=0;k<8;k++) c = (c & 1) ? (0xEDB88320 ^ (c >>> 1)) : (c >>> 1);
      table[n] = c >>> 0;
    }
    window.__crcTable = table;
  }
  let crc = 0 ^ (-1);
  for(let i=0;i<bytes.length;i++) crc = (crc >>> 8) ^ window.__crcTable[(crc ^ bytes[i]) & 0xFF];
  return (crc ^ (-1)) >>> 0;
}
function strBytes(s){ return new TextEncoder().encode(s); }
function concatArrays(arrays){
  const total = arrays.reduce((n,a)=>n+a.length,0);
  const out = new Uint8Array(total);
  let off = 0;
  arrays.forEach(a=>{ out.set(a, off); off += a.length; });
  return out;
}
function u16(n){ return new Uint8Array([n & 255, (n >>> 8) & 255]); }
function u32(n){ return new Uint8Array([n & 255, (n >>> 8) & 255, (n >>> 16) & 255, (n >>> 24) & 255]); }
function createZipStore(files){
  let offset = 0;
  const localParts = [];
  const centralParts = [];
  files.forEach(file=>{
    const nameBytes = strBytes(file.name);
    const dataBytes = file.data instanceof Uint8Array ? file.data : strBytes(file.data);
    const crc = crc32(dataBytes);
    const localHeader = concatArrays([
      u32(0x04034b50), u16(20), u16(0), u16(0), u16(0), u16(0),
      u32(crc), u32(dataBytes.length), u32(dataBytes.length),
      u16(nameBytes.length), u16(0), nameBytes, dataBytes
    ]);
    localParts.push(localHeader);
    const centralHeader = concatArrays([
      u32(0x02014b50), u16(20), u16(20), u16(0), u16(0), u16(0), u16(0),
      u32(crc), u32(dataBytes.length), u32(dataBytes.length),
      u16(nameBytes.length), u16(0), u16(0), u16(0), u16(0), u32(0), u32(offset),
      nameBytes
    ]);
    centralParts.push(centralHeader);
    offset += localHeader.length;
  });
  const centralDir = concatArrays(centralParts);
  const end = concatArrays([
    u32(0x06054b50), u16(0), u16(0), u16(files.length), u16(files.length),
    u32(centralDir.length), u32(offset), u16(0)
  ]);
  return new Blob([...localParts, centralDir, end], {type:'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'});
}
function buildDocxBlob(title){
  const exportHtml = buildExportHtml();
  const mht = buildMhtmlFromHtml(exportHtml);
  const docXml = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<w:document xmlns:wpc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/word/2010/wordprocessingCanvas"
 xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006"
 xmlns:o="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office"
 xmlns:r="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships"
 xmlns:m="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/math"
 xmlns:v="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml"
 xmlns:wp14="http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/word/2010/wordprocessingDrawing"
 xmlns:wp="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/wordprocessingDrawing"
 xmlns:w10="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:word"
 xmlns:w="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main"
 xmlns:w14="http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/word/2010/wordml"
 xmlns:wpg="http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/word/2010/wordprocessingGroup"
 xmlns:wpi="http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/word/2010/wordprocessingInk"
 xmlns:wne="http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/word/2006/wordml"
 xmlns:wps="http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/word/2010/wordprocessingShape"
 mc:Ignorable="w14 wp14">
  <w:body>
    <w:altChunk r:id="htmlChunk"/>
    <w:sectPr>
      <w:pgSz w:w="11906" w:h="16838"/>
      <w:pgMar w:top="567" w:right="567" w:bottom="567" w:left="567" w:header="300" w:footer="300" w:gutter="0"/>
    </w:sectPr>
  </w:body>
</w:document>`;
  const rels = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Relationships xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships">
  <Relationship Id="rId1" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/officeDocument" Target="word/document.xml"/>
</Relationships>`;
  const docRels = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Relationships xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships">
  <Relationship Id="htmlChunk" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/aFChunk" Target="afchunk.mht"/>
</Relationships>`;
  const contentTypes = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Types xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/content-types">
  <Default Extension="rels" ContentType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-package.relationships+xml"/>
  <Default Extension="xml" ContentType="application/xml"/>
  <Default Extension="mht" ContentType="message/rfc822"/>
  <Override PartName="/word/document.xml" ContentType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document.main+xml"/>
</Types>`;
  return createZipStore([
    {name:'[Content_Types].xml', data:contentTypes},
    {name:'_rels/.rels', data:rels},
    {name:'word/document.xml', data:docXml},
    {name:'word/_rels/document.xml.rels', data:docRels},
    {name:'word/afchunk.mht', data:mht}
  ]);
}
function exportWord(){
  updatePreview();

  const title = currentTitle().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/gi,'_') || 'document';
  const host = document.getElementById('previewHost');
  const page = host.querySelector('.nc-a4, .maint-v2-sheet, .sec-a4, .doc-outline') || host;

  const clone = page.cloneNode(true);
  clone.querySelectorAll('input, textarea, select, button, script').forEach(el => el.remove());

  const css = document.querySelector('style').innerHTML + `
    html,body{
      margin:0;
      padding:0;
      background:#ffffff;
      font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;}
    .nc-a4,.sec-a4,.maint-v2-sheet,.doc-outline{
      margin:0 !important;
      box-shadow:none !important;
      transform:none !important;
    }
  `;

  // Dimensions A4 à 96dpi environ
  const w = 794;
  const h = 1123;

  const xhtml = `
  <div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml">
    <style>${css}</style>
    <div style="width:210mm;min-height:297mm;background:white;overflow:hidden;">
      ${clone.outerHTML}
    </div>
  </div>`;

  const svg = `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="${w}" height="${h}" viewBox="0 0 ${w} ${h}">
    <foreignObject x="0" y="0" width="${w}" height="${h}">
      ${xhtml}
    </foreignObject>
  </svg>`;

  const svgBase64 = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(svg)));
  const svgData = `data:image/svg+xml;base64,${svgBase64}`;

  const docHtml = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>${title}</title>
<style>
@page{size:A4;margin:0;}
html,body{margin:0;padding:0;background:#fff;}
.page{width:210mm;height:297mm;margin:0;padding:0;overflow:hidden;}
.page img{display:block;width:210mm;height:297mm;margin:0;padding:0;border:0;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="page">
  <img src="${svgData}" width="794" height="1123" alt="${title}">
</div>


<!-- ============================================================

     • Volet de saisie : les titres sur bandeaux noirs passent en blanc.

  }
