    left:calc(min(88vw,720px) - 14px) !important;
  }
}
@media(max-width:820px){
  body.ws-epure #wsFormResizer{display:none !important;}
}
</style>

</body>
</html>`;

  const blob = new Blob(['\ufeff', docHtml], {type:'application/msword'});
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.download = title + '.doc';
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();

  setTimeout(()=>{
    URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
    a.remove();
  },1000);
}
function exportPdf(){
  updatePreview();

  const content = document.getElementById('previewHost').innerHTML;
  const w = window.open('', '_blank');

  w.document.write(`<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>${escapeHtml(currentTitle())}</title>
  <style>
    @page {
      size: A4;
      margin: ${(state.active==='consigne'||state.active==='diagnostic') ? '0' : '10mm'};
    }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      background: #fff;
    }

    ${Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('style')).map(s=>s.innerHTML).join('\n')}

    .block, .photo-card, .maintenance-photo-grid, .maintenance-photo-grid .photo-card, .diagnostic-photo-grid, .diagnostic-photo-grid > * {
      page-break-inside: avoid;
      break-inside: avoid;

function normalizeImportedPayloadData(type, data){
  const base = freshDataForTab(type);
  const merged = mergeDefaults(base, data || {});

  if(type === 'consigne'){
    state.consigne = merged;
    ensureConsigneV4();
    return state.consigne;
  }

  if(type === 'maintenance'){
    state.maintenance = mergeDefaults(makeMaintenanceDefault(), merged);
    normalizeMaintenanceData();
    return state.maintenance;
  }

  if(type === 'securite'){
    state.securite = merged;
    ensureSecurityData();
    return state.securite;
  }

  if(type === 'fiche'){
    state.fiche = merged;
    if(typeof ensureFicheSecuriteMachine === 'function') ensureFicheSecuriteMachine();
    return state.fiche;
  }

  return merged;
}

async function importCurrentJson(file){
  if(!file) return;
  const raw = await file.text();
  const payload = JSON.parse(raw);

  if(!payload || !payload.type || !payload.data){
    alert('Ce fichier JSON ne correspond pas à un document exporté.');
    return;
  }

  const allowedTypes = ['consigne','provisoire','bonnes','maintenance','diagnostic','fiche','securite'];
  if(!allowedTypes.includes(payload.type)){
    alert('Type de document non reconnu dans ce JSON.');
    return;
  }

  state.active = payload.type;
  state.currentArchiveId = null;
  state[payload.type] = normalizeImportedPayloadData(payload.type, payload.data);

  if(payload.logos && typeof payload.logos === 'object'){
    state.logos = {...defaultState.logos, ...(state.logos||{}), ...payload.logos};
  }
  if(payload.pictos && typeof payload.pictos === 'object'){
    state.pictos = {...(state.pictos||{}), ...payload.pictos};
  }

  persist();
  render();
  updatePreview();
  document.getElementById('editorArea').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});
  setTimeout(()=>{ render(); updatePreview(); },50);
  alert('Document JSON importé. Les champs sont prêts pour modification.');
}

function exportCurrentJson(){
  if(state.active==='archives') return alert('Choisis d’abord un type de document.');
  const payload = {
    type: state.active,
    title: currentTitle(),
    exportedAt: new Date().toLocaleString(),
    logos: state.logos || {},
    pictos: state.pictos || {},
    data: currentData()
  };
  const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
  const a=document.createElement('a');
  a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.download=(currentTitle()||state.active||'document').replace(/[^a-z0-9-_]+/gi,'_')+'.json';
  a.click();
}
function exportLibrary(){
  const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify({logos:state.logos,pictos:state.pictos,archives:state.archives}, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
  const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download='bibliotheque_consignes_securite.json'; a.click();
}
async function importLibrary(file){
  if(!file) return;
  const txt = await file.text();
  const data = JSON.parse(txt);
  if(data.logos) state.logos = {...defaultState.logos, ...data.logos};
  state.pictos = data.pictos || state.pictos;
  state.archives = Array.isArray(data.archives)? data.archives : state.archives;
  persist(); render();
}


function normalizePictoKey(name){
  return (name||'')
    .normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'')
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/,'')
    .replace(/[_\-]+/g,' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g,' ')
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
}
function isPictoCandidate(file){
  const path = ((file.webkitRelativePath || '') + ' ' + (file.name || '')).toLowerCase()
    .normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'');
  const isImage = (file.type||'').startsWith('image/') || /\.(png|jpe?g|gif|webp|svg)$/i.test(file.name||'');
  if(!isImage) return false;

  // Exclusions explicites pour éviter de mélanger logos et photos
  if(/(^|[\/\s_-])(logo|logos|photo|photos|illustration|illustrations)([\/\s_.-]|$)/.test(path)) return false;

  // Acceptation préférentielle si le fichier vient d'un dossier pictos
  if(/(^|[\/\s_-])(picto|pictos|micro|micros)([\/\s_.-]|$)/.test(path)) return true;

  // Fallback: noms de pictogrammes classiques
  if(/^(picto|danger|risque)[ _-]/.test((file.name||'').toLowerCase())) return true;

  return false;
}
function pictoLoadReport(files){
  const kept = [];
  const skipped = [];
  files.forEach(f => (isPictoCandidate(f) ? kept : skipped).push(f.name));
  return {kept, skipped};
}
function pictoLabel(key){
  const v = (key||'').trim();
  if(!v) return '';
  return v.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + v.slice(1);
}

function setupGlobalActions(){
  document.getElementById('logoInput').onchange = async e=>{
    const f = e.target.files[0];
    if(!f) return;
    const tabId = e.target.dataset.targetTab || state.active;
    state.logos = state.logos || {...defaultState.logos};
    state.logos[tabId] = await fileToDataUrl(f);
    e.target.value = '';
    persist();
    render();
  };
  document.getElementById('pictoFolder').onchange = async e=>{
    const allFiles = [...e.target.files];
    const files = allFiles.filter(isPictoCandidate);
    let loaded = 0;
    state.pictos = {};
    for(const file of files){
      const key = normalizePictoKey(file.name);
      if(!key) continue;
      state.pictos[key] = await fileToDataUrl(file);
      loaded++;
    }
    e.target.value = '';
    persist(); render();
    if(loaded){
      alert(loaded + ' pictogramme(s) chargé(s). Seuls les fichiers du dossier pictos/micro ont été pris en compte.');
    } else {
      const report = pictoLoadReport(allFiles);
      alert('Aucun pictogramme exploitable détecté. Vérifie que tes images sont bien dans un dossier nommé pictos (ou micro) et pas dans logos/photos.');
    }
  };
  document.getElementById('previewBtn').onclick = ()=>{ updatePreview(); document.getElementById('previewHost').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}); };
  document.getElementById('newBtn').onclick = newCurrentDocument;
  document.getElementById('pdfBtn').onclick = ()=>{ if(typeof doPrint==='function') doPrint(); else exportPdf(); };
  document.getElementById('saveBtn').onclick = saveCurrent;
  document.getElementById('exportCurrentJsonBtn').onclick = exportCurrentJson;
  document.getElementById('importCurrentJsonInput').onchange = e=> importCurrentJson(e.target.files[0]);
  document.getElementById('exportLibBtn').onclick = exportLibrary;
  document.getElementById('importLibInput').onchange = e=> importLibrary(e.target.files[0]);
}

setupGlobalActions();
render();

// Verrou export Word V5.21 : toujours utiliser exportWord SVG .doc
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
  const wb=document.getElementById('wordBtn');
  if(wb) wb.onclick=exportWord;
});


/* V5.27 - Compatibilité Edge entreprise
   Edge peut parfois perdre certains handlers inline dans un gros HTML local.
   Ce patch centralise click/input/change côté Edge uniquement. */
(function(){
  const isEdge = /\bEdg\//.test(navigator.userAgent || '');
  if(!isEdge) return;

  function findHandlerElement(start, attr){
    let el = start;
    while(el && el !== document && el.nodeType === 1){
      if(el.hasAttribute && el.hasAttribute(attr)) return el;
      el = el.parentElement;
    }
    return null;
  }

  function runInlineHandler(el, attr, event){
    const code = el.getAttribute(attr);
    if(!code) return;
    try{
      new Function('event', code).call(el, event);
    }catch(err){
      console.error('Compat Edge - erreur handler', attr, code, err);
      alert("Erreur dans l'action : " + (err && err.message ? err.message : err));
    }
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', function(event){
    const el = findHandlerElement(event.target, 'onclick');
    if(!el) return;
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();
    runInlineHandler(el, 'onclick', event);
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('input', function(event){
    const el = findHandlerElement(event.target, 'oninput');
    if(!el) return;
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();
    runInlineHandler(el, 'oninput', event);
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('change', function(event){
    const el = findHandlerElement(event.target, 'onchange');
    if(!el) return;
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();
    runInlineHandler(el, 'onchange', event);
  }, true);
})();

(function(){
  const bindCoreButtons = () => {
    const map = {
      previewBtn: () => updatePreview(),
      newBtn: () => newCurrentDocument(),
      pdfBtn: () => exportPdf(),
      saveBtn: () => saveCurrent(),
      exportCurrentJsonBtn: () => exportCurrentJson(false),
      exportLibBtn: () => exportLibraryJson()
    };
    Object.keys(map).forEach(id=>{
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if(el && !el.dataset.edgeCompatBound){
        el.dataset.edgeCompatBound = '1';
        el.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{ e.preventDefault(); map[id](); }, false);
      }
    });
  };
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', bindCoreButtons);
  else bindCoreButtons();
})();


/* =========================================================
   V5.59 - AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC — LOGIQUE AUTONOME
========================================================= */
function makeDiagnosticDefaultV59(){
  return {
    logo:'', title:'AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC', subtitle:"Identifier rapidement l’origine du problème",
    sector:'', machine:'', author:'', date:'',
    symptoms:[{icon:'⚠️',label:'Pièce trop courte'},{icon:'⚙️',label:'Blocage machine'},{icon:'💧',label:'Défaut étanchéité'},{icon:'📏',label:'Cote incorrecte'},{icon:'🔊',label:'Bruit anormal'},{icon:'🚫',label:'Cycle impossible'}],
    checks:[{title:'Pression air',photo:'',status:'ok'},{title:'Référence outil',photo:'',status:'warn'},{title:'Présence butée',photo:'',status:'ok'},{title:'Position profil',photo:'',status:'warn'}],
    example:'PIÈCE TROP COURTE',
    flow:[{title:'Vérifier le gabarit',photo:'',checks:['Gabarit conforme ?','Bien plaqué ?'],fix:'Repositionner le gabarit'},{title:"Vérifier l’angle",photo:'',checks:['Angle correct ?','Pas de jeu ?'],fix:"Régler l’angle"},{title:'Vérifier la référence',photo:'',checks:['Référence correcte ?','Outil adapté ?'],fix:"Changer l’outil"}],
    resolvedText:'PROBLÈME RÉSOLU', resolvedAction:'Relancer le cycle',
    causeTitle:'Mauvais réglage du gabarit', gravity:'● ● ○ ○', frequency:'Fréquente', impact:'Élevé',
    actions:['Repositionner le gabarit correctement','Régler l’angle','Vérifier et changer l’outil si besoin','Relancer un cycle test','Contrôler la première pièce'],
    service:'Méthodes Atelier', phone:'1234', priority:'Normale',
    tips:['Ne jamais forcer la machine','Toujours vérifier avant de relancer un cycle',"En cas de doute, demander de l’aide"],
    safetyTitle:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT', safetyText:'Respecter les consignes de sécurité avant toute intervention.'
  };
}
function ensureDiagnosticV59(){
  if(!state.diagnostic || !Array.isArray(state.diagnostic.symptoms)) state.diagnostic=makeDiagnosticDefaultV59();
  const d=state.diagnostic, def=makeDiagnosticDefaultV59();
  Object.keys(def).forEach(k=>{ if(d[k]===undefined) d[k]=def[k]; });
  ['symptoms','checks','flow','actions','tips'].forEach(k=>{ if(!Array.isArray(d[k])) d[k]=def[k]; });
  return d;
}
function diagV59StatusText(s){return s==='ok'?'✓ OK':s==='bad'?'✕ ANOMALIE':'! À CONTRÔLER'}
function diagV59StatusClass(s){return s==='ok'?'ok':s==='bad'?'bad':'warn'}
function diagV59Lines(v){return String(v||'').split('\n').map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean)}
function renderDiagnosticV59(){

    <div class="subband" style="margin-top:14px">3 — Démarche diagnostic <button class="yellow mini-btn" onclick="addDiagV59Flow()">+ Ajouter étape</button></div>
    ${d.flow.map((f,i)=>`<div class="diag59-editor-card"><div class="diag59-editor-head"><strong>Étape ${i+1}</strong><button class="danger" onclick="removeDiagV59Flow(${i})">Supprimer</button></div><div class="grid-4"><div class="field"><label>Titre</label><input value="${escapeHtml(f.title)}" oninput="diagV59Flow(${i},'title',this.value)"></div><div class="field"><label>Photo</label><label class="file-btn">Importer<input class="hidden" type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="setDiagV59FlowPhoto(${i},this.files[0])"></label><div class="diag59-photo">${f.photo?`<img src="${f.photo}">`:'Photo'}</div></div><div class="field"><label>Questions</label><textarea oninput="diagV59FlowList(${i},this.value)">${escapeHtml((f.checks||[]).join('\\n'))}</textarea></div><div class="field"><label>Action si NON</label><input value="${escapeHtml(f.fix)}" oninput="diagV59Flow(${i},'fix',this.value)"></div></div></div>`).join('')}

      <div class="field"><label>Résolution</label><input id="diag59-resolvedText" value="${escapeHtml(d.resolvedText)}"><input id="diag59-resolvedAction" value="${escapeHtml(d.resolvedAction)}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Bonnes pratiques</label><textarea id="diag59-tips">${escapeHtml(d.tips.join('\\n'))}</textarea></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Sécurité avant tout</label><input id="diag59-safetyTitle" value="${escapeHtml(d.safetyTitle)}"><textarea id="diag59-safetyText">${escapeHtml(d.safetyText)}</textarea></div>
    </div></div>`;
  p.querySelectorAll('#diag59-title,#diag59-subtitle,#diag59-date,#diag59-author,#diag59-sector,#diag59-machine,#diag59-example,#diag59-causeTitle,#diag59-gravity,#diag59-frequency,#diag59-impact,#diag59-actions,#diag59-service,#diag59-phone,#diag59-priority,#diag59-resolvedText,#diag59-resolvedAction,#diag59-tips,#diag59-safetyTitle,#diag59-safetyText').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('input',syncDiagV59));
}
function syncDiagV59(){ const d=ensureDiagnosticV59(), v=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value||''; d.title=v('diag59-title');d.subtitle=v('diag59-subtitle');d.date=v('diag59-date');d.author=v('diag59-author');d.sector=v('diag59-sector');d.machine=v('diag59-machine');d.example=v('diag59-example');d.causeTitle=v('diag59-causeTitle');d.gravity=v('diag59-gravity');d.frequency=v('diag59-frequency');d.impact=v('diag59-impact');d.actions=diagV59Lines(v('diag59-actions'));d.service=v('diag59-service');d.phone=v('diag59-phone');d.priority=v('diag59-priority');d.resolvedText=v('diag59-resolvedText');d.resolvedAction=v('diag59-resolvedAction');d.tips=diagV59Lines(v('diag59-tips'));d.safetyTitle=v('diag59-safetyTitle');d.safetyText=v('diag59-safetyText');persist();updatePreview();}
function setDiagV59LogoClick(){document.getElementById('diag59-logo-file')?.click()}
window.setDiagV59Logo=async f=>{if(!f)return;ensureDiagnosticV59().logo=await fileToDataUrl(f);persist();renderDiagnosticV59();updatePreview()}
window.addDiagV59Symptom=()=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().symptoms.push({icon:'⚠️',label:'Nouveau symptôme'});persist();renderDiagnosticV59();updatePreview()}
window.diagV59Symptom=(i,k,v)=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().symptoms[i][k]=v;persist();updatePreview()}
window.removeDiagV59Symptom=i=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().symptoms.splice(i,1);persist();renderDiagnosticV59();updatePreview()}
window.addDiagV59Check=()=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().checks.push({title:'Nouveau contrôle',photo:'',status:'warn'});persist();renderDiagnosticV59();updatePreview()}
window.diagV59Check=(i,k,v)=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().checks[i][k]=v;persist();updatePreview()}
window.removeDiagV59Check=i=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().checks.splice(i,1);persist();renderDiagnosticV59();updatePreview()}
window.setDiagV59CheckPhoto=async(i,f)=>{if(!f)return;ensureDiagnosticV59().checks[i].photo=await fileToDataUrl(f);persist();renderDiagnosticV59();updatePreview()}
window.addDiagV59Flow=()=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().flow.push({title:'Nouvelle vérification',photo:'',checks:['Question ?'],fix:'Action à effectuer'});persist();renderDiagnosticV59();updatePreview()}
window.diagV59Flow=(i,k,v)=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().flow[i][k]=v;persist();updatePreview()}
window.diagV59FlowList=(i,v)=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().flow[i].checks=diagV59Lines(v);persist();updatePreview()}
window.removeDiagV59Flow=i=>{ensureDiagnosticV59().flow.splice(i,1);persist();renderDiagnosticV59();updatePreview()}
window.setDiagV59FlowPhoto=async(i,f)=>{if(!f)return;ensureDiagnosticV59().flow[i].photo=await fileToDataUrl(f);persist();renderDiagnosticV59();updatePreview()}
function previewDiagnosticV59(){
  const d=ensureDiagnosticV59(); const date=d.date?d.date.split('-').reverse().join('/'):'';
  return `<div class="diag59-a4"><div class="diag59-top"><div class="diag59-logo">${d.logo?`<img src="${d.logo}">`:`<div class="diag59-logo-fallback">WIBAIE<small>PRODUCTION</small></div>`}</div><div class="diag59-title"><div class="ico">🛠️</div><div><h1>${escapeHtml(d.title)}</h1><p>${escapeHtml(d.subtitle)}</p></div></div><div class="diag59-meta"><small>Secteur</small><b>${escapeHtml(d.sector)}</b></div><div class="diag59-meta"><small>Machine</small><b>${escapeHtml(d.machine)}</b></div><div class="diag59-meta"><small>Rédacteur</small><b>${escapeHtml(d.author)}</b></div><div class="diag59-meta"><small>Date</small><b>${escapeHtml(date)}</b></div></div><div class="diag59-content">
  <div class="diag59-sec-title"><span class="diag59-num">1</span> Que se passe-t-il ?</div><div class="diag59-sub">Sélectionner le symptôme observé</div><div class="diag59-symptoms">${d.symptoms.map(s=>`<div class="diag59-symptom"><div class="icon">${escapeHtml(s.icon)}</div><b>${escapeHtml(s.label)}</b></div>`).join('')}</div>
  <div class="diag59-sec-title"><span class="diag59-num">2</span> Commencer par : vérifications rapides</div><div class="diag59-sub">Effectuer ces contrôles dans l’ordre</div><div class="diag59-checks-wrap"><div class="diag59-checks">${d.checks.map(c=>`<div class="diag59-check"><h3>${escapeHtml(c.title)}</h3><div class="diag59-check-img">${c.photo?`<img src="${c.photo}">`:'Photo'}</div><div class="diag59-status ${diagV59StatusClass(c.status)}">${diagV59StatusText(c.status)}</div></div>`).join('')}</div><div class="diag59-legend"><h3>Légende</h3><div class="diag59-leg-row"><div class="diag59-status ok">✓ OK</div><span>Conforme</span></div><div class="diag59-leg-row"><div class="diag59-status warn">! À contrôler</div><span>Vérification nécessaire</span></div><div class="diag59-leg-row"><div class="diag59-status bad">✕ Anomalie</div><span>Cause probable</span></div></div></div>
  <div class="diag59-sec-title"><span class="diag59-num">3</span> Suivre la démarche diagnostic</div><div class="diag59-flow"><div class="diag59-example">⚠️<br>Exemple :<br>${escapeHtml(d.example)}</div>${d.flow.slice(0,3).map((f,i)=>`<div class="diag59-step"><div class="diag59-step-head"><span class="diag59-step-num">${i+1}</span>${escapeHtml(f.title)}</div><div class="diag59-step-img">${f.photo?`<img src="${f.photo}">`:'Photo'}</div><ul>${(f.checks||[]).map(x=>`<li>${escapeHtml(x)}</li>`).join('')}</ul><div class="diag59-choice"><span class="yes">OUI</span><span class="no">NON</span></div><div class="diag59-fix">🔧 ${escapeHtml(f.fix)}</div></div>`).join('')}<div class="diag59-resolved">✓<br>${escapeHtml(d.resolvedText)}<br><small>${escapeHtml(d.resolvedAction)}</small></div></div>
  <div class="diag59-bottom"><div class="diag59-cause"><div class="diag59-box-title"><span class="diag59-num">4</span> Cause probable</div><div class="diag59-cause-grid"><div class="diag59-cause-ico">⚙️</div><div class="diag59-cause-text"><b>${escapeHtml(d.causeTitle)}</b><br>Gravité : ${escapeHtml(d.gravity)}<br>Fréquence : ${escapeHtml(d.frequency)}<br>Impact qualité : ${escapeHtml(d.impact)}</div></div></div><div class="diag59-actions"><div class="diag59-box-title"><span class="diag59-num">5</span> Action à effectuer</div><ul>${d.actions.map(x=>`<li>☐ ${escapeHtml(x)}</li>`).join('')}</ul></div><div class="diag59-escalade"><div class="diag59-box-title"><span class="diag59-num">6</span> Si le problème persiste</div><div class="diag59-escalade-grid"><div class="diag59-phone">☎️</div><div><b>APPELER LE SERVICE COMPÉTENT</b> &nbsp;·&nbsp; Service : ${escapeHtml(d.service)} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Poste : ${escapeHtml(d.phone)} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Priorité : ${escapeHtml(d.priority)}</div></div></div></div>
  <div class="diag59-foot"><div class="diag59-bp">💡<br>Bonnes<br>pratiques</div><div class="diag59-tips">${d.tips.map(x=>`<div>☑ ${escapeHtml(x)}</div>`).join('')}</div><div class="diag59-safety">🛡️ ${escapeHtml(d.safetyTitle)}<small>${escapeHtml(d.safetyText)}</small></div></div></div></div>`;
}


/* V5.60 - Aide au diagnostic métier JS */
function diag60LevelClass(v){v=String(v||'').toLowerCase();if(v.includes('crit')||v.includes('arrêt')||v.includes('secur')||v.includes('sécur'))return'crit';if(v.includes('élev')||v.includes('production'))return'high';if(v.includes('moy')||v.includes('occasion')||v.includes('qualit'))return'mid';return'low'}
function diag60Lib(){return[['⚠️','Pièce trop courte'],['📏','Pièce trop longue'],['💧','Défaut étanchéité'],['🧴','Mauvais encollage'],['⚙️','Blocage machine'],['🔊','Bruit anormal'],['🚫','Cycle impossible'],['🎯','Mauvais positionnement'],['✂️','Coupe incorrecte'],['📐','Angle faux'],['🟠','Capteur absent'],['❓','Autre']]}
function diag60Default(){return{logo:'',title:'AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC',subtitle:"Identifier rapidement l’origine du problème",sector:'',machine:'',author:'',date:'',symptoms:[{type:'Mauvais encollage',icon:'🧴',label:'Mauvais encollage',photos:[]}],causeTitle:'Cause à caractériser',gravity:'Moyenne',frequency:'Occasionnelle',impact:'Qualité',steps:[{title:"Vérifier l’aspect de la zone",photos:[],why:"Permet de confirmer visuellement le défaut avant d’agir.",question:"Le défaut est-il visible sur la pièce ?",ifYes:"Passer au contrôle suivant.",ifNo:"Rechercher une autre origine ou appeler le référent."},{title:"Contrôler les capteurs",photos:[],why:"Un capteur mal lu peut provoquer une mauvaise séquence machine.",question:"Les voyants / informations capteur sont-ils conformes ?",ifYes:"Passer au contrôle suivant.",ifNo:"Nettoyer, repositionner ou remplacer l’élément concerné."}],service:'Méthodes Atelier',phone:'1234',priority:'Normale',safetyTitle:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT',safetyText:'Respecter les consignes de sécurité avant toute intervention.'}}
function ensureDiagnostic60(){if(!state.diagnostic||!Array.isArray(state.diagnostic.steps)){const old=state.diagnostic||{},d=diag60Default();d.title=old.title||d.title;d.subtitle=old.subtitle||d.subtitle;d.sector=old.sector||old.zone||'';d.machine=old.machine||'';d.author=old.author||'';d.date=old.date||'';if(Array.isArray(old.symptoms))d.symptoms=old.symptoms.map(s=>({type:s.type||s.label||'Autre',icon:s.icon||'❓',label:s.label||s.type||'Autre',photos:s.photos||[]}));d.causeTitle=old.causeTitle||old.problem||d.causeTitle;d.gravity=old.gravity||'Moyenne';d.frequency=old.frequency||'Occasionnelle';d.impact=old.impact||'Qualité';if(Array.isArray(old.flow))d.steps=old.flow.map(f=>({title:f.title||'',photos:f.photos||(f.photo?[f.photo]:[]),why:f.why||'',question:(f.checks||[]).join('\n')||'',ifYes:'Passer au contrôle suivant.',ifNo:f.fix||''}));state.diagnostic=d}const d=state.diagnostic,def=diag60Default();Object.keys(def).forEach(k=>{if(d[k]===undefined)d[k]=def[k]});if(!Array.isArray(d.symptoms))d.symptoms=def.symptoms;if(!Array.isArray(d.steps))d.steps=def.steps;d.symptoms.forEach(s=>{if(!Array.isArray(s.photos))s.photos=[];if(!s.icon)s.icon='❓';if(!s.label)s.label=s.type||'Autre'});d.steps.forEach(s=>{if(!Array.isArray(s.photos))s.photos=[]});return d}
function diag60PickIcon(type){const f=diag60Lib().find(x=>x[1]===type);return f?f[0]:'❓'}
function diag60PhotoGrid(photos){return(photos||[]).map((p,i)=>`<div class="diag60-thumb"><img src="${p}"><button onclick="removeDiag60Photo(this,${i})">×</button></div>`).join('')||'<div class="muted">Aucune photo</div>'}
function renderDiagnosticV59(){return renderDiagnostic60()}

yellow-accent">🛠️ Aide au diagnostic — arbre de dépannage</div><div class="diag60-help">Chaque étape est un contrôle. <b>OUI</b> = passer au contrôle suivant. <b>NON</b> = appliquer l’action function diagTextKeepSpaces(v){ return escapeHtml(v||'').replace(/ /g,'&nbsp;'); }

${diag60LevelClass(d.impact)}">${escapeHtml(d.impact)}</div></div>${diag74Matrix(d.gravity,d.frequency)}</div><div class="diag59-sec-title"><span class="diag59-num">3</span> Démarche diagnostic</div><div class="diag59-sub">Si OUI : passer au contrôle suivant. Si NON : appliquer l’action corrective.</div><div class="diag60-flow">${d.steps.map((st,i)=>`<div class="diag60-step"><div class="diag60-step-num">${i+1}</div><div class="diag60-step-photos">${diag60Imgs(st.photos)}</div><div class="diag60-step-body"><h3>${escapeHtml(st.title)}</h3>${st.why?`<div class="diag60-why"><b>Pourquoi ?</b><br>${escapeHtml(st.why)}</div>`:''}<div class="diag60-question">${escapeHtml(st.question||'')}</div><div class="diag60-actions"><div class="diag60-ifok">✅ SI OUI<br>${escapeHtml(st.ifYes||'Passer à l’étape suivante.')}</div><div class="diag60-ifno">❌ SI NON<br>${escapeHtml(st.ifNo||'')}</div></div></div></div>`).join('')}</div><div class="diag60-bottom"><div class="diag60-escalade"><div class="diag60-box-title">☎️ Si le problème persiste</div><div class="diag60-escalade-grid"><div class="diag60-phone">☎</div><div><b>APPELER LE SERVICE COMPÉTENT</b> &nbsp;·&nbsp; Service : ${escapeHtml(d.service)} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Poste : ${escapeHtml(d.phone)} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Priorité : ${escapeHtml(d.priority)}</div></div></div><div class="diag60-security"><div class="diag60-box-title">🛡️ ${escapeHtml(d.safetyTitle)}</div><div style="color:#111827;font-size:10px;font-weight:700">${escapeHtml(d.safetyText)}</div></div></div></div></div>`}

/* =========================================================
   V5.70 - Nouveau moteur PDF html2pdf
   Capture la prévisualisation complète et découpe en A4 multipages.
========================================================= */
(function(){
  function loadScriptOnce(src){
    return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{
      if(window.html2pdf) return resolve();
      const existing = document.querySelector('script[data-html2pdf-loader="1"]');
      if(existing){
        existing.addEventListener('load',()=>resolve(),{once:true});
        existing.addEventListener('error',()=>reject(new Error('Chargement html2pdf impossible')),{once:true});
        return;
      }
      const s=document.createElement('script');
      s.src=src;
      s.dataset.html2pdfLoader='1';
      s.onload=()=>resolve();
      s.onerror=()=>reject(new Error('Impossible de charger le moteur PDF html2pdf. Vérifie l’accès Internet ou le proxy entreprise.'));
      document.head.appendChild(s);
    });
  }

  function sanitizePdfName(name){
    return String(name||'document_atelier').replace(/[^a-z0-9À-ÿ_-]+/gi,'_').replace(/_+/g,'_').replace(/^_|_$/g,'');
  }

  function preparePdfClone(){
    updatePreview();

    const host=document.getElementById('previewHost');
    if(!host) throw new Error('Prévisualisation introuvable');

    const clone=host.cloneNode(true);

    // PATCH V2.8 — Fiche sécurité machine : ne plus remplacer les pictos par un SVG générique.
    // On conserve l'image réelle choisie par l'utilisateur et on force le texte visible.
    if(state.active === 'fiche'){
      clone.querySelectorAll('.fiche-risk-pill').forEach(pill=>{
        const src = pill.getAttribute('data-picto-src') || '';
        if(src && !pill.querySelector('img')){
          const img=document.createElement('img');
          img.className='fiche-risk-img';
          img.src=src;
          img.alt='';
          img.setAttribute('loading','eager');
          img.setAttribute('decoding','sync');
          img.style.cssText='width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;min-height:18px;max-width:18px;max-height:18px;object-fit:contain;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;opacity:1;visibility:visible;background:transparent;';
          pill.insertBefore(img, pill.firstChild);
        }
        const label = pill.querySelector('.fiche-risk-label');
        if(label){
          label.style.display='inline-block';
          label.style.color='#111827';
          label.style.opacity='1';
          label.style.visibility='visible';
        }
        pill.style.display='inline-flex';
        pill.style.alignItems='center';
        pill.style.justifyContent='flex-start';
        pill.style.gap='6px';
        pill.style.background='#ffffff';
        pill.style.color='#111827';
        pill.style.border='1px solid #cfd6df';
        pill.style.borderRadius='999px';
        pill.style.padding='4px 10px';
        pill.style.fontWeight='800';
        pill.style.whiteSpace='nowrap';
      });
    }

    clone.classList.remove('consigne-preview','maintenance-preview','fiche-preview','securite-preview','diagnostic-preview');
    clone.classList.add(getExportPageClass('pdf'));

    clone.style.width='210mm';
    clone.style.minHeight='297mm';
    clone.style.height='auto';
    clone.style.maxHeight='none';
    clone.style.overflow='visible';
    clone.style.margin='0';
    clone.style.padding='0';
    clone.style.boxShadow='none';
    clone.style.background='#fff';

    clone.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(el=>{
      el.style.maxHeight = el.style.maxHeight === '297mm' ? 'none' : el.style.maxHeight;
      if(getComputedStyle(el).overflow === 'hidden' && state.active === 'diagnostic'){
        if(el.classList.contains('diag59-a4') || el.classList.contains('diag60-content')){
          el.style.overflow='visible';
        }
      }
    });

    const wrap=document.createElement('div');
    wrap.id='pdfExportSandboxV70';
    wrap.style.position='fixed';
    wrap.style.left='-10000px';
    wrap.style.top='0';
    wrap.style.width='210mm';
    wrap.style.background='#fff';
    wrap.style.zIndex='-1';
    wrap.appendChild(clone);
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);

    return {wrap, clone};
  }


  async function waitForFicheRiskImagesV28(root){
    if(!(state && state.active === 'fiche') || !root) return;
    const imgs = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.fiche-risk-pill img'));
    await Promise.all(imgs.map(img => new Promise(resolve => {
      try{
        img.setAttribute('loading','eager');
        img.setAttribute('decoding','sync');
        img.style.display='inline-block';
        img.style.visibility='visible';
        img.style.opacity='1';
        if(img.complete && img.naturalWidth > 0) return resolve();
        img.onload = () => resolve();
        img.onerror = () => resolve();
        if(typeof img.decode === 'function') img.decode().then(resolve).catch(resolve);
        setTimeout(resolve, 900);
      }catch(e){ resolve(); }
    })));
  }

  async function exportPdfHtml2PdfV70(){
    try{
      await loadScriptOnce('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2pdf.js@0.10.1/dist/html2pdf.bundle.min.js');

      const {wrap, clone}=preparePdfClone();
      const filename=(typeof docBaseNameV78==='function' ? docBaseNameV78() : sanitizePdfName(currentTitle()))+'.pdf';

      const opt={
        margin:0,
        filename,
        image:{type:'jpeg',quality:0.98},
        html2canvas:{
          scale:2,
          useCORS:true,
          allowTaint:true,
          backgroundColor:'#ffffff',
          scrollX:0,
          scrollY:0,
          windowWidth:Math.max(clone.scrollWidth, clone.offsetWidth),
          windowHeight:Math.max(clone.scrollHeight, clone.offsetHeight)
        },
        jsPDF:{unit:'mm',format:'a4',orientation:'portrait',compress:true},
        pagebreak:{
          mode:['css','legacy'],
          avoid:['.diag60-step','.nc-step','.sec-box','.maint-v2-table tr','.block','.photo-card']
        }
      };

      await waitForFicheRiskImagesV28(clone);
      await html2pdf().set(opt).from(clone).save();

      setTimeout(()=>wrap.remove(),500);
    }catch(err){
      console.error(err);
      alert("Le nouveau moteur PDF n'a pas pu se lancer : " + (err && err.message ? err.message : err) + "\n\nJe bascule sur l'ancien export navigateur.");
      if(typeof window.exportDiagnosticPdfV69 === 'function' && state.active === 'diagnostic') return window.exportDiagnosticPdfV69();
      if(typeof oldExportPdfV70 === 'function') return oldExportPdfV70();
    }
  }

  window.oldExportPdfV70 = window.exportPdf || exportPdf;
  window.exportPdf = exportPdfHtml2PdfV70;

  const btn=document.getElementById('pdfBtn');
  if(btn){
    btn.onclick=exportPdfHtml2PdfV70;
    btn.title='Export PDF multipage via moteur html2pdf';
  }
})();

   V5.71 - Mode "Aperçu imprimable"

(function(){
  function openPrintablePreviewV71(){
    updatePreview();

    const host = document.getElementById('previewHost');
    if(!host){
      alert("Prévisualisation introuvable.");
      return;
    }

    const clone = host.cloneNode(true);
    const exportClass = typeof getExportPageClass === 'function' ? getExportPageClass('pdf') : '';

    clone.classList.remove(
      'consigne-preview',
      'maintenance-preview',
      'fiche-preview',
      'securite-preview',
      'diagnostic-preview'
    );

    if(exportClass) clone.classList.add(exportClass);

    const title = typeof currentTitle === 'function' ? currentTitle() : 'Document atelier';

    const w = window.open('', '_blank');

    w.document.write(`<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">

<style>
@page{
  size:A4;
  margin:0;
}

  padding:0 !important;

  width:210mm !important;
  height:auto !important;
  min-height:297mm !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
  font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;
}

${document.querySelector('style').innerHTML}

<!-- ============================================================
     V17 — Finitions ergonomie

       du bord droit, plus seulement via le repère central.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="patch-v17-bandeaux-blancs-resize-plein-bord">
/* Titres sur bandeaux noirs du volet de saisie : blanc plus lisible */
body.ws-epure #editorArea .band,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .subband,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .block > .subband,

  color:#ffffff !important;
  text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.35) !important;
}
body.ws-epure #editorArea .band *,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .subband *,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .nc-mode-head *{
  color:inherit !important;
}

  left:7px !important;

}

  content:'↔' !important;
  position:fixed !important;
  top:50% !important;
  left:calc(var(--ws-form-live-w) - 14px) !important;
  transform:translateY(-50%) !important;
  width:28px !important;
  height:48px !important;
  border-radius:999px !important;
  display:flex !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  justify-content:center !important;
  color:#00e5ff !important;
  background:#07182a !important;
  border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.45) !important;

}

  opacity:1 !important;

  left:var(--ws-form-live-w) !important;

</style>

</body>
</html>`);

    w.document.close();
  }

  window.openPrintablePreviewV71 = openPrintablePreviewV71;

  function addPrintableButtonV71(){
    const toolbar = document.querySelector('.toolbar');
    if(!toolbar || document.getElementById('printablePreviewBtnV71')) return;

    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.id = 'printablePreviewBtnV71';
    btn.type = 'button';
    btn.className = 'yellow';
    btn.textContent = 'Aperçu imprimable';
    btn.title = 'Ouvre la prévisualisation seule pour impression/PDF multipage';
    btn.onclick = openPrintablePreviewV71;

    const pdfBtn = document.getElementById('pdfBtn');
    if(pdfBtn && pdfBtn.parentNode === toolbar){
      toolbar.insertBefore(btn, pdfBtn.nextSibling);
    }else{
      toolbar.appendChild(btn);
    }
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', addPrintableButtonV71);
  }else{
    addPrintableButtonV71();
  }
})();


/* =========================================================
   V5.72 - Aperçu imprimable corrigé
   - plus de page blanche
   - bouton placé sous la prévisualisation
========================================================= */
(function(){
  function getPrintableContentV72(){
    updatePreview();
    const host = document.getElementById('previewHost');
    if(!host) throw new Error("Prévisualisation introuvable.");

    const clone = host.cloneNode(true);
    const exportClass = typeof getExportPageClass === 'function' ? getExportPageClass('pdf') : '';

    clone.classList.remove(
      'consigne-preview',
      'maintenance-preview',
      'fiche-preview',
      'securite-preview',
      'diagnostic-preview'
    );

    if(exportClass) clone.classList.add(exportClass);

    return clone.outerHTML;
  }

  window.openPrintablePreviewV72 = function(){
    let content = '';
    try{
      content = getPrintableContentV72();
    }catch(err){
      alert(err.message || err);
      return;
    }

    const title = typeof currentTitle === 'function' ? currentTitle() : 'Document atelier';
    const w = window.open('', '_blank');

    w.document.open();
    w.document.write(`<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>${escapeHtml(title)} - aperçu imprimable</title>
<style>
@page{
  size:A4;
  margin:0;
}

html,body{
  margin:0 !important;
  padding:0 !important;
  background:#fff !important;
  width:210mm !important;
  min-height:297mm !important;
  height:auto !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
  font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;
}

${document.querySelector('style').innerHTML}

/* V5.72 : aperçu imprimable direct, sans injection JS */

  function addPrintableButtonBottomV72(){
    if(document.getElementById('printablePreviewBtnBottomV72')) return;

    const previewWrap = document.querySelector('.preview-wrap');
    if(!previewWrap) return;

    const btnBox = document.createElement('div');
    btnBox.id = 'printablePreviewBtnBottomV72';
    btnBox.style.display = 'flex';
    btnBox.style.justifyContent = 'center';
    btnBox.style.marginTop = '16px';

    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.type = 'button';
    btn.className = 'yellow';
    btn.textContent = 'Ouvrir l’aperçu imprimable';
    btn.title = 'Ouvre uniquement la prévisualisation pour imprimer ou enregistrer en PDF';
    btn.onclick = window.openPrintablePreviewV72;

    btnBox.appendChild(btn);
    previewWrap.appendChild(btnBox);
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', addPrintableButtonBottomV72);
  }else{
    addPrintableButtonBottomV72();
  }
})();


/* =========================================================
   V5.73 - Aperçu imprimable : couleurs/fonds conservés
   Chrome/Edge n'impriment pas toujours les backgrounds par défaut.
   Ici on force l'impression des fonds et des couleurs.
========================================================= */
(function(){
  const style = document.createElement('style');
  style.id = 'printColorFixV73';
  style.textContent = `
    *{
      -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
      print-color-adjust: exact !important;
      color-adjust: exact !important;
    }

    @media print{
      *{
        -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
        print-color-adjust: exact !important;
        color-adjust: exact !important;
      }

      .diag59-title,
      .diag59-title *,
      .diag60-ifok,
      .diag60-ifno,
      .diag60-why,
      .diag60-level,
      .diag60-cause-box,
      .diag60-cause-main,
      .diag60-security,
      .diag59-num,
      .diag60-step-num,
      .nc-blackbar,
      .nc-tag,
      .nc-card-head,
      .sec-top,
      .sec-box-head,
      .band,
      .subband{
        -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
        print-color-adjust: exact !important;
        color-adjust: exact !important;
      }
    }
  `;
  if(!document.getElementById('printColorFixV73')){
    document.head.appendChild(style);
  }
})();

(function(){

  left:7px !important;

}

</html>`);
    w.document.close();
  };

  window.openPrintablePreviewV72 = window.openPrintablePreviewV73;
  window.openPrintablePreviewV71 = window.openPrintablePreviewV73;

  function rebindPrintableButtonV73(){
    const btn = document.getElementById('printablePreviewBtnBottomV72')?.querySelector('button');
    if(btn){
      btn.onclick = window.openPrintablePreviewV73;
      btn.textContent = 'Ouvrir l’aperçu imprimable';
    }
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', rebindPrintableButtonV73);
  }else{
    rebindPrintableButtonV73();
  }
})();


/* V5.74 - Helpers matrice Gravité x Fréquence */
function diag74ScoreSeverity(v){
  v=String(v||'').toLowerCase();
  if(v.includes('crit')) return 4;
  if(v.includes('élev') || v.includes('elev')) return 3;
  if(v.includes('moy')) return 2;
  return 1;
}
function diag74ScoreFrequency(v){
  v=String(v||'').toLowerCase();
  if(v.includes('perman')) return 4;
  if(v.includes('fréq') || v.includes('freq')) return 3;
  if(v.includes('occasion')) return 2;
  return 1;
}
function diag74Matrix(gravity, frequency){
  const g=diag74ScoreSeverity(gravity);
  const f=diag74ScoreFrequency(frequency);
  let cells='';
  for(let row=4; row>=1; row--){
    for(let col=1; col<=4; col++){
      const level=Math.min(4, Math.max(1, Math.ceil((row+col)/2)-1));
      const active=(row===g && col===f);
      cells += `<div class="diag60-matrix-cell l${level}${active?' active':''}"></div>`;
    }
  }
  return `<div class="diag60-matrix">
    <div class="diag60-matrix-title">Gravité × fréquence</div>
    <div class="diag60-matrix-grid">${cells}</div>
    <div class="diag60-matrix-legend"><span>Rare</span><span>Fréqu.</span></div>
  </div>`;
}


/* =========================================================
   V5.75 - Jauges Gravité / Fréquence + aperçu A4/A3
========================================================= */
function diag75ScoreGravity(v){
  v=String(v||'').toLowerCase();
  if(v.includes('crit')) return 5;
  if(v.includes('élev') || v.includes('elev')) return 4;
  if(v.includes('moy')) return 3;
  if(v.includes('faib')) return 1;
  return 2;
}
function diag75ScoreFrequency(v){
  v=String(v||'').toLowerCase();
  if(v.includes('perman')) return 5;
  if(v.includes('fréq') || v.includes('freq')) return 4;
  if(v.includes('occasion')) return 3;
  if(v.includes('rare')) return 1;
  return 2;
}
function diag75Gauge(label, score){
  let cells='';
  for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){
    cells += `<span class="diag60-gauge-cell ${i<=score?'on l'+i:''}"></span>`;
  }
  return `<div class="diag60-gauge">
    <div class="diag60-gauge-label">${label}</div>
    <div class="diag60-gauge-bar">${cells}</div>
    <div class="diag60-gauge-value">${score}/5</div>
  </div>`;
}
function diag75Gauges(gravity, frequency){
  return `<div class="diag60-gauges">
    ${diag75Gauge('Gravité', diag75ScoreGravity(gravity))}
    ${diag75Gauge('Fréquence', diag75ScoreFrequency(frequency))}
  </div>`;
}

/* Remplace la matrice si la fonction ancienne est appelée */
function diag74Matrix(gravity, frequency){
  return diag75Gauges(gravity, frequency);
}

window.openPrintablePreviewV75 = function(format='a4'){
  updatePreview();

  const host = document.getElementById('previewHost');
  if(!host){
    alert("Prévisualisation introuvable.");
    return;
  }

  const clone = host.cloneNode(true);
  const exportClass = typeof getExportPageClass === 'function' ? getExportPageClass('pdf') : '';

  clone.classList.remove(
    'consigne-preview',
    'maintenance-preview',
    'fiche-preview',
    'securite-preview',
    'diagnostic-preview'
  );

  if(exportClass) clone.classList.add(exportClass);

  const isA3 = format === 'a3';
  const pageW = isA3 ? '297mm' : '210mm';
  const pageH = isA3 ? '420mm' : '297mm';
  const scale = isA3 ? '1.414' : '1';

  const title = typeof currentTitle === 'function' ? currentTitle() : 'Document atelier';
  const content = clone.outerHTML;
  const w = window.open('', '_blank');

  w.document.open();
  w.document.write(`<!DOCTYPE html>

  size:${isA3 ? 'A3' : 'A4'};

}

html,body{
  margin:0 !important;
  padding:0 !important;
  background:#fff !important;

  min-height:${pageH} !important;
  height:auto !important;
  overflow:visible !important;

  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
  print-color-adjust: exact !important;
  color-adjust: exact !important;
}

${Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('style')).map(s=>s.innerHTML).join('\n')}

#printableRootV75{

function addPrintableButtonsV75(){
  const oldBox = document.getElementById('printablePreviewBtnBottomV72');
  if(oldBox) oldBox.remove();

  if(document.getElementById('printablePreviewBtnsV75')) return;

  const previewWrap = document.querySelector('.preview-wrap');
  if(!previewWrap) return;

  const box = document.createElement('div');
  box.id = 'printablePreviewBtnsV75';
  box.style.display = 'flex';
  box.style.justifyContent = 'center';
  box.style.gap = '10px';
  box.style.marginTop = '16px';

  const a4 = document.createElement('button');
  a4.type = 'button';
  a4.className = 'yellow';
  a4.textContent = 'Aperçu imprimable A4';
  a4.onclick = () => window.openPrintablePreviewV75('a4');

  const a3 = document.createElement('button');
  a3.type = 'button';
  a3.className = 'yellow';
  a3.textContent = 'Aperçu imprimable A3';
  a3.onclick = () => window.openPrintablePreviewV75('a3');

  box.appendChild(a4);
  box.appendChild(a3);
  previewWrap.appendChild(box);
}

if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', addPrintableButtonsV75);
}else{
  addPrintableButtonsV75();
}


/* =========================================================
   V5.77 - Menu simplifié + JSON compagnon
   - retire Export PDF et Aperçu imprimable du haut
   - retire exports/imports bibliothèque JSON
   - garde import JSON document
   - génère automatiquement un JSON compagnon au lancement de l’aperçu imprimable
========================================================= */
(function(){
  function injectMenuStyleV77(){
    if(document.getElementById('menuStyleV77')) return;

    const style = document.createElement('style');
    style.id = 'menuStyleV77';
    style.textContent = `
      .topbar{
        border-radius:26px !important;
        background:rgba(255,255,255,.92) !important;
        backdrop-filter:blur(14px) !important;
        box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,.10) !important;
      }

      .toolbar{
        gap:10px !important;
        align-items:center !important;
      }

      .toolbar button,
      .toolbar .file-btn{
        border-radius:999px !important;
        padding:10px 16px !important;
        font-weight:850 !important;
        border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.12) !important;
        box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(15,23,42,.05) !important;
      }

      .toolbar .primary{
        background:#0b1220 !important;
        color:#fff !important;
      }

      .toolbar .yellow{
        background:#fff7cc !important;
        border-color:#f3c316 !important;
        color:#111827 !important;
      }

      #pdfBtn,
      #printablePreviewBtnV71,
      #exportCurrentJsonBtn,
      #exportLibBtn,
      label.file-btn:has(#importLibInput),
      #importLibInput,
      #exportCurrentJsonBtn,
      #exportLibBtn{
        display:none !important;
      }

      /* On masque aussi l'ancien bouton aperçu imprimable ajouté dans le haut si présent */
      .toolbar button[title*="imprimable"],
      .toolbar button[title*="html2pdf"]{
        display:none !important;
      }

      /* Le bouton bas de prévisualisation reste la voie officielle */
      #printablePreviewBtnsV75 button{
        border-radius:999px !important;
        padding:12px 18px !important;
        font-weight:900 !important;
        box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(15,23,42,.10) !important;
      }

      /* Garder visible le bouton import JSON document */
      label.file-btn:has(#importCurrentJsonInput){
        display:inline-flex !important;
        align-items:center !important;
      }
    `;
    document.head.appendChild(style);
  }

  function cleanupMenuV77(){
    injectMenuStyleV77();

    const hideById = [
      'pdfBtn',
      'exportCurrentJsonBtn',
      'exportLibBtn'
    ];

    hideById.forEach(id=>{
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if(el) el.style.display = 'none';
    });

    const importLib = document.getElementById('importLibInput');
    if(importLib){
      const lab = importLib.closest('label');
      if(lab) lab.style.display = 'none';
    }

    // Raccourcir le libellé de l'import document JSON.
    const importDoc = document.getElementById('importCurrentJsonInput');
    if(importDoc){
      const lab = importDoc.closest('label');
      if(lab){
        lab.childNodes.forEach(n=>{
          if(n.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && n.textContent.includes('Importer document JSON')){
            n.textContent = 'Importer JSON';
          }
        });
      }
    }

    const reload = document.getElementById('reloadLastJsonBtn');
    if(reload) reload.textContent = 'Dernier JSON';
  }

  function getCurrentDocumentPayloadV77(){
    const type = state.active || 'consigne';
    const data = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state[type] || {}));
    return {
      app:'creation_documents_atelier',
      version:'V5.77',
      type,
      exportedAt:new Date().toISOString(),
      title:typeof currentTitle === 'function' ? currentTitle() : type,
      data
    };
  }

  function sanitizeFileNameV77(name){
    return String(name || 'document_atelier')
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9À-ÿ_-]+/gi,'_')
      .replace(/_+/g,'_')
      .replace(/^_|_$/g,'');
  }

  function downloadJsonCompanionV77(){
    try{
      const payload = getCurrentDocumentPayloadV77();
      const base = sanitizeFileNameV77(payload.title);
      const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload,null,2)], {type:'application/json'});
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      a.download = base + '.json';
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      setTimeout(()=>{
        URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
        a.remove();
      },1000);
    }catch(err){
      console.warn('JSON compagnon non généré', err);
    }
  }

  // On enveloppe l’aperçu imprimable A4/A3 pour générer automatiquement le JSON compagnon.
  function wrapPrintableV77(){
    if(window.__printableWrappedV77) return;
    window.__printableWrappedV77 = true;

    const oldV75 = window.openPrintablePreviewV75;
    if(typeof oldV75 === 'function'){
      window.openPrintablePreviewV75 = function(format='a4'){
        downloadJsonCompanionV77();
        return oldV75(format);
      };
    }

    const oldV73 = window.openPrintablePreviewV73;
    if(typeof oldV73 === 'function'){
      window.openPrintablePreviewV73 = function(){
        downloadJsonCompanionV77();
        return oldV73();
      };
    }

    const oldV72 = window.openPrintablePreviewV72;
    if(typeof oldV72 === 'function'){
      window.openPrintablePreviewV72 = function(){
        downloadJsonCompanionV77();
        return oldV72();
      };
    }
  }

  function initV77(){
    cleanupMenuV77();
    wrapPrintableV77();

    // Repassage après render(), car certains boutons sont recréés.
    setTimeout(cleanupMenuV77,300);
    setTimeout(wrapPrintableV77,300);
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initV77);
  }else{
    initV77();
  }

  // Sécurité : au cas où render() reconstruit des éléments.
  const oldRenderV77 = window.render;
  if(typeof oldRenderV77 === 'function' && !window.__renderWrappedV77){
    window.__renderWrappedV77 = true;
    window.render = function(){
      const r = oldRenderV77.apply(this, arguments);
      setTimeout(initV77, 0);
      // Notifier les autres modules sans chaîner les wrappers
      setTimeout(()=>document.dispatchEvent(new Event('labodoc-rendered')), 60);
      return r;
    };
  }
})();


/* =========================================================
   V5.78 - Dossier de travail + nom JSON intelligent
   - choix d'un dossier via Edge/Chrome
   - JSON compagnon enregistré dans ce dossier si autorisé
   - nom basé sur le contenu de la consigne, pas sur le titre de page
========================================================= */
(function(){
  let atelierDirectoryHandleV78 = null;

  function sanitizeNameV78(name){
    return String(name || 'document_atelier')
      .normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'')
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]+/gi,'_')
      .replace(/_+/g,'_')
      .replace(/^_|_$/g,'')
      .slice(0,120) || 'document_atelier';
  }

  function firstNonEmptyV78(){
    for(const v of arguments){
      if(v !== undefined && v !== null && String(v).trim()) return String(v).trim();
    }
    return '';
  }

  function docBaseNameV78(){
    const type = state.active || 'document';
    const d = state[type] || {};

    // Aide au diagnostic : Onglet_TitreProblème_Machine
    if(type === 'diagnostic'){
      const titre  = firstNonEmptyV78(d.title, d.subtitle, d.problem, 'Aide au Diagnostic');
      const machine = firstNonEmptyV78(d.machine, d.sector);
      return sanitizeNameV78(['Aide au Diagnostic', titre, machine].filter(Boolean).join('_'));
    }

    // Consigne : TypeConsigne + Titre principal + Poste
    if(type === 'consigne'){
      // Type lisible (ex: "Bonnes Pratiques", "Nouvelle Consigne", "Mode Opératoire"...)
      const typeLabel = firstNonEmptyV78(
        d.typeConsigneLabel, d.typeLabel, d.typeConsigne,
        document.querySelector('.nc-type-pill')?.textContent,
        document.querySelector('.nc-level')?.textContent,
        'Consigne'
      );
      const titre = firstNonEmptyV78(
        d.displayTitle, d.mainTitle, d.subjectTitle, d.heroTitle, d.titleMain, d.title, d.titre, d.nom,
        document.querySelector('.nc-hero-title h1')?.textContent
      );
      const poste = firstNonEmptyV78(
        d.poste, d.post, d.machine, d.station, d.subtitle, d.subTitle, d.ref, d.reference,
        document.querySelector('.nc-hero-title div')?.textContent
      );
      return sanitizeNameV78([typeLabel, titre, poste].filter(Boolean).join('_'));
    }

    // Consigne Sécurité : Onglet_Équipement
    if(type === 'securite'){
      const equipement = firstNonEmptyV78(d.equipment, d.equipement, d.zone, d.location, d.title, d.titre);
      return sanitizeNameV78(['Consigne Securite', equipement].filter(Boolean).join('_'));
    }

    // Maintenance 1er Niveau : Onglet_Machine
    if(type === 'maintenance'){
      const machine = firstNonEmptyV78(d.machine, d.equipement, d.title, d.titre);
      return sanitizeNameV78(['Maintenance 1er Niveau', machine].filter(Boolean).join('_'));
    }

    // Fiche Sécurité Machine : Onglet_NomMachine
    if(type === 'fiche'){
      const machine = firstNonEmptyV78(d.machine, d.equipement, d.title, d.titre);
      return sanitizeNameV78(['Fiche Securite Machine', machine].filter(Boolean).join('_'));
    }

    return sanitizeNameV78([type, currentTitle ? currentTitle() : 'document'].join('_'));
  }

  function payloadV78(){
    const type = state.active || 'document';
    return {
      app:'creation_documents_atelier',
      version:'V5.78',
      type,
      exportedAt:new Date().toISOString(),
      name:docBaseNameV78(),
      data:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state[type] || {}))
    };
  }

  async function chooseWorkingFolderV78(){
    if(!window.showDirectoryPicker){
      alert("Ton navigateur ne permet pas le choix direct d'un dossier.\nSur Edge/Chrome récent, ça fonctionne. Sinon le JSON ira dans Téléchargements.");
      return;
    }

    try{
      atelierDirectoryHandleV78 = await window.showDirectoryPicker({mode:'readwrite'});
      window._labodocDirHandle = atelierDirectoryHandleV78; // handle global unique
      const folderName = atelierDirectoryHandleV78.name || 'Dossier choisi';
      localStorage.setItem('atelierWorkingFolderNameV78', folderName);
      localStorage.setItem('labodoc_folder_name_v1', folderName);
      // Mettre à jour le label HUD
      const hudLbl = document.getElementById('hudFolderName');
      if(hudLbl) hudLbl.textContent = '📂 ' + folderName;
      const hudBtn = document.getElementById('hudChooseFolderBtn');
      if(hudBtn) hudBtn.classList.add('folder-set');
      updateFolderBtnV78();
    }catch(err){
      if(err && err.name !== 'AbortError') alert("Impossible de choisir le dossier : " + err.message);
    }
  }

  async function saveJsonCompanionV78(){
    const payload = payloadV78();
    const fileName = payload.name + '.json';
    const text = JSON.stringify(payload,null,2);

    const _activeHandle = window._labodocDirHandle || atelierDirectoryHandleV78;
    if(_activeHandle){
      try{
        const fileHandle = await _activeHandle.getFileHandle(fileName,{create:true});
        const writable = await fileHandle.createWritable();
        await writable.write(text);
        await writable.close();
        return {savedToFolder:true, fileName};
      }catch(err){
        console.warn('Sauvegarde dossier impossible, fallback téléchargement', err);
      }
    }

    const blob = new Blob([text], {type:'application/json'});
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = fileName;
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    setTimeout(()=>{
      URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
      a.remove();
    },1000);
    return {savedToFolder:false, fileName};
  }

  function updateFolderBtnV78(){
    const btn = document.getElementById('chooseFolderBtnV78');
    if(!btn) return;
    const name = atelierDirectoryHandleV78?.name || localStorage.getItem('atelierWorkingFolderNameV78');
    btn.textContent = name ? ('Dossier : ' + name) : 'Choisir dossier';
  }

  function addFolderButtonV78(){
    const toolbar = document.querySelector('.toolbar');
    if(!toolbar || document.getElementById('chooseFolderBtnV78')) return;

    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.id = 'chooseFolderBtnV78';
    btn.type = 'button';
    btn.className = 'yellow';
    btn.onclick = chooseWorkingFolderV78;
    btn.title = "Choisir le dossier où enregistrer automatiquement le JSON compagnon";
    toolbar.appendChild(btn);
    updateFolderBtnV78();
  }

  function wrapPrintableForJsonV78(){
    if(window.__jsonCompanionWrappedV78) return;
    window.__jsonCompanionWrappedV78 = true;

    const wrap = fn => async function(){
      await saveJsonCompanionV78();
      return fn.apply(this, arguments);
    };

    if(typeof window.openPrintablePreviewV75 === 'function'){
      window.openPrintablePreviewV75 = wrap(window.openPrintablePreviewV75);
    }
    if(typeof window.openPrintablePreviewV73 === 'function'){
      window.openPrintablePreviewV73 = wrap(window.openPrintablePreviewV73);
    }
    if(typeof window.openPrintablePreviewV72 === 'function'){
      window.openPrintablePreviewV72 = wrap(window.openPrintablePreviewV72);
    }
  }

  function initV78(){
    addFolderButtonV78();
    wrapPrintableForJsonV78();
    setTimeout(addFolderButtonV78,250);
    setTimeout(wrapPrintableForJsonV78,250);
  }

  window.chooseWorkingFolderV78 = chooseWorkingFolderV78;
  window.saveJsonCompanionV78 = saveJsonCompanionV78;
  window.docBaseNameV78 = docBaseNameV78;

  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initV78);
  }else{
    initV78();
  }
})();

</script>

<script>
/* Patch Atelier V2.7 — export PDF/Word fidèle + JSON source auto + trames complètes */
const ATELIER_SOURCE_STORE = 'creation_documents_atelier_last_source_v27';
const ATELIER_VERSION_STORE = 'creation_documents_atelier_versions_v27';
function atelierSanitize(v){ return String(v || 'document').trim().replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').replace(/[\\/:*?"<>|]+/g,'_').replace(/\s+/g,'_').replace(/_+/g,'_').slice(0,90) || 'document'; }
function atelierColor(){ const t = state.active; if(t === 'bonnes') return '#166534'; if(t === 'maintenance') return '#d97706'; if(t === 'diagnostic') return '#7c3aed'; if(t === 'fiche' || t === 'securite' || t === 'provisoire') return '#c62828'; return '#163a63'; }
function atelierTitle(){ try { return currentTitle() || state.active || 'document'; } catch(e){ return state.active || 'document'; } }
function atelierNextVersion(base){ let versions = {}; try { versions = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(ATELIER_VERSION_STORE) || '{}') || {}; } catch(e) {} const key = atelierSanitize(base).toLowerCase(); versions[key] = (Number(versions[key] || 0) + 1); localStorage.setItem(ATELIER_VERSION_STORE, JSON.stringify(versions)); return versions[key]; }
function atelierSourcePayload(){ return { type: state.active, title: atelierTitle(), exportedAt: new Date().toLocaleString(), exportedAtIso: new Date().toISOString(), sourceVersion: 'atelier_v2.7', logos: state.logos || {}, pictos: state.pictos || {}, data: currentData() }; }
function atelierDownloadBlob(text, name, type){ const blob = new Blob([text], {type}); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download = name; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); setTimeout(()=>{ URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href); a.remove(); }, 800); }
function exportCurrentJson(auto=false){ if(state.active === 'archives') return alert('Choisis d’abord un type de document.'); const payload = atelierSourcePayload(); const version = atelierNextVersion(payload.type + '_' + payload.title); payload.sourceFileVersion = version; const date = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); const suffix = auto ? '_source' : ''; const name = `${atelierSanitize(payload.type)}_${atelierSanitize(payload.title)}_${date}_v${String(version).padStart(2,'0')}${suffix}.json`; const text = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2); atelierDownloadBlob(text, name, 'application/json;charset=utf-8'); try { localStorage.setItem(ATELIER_SOURCE_STORE, JSON.stringify({name, text, savedAt:new Date().toISOString()})); } catch(e) {} }
function atelierDownloadLastJson(){ try { const last = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(ATELIER_SOURCE_STORE) || 'null'); if (!last || !last.text) return alert('Aucun JSON source récent à retélécharger.'); atelierDownloadBlob(last.text, last.name || 'document_source.json', 'application/json;charset=utf-8'); } catch(e) { alert('Aucun JSON source récent à retélécharger.'); } }
async function importCurrentJson(file){ if(!file) return; const raw = await file.text(); const payload = JSON.parse(raw); const realPayload = payload && payload.state ? payload.state : payload; if(!realPayload || !realPayload.type || !realPayload.data){ alert('Ce fichier JSON ne correspond pas à un document exporté.'); return; } const allowedTypes = ['consigne','provisoire','bonnes','maintenance','diagnostic','fiche','securite']; if(!allowedTypes.includes(realPayload.type)){ alert('Type de document non reconnu dans ce JSON.'); return; } state.active = realPayload.type; state.currentArchiveId = null; state[realPayload.type] = mergeDefaults(freshDataForTab(realPayload.type), realPayload.data); if(realPayload.logos && typeof realPayload.logos === 'object') state.logos = {...defaultState.logos, ...(state.logos||{}), ...realPayload.logos}; if(realPayload.pictos && typeof realPayload.pictos === 'object') state.pictos = {...(state.pictos||{}), ...realPayload.pictos}; persist(); render(); updatePreview(); document.getElementById('previewHost').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}); alert('Document JSON importé. Tu peux maintenant le modifier puis le réexporter.'); }
function atelierBuildExactHtml(mode){
  updatePreview();
  const host = document.getElementById('previewHost');
  if(!host) throw new Error('Prévisualisation introuvable');
  const clone = host.cloneNode(true);
  const exportClass = (typeof getExportPageClass === 'function') ? getExportPageClass(mode) : '';
  clone.className = ((clone.className || '') + ' ' + exportClass).trim();

  if(mode === 'pdf' && state.active === 'consigne'){
    clone.classList.remove('consigne-preview');
    clone.classList.add('consigne-pdf');
    clone.querySelectorAll('.nc-step-img img, .nc-step-photo-grid img').forEach(img=>{
      img.style.width = 'auto';
      img.style.height = 'auto';
      img.style.maxWidth = '100%';
      img.style.maxHeight = '100%';
      img.style.objectFit = 'contain';
      img.style.objectPosition = 'center center';
      img.style.background = '#eef2f7';
      img.style.display = 'block';
    });
    clone.querySelectorAll('.nc-step').forEach(step=>{
      step.style.display='grid';
      step.style.gridTemplateColumns='42mm 46mm 1fr';
      step.style.columnGap='5mm';
      step.style.minHeight='52mm';
      step.style.maxHeight='none';
      step.style.alignItems='center';
      step.style.overflow='hidden';
    });
    clone.querySelectorAll('.nc-step-h').forEach(head=>{
      head.style.gridColumn='1';
      head.style.gridRow='1';
      head.style.margin='0';
    });
    clone.querySelectorAll('.nc-step-textwrap').forEach(wrap=>{
      wrap.style.gridColumn='3';
      wrap.style.gridRow='1';
      wrap.style.paddingLeft='3mm';
      wrap.style.minHeight='46mm';
      wrap.style.display='flex';
      wrap.style.flexDirection='column';
      wrap.style.justifyContent='center';
      wrap.style.alignItems='flex-start';
    });
    clone.querySelectorAll('.nc-step-img').forEach(box=>{
      box.style.gridColumn='2';
      box.style.gridRow='1';
      box.style.width='46mm';
      box.style.height='46mm';
      box.style.minHeight='46mm';
      box.style.maxHeight='46mm';
      box.style.display='flex';
      box.style.alignItems='center';
      box.style.justifyContent='center';
      box.style.overflow='hidden';
      box.style.background='#eef2f7';
    });
  }
  const activeTypeColor = atelierColor();
  clone.querySelectorAll('.doc-title-red,.doc-title-blue,.doc-title-black,.doc-title-green').forEach(el => { el.style.setProperty('color', activeTypeColor, 'important'); });
  clone.querySelectorAll('.doc-header').forEach(header => { const logoBox = header.querySelector('.hero-image'); if (logoBox) { logoBox.style.width = '160px'; logoBox.style.maxWidth = '160px'; logoBox.style.height = '64px'; logoBox.style.border = '0'; logoBox.style.background = '#f7f7f7'; logoBox.style.borderRadius = '12px'; logoBox.style.marginLeft = 'auto'; const logoImg = logoBox.querySelector('img'); if (logoImg) { logoImg.style.maxWidth = '154px'; logoImg.style.maxHeight = '56px'; logoImg.style.width = '154px'; logoImg.style.height = 'auto'; logoImg.style.objectFit = 'contain'; } } });
  clone.querySelectorAll('.photo-card').forEach(card => { card.style.overflow = 'hidden'; card.style.boxSizing = 'border-box'; card.style.textAlign = 'center'; card.style.minHeight = '142px'; });
  clone.querySelectorAll('.photo-card img').forEach(img => { img.style.width = '100%'; img.style.maxWidth = '220px'; img.style.height = '135px'; img.style.maxHeight = '135px'; img.style.objectFit = 'contain'; img.style.display = 'block'; img.style.margin = '0 auto'; img.setAttribute('width', '220'); img.setAttribute('height', '135'); });
  if (mode === 'word') {
    clone.querySelectorAll('.doc-header').forEach(header => { const logoBox = header.querySelector('.hero-image'); const leftWrap = document.createElement('div'); Array.from(header.childNodes).forEach(node => { if (node.nodeType === 1 && logoBox && node === logoBox) return; leftWrap.appendChild(node.cloneNode(true)); }); leftWrap.querySelectorAll('.hero-image').forEach(el => el.remove()); const table = document.createElement('table'); table.setAttribute('cellpadding','0'); table.setAttribute('cellspacing','0'); table.style.width = '100%'; table.style.tableLayout = 'fixed'; table.style.borderCollapse = 'collapse'; table.style.marginBottom = '10px'; const tr = document.createElement('tr'); const leftTd = document.createElement('td'); leftTd.style.width = '70%'; leftTd.style.verticalAlign = 'top'; leftTd.style.padding = '0'; leftTd.appendChild(leftWrap); const rightTd = document.createElement('td'); rightTd.style.width = '30%'; rightTd.style.verticalAlign = 'top'; rightTd.style.textAlign = 'right'; rightTd.style.padding = '0'; if (logoBox) rightTd.appendChild(logoBox.cloneNode(true)); tr.appendChild(leftTd); tr.appendChild(rightTd); table.appendChild(tr); header.replaceWith(table); });
    const headerLogo = clone.querySelector('table td:last-child .hero-image img') || clone.querySelector('table .hero-image img');
    if (headerLogo && headerLogo.getAttribute('src')) { const logoSrc = headerLogo.getAttribute('src'); clone.querySelectorAll('.hero-image img').forEach(img => { const box = img.closest('.hero-image'); const isKeptHeaderLogo = img === headerLogo; if (!isKeptHeaderLogo && img.getAttribute('src') === logoSrc && box) box.remove(); }); }
    clone.querySelectorAll('.photo-grid,.diagnostic-photo-grid,.maintenance-photo-grid').forEach(grid => { const cards = Array.from(grid.children).filter(el => el.nodeType === 1); const table = document.createElement('table'); table.setAttribute('cellpadding','0'); table.setAttribute('cellspacing','10'); table.style.width = '100%'; table.style.borderCollapse = 'separate'; table.style.tableLayout = 'fixed'; table.style.marginTop = '8px'; const cols = grid.classList.contains('single') ? 1 : 2; for (let i=0;i<cards.length;i+=cols){ const tr = document.createElement('tr'); for(let c=0;c<cols;c++){ const td = document.createElement('td'); td.style.width = (100/cols)+'%'; td.style.verticalAlign='top'; td.style.padding='0'; td.style.textAlign='center'; if(cards[i+c]) td.appendChild(cards[i+c].cloneNode(true)); tr.appendChild(td); } table.appendChild(tr); } grid.replaceWith(table); });
  }
  const style = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('style')).map(st => st.innerHTML || '').join('\n');
  const title = atelierSanitize(atelierTitle());
  const extra = '\n' +
    '*{box-sizing:border-box !important;-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact !important;print-color-adjust:exact !important;color-adjust:exact !important;}\n' +
    'html,body{margin:0 !important;padding:0 !important;background:#fff !important;}\n' +
    'body{font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif !important;}\n' +
    '.preview-page{width:210mm !important;height:297mm !important;min-height:297mm !important;margin:0 auto !important;background:#fff !important;box-shadow:none !important;padding:0 !important;line-height:1.24 !important;overflow:hidden !important;}\n' +
    '.preview-page > .nc-a4{width:210mm !important;height:297mm !important;min-height:297mm !important;margin:0 !important;box-shadow:none !important;border:0 !important;overflow:hidden !important;}\n' +
    '.doc-outline{page-break-inside:avoid;break-inside:avoid;border-radius:16px !important;padding:8mm !important;}\n' +
    '.doc-footer,.subband,.band{background:#111827 !important;color:#fff !important;}\n' +
    '.doc-title-red,.doc-title-blue,.doc-title-green,.doc-title-black{color:' + activeTypeColor + ' !important;}\n' +
    '.photo-grid,.diagnostic-photo-grid,.maintenance-photo-grid{display:grid !important;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;gap:10px !important;align-items:start !important;margin-top:8px !important;}\n' +
    '.photo-card{break-inside:avoid !important;page-break-inside:avoid !important;overflow:hidden !important;text-align:center !important;border-radius:12px !important;padding:6px !important;background:#f8fafc !important;min-height:142px !important;}\n' +
    '.photo-card img{width:100% !important;max-width:220px !important;height:135px !important;max-height:135px !important;object-fit:contain !important;display:block !important;margin:0 auto !important;}\n' +
    '.preview-page table .photo-card img,.preview-page .photo-grid .photo-card img,.preview-page .diagnostic-photo-grid .photo-card img,.preview-page .maintenance-photo-grid .photo-card img{width:220px !important;max-width:220px !important;height:135px !important;max-height:135px !important;object-fit:contain !important;display:block !important;margin:0 auto !important;}\n' +
    '.message-box{display:grid !important;grid-template-columns:1fr 180px !important;gap:14px !important;align-items:start !important;}\n' +
    '.preview-page .risk-pill img,.preview-page .risk-table .risk-pill img,#previewHost .risk-pill img{width:18px !important;height:18px !important;min-width:18px !important;min-height:18px !important;object-fit:contain !important;display:inline-block !important;vertical-align:middle !important;background:transparent !important;}\n' +
    '.preview-page .risk-pill{font-size:10px !important;padding:4px 10px !important;gap:6px !important;display:inline-flex !important;align-items:center !important;justify-content:center !important;margin:2px !important;background:#fff !important;color:#111827 !important;border:1px solid #cfd6df !important;border-radius:999px !important;}\n' +
    '.doc-header{display:flex !important;justify-content:space-between !important;align-items:flex-start !important;gap:16px !important;margin-bottom:10px !important;}\n' +
    '.doc-header .hero-image, table .hero-image{width:160px !important;max-width:160px !important;height:64px !important;border:0 !important;background:#f7f7f7 !important;border-radius:12px !important;margin-left:auto !important;}\n' +
    '.doc-header .hero-image img, table .hero-image img{width:154px !important;max-width:154px !important;max-height:56px !important;height:auto !important;object-fit:contain !important;}\n' +
    '.studio-watermark{display:none !important;}\n' +
    '.maint-v2-head-table,.maint-v2-meta-table,.maint-v2-safety-table,.maint-v2-bottom-table,.maint-v2-checktable{mso-table-lspace:0pt !important;mso-table-rspace:0pt !important;border-collapse:collapse !important;}\n' +
    '.maint-v2-table{border-collapse:collapse !important;table-layout:fixed !important;}\n' +
    '.studio-official-footer{margin:7mm auto 0 auto !important;width:190mm !important;border-top:1px solid #d9dde3 !important;padding-top:6px !important;font-size:10px !important;color:#667085 !important;text-align:center !important;letter-spacing:.08em !important;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif !important;font-weight:700 !important;}\n' +
    '@page{size:A4;margin:0;}\n' +
    '@media print{html,body{width:210mm !important;min-height:297mm !important;height:auto !important;margin:0 !important;padding:0 !important;background:#fff !important;overflow:visible !important;}.preview-page{width:210mm !important;height:297mm !important;min-min-height:297mm !important;height:auto !important;margin:0 !important;padding:0 !important;box-shadow:none !important;overflow:visible !important;}.preview-page > .nc-a4{width:210mm !important;min-height:297mm !important;height:auto !important;margin:0 !important;box-shadow:none !important;border:0 !important;overflow:visible !important;}.block,.photo-card,.message-box,.alert-box,.machine-head{break-inside:avoid !important;page-break-inside:avoid !important;}.topbar,.tabs,#editorArea,.noprint{display:none !important;}}\n';
  const officialFooter = (mode === 'pdf') ? '' : '<div class="studio-official-footer">DOCUMENT PRODUCTION - WIBAIE</div>';
  return '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><title>' + title + '</title><style>' + style + '\n' + extra + '</style></head><body>' + clone.outerHTML + officialFooter + '

<!-- ============================================================
     V17 — Finitions ergonomie
     • Volet de saisie : les titres sur bandeaux noirs passent en blanc.
     • Redimensionnement du volet de saisie possible sur toute la hauteur
       du bord droit, plus seulement via le repère central.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="patch-v17-bandeaux-blancs-resize-plein-bord">
/* Titres sur bandeaux noirs du volet de saisie : blanc plus lisible */
body.ws-epure #editorArea .band,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .subband,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .block > .subband,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .sheet > .band,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .nc-mode-head,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .rich-toolbar + .subband{
  color:#ffffff !important;
  text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.35) !important;
}
body.ws-epure #editorArea .band *,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .subband *,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .nc-mode-head *{
  color:inherit !important;
}
/* On garde les boutons + bien visibles, sans virer leur jaune */
body.ws-epure #editorArea .subband button,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .band button,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .nc-mode-head button,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .mini-btn{
  color:inherit;
}
body.ws-epure #editorArea .subband .yellow,
body.ws-epure #editorArea .band .yellow,
body.ws-epure #editorArea button.yellow{
  color:#fbbf24 !important;
}

/* Poignée pleine hauteur : toute la bordure droite du volet devient étirable */
body.ws-epure #wsFormResizer{
  position:fixed !important;
  top:var(--ws-bar-h) !important;
  bottom:0 !important;
  left:calc(var(--ws-form-live-w) - 9px) !important;
  right:auto !important;
  width:18px !important;
  height:auto !important;
  z-index:4295 !important;
  cursor:ew-resize !important;
  touch-action:none !important;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(0,229,255,.035) 45%, rgba(0,229,255,.08) 50%, rgba(0,229,255,.035) 55%, transparent 100%) !important;
