/* === V3.4 - Export Word Maintenance strict : génération Word dédiée, sans toucher à la preview/PDF === */
function maintWordText(txt, opts={}){
  const color = opts.color || '#111827';
  const weight = opts.weight || 'normal';
  const size = opts.size || '7.2pt';
  const raw = String(txt||'');
  const lines = raw.split(/\n+/).map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if(!lines.length) return '';
  if(lines.some(l=>/^[-•]/.test(l))){
    return '<ul style="margin:1mm 0 0 4mm;padding:0;color:'+color+';font-size:'+size+';line-height:1.05;font-weight:'+weight+';">'+
      lines.map(l=>'<li style="margin:0 0 .4mm 0;padding:0;">'+escapeHtml(l.replace(/^[-•]\s*/,''))+'</li>').join('')+
      '</ul>';
  }
  return '<div style="color:'+color+';font-size:'+size+';line-height:1.08;font-weight:'+weight+';">'+lines.map(escapeHtml).join('<br>')+'</div>';
}
function maintWordCheckGrid(){
  const days=['LUN','MAR','MER','JEU','VEN','SAM'];
  let html='<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;table-layout:fixed;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">';
  html+='<tr><td style="width:7mm;background:#0b2d5c;border:1px solid #0b2d5c;height:4.2mm;"></td>'+days.map(d=>'<th style="background:#0b2d5c;color:#fff;border:1px solid #ffffff;height:4.2mm;font-size:5.5pt;text-align:center;padding:0;">'+d+'</th>').join('')+'</tr>';
  ['M','APM','N'].forEach(s=>{ html+='<tr><th style="width:7mm;background:#0b2d5c;color:#fff;border:1px solid #ffffff;height:5.2mm;font-size:7pt;text-align:center;padding:0;">'+s+'</th>'+days.map(()=>'<td style="border:1px solid #6b7b8c;background:#fff;height:5.2mm;padding:0;"></td>').join('')+'</tr>'; });
  html+='</table>';
  return html;
}
function buildMaintenanceWordHtmlStrict(){
  syncMaintenanceFromEditor();
  const d = normalizeMaintenanceData();
  const logo = getLogoForTab('maintenance');
  const title = atelierSanitize((d.title||'maintenance')+'_'+(d.machine||''));
  const pageW = '190mm';
  const border = '#0b2d5c';
  const blue = '#163a63';
  const black = '#050505';

  const rows = (d.rows||[]).map(row=>{
    const imgsList = (row.illustrations||[]).filter(p=>p&&p.src);
    const img = imgsList.length ? imgsList.map(p=>{ const wmm=(31*((p.w||100)/100)).toFixed(1); return '<img src="'+p.src+'" style="width:'+wmm+'mm;max-width:'+wmm+'mm;height:auto;object-fit:contain;display:block;margin:0 auto 0.8mm auto;">'; }).join('') : '<span style="font-size:6pt;color:#667085;">Illustration</span>';
    return '<tr style="page-break-inside:avoid;">'+
      '<td style="width:8mm;border:1px solid '+border+';vertical-align:top;text-align:center;padding:1mm;color:'+blue+';font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;line-height:1;">'+escapeHtml(row.number||'')+'</td>'+
      '<td style="width:57mm;border:1px solid '+border+';vertical-align:top;padding:1mm;"><div style="font-size:8pt;line-height:1.02;color:'+blue+';font-weight:bold;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.5mm;">'+escapeHtml(row.title||'')+'</div>'+maintWordText(row.controls,{size:'7pt',weight:'bold',color:'#111827'})+'</td>'+
      '<td style="width:33mm;border:1px solid '+border+';vertical-align:middle;text-align:center;padding:1mm;">'+img+'</td>'+
      '<td style="width:48mm;border:1px solid '+border+';vertical-align:top;padding:1mm;">'+maintWordText(row.why,{size:'7pt',weight:'bold',color:'#24512a'})+'<div style="margin-top:1mm;">'+maintWordText(row.risk,{size:'7pt',weight:'bold',color:'#c62828'})+'</div></td>'+
      '<td style="width:42mm;border:1px solid '+border+';vertical-align:top;padding:.6mm;">'+maintWordCheckGrid()+'</td>'+ 
    '</tr>';
  }).join('');

  const logoHtml = logo ? '<img src="'+logo+'" width="120" height="44" style="width:32mm;max-width:32mm;height:auto;max-height:12mm;object-fit:contain;display:block;">' : '<div style="font-weight:bold;color:#667085;font-size:10pt;">WIBAIE<br>PRODUCTION</div>';
  const machineHtml = d.machineImage ? '<img src="'+d.machineImage+'" width="132" height="44" style="width:35mm;height:11.5mm;object-fit:contain;display:block;margin:0 auto;">' : '<div style="font-size:7pt;color:#667085;text-align:center;">Image machine</div>';

  const metaCell = (ico, label, value, isLast) =>
    '<td style="width:33.33%;height:17mm;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border-top:1.5px solid '+blue+';border-bottom:1.5px solid '+blue+';border-left:'+(isLast?'1.5px solid '+blue:'1.5px solid '+blue)+';border-right:'+(isLast?'1.5px solid '+blue:'0')+';padding:1mm;font-size:8.5pt;line-height:1.05;background:#ffffff;">'+
      '<div style="font-size:14pt;color:'+blue+';line-height:1;">'+ico+'</div>'+
      '<div style="font-weight:bold;color:'+blue+';letter-spacing:.2pt;">'+label+'</div>'+
      '<div style="color:#111827;">'+escapeHtml(value||'')+'</div>'+
    '</td>';

  const epiSources = Array.isArray(d.epiImages) ? d.epiImages.filter(Boolean) : [];
  const epiHtml = '<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:2mm 0;margin:0 auto;"><tr>'+
    (epiSources.length ? epiSources.map(src=>'<td style="width:9mm;height:9mm;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;background:#0f3d8c;border:1.5px solid #ffffff;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;"><img src="'+src+'" width="32" height="32" style="width:8.5mm;height:8.5mm;object-fit:contain;display:block;margin:0 auto;border-radius:50%;"></td>') : [_epiSvgGants(),_epiSvgLunettes(),_epiSvgChaussures(),_epiSvgBouchons()].map(svg=>'<td style="width:9mm;height:9mm;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;background:#0f3d8c;border:1.5px solid #ffffff;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;">'+svg+'</td>')).join('')+
    '</tr></table>';

  const html = '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><title>'+title+'</title>'+ 
  '<style>@page{size:A4;margin:7mm 8mm 7mm 8mm;} body{margin:0;background:#fff;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;} table{mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt;} img{border:0;} p{margin:0;}</style>'+ 
  '</head><body>'+ 
  '<div style="width:'+pageW+';margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;color:#111827;">'+
  '<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;border:2px solid '+border+';table-layout:fixed;">'+
  '<tr><td style="padding:2mm 2mm 0 2mm;border:0;">'+

    '<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;table-layout:fixed;">'+
      '<tr>'+ 
        '<td style="width:38mm;vertical-align:middle;text-align:left;border:0;padding:0;">'+logoHtml+'</td>'+ 
        '<td style="vertical-align:middle;text-align:center;border:0;padding:0 2mm;">'+
          '<div style="font-size:18pt;font-weight:bold;line-height:1.05;color:#111827;">'+escapeHtml(d.title||'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIVEAU')+'</div>'+ 
          '<div style="font-size:18pt;font-weight:bold;line-height:1.05;color:#111827;">'+escapeHtml(d.machine||'')+'</div>'+ 
          '<div style="font-size:11pt;font-weight:bold;line-height:1.05;color:'+blue+';margin-top:1mm;">'+escapeHtml(d.subtitle||'')+'</div>'+ 
        '</td>'+ 
        '<td style="width:42mm;vertical-align:middle;text-align:center;border:0;padding:0;"><table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width:39mm;height:13mm;border-collapse:collapse;border:1px solid #d9dde3;background:#f8fafc;"><tr><td style="text-align:center;vertical-align:middle;border:0;padding:0;">'+machineHtml+'</td></tr></table></td>'+ 
      '</tr>'+ 
    '</table>'+ 

    '<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;table-layout:fixed;margin-top:1.5mm;">'+
      '<tr>'+
        metaCell('▦','SECTEUR',d.secteur,false)+
        metaCell('♟','POSTE',d.poste,false)+
        metaCell('◷','DURÉE',d.duree,true)+
      '</tr>'+ 
    '</table>'+ 

    '<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;table-layout:fixed;margin-top:1.5mm;background:'+black+';">'+
      '<tr>'+ 
        '<td style="width:66mm;background:'+black+';color:#f3c316;font-weight:bold;font-size:15pt;line-height:1.05;padding:2mm;vertical-align:middle;">⚠ '+escapeHtml(d.footer||'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT !')+'</td>'+

function exportWord(){ const html = (state.active==='maintenance') ? buildMaintenanceWordHtmlStrict() : atelierBuildExactHtml('word'); setTimeout(()=>exportCurrentJson(true), 200); const name = atelierSanitize(atelierTitle()) + '.doc'; const blob = new Blob(['\ufeff', html], {type:'application/msword;charset=utf-8'}); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download = name; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); setTimeout(()=>{URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href); a.remove();}, 800); }
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   EXPORT PDF WYSIWYG — capture html2canvas → jsPDF
   Photographie la prévisualisation exactement comme affichée.
   Pas de clone, pas de CSS à recalculer, ce que tu vois = PDF.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
async function exportPdf(){
  if(state && state.active === 'fiche') { syncFicheRichFields(); persist(); updatePreview(); }
  const host = document.getElementById('previewHost');
  if(!host){ alert('Prévisualisation introuvable. Génère d\'abord un aperçu.'); return; }

  // Indicateur de chargement
  const btn = document.getElementById('pdfBtn');
  const originalText = btn ? btn.textContent : '';
  if(btn){ btn.textContent = '⏳ Génération…'; btn.disabled = true; }

  try{
    // Charger html2canvas si absent
    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      if(window.html2canvas) return resolve();
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      s.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js';
      s.onload = resolve;
      s.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Impossible de charger html2canvas'));
      document.head.appendChild(s);
    });

    // Charger jsPDF si absent
    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      if(window.jspdf || (window.jsPDF)) return resolve();
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      s.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jspdf@2.5.1/dist/jspdf.umd.min.js';
      s.onload = resolve;
      s.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Impossible de charger jsPDF'));
      document.head.appendChild(s);
    });

    // Mesurer le contenu réel de la prévisualisation
    const previewPage = host.querySelector('.nc-a4, .sec-a4, .maint-v2-sheet, .doc-outline, .diag59-a4') || host.firstElementChild || host;

    // PATCH V2.7 — attendre le chargement réel des images avant capture PDF.
    await Promise.all(Array.from(previewPage.querySelectorAll('img')).map(img => {
      if(img.complete && img.naturalWidth !== 0) return Promise.resolve();
      return new Promise(resolve => {
        img.onload = resolve;
        img.onerror = resolve;
        setTimeout(resolve, 800);
      });
    }));

    // Capture haute résolution (scale 3 = ~216 DPI, qualité impression)
    const canvas = await html2canvas(previewPage, {
      scale: 3,
      useCORS: true,
      allowTaint: true,
      backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
      logging: false,
      // Forcer fond blanc même avec les variables CSS dark
      onclone: (doc, el) => {
        el.style.background = '#fff';
        el.style.color = '#111827';
        // Forcer toutes les variables CSS dark en blanc
        el.style.setProperty('--bg', '#fff');
        el.style.setProperty('--bg2', '#fff');
        el.style.setProperty('--card', '#fff');
        el.style.setProperty('--card2', '#f8fafc');
        el.style.setProperty('--text', '#111827');
        el.style.setProperty('--text2', '#374151');
        el.style.setProperty('--line', '#d4d8df');
        el.style.setProperty('--muted', '#6b7280');

        // PATCH V2.9 — Fiche sécurité machine / PDF : reconstruction explicite des pastilles risque
        // Le clone html2canvas ne doit plus dépendre du flex, des emojis, ni d'un rendu CSS fragile.
        if(state && state.active === 'fiche'){
          el.querySelectorAll('.fiche-risk-pill').forEach(pill=>{
            const rawName = pill.getAttribute('data-risk-name') || '';
            const label = pill.getAttribute('data-risk-label') || (rawName ? (typeof pictoLabel === 'function' ? pictoLabel(rawName) : rawName) : (pill.textContent || '').trim());
            const src = pill.getAttribute('data-picto-src') || '';
            while(pill.firstChild) pill.removeChild(pill.firstChild);
            pill.style.cssText = 'display:inline-block!important;white-space:nowrap!important;color:#111827!important;background:#ffffff!important;border:1px solid #cfd6df!important;border-radius:999px!important;padding:4px 10px!important;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif!important;font-size:11px!important;font-weight:800!important;line-height:18px!important;min-height:26px!important;vertical-align:middle!important;opacity:1!important;visibility:visible!important;';
            if(src){
              const img = doc.createElement('img');
              img.src = src;
              img.alt = '';
              img.setAttribute('loading','eager');
              img.setAttribute('decoding','sync');
              img.style.cssText = 'width:18px!important;height:18px!important;min-width:18px!important;min-height:18px!important;max-width:18px!important;max-height:18px!important;object-fit:contain!important;display:inline-block!important;vertical-align:middle!important;opacity:1!important;visibility:visible!important;background:transparent!important;margin-right:6px!important;';
              pill.appendChild(img);
            }
            const lab = doc.createElement('span');
            lab.className = 'fiche-risk-label';
            lab.textContent = label;
            lab.style.cssText = 'display:inline-block!important;color:#111827!important;background:transparent!important;opacity:1!important;visibility:visible!important;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif!important;font-size:11px!important;font-weight:800!important;line-height:18px!important;vertical-align:middle!important;';
            pill.appendChild(lab);
          });
          el.querySelectorAll('.fiche-risk-prevention').forEach(cell=>{
            cell.style.display='block';
            cell.style.visibility='visible';
            cell.style.opacity='1';
            cell.style.color='#111827';
            cell.style.background='transparent';
            cell.style.minHeight='14px';
          });
        }
      }
    });

    // Dimensions A4 en mm
    const A4_W = 210;
    const A4_H = 297;

    // Ratio pixel/mm basé sur la largeur réelle de l'élément
    const elWidthPx = previewPage.offsetWidth;
    const pxPerMm = (canvas.width / 3) / (elWidthPx / (96 / 25.4));

    // Hauteur du contenu en mm
    const contentHeightMm = (canvas.height / 3) / (96 / 25.4);

    const jsPDFCtor = (window.jspdf && window.jspdf.jsPDF) || window.jsPDF;
    const pdf = new jsPDFCtor({ unit: 'mm', format: 'a4', orientation: 'portrait' });

    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.97);

    if(contentHeightMm <= A4_H + 5){
      // Contenu tient sur une page : centré/ajusté
      const ratio = A4_W / contentHeightMm > A4_H / contentHeightMm
        ? A4_W / A4_W
        : A4_W / A4_W;
      pdf.addImage(imgData, 'JPEG', 0, 0, A4_W, Math.min(contentHeightMm, A4_H));
    } else {
      // Contenu multi-pages : découpe en tranches A4
      const totalHeightPx = canvas.height;
      const pageHeightPx = Math.round(totalHeightPx * (A4_H / contentHeightMm));
      let offsetPx = 0;
      let pageNum = 0;

      while(offsetPx < totalHeightPx){
        const sliceH = Math.min(pageHeightPx, totalHeightPx - offsetPx);
        const pageCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        pageCanvas.width = canvas.width;
        pageCanvas.height = sliceH;
        const ctx = pageCanvas.getContext('2d');
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, pageCanvas.width, pageCanvas.height);
        ctx.drawImage(canvas, 0, -offsetPx);
        const pageImg = pageCanvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.97);
        const sliceHmm = sliceH * (contentHeightMm / totalHeightPx);
        if(pageNum > 0) pdf.addPage();
        pdf.addImage(pageImg, 'JPEG', 0, 0, A4_W, sliceHmm);
        offsetPx += sliceH;
        pageNum++;
      }
    }

    const filename = (typeof docBaseNameV78 === 'function' ? docBaseNameV78() : atelierSanitize(atelierTitle())) + '.pdf';

    // Obtenir le blob PDF
    const pdfBlob = pdf.output('blob');

    // Récupérer le handle de dossier — handle global unique
    const dirHandle = window._labodocDirHandle || null;

    if(dirHandle){
      try{
        const fh = await dirHandle.getFileHandle(filename, {create:true});
        const writable = await fh.createWritable();
        await writable.write(pdfBlob);
        await writable.close();
        // Ouvrir le PDF dans un nouvel onglet
        const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(pdfBlob);
        window.open(blobUrl, '_blank');
        setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl), 10000);
        // Feedback visuel
        const st = document.getElementById('preview-hud-status');
        if(st){ st.textContent = '✓ PDF : ' + filename; st.style.color='#00e676'; clearTimeout(st._t); st._t=setTimeout(()=>{st.textContent='EN ATTENTE';st.style.color='';},4000); }
      }catch(err){
        console.warn('Sauvegarde PDF dans le dossier échouée, téléchargement :', err);
        pdf.save(filename);
      }
    } else {
      pdf.save(filename);
    }

    // Sauvegarder le JSON en parallèle
    setTimeout(()=>{ if(typeof exportCurrentJson === 'function') exportCurrentJson(true); }, 200);

  } catch(err){
    console.error('Export PDF WYSIWYG:', err);
    alert('Export PDF impossible : ' + (err.message || err) + '\n\nVérifie ta connexion Internet (CDN requis).');
  } finally {
    if(btn){ btn.textContent = originalText; btn.disabled = false; }
  }
}
document.getElementById('pdfBtn').onclick = exportPdf;
document.getElementById('exportCurrentJsonBtn').onclick = () => exportCurrentJson(false);
document.getElementById('importCurrentJsonInput').onchange = e => importCurrentJson(e.target.files[0]);
try { const toolbar = document.querySelector('.toolbar'); if (toolbar && !document.getElementById('downloadLastSourceJsonBtn')) { const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.id = 'downloadLastSourceJsonBtn'; btn.textContent = 'Retélécharger dernier JSON'; btn.onclick = atelierDownloadLastJson; toolbar.appendChild(btn); } } catch(e) {}
</script>

<script>

  /* V5.9 Studio : bouton focus + bouton sauvegarde JSON dossier si moteur V5.78 présent */
(function(){
  function addStudioButtons(){
    const toolbar = document.querySelector('.toolbar');

    if(toolbar && typeof window.saveJsonCompanionV78 === 'function' && !document.getElementById('v59SaveJsonFolderBtn')){
      const b = document.createElement('button');
      b.id = 'v59SaveJsonFolderBtn';
      b.type = 'button';
      b.textContent = 'Sauver JSON dossier';
      b.onclick = async function(){
        const r = await window.saveJsonCompanionV78();
        if(r && r.fileName) alert('JSON enregistré : ' + r.fileName);
      };
      toolbar.appendChild(b);
    }

    if(!document.getElementById('v59StudioFocusBtn')){
      const f = document.createElement('button');
      f.id = 'v59StudioFocusBtn';
      f.type = 'button';
      f.textContent = '🔍 Plein écran aperçu';
      f.onclick = function(){
        document.body.classList.toggle('v59-studio-focus');
        f.textContent = document.body.classList.contains('v59-studio-focus') ? '✕ Quitter plein écran' : '🔍 Plein écran aperçu';
      };
      document.body.appendChild(f);
    }
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', addStudioButtons);
  }else{
    addStudioButtons();
  }

  setTimeout(addStudioButtons,500);
})();
</script>


<script id="v71-ui-only">
/* V71 : UI uniquement. Le moteur V5 reste propriétaire des rendus et du PDF. */
(function(){
  function ready(fn){
    if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn);
    else fn();
  }

  ready(function(){
    const previewWrap = document.querySelector('.preview-wrap');
    const previewHost = document.getElementById('previewHost');
    const band = previewWrap ? previewWrap.querySelector('.band') : null;
    const pdfBtn = document.getElementById('pdfBtn');

    if(!previewWrap || !previewHost || !band) return;
    if(document.getElementById('v71PreviewScroller')) return;

    const scroller = document.createElement('div');
    scroller.id = 'v71PreviewScroller';

    const scaler = document.createElement('div');
    scaler.id = 'v71PreviewScaler';

    previewHost.parentNode.insertBefore(scroller, previewHost);
    scaler.appendChild(previewHost);
    scroller.appendChild(scaler);

    const tools = document.createElement('div');
    tools.id = 'v71PreviewTools';
    tools.innerHTML = `
      <label>Zoom
        <button type="button" id="v71Minus">−</button>
        <input id="v71Zoom" type="range" min="35" max="120" value="62">
        <button type="button" id="v71Plus">+</button>
        <span id="v71ZoomValue">62%</span>
      </label>
      <button type="button" id="v71Refresh">Actualiser</button>
    `;
    band.appendChild(tools);

    const zoom = document.getElementById('v71Zoom');
    const zoomVal = document.getElementById('v71ZoomValue');

    function applyZoom(){
      const z = Number(zoom.value || 62) / 100;
      scaler.style.transform = 'scale(' + z + ')';
      scaler.style.transformOrigin = 'top left';
      scaler.style.width = (100 / z) + '%';
      zoomVal.textContent = Math.round(z * 100) + '%';
    }

    function refresh(){
      if(typeof window.updatePreview === 'function') window.updatePreview();
      applyZoom();
    }

    document.getElementById('v71Minus').onclick = function(){
      zoom.value = Math.max(Number(zoom.min), Number(zoom.value) - 5);
      applyZoom();
    };
    document.getElementById('v71Plus').onclick = function(){
      zoom.value = Math.min(Number(zoom.max), Number(zoom.value) + 5);
      applyZoom();
    };
    zoom.addEventListener('input', applyZoom);
    document.getElementById('v71Refresh').onclick = refresh;

    function printPdf(){
      refresh();
      setTimeout(function(){
        if(pdfBtn) pdfBtn.click();
        else if(typeof window.exportPdf === 'function') window.exportPdf();
      }, 80);
    }



    let dragging=false,startX=0,startY=0,scrollLeft=0,scrollTop=0;
    scroller.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){
      if(e.button !== 0) return;
      dragging=true;
      scroller.classList.add('is-dragging');
      startX=e.pageX;
      startY=e.pageY;
      scrollLeft=scroller.scrollLeft;
      scrollTop=scroller.scrollTop;
    });
    window.addEventListener('mouseup', function(){
      dragging=false;
      scroller.classList.remove('is-dragging');
    });
    window.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e){
      if(!dragging) return;
      e.preventDefault();
      scroller.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - (e.pageX - startX);
      scroller.scrollTop = scrollTop - (e.pageY - startY);
    });

    let timer=null;
    const editor = document.getElementById('editorArea');
    if(editor){
      const schedule = function(){
        clearTimeout(timer);
        timer=setTimeout(refresh, 250);
      };
      editor.addEventListener('input', schedule, true);
      editor.addEventListener('change', schedule, true);
      editor.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        if(e.target && (e.target.tagName === 'BUTTON' || e.target.closest('button'))){
          setTimeout(schedule, 80);
        }
      }, true);
    }

    const tabs = document.getElementById('tabs');
    if(tabs){
      tabs.addEventListener('click', function(){
        setTimeout(function(){
          refresh();
          scroller.scrollTop=0;
          scroller.scrollLeft=0;
        }, 150);
      });
    }

    applyZoom();
    setTimeout(refresh, 350);
  });
})();


/* =========================================================
   VOLETS REDIMENSIONNABLES - Drag handles entre volets
========================================================= */
(function(){
  function ready(fn){
    if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn);
    else fn();
  }

  ready(function(){
    const app = document.querySelector('.app');
    if(!app) return;

    const STORE_KEY = 'acs_pane_sizes_v1';
    const MIN_COL = 140; // px minimum par volet

    // Restore saved sizes
    function loadSizes(){
      try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORE_KEY)) || {}; } catch(e){ return {}; }
    }
    function saveSizes(col1px, col2px){
      try { localStorage.setItem(STORE_KEY, JSON.stringify({col1:col1px, col2:col2px})); } catch(e){}
    }
    function applyColSizes(col1px, col2px){
      app.style.setProperty('--col1', col1px + 'px');
      app.style.setProperty('--col2', col2px + 'px');
      app.style.setProperty('--col3', '1fr');
    }

    // Apply saved sizes on load
    const saved = loadSizes();
    if(saved.col1 && saved.col2){
      applyColSizes(saved.col1, saved.col2);
    }

    function makeDraggable(dividerId, colsBefore){
      const divider = document.getElementById(dividerId);
      if(!divider) return;

      let dragging = false;
      let startX = 0;
      let startSizes = [];

      function getColPx(colIdx){
        // colIdx: 0-based index of the grid-template-columns
        const cols = getComputedStyle(app).gridTemplateColumns.split(' ');
        return parseFloat(cols[colIdx]) || 0;
      }

      divider.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){
        if(e.button !== 0) return;
        dragging = true;
        divider.classList.add('dragging');
        startX = e.clientX;
        // Snapshot current pixel sizes (col indices 0,2,4 in 5-col grid)
        startSizes = [getColPx(0), getColPx(2), getColPx(4)];
        document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
        document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
        e.preventDefault();
      });

      window.addEventListener('mouseup', function(){
        if(!dragging) return;
        dragging = false;
        divider.classList.remove('dragging');
        document.body.style.cursor = '';
        document.body.style.userSelect = '';
        // Save sizes
        const cols = getComputedStyle(app).gridTemplateColumns.split(' ');
        saveSizes(parseFloat(cols[0])||0, parseFloat(cols[2])||0);
      });

      window.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e){
        if(!dragging) return;
        const delta = e.clientX - startX;
        const totalW = app.offsetWidth - 18*2 - 6*2; // padding + dividers

        if(colsBefore === 1){
          // Divider between col1 and col2
          let c1 = Math.max(MIN_COL, startSizes[0] + delta);
          let c2 = Math.max(MIN_COL, startSizes[1] - delta);
          applyColSizes(c1, c2);
        } else {
          // Divider between col2 and col3
          let c2 = Math.max(MIN_COL, startSizes[1] + delta);
          applyColSizes(startSizes[0], c2);
        }
      });

      // Double-click to reset
      divider.addEventListener('dblclick', function(){
        app.style.removeProperty('--col1');
        app.style.removeProperty('--col2');
        app.style.removeProperty('--col3');
        localStorage.removeItem(STORE_KEY);
      });
    }

    makeDraggable('divider12', 1);
    makeDraggable('divider23', 2);
  });
})();


/* ════ ATELIERO OS SHELL ════ */
(function(){
  function tick(){
    const el=document.getElementById('os-clock');
    if(el) el.textContent=new Date().toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR');
  }
  setInterval(tick,1000); tick();

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){
    // Doc label
    function refreshLabel(){
      const labels={consigne:'NOUVELLE CONSIGNE',maintenance:'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIV.',fiche:'FICHE SÉCURITÉ MACHINE',securite:'CONSIGNE SÉCURITÉ',diagnostic:'AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC',archives:'ARCHIVES'};
      const el=document.getElementById('os-doc-label');
      if(el && typeof state!=='undefined') el.textContent='MODULE : '+(labels[state.active]||'—');
    }
    // refreshLabel appelé via DOMContentLoaded et via l'event render-complete
    refreshLabel();
    // Écoute personnalisée sans re-wrapper render
    document.addEventListener('labodoc-rendered', refreshLabel);

    // Preview HUD status
    const _u=window.updatePreview;
    if(_u) window.updatePreview=function(){
      _u.apply(this,arguments);
      const s=document.getElementById('preview-hud-status');
      if(s){s.textContent='ACTUALISÉ '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR');s.style.color='var(--cyan2)';clearTimeout(s._t);s._t=setTimeout(()=>{s.style.color='';},3000);}
    };
  });
})();


/* ════ PREVIEW ZOOM & PAN ════ */
(function(){
  let zoom = 1;
  const STEP = 0.15;
  const MIN = 0.3;
  const MAX = 2.5;

  function applyZoom(){
    const host = document.getElementById('previewHost');
    if(host){
      host.style.transform = 'scale('+zoom+')';
      host.style.transformOrigin = 'top center';
      // adjust scroll container min-height so scrollbar appears correctly
      host.style.marginBottom = zoom < 1 ? ((zoom - 1) * host.offsetHeight) + 'px' : '';
    }
    const val = document.getElementById('zoomVal');
    if(val) val.textContent = Math.round(zoom*100)+'%';
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    const zIn  = document.getElementById('zoomIn');
    const zOut = document.getElementById('zoomOut');
    const zRst = document.getElementById('zoomReset');
    if(zIn)  zIn.onclick  = ()=>{ zoom = Math.min(MAX, zoom+STEP); applyZoom(); };
    if(zOut) zOut.onclick = ()=>{ zoom = Math.max(MIN, zoom-STEP); applyZoom(); };
    if(zRst) zRst.onclick = ()=>{ zoom = 1; applyZoom(); };

    // Ctrl+scroll to zoom
    const scroll = document.querySelector('.preview-scroll');
    if(scroll){
      scroll.addEventListener('wheel', function(e){
        if(e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey){
          e.preventDefault();
          zoom = Math.min(MAX, Math.max(MIN, zoom - e.deltaY * 0.001));
          applyZoom();
        }
      }, {passive:false});

      // Pan via drag
      let dragging = false, startX=0, startY=0, scrollLeft=0, scrollTop=0;
      scroll.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){
        // Only drag on background, not on form elements
        if(e.target.closest('button,input,select,textarea,label,a')) return;
        dragging = true;
        scroll.classList.add('panning');
        startX = e.clientX; startY = e.clientY;
        scrollLeft = scroll.scrollLeft; scrollTop = scroll.scrollTop;
        e.preventDefault();
      });
      window.addEventListener('mouseup', ()=>{ dragging=false; scroll.classList.remove('panning'); });
      window.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e){
        if(!dragging) return;
        scroll.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - (e.clientX - startX);
        scroll.scrollTop  = scrollTop  - (e.clientY - startY);
      });
    }
  });
})();


/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════
   LABO.DOC — Impression HUD + JSON auto-dossier
   • Bouton 📁 : choisit/affiche le dossier de travail
   • Bouton 🖨️ : exporte JSON dans le dossier choisi
               + ouvre la fenêtre d'impression calibrée A4
════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
(function(){
  let _dirHandle = null;

  // ── Restore folder name from memory ──
  function restoreFolderName(){
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('labodoc_folder_name_v1');
    const btn = document.getElementById('hudChooseFolderBtn');
    const lbl = document.getElementById('hudFolderName');
    if(saved && lbl){ lbl.textContent = saved; if(btn) btn.classList.add('folder-set'); }
  }

  // ── Choose folder (File System Access API) ──
  async function chooseFolder(){
    if(!window.showDirectoryPicker){
      alert("Ton navigateur ne supporte pas le choix direct d'un dossier.\nSur Chrome/Edge récent ça fonctionne. Le JSON sera sinon téléchargé normalement.");
      return;
    }
    try{
      _dirHandle = await window.showDirectoryPicker({mode:'readwrite'});
      window._labodocDirHandle = _dirHandle; // handle global unique
      const name = _dirHandle.name || 'Dossier choisi';
      localStorage.setItem('labodoc_folder_name_v1', name);
      const lbl = document.getElementById('hudFolderName');
      if(lbl) lbl.textContent = '📂 ' + name;
      const btn = document.getElementById('hudChooseFolderBtn');
      if(btn) btn.classList.add('folder-set');
    }catch(err){
      if(err && err.name !== 'AbortError') console.warn('Folder pick error', err);
    }
  }

  // ── Build JSON payload ──
  function buildJsonPayload(){
    try{
      // Use V78 if available, else fallback
      if(typeof window.docBaseNameV78 === 'function' && typeof window.payloadV78 === 'function'){
        return { payload: window.payloadV78(), name: window.docBaseNameV78() };
      }
      // Fallback
      const type = (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state.active) || 'document';
      const d = (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state[type]) || {};
      const date = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
      const title = (d.displayTitle||d.title||d.machine||type||'document')
        .replace(/[^a-z0-9À-ÿ ]/gi,'').trim().replace(/\s+/g,'_').slice(0,60) || type;
      const name = [date, type, title].filter(Boolean).join('_');
      return { payload:{app:'labodoc',version:'2',type,exportedAt:new Date().toISOString(),data:JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(d))}, name };
    }catch(e){ return { payload:{error:'build failed'}, name:'labodoc_export' }; }
  }

  // ── Save JSON (folder or download) ──
  async function saveJsonAuto(){
    const {payload, name} = buildJsonPayload();
    const text = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
    const fileName = name.replace(/[^a-z0-9À-ÿ_-]/gi,'_').replace(/_+/g,'_') + '.json';

    // Try V78 dir handle first, then ours
    const dir = window._labodocDirHandle || _dirHandle || null;
    if(dir){
      try{
        const fh = await dir.getFileHandle(fileName, {create:true});
        const w = await fh.createWritable();
        await w.write(text); await w.close();
        const st = document.getElementById('preview-hud-status');
        if(st){ st.textContent = '✓ JSON : ' + fileName; st.style.color='#00e676'; clearTimeout(st._t); st._t=setTimeout(()=>{st.textContent='EN ATTENTE';st.style.color='';},4000); }
        return;
      }catch(err){ console.warn('Save to folder failed, falling back', err); }
    }
    // Download fallback
    const blob = new Blob([text],{type:'application/json'});
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    a.download = fileName;
    document.body.appendChild(a); a.click();
    setTimeout(()=>{URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);a.remove();},800);
  }

  // ── Build print HTML ──
  function buildPrintHtml(){
    if(typeof window.atelierBuildExactHtml === 'function'){
      try{ return window.atelierBuildExactHtml('pdf'); }catch(e){}
    }
    // Fallback: extract previewHost content
    const host = document.getElementById('previewHost');
    if(!host) return null;
    const styles = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('style,link[rel="stylesheet"]'))
      .map(el => el.outerHTML).join('\n');
    return `<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8">${styles}
<style>
@page{size:A4 portrait;margin:0}
*{box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{margin:0;padding:0;background:#fff;width:210mm}
body{color:#111827;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif}
/* Reset dark theme vars for print */
:root{--bg:#fff;--card:#fff;--card2:#fff;--text:#111827;--line:#d0d0d0;
  --cyan:#075aa8;--amber:#d97706;--ion:#075aa8;--t1:#111827;--t2:#333;--t3:#666}
.preview-page{
  width:210mm !important;
  min-height:297mm !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  padding:12mm !important;
  background:#fff !important;
  box-shadow:none !important;
  page-break-after:always !important;
  color:#111827 !important;
}
/* Cacher l'interface, ne garder que la page */
.topbar,.tabs,.pane-divider,#editorArea,.preview-hud-bar,.noprint,
.preview-zoom-controls,.preview-print-actions,.preview-hud-status,.hud-folder-btn,.hud-print-btn{
  display:none !important;
}
/* Flux de pagination : nc-bottom et nc-footer collés au mode opératoire */
.nc-bottom{break-before:avoid !important;page-break-before:avoid !important}
.nc-footer{break-before:avoid !important;page-break-before:avoid !important}
.nc-bottom-wrap{break-inside:auto !important;page-break-inside:auto !important}
/* Force les couleurs pour l'impression */
.band,.subband,.doc-footer{background:#111827 !important;color:#fff !important;-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;print-color-adjust:exact}
.doc-title-red{color:#c62828 !important}
.doc-title-blue{color:#163a63 !important}
.doc-title-green{color:#166534 !important}
img{max-width:100%;-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;print-color-adjust:exact}
</style></head><body>${host.outerHTML}

<!-- ============================================================
     V17 — Finitions ergonomie
     • Volet de saisie : les titres sur bandeaux noirs passent en blanc.
     • Redimensionnement du volet de saisie possible sur toute la hauteur
       du bord droit, plus seulement via le repère central.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="patch-v17-bandeaux-blancs-resize-plein-bord">
/* Titres sur bandeaux noirs du volet de saisie : blanc plus lisible */
body.ws-epure #editorArea .band,

body.ws-epure #wsFormResizer{

  display:flex !important;

  }

  body.ws-epure #wsFormResizer{display:none !important;}
}
</style>

</body></html>`;
  }

  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // MOTEUR D'IMPRESSION v3 — Impression directe de la preview
  // Principe : on masque toute l'UI via une classe CSS,
  // on laisse le navigateur imprimer la preview telle quelle.
  // Aucun clonage DOM, aucune popup, tous les CSS intacts.
  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  async function doPrint(){
    const btn = document.getElementById('hudPrintBtn');
    if(btn){ btn.textContent='⏳ Génération PDF…'; btn.disabled=true; }

    try{
      const host = document.getElementById('previewHost');
      if(!host || !host.innerHTML.trim()){
        alert("Lance d'abord la prévisualisation (bouton ▶ Prévisualiser).");
        return;
      }

      // Export JSON auto
      await saveJsonAuto();

      // Déléguer à exportPdf (WYSIWYG html2canvas)
      if(typeof exportPdf === 'function'){
        await exportPdf();
      }

    } catch(e) {
      console.error('Print error:', e);
      alert('Erreur : ' + (e.message || e));
    } finally {
      if(btn){ btn.textContent='🖨️ Imprimer / PDF'; btn.disabled=false; }
    }
  }

  // ── Wire up buttons ──
  function init(){
    const folderBtn = document.getElementById('hudChooseFolderBtn');
    const printBtn = document.getElementById('hudPrintBtn');
    if(folderBtn) folderBtn.onclick = function(){
      // Utiliser V78 si disponible (gère JSON + PDF), sinon fallback V75
      if(typeof window.chooseWorkingFolderV78 === 'function') window.chooseWorkingFolderV78();
      else chooseFolder();
    };
    if(printBtn) printBtn.onclick = doPrint;

    // Bouton import JSON dans le HUD
    const hudImport = document.getElementById('hudImportJsonInput');
    if(hudImport){
      hudImport.onchange = function(e){
        const file = e.target.files[0];
        if(file) importCurrentJson(file);
        hudImport.value = '';
      };
    }
    restoreFolderName();
    // Sync with V78 handle if it already ran
    if(typeof window.atelierDirectoryHandleV78 !== 'undefined' && window.atelierDirectoryHandleV78) _dirHandle = window.atelierDirectoryHandleV78;
  }

  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  else init();
  // Re-init via event au lieu de wrapper render
  document.addEventListener('labodoc-rendered', ()=>setTimeout(init, 50));
})();

</script>

<style id="global-print-engine-css">
/* =========================================================
   GLOBAL PRINT ENGINE — Pagination propre tous onglets
   Objectif : ne plus laisser Chrome couper n'importe où.
   Le moteur JS construit une fenêtre d'impression avec pages A4.
   ========================================================= */

.gpe-print-root{
  background:#fff !important;
}

.gpe-page{
  width:210mm !important;
  min-height:297mm !important;
  height:auto !important;
  background:#fff !important;
  color:#111827 !important;
  box-sizing:border-box !important;
  page-break-after:always !important;
  break-after:page !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
  position:relative !important;
}

.gpe-page:last-child{
  page-break-after:auto !important;
  break-after:auto !important;
}

.gpe-page-inner{
  width:100% !important;
  min-height:297mm !important;
  box-sizing:border-box !important;
  background:#fff !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
}

.gpe-avoid-break,
.gpe-avoid-break *{
  break-inside:avoid !important;
  page-break-inside:avoid !important;
}

@media print{
  @page{size:A4;margin:0}
  html,body{
    width:210mm !important;
    margin:0 !important;
    padding:0 !important;
    background:#fff !important;
    overflow:visible !important;
    -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact !important;
    print-color-adjust:exact !important;
  }
  .gpe-page{
    margin:0 !important;
    box-shadow:none !important;
  }
}
</style>

<script id="global-print-engine-js">
(function(){
  const GPE_PAGE_HEIGHT_PX = 1122; // A4 approx at 96dpi
  const GPE_PAGE_WIDTH_MM = '210mm';

  function gpeCloneStyles(){
    return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('style'))
      .map(st => st.innerHTML || '')
      .join('\n');
  }

  function gpeCleanClone(root){
    const clone = root.cloneNode(true);

    // Supprimer les éléments non-imprimables
    clone.querySelectorAll('script, .noprint, .preview-hud-bar, .preview-zoom-controls, .preview-print-actions, .labodoc-signature').forEach(el => el.remove());

    // Supprimer les styles sombres inline
    clone.querySelectorAll('[style]').forEach(el => {
      // Enlever les couleurs/backgrounds sombres inline
      const s = el.style;
      if(s.backgroundColor && s.backgroundColor.includes('rgb(') && !s.backgroundColor.includes('255, 255, 255')){
        // Garder seulement si c'est une couleur voulue (bandes, etc.)
      }
      // Libérer les hauteurs fixes
      if(s.height && (s.height.includes('297mm') || s.height.includes('px') && parseInt(s.height) > 800)){
        s.height = 'auto';
      }
      s.maxHeight = 'none';
      s.overflow = 'visible';
    });

    // Libérer les éléments qui coupent le contenu
    const BLOCK_SELECTORS = '.preview-page, .nc-a4, .sec-a4, .diag59-a4, .diag60-a4, .maint-v2-sheet';
    clone.querySelectorAll(BLOCK_SELECTORS).forEach(el => {
      el.style.height = 'auto';
      el.style.minHeight = '297mm';
      el.style.overflow = 'visible';
      el.style.boxShadow = 'none';
      el.style.margin = '0';
      el.style.padding = el.style.padding || '12mm';
    });

    // break-inside:avoid seulement sur les petits blocs, PAS sur les conteneurs
    const AVOID_SELECTORS = '.nc-step, .nc-card, .maint-v2-table tr, .block, .photo-card, .message-box, .alert-box, .machine-head, .step, .archive-card, .sec-box, .diag60-step';
    clone.querySelectorAll(AVOID_SELECTORS).forEach(el => {
      el.style.breakInside = 'avoid';
      el.style.pageBreakInside = 'avoid';
    });

    return clone;
  }

  function gpeGetPrintableSource(){
    const previewHost = document.getElementById('previewHost');
    if(previewHost && previewHost.innerHTML.trim()){
      const activeDoc = previewHost.querySelector('.preview-page') || previewHost.firstElementChild;
      if(activeDoc) return activeDoc;
    }

    const activePreview = document.querySelector('.preview-page');
    if(activePreview) return activePreview;

    return null;
  }

  function gpeOpenPrintWindow(htmlContent, title){
    const w = window.open('', '_blank');
    if(!w){
      alert("Fenêtre d'impression bloquée par le navigateur.");
      return;
    }

    w.document.open();
    w.document.write(`<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>${title || 'Impression document atelier'}</title>
<style>
${gpeCloneStyles()}

@page{size:A4;margin:0}
:root{
  /* Reset dark theme pour impression */
  --bg:#fff !important;
  --bg2:#fff !important;
  --card:#fff !important;
  --card2:#fff !important;
  --text:#111827 !important;
  --text2:#333 !important;
  --muted:#666 !important;
  --line:#d0d0d0 !important;
  --border:rgba(0,0,0,.12) !important;
  --border2:rgba(0,0,0,.08) !important;
  --t1:#111827 !important;
  --t2:#333 !important;
  --t3:#666 !important;
  --void:#fff !important;
  --deep:#fff !important;
  --glass:rgba(255,255,255,1) !important;
  --glass2:rgba(255,255,255,1) !important;
}
html,body{
  margin:0 !important;
  padding:0 !important;
  background:#fff !important;
  color:#111827 !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
  -webkit-print-color-adjust:exact !important;
  print-color-adjust:exact !important;
}
body{
  font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif !important;
}
/* Force input/textarea backgrounds blanc pour impression */
input,textarea,select,.rich,[contenteditable]{
  background:#fff !important;
  color:#111827 !important;
  border-color:#ccc !important;
}
.gpe-page{
  width:${GPE_PAGE_WIDTH_MM} !important;
  min-height:297mm !important;
  height:auto !important;
  background:#fff !important;
  page-break-after:always !important;
  break-after:page !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
}
.gpe-page:last-child{
  page-break-after:auto !important;
  break-after:auto !important;
}
.gpe-page-inner{
  width:100% !important;
  min-height:297mm !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
  background:#fff !important;
  box-sizing:border-box !important;
}
.preview-page,
.doc-export-root{
  width:210mm !important;
  min-height:297mm !important;
  height:auto !important;
  max-height:none !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  padding:0 !important;
  box-shadow:none !important;
  background:#fff !important;
}
.nc-a4,.sec-a4,.diag59-a4,.diag60-a4,.maint-v2-sheet{
  width:210mm !important;
  min-height:297mm !important;
  height:auto !important;
  max-height:none !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  box-shadow:none !important;
}
.nc-step,.nc-card,.sec-box,.diag60-step,.diag59-step,.maint-v2-table tr,.block,.photo-card{
  break-inside:avoid !important;
  page-break-inside:avoid !important;
}
/* nc-bottom et nc-footer collés — pas de saut avant */
.nc-bottom,.nc-footer{
  break-before:avoid !important;
  page-break-before:avoid !important;
}
.nc-bottom-wrap{
  break-inside:auto !important;
  page-break-inside:auto !important;
}
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ÉTAPES MODE OPÉRATOIRE — MISE EN PAGE LIGNES (inspiré maquette)
   Chaque étape = ligne horizontale : numéro/titre | photo | texte
   Compatible impression directe et export PDF.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Conteneur étapes : colonne verticale */
.consigne-pdf .nc-steps,
.consigne-preview .nc-steps,
#previewHost .nc-steps{
  display:flex !important;
  flex-direction:column !important;
  gap:2.5mm !important;
}

/* Chaque étape : grille 3 colonnes — [num+titre | photo | texte] */
.consigne-pdf .nc-step,
.consigne-preview .nc-step,
#previewHost .nc-step{
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:38mm 44mm 1fr !important;
  column-gap:4mm !important;
  row-gap:0 !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  min-height:24mm !important;
  max-height:none !important;
  padding:2.5mm !important;
  border:1px solid #d4d8df !important;
  border-radius:3mm !important;
  background:#fff !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
  break-inside:avoid !important;
  page-break-inside:avoid !important;
}

/* En-tête étape : numéro + titre */
.consigne-pdf .nc-step-h,
.consigne-preview .nc-step-h,
#previewHost .nc-step-h{
  grid-column:1 !important;
  display:flex !important;
  flex-direction:column !important;
  align-items:flex-start !important;
  gap:1.5mm !important;
  margin:0 !important;
}

/* Badge numéro */
.consigne-pdf .nc-num,
.consigne-preview .nc-num,
#previewHost .nc-num{
  width:8mm !important;
  height:8mm !important;
  font-size:13px !important;
  flex:0 0 auto !important;
}

/* Titre de l'étape */
.consigne-pdf .nc-step-title,
.consigne-preview .nc-step-title,
#previewHost .nc-step-title{
  font-size:10.5px !important;
  line-height:1.08 !important;

  function gpePrepareSimplePrint(){
    const source = gpeGetPrintableSource();
    if(!source){
      alert("Aucun aperçu imprimable trouvé. Clique d'abord sur Prévisualiser.");
      return;
    }

    const clone = gpeCleanClone(source);

    // Récupérer les classes du previewHost pour conserver le contexte CSS
    // (ex: consigne-preview impose flex-column sur les étapes)
    const previewHost = document.getElementById('previewHost');
    const hostClasses = previewHost ? Array.from(previewHost.classList).join(' ') : '';

    const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
    wrapper.className = 'gpe-page';

    // Wrapper intermédiaire qui simule #previewHost avec ses classes
    const hostMirror = document.createElement('div');
    hostMirror.id = 'previewHost';
    hostMirror.className = hostClasses;
    hostMirror.style.cssText = 'width:100%;background:#fff;';

    const inner = document.createElement('div');
    inner.className = 'gpe-page-inner';
    inner.appendChild(clone);
    hostMirror.appendChild(inner);
    wrapper.appendChild(hostMirror);

    gpeOpenPrintWindow(wrapper.outerHTML, 'Impression document atelier');
  }

  function gpeInstallButtons(){
    // GPE v3 : le HUD hudPrintBtn gère tout via doPrint()
    // On n'intercepte plus les autres boutons pour éviter les conflits
    return; // désactivé — impression directe via doPrint()
    const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button'));
    candidates.forEach(btn => {
      const txt = (btn.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
      const id = (btn.id || '').toLowerCase();

      const isPrintLike =
        txt.includes('aperçu imprimable') ||
        txt.includes('imprimer') ||
        id.includes('print');

      const isPdf = txt.includes('pdf') || id.includes('pdf');

      if(isPrintLike && !isPdf && !btn.dataset.gpeBound){
        btn.dataset.gpeBound = '1';
        btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
          ev.preventDefault();
          ev.stopPropagation();
          gpePrepareSimplePrint();
        }, true);
      }
    });
  }

  window.globalPrintEngine = {
    print: gpePrepareSimplePrint,
    install: gpeInstallButtons
  };

  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', gpeInstallButtons);
  }else{
    gpeInstallButtons();
  }

  window.addEventListener('load', gpeInstallButtons);
  setTimeout(gpeInstallButtons, 500);
  setTimeout(gpeInstallButtons, 1500);

})();
</script>

     ========================================================= -->
