  .v45f-foot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;padding:12px 18px 16px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);}
  .v45f-foot .hint{color:#7298b2;font-size:.77rem;}
  .v45f-photos{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(96px,1fr));gap:9px;margin-top:8px;}
  .v45f-photo{border:1px solid #203b52;border-radius:12px;background:#071321;padding:6px;display:grid;gap:6px;}
  .v45f-photo img{width:100%;height:82px;object-fit:contain;background:#0f2030;border-radius:8px;}
  .v45f-row{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
  #v45FixedToast{position:fixed;right:16px;bottom:16px;z-index:99990;background:#071321;border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.35);color:#dff9ff;border-radius:14px;padding:10px 13px;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.45);opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px);transition:.18s;pointer-events:none;font-size:.84rem;}
  #v45FixedToast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
  .v45f-note{margin:10px 0 12px;border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.20);background:rgba(0,229,255,.055);border-radius:16px;padding:10px 12px;color:#cfeeff;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.35;}
  .v45f-note b{color:#fff;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.v45f-body .v45f-grid2{grid-template-columns:1fr}#v45FixedModal{top:12px;transform:translateX(-50%);max-height:calc(100vh - 24px)}}
  @media print{#v45FixedToggle,#v45FixedBackdrop,#v45FixedModal,#v45FixedToast,.v45f-note{display:none!important}#previewHost .v45-fixed-zone{outline:none!important;box-shadow:none!important}.v45-fixed-zone::after{display:none!important}}
</style>
<script id="v45-fixed-preview-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V45_FIXED_PREVIEW__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V45_FIXED_PREVIEW__ = true;
  var STORE = 'labodoc-v45-fixed-preview-fill';
  function qs(sel,root){ return (root||document).querySelector(sel); }
  function qsa(sel,root){ return Array.prototype.slice.call((root||document).querySelectorAll(sel)); }
  function appState(){ try{ return state; }catch(e){ return null; } }
  function isConsigne(){ var s=appState(); return !!(s && s.active === 'consigne'); }
  function data(){
    try{ if(typeof ensureConsigneV4 === 'function') return ensureConsigneV4(); }catch(e){}
    var s=appState(); if(!s) return {}; return s.consigne || (s.consigne={});
  }
  function html(s){
    try{ if(typeof escapeHtml === 'function') return escapeHtml(String(s==null?'':s)); }catch(e){}
    return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];});
  }
  function toLines(v){ return String(v||'').split(/\n+/).map(function(x){return x.trim();}).filter(Boolean); }
  function fromLines(v){ return (v||[]).join('\n'); }
  function today(){ return new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); }
  function commit(refreshForm){
    try{ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); }catch(e){}
    try{ if(refreshForm && typeof renderConsigne === 'function') renderConsigne(); }catch(e){}
    try{ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); }catch(e){ console.warn('V45 updatePreview', e); }
    setTimeout(markPreview, 0);
  }
  async function readFile(file){
    if(typeof fileToDataUrl === 'function') return await fileToDataUrl(file);
    return await new Promise(function(resolve,reject){ var r=new FileReader(); r.onload=function(){resolve(r.result)}; r.onerror=reject; r.readAsDataURL(file); });
  }
  function input(label,key,value,type,ph){
    return '<div class="field"><label>'+html(label)+'</label><input type="'+(type||'text')+'" data-v45f-field="'+html(key)+'" value="'+html(value||'')+'" placeholder="'+html(ph||'')+'"></div>';
  }
  function area(label,key,value,ph){
    return '<div class="field"><label>'+html(label)+'</label><textarea data-v45f-field="'+html(key)+'" placeholder="'+html(ph||'')+'">'+html(value||'')+'</textarea></div>';
  }
  function arrayArea(label,key,value,help){
    return '<div class="field"><label>'+html(label)+'</label><textarea data-v45f-array="'+html(key)+'" placeholder="Une ligne par élément">'+html(fromLines(value||[]))+'</textarea>'+(help?'<div class="v45f-help">'+html(help)+'</div>':'')+'</div>';
  }
  function selectType(value){
    var opts=['','Nouvelle Consigne','Bonnes Pratiques','Consigne Provisoire','Consigne Qualité'];
    return '<div class="field"><label>Type de consigne</label><select data-v45f-type-select>'+opts.map(function(o){return '<option value="'+html(o)+'" '+(String(value||'')===o?'selected':'')+'>'+(o?html(o):'Choisir…')+'</option>';}).join('')+'</select><input style="margin-top:8px" type="text" data-v45f-field="typeConsigne" value="'+html(value||'')+'" placeholder="Ou libellé personnalisé"></div>';
  }
  function modal(){
    var b=qs('#v45FixedBackdrop'), m=qs('#v45FixedModal');
    if(!b){ b=document.createElement('div'); b.id='v45FixedBackdrop'; document.body.appendChild(b); b.addEventListener('click', closeModal); }
    if(!m){ m=document.createElement('div'); m.id='v45FixedModal'; m.setAttribute('role','dialog'); m.setAttribute('aria-modal','true'); document.body.appendChild(m); }
    return m;
  }
  function openModal(kind,index){
    if(!isConsigne()) return;
    if(kind === 'logo'){
      try{ if(typeof chooseLogoForTab === 'function') chooseLogoForTab('consigne'); }catch(e){}
      return;
    }
    index = Number(index||0);
    var d=data();
    var cfg=config(kind,index,d);
    var m=modal();
    m.innerHTML = '<div class="v45f-head"><div class="v45f-title"><span class="ico">'+cfg.ico+'</span><div><strong>'+cfg.title+'</strong><small>'+cfg.sub+'</small></div></div><button type="button" class="v45f-close" data-v45f-close>Fermer</button></div>'+
      '<div class="v45f-body">'+cfg.body+'</div><div class="v45f-foot"><span class="hint">Modification directe de la preview.</span><button type="button" class="primary" data-v45f-close>OK</button></div>';
    qs('#v45FixedBackdrop').classList.add('open');
    m.classList.add('open');
    bind(m,kind,index);
    var first=m.querySelector('input,textarea,select,button'); if(first) setTimeout(function(){ first.focus(); },40);
  }
  function closeModal(){
    var b=qs('#v45FixedBackdrop'), m=qs('#v45FixedModal');
    if(b) b.classList.remove('open');
    if(m) m.classList.remove('open');
    try{ if(isConsigne() && typeof renderConsigne === 'function') renderConsigne(); }catch(e){}
  }
  function config(kind,index,d){
    var st=(d.steps||[])[index] || {};
    if(kind==='identity') return {ico:'🏷️',title:'Identité du document',sub:'En-tête, secteur, poste, rédacteur et date.',body:
      '<div class="v45f-grid2">'+input('Titre de trame','headerTitle',d.headerTitle||'INFO ATELIER')+input('Sous-titre','headerSubtitle',d.headerSubtitle||'')+'</div>'+ 
      '<div class="v45f-grid2">'+input('Secteur','sector',d.sector||'')+input('Poste','poste',d.poste||'')+'</div>'+ 
      '<div class="v45f-grid2">'+input('Rédacteur','author',d.author||'')+input('Date','date',d.date||today(),'date')+'</div>'};
    if(kind==='title') return {ico:'✍️',title:'Titre et bandeau',sub:'Ce que l’opérateur voit en premier.',body:
      selectType(d.typeConsigne||'')+input('Titre principal','displayTitle',d.displayTitle||d.title||'')+input('Sous-titre','subtitle',d.subtitle||'')+input('Cartouche à droite','tagLabel',d.tagLabel||'SOYEZ INFORMÉ')};
    if(kind==='photo') return {ico:'🖼️',title:'Photo principale',sub:'Image centrale de la consigne.',body:
      '<div class="field"><label>Photo principale</label><label class="file-btn">Charger / remplacer<input class="hidden" type="file" accept="image/*" data-v45f-main-photo></label><div class="v45f-photos">'+((d.mainPhotos&&d.mainPhotos[0]&&d.mainPhotos[0].src)?'<div class="v45f-photo"><img src="'+d.mainPhotos[0].src+'"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" data-v45f-clear-main>Supprimer</button></div>':'<div class="v45f-help">Aucune photo pour le moment.</div>')+'</div></div>'};
    if(kind==='objectif') return {ico:'🎯',title:'Objectif',sub:'La raison simple de cette consigne.',body:area('Objectif','objectif',d.objectif||'','Pourquoi cette consigne existe ?')};
    if(kind==='retain') return {ico:'🧠',title:'À retenir',sub:'Les messages essentiels.',body:arrayArea('À retenir','retenir',d.retenir,'Une ligne = un point affiché.')};
    if(kind==='step') return {ico:'➊',title:'Étape '+(index+1),sub:'Geste, illustration, point d’attention.',body:stepBody(index,st)};
    if(kind==='security') return {ico:'⚠️',title:'Sécurité et EPI',sub:'Risques et protections.',body:arrayArea('Risques identifiés','safetyRisks',d.safetyRisks,'Une ligne par risque.')+arrayArea('EPI spécifiques','epi',d.epi,'Une ligne par EPI.')};
    if(kind==='keypoints') return {ico:'🔑',title:'Points clés',sub:'Ce qui fait réussir le geste.',body:arrayArea('Points clés','keyPoints',d.keyPoints,'Une ligne par point clé.')};
    if(kind==='quality') return {ico:'☑️',title:'Contrôle qualité',sub:'Ce qui doit être vérifié.',body:arrayArea('Contrôles qualité','qualityChecks',d.qualityChecks,'Une ligne par contrôle.')};
    if(kind==='special') return {ico:'❗',title:'Cas particuliers',sub:'Exceptions et image éventuelle.',body:input('Titre du bloc','specialTitle',d.specialTitle||'CAS PARTICULIERS')+area('Texte','specialText',d.specialText||'')+'<div class="field"><label>Image cas particulier</label><label class="file-btn">Charger image<input class="hidden" type="file" accept="image/*" data-v45f-special-image></label><div class="v45f-photos">'+(d.specialImage?'<div class="v45f-photo"><img src="'+d.specialImage+'"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" data-v45f-clear-special>Supprimer</button></div>':'<div class="v45f-help">Aucune image.</div>')+'</div></div>'};
    if(kind==='footer') return {ico:'👥',title:'En cas de doute',sub:'Message du pied de page.',body:area('Texte du pied de page','doubtText',d.doubtText||'','Ex : appeler le chef d’équipe / méthodes')};
    return {ico:'✍️',title:'Modifier',sub:'Zone sélectionnée.',body:'<div class="v45f-help">Zone non reconnue.</div>'};
  }
  function stepBody(index,st){
    var photos=(st.photos&&st.photos.length)?st.photos:(st.photo?[st.photo]:[]);
    return input('Titre de l’étape','step:title',st.title||'')+area('Texte de l’étape','step:text',st.text||'','Décrire le geste à réaliser...')+area('Alerte / point rouge','step:warning',st.warning||'','Facultatif')+
      '<div class="field"><label>Photo(s) de l’étape</label><label class="file-btn">Ajouter photo(s)<input class="hidden" type="file" accept="image/*" multiple data-v45f-step-photos></label><div class="v45f-photos">'+(photos.length?photos.map(function(ph,pi){return '<div class="v45f-photo"><img src="'+ph+'"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" data-v45f-remove-step-photo="'+pi+'">Supprimer</button></div>';}).join(''):'<div class="v45f-help">Aucune photo pour cette étape.</div>')+'</div></div>'+ 
      '<div class="v45f-row"><button type="button" class="yellow" data-v45f-add-after>+ Ajouter une étape après</button><button type="button" class="danger" data-v45f-delete-step>Supprimer cette étape</button></div>';
  }
  function bind(root,kind,index){
    qsa('[data-v45f-close]',root).forEach(function(btn){ btn.addEventListener('click',closeModal); });
    qsa('[data-v45f-field]',root).forEach(function(el){
      el.addEventListener('input',function(){
        var key=el.getAttribute('data-v45f-field'), d=data();
        if(key.indexOf('step:')===0){
          if(!d.steps[index]) d.steps[index]=(typeof makeConsigneStep==='function'?makeConsigneStep():{title:'',text:'',warning:'',photos:[]});
          d.steps[index][key.split(':')[1]]=el.value;
        }else{
          d[key]=el.value;
          if(key==='displayTitle') d.title=el.value;
          if(key==='typeConsigne') d.level=el.value;
        }
        commit(false);
      });
    });
    qsa('[data-v45f-array]',root).forEach(function(el){ el.addEventListener('input',function(){ data()[el.getAttribute('data-v45f-array')]=toLines(el.value); commit(false); }); });
    var typeSel=qs('[data-v45f-type-select]',root);
    if(typeSel) typeSel.addEventListener('change',function(){ if(!typeSel.value) return; var d=data(); d.typeConsigne=typeSel.value; d.level=typeSel.value; var inp=qs('[data-v45f-field="typeConsigne"]',root); if(inp) inp.value=typeSel.value; commit(false); });
    var main=qs('[data-v45f-main-photo]',root);
    if(main) main.addEventListener('change',async function(){ if(!this.files||!this.files[0]) return; var d=data(); d.mainPhotos=[{src:await readFile(this.files[0]),caption:''}]; d.machinePhoto=d.mainPhotos[0].src; commit(true); openModal('photo',0); });
    var clear=qs('[data-v45f-clear-main]',root);
    if(clear) clear.addEventListener('click',function(){ var d=data(); d.mainPhotos=[]; d.machinePhoto=''; commit(true); openModal('photo',0); });
    var stepPhotos=qs('[data-v45f-step-photos]',root);
    if(stepPhotos) stepPhotos.addEventListener('change',async function(){ if(!this.files||!this.files.length) return; var d=data(); if(!d.steps[index]) d.steps[index]=(typeof makeConsigneStep==='function'?makeConsigneStep():{title:'',text:'',warning:'',photos:[]}); if(!Array.isArray(d.steps[index].photos)) d.steps[index].photos=[]; for(var i=0;i<this.files.length;i++) d.steps[index].photos.push(await readFile(this.files[i])); d.steps[index].photo=d.steps[index].photos[0]||''; commit(true); openModal('step',index); });
    qsa('[data-v45f-remove-step-photo]',root).forEach(function(btn){ btn.addEventListener('click',function(){ var pi=Number(btn.getAttribute('data-v45f-remove-step-photo')); var d=data(); if(d.steps[index]&&Array.isArray(d.steps[index].photos)){ d.steps[index].photos.splice(pi,1); d.steps[index].photo=d.steps[index].photos[0]||''; } commit(true); openModal('step',index); }); });
    var addAfter=qs('[data-v45f-add-after]',root);
    if(addAfter) addAfter.addEventListener('click',function(){ try{ if(typeof addConsigneStepAfterV4==='function') addConsigneStepAfterV4(index); }catch(e){} openModal('step',index+1); });
    var del=qs('[data-v45f-delete-step]',root);
    if(del) del.addEventListener('click',function(){ if(!confirm('Supprimer cette étape ?')) return; try{ if(typeof removeConsigneStepV4==='function') removeConsigneStepV4(index); }catch(e){} closeModal(); });
    var special=qs('[data-v45f-special-image]',root);
    if(special) special.addEventListener('change',async function(){ if(!this.files||!this.files[0]) return; data().specialImage=await readFile(this.files[0]); commit(true); openModal('special',0); });
    var clearSpecial=qs('[data-v45f-clear-special]',root);
    if(clearSpecial) clearSpecial.addEventListener('click',function(){ data().specialImage=''; commit(true); openModal('special',0); });
  }
  function tag(el,kind,label,index){ if(!el) return; el.classList.add('v45-fixed-zone'); el.setAttribute('data-v45-kind',kind); el.setAttribute('data-v45-label',label); if(index!==undefined) el.setAttribute('data-v45-index',String(index)); }
  function markPreview(){
    var host=qs('#previewHost'); if(!host) return;
    var on = localStorage.getItem(STORE) !== '0';
    host.classList.toggle('v45-fixed-on', on && isConsigne());
    qsa('.v45-fixed-zone',host).forEach(function(el){ el.classList.remove('v45-fixed-zone'); el.removeAttribute('data-v45-kind'); el.removeAttribute('data-v45-label'); el.removeAttribute('data-v45-index'); });
    if(!on || !isConsigne()) return;
    tag(qs('.nc-logo',host),'logo','Logo');
    tag(qs('.nc-titlebox',host),'identity','Identité');
    qsa('.nc-meta',host).forEach(function(el){ tag(el,'identity','Identité'); });
    tag(qs('.nc-blackbar',host),'title','Titre');
    tag(qs('.nc-main-photo',host),'photo','Photo principale');
    tag(qs('.nc-objectif > p',host),'objectif','Objectif');
    tag(qs('.nc-retain',host),'retain','À retenir');
    qsa('.nc-step',host).forEach(function(el,i){ tag(el,'step','Étape '+(i+1),i); });
    var cards=qsa('.nc-bottom .nc-card',host);
    if(cards[0]) tag(cards[0],'security','Sécurité');
    if(cards[1]) tag(cards[1],'keypoints','Points clés');
    if(cards[2]) tag(cards[2],'quality','Qualité');
    if(cards[3]) tag(cards[3],'special','Cas particuliers');
    tag(qs('.nc-footer',host),'footer','Doute');
  }
  function ensureToggle(){
    var bar=qs('.preview-hud-bar'); if(!bar || qs('#v45FixedToggle')) return;
    var btn=document.createElement('button'); btn.type='button'; btn.id='v45FixedToggle';
    function refresh(){ var on=localStorage.getItem(STORE)!=='0'; btn.classList.toggle('off',!on); btn.innerHTML='<span class="v45-dot"></span>'+(on?'Remplir dans l’aperçu':'Aperçu non remplissable'); markPreview(); }
    btn.addEventListener('click',function(){ var on=localStorage.getItem(STORE)!=='0'; localStorage.setItem(STORE,on?'0':'1'); refresh(); toast(on?'Édition dans l’aperçu coupée.':'Clique sur une zone de la preview.'); });
    var label=qs('.preview-hud-label',bar); if(label && label.nextSibling) bar.insertBefore(btn,label.nextSibling); else bar.insertBefore(btn,bar.firstChild);
    refresh();
  }
  function ensureNote(){
    var panel=qs('#panel-consigne'); if(!panel || qs('#v45FixedNote',panel)) return;
    var sheet=panel.querySelector('.sheet'); if(!sheet) return;
    var note=document.createElement('div'); note.id='v45FixedNote'; note.className='v45f-note';
    note.innerHTML='<b>Mode classe :</b> tu peux remplir la consigne en cliquant directement dans l’aperçu. Le volet reste là pour les réglages avancés.';
    sheet.insertBefore(note, sheet.firstChild);
  }
  function toast(msg){ var t=qs('#v45FixedToast'); if(!t){ t=document.createElement('div'); t.id='v45FixedToast'; document.body.appendChild(t); } t.textContent=msg; t.classList.add('show'); clearTimeout(t._timer); t._timer=setTimeout(function(){ t.classList.remove('show'); },2200); }
  function install(){
    ensureToggle(); ensureNote(); markPreview();
    if(!document.body.dataset.v45FixedInstalled){
      document.body.dataset.v45FixedInstalled='1';
      document.addEventListener('click',function(ev){
        var host=qs('#previewHost'); if(!host || !host.contains(ev.target)) return;
        if(localStorage.getItem(STORE)==='0' || !isConsigne()) return;
        var zone=ev.target.closest('.v45-fixed-zone'); if(!zone || !host.contains(zone)) return;
        ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation();
        openModal(zone.getAttribute('data-v45-kind'), zone.getAttribute('data-v45-index')||0);
      },true);
      document.addEventListener('keydown',function(ev){ if(ev.key==='Escape') closeModal(); },true);
      var host=qs('#previewHost');
      if(host && window.MutationObserver){ new MutationObserver(function(){ setTimeout(markPreview,0); }).observe(host,{childList:true,subtree:true}); }
    }
  }
  function boot(){ install(); setTimeout(install,200); setTimeout(install,900); }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot); else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load',boot);
})();
</script>


<!-- V47 — Preview d'abord + remplissage direct multi-modules -->

  .v47-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding:14px 17px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,230,118,.12),rgba(255,255,255,.02));}

  .v47-title small{display:block;color:#8db0c7;font-size:.78rem;margin-top:3px;}
  .v47-close{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12)!important;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05)!important;color:#d9edf8!important;border-radius:10px!important;padding:7px 10px!important;}
  .v47-body{padding:16px 18px;overflow:auto;display:grid;gap:12px;}
  .v47-grid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:11px;}
  .v47-grid3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:11px;}
  .v47-body .field label{color:#8fb4cc;font-size:.66rem;}
  .v47-body input[type="text"],.v47-body input[type="date"],.v47-body select,.v47-body textarea{
    background:#0f2030!important;border-color:#203b52!important;color:#e9f7ff!important;border-radius:11px!important;

  #v47Toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}

  .v47-note b{color:#fff;}

  @media print{#v47PreviewToggle,#v47Backdrop,#v47Modal,#v47Toast,.v47-note{display:none!important}#previewHost .v47-zone{outline:none!important;box-shadow:none!important}.v47-zone::after{display:none!important}}

<script id="v47-preview-first-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V47_PREVIEW_FIRST__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V47_PREVIEW_FIRST__ = true;
  var STORE='labodoc-v47-preview-fill';
  var OLD_STORE='labodoc-v45-fixed-preview-fill';
  function qs(sel,root){return (root||document).querySelector(sel);}
  function qsa(sel,root){return Array.prototype.slice.call((root||document).querySelectorAll(sel));}
  function moduleKey(){try{return state.active||'consigne';}catch(e){return 'consigne';}}
  function esc(v){try{if(typeof escapeHtml==='function')return escapeHtml(String(v==null?'':v));}catch(e){}return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];});}
  function strip(v){try{if(typeof stripHtml==='function')return stripHtml(String(v||''));}catch(e){}return String(v||'').replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi,'\n').replace(/<[^>]+>/g,'').trim();}
  function nl2br(v){return esc(v).replace(/\n/g,'<br>');}
  function today(){return new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);}
  function toLines(v){return String(v||'').split(/\n+/).map(function(x){return x.trim();}).filter(Boolean);}
  function fromLines(v){return (Array.isArray(v)?v:[]).join('\n');}
  function getData(mod){
    mod=mod||moduleKey();
    try{
      if(mod==='consigne' && typeof ensureConsigneV4==='function') return ensureConsigneV4();
      if(mod==='maintenance' && typeof normalizeMaintenanceData==='function') return normalizeMaintenanceData();
      if(mod==='fiche' && typeof ensureFicheSecuriteMachine==='function') return ensureFicheSecuriteMachine();
      if(mod==='securite' && typeof ensureSecurityData==='function') return ensureSecurityData();
      if(mod==='diagnostic' && typeof ensureDiagnostic60==='function') return ensureDiagnostic60();
      return state[mod] || (state[mod]={});
    }catch(e){console.warn('V47 getData',e);return {};}
  }
  function getPath(obj,path){return String(path||'').split('.').reduce(function(o,k){return o&&o[k]!=null?o[k]:'';},obj);}
  function setPath(obj,path,val){var p=String(path||'').split('.'),o=obj;for(var i=0;i<p.length-1;i++){var k=p[i];if(o[k]==null)o[k]=/^\d+$/.test(p[i+1])?[]:{};o=o[k];}o[p[p.length-1]]=val;}
  function renderActive(mod){mod=mod||moduleKey();try{if(mod==='consigne'&&typeof renderConsigne==='function')renderConsigne();else if(mod==='maintenance'&&typeof renderMaintenance==='function')renderMaintenance();else if(mod==='fiche'&&typeof renderFiche==='function')renderFiche();else if(mod==='securite'&&typeof renderSecurite==='function')renderSecurite();else if(mod==='diagnostic'&&typeof renderDiagnosticV59==='function')renderDiagnosticV59();}catch(e){console.warn('V47 renderActive',e);}}
  function commit(renderForm){try{if(typeof persist==='function')persist();}catch(e){}try{if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();}catch(e){console.warn('V47 updatePreview',e);}setTimeout(markPreview,0);if(renderForm)setTimeout(function(){renderActive();markPreview();},10);}
  async function readFile(file){if(typeof fileToDataUrl==='function')return await fileToDataUrl(file);return await new Promise(function(resolve,reject){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(){resolve(r.result);};r.onerror=reject;r.readAsDataURL(file);});}
  function field(label,path,value,type,ph){return '<div class="field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><input type="'+(type||'text')+'" data-v47-path="'+esc(path)+'" value="'+esc(value||'')+'" placeholder="'+esc(ph||'')+'"></div>';}
  function area(label,path,value,ph,htmlMode){return '<div class="field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><textarea '+(htmlMode?'data-v47-htmlpath':'data-v47-path')+'="'+esc(path)+'" placeholder="'+esc(ph||'')+'">'+esc(htmlMode?strip(value||''):(value||''))+'</textarea></div>';}
  function lines(label,path,arr,help){return '<div class="field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><textarea data-v47-lines="'+esc(path)+'" placeholder="Une ligne par élément">'+esc(fromLines(arr||[]))+'</textarea>'+(help?'<div class="v47-help">'+esc(help)+'</div>':'')+'</div>';}
  function selectField(label,path,value,opts){return '<div class="field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><select data-v47-path="'+esc(path)+'">'+opts.map(function(o){return '<option value="'+esc(o)+'" '+(String(value||'')===o?'selected':'')+'>'+esc(o||'Choisir…')+'</option>';}).join('')+'</select></div>';}
  function photoPreview(items,actionPrefix){items=items||[];if(!items.length)return '<div class="v47-help">Aucune image.</div>';return items.map(function(p,i){var src=typeof p==='string'?p:(p&&p.src)||'';return '<div class="v47-photo"><img src="'+src+'"><button type="button" class="danger mini-btn" data-v47-action="'+actionPrefix+'" data-v47-index="'+i+'">Supprimer</button></div>';}).join('');}
  function fileBox(label,cmd,htmlPreview,multiple){return '<div class="field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><label class="file-btn">Charger / ajouter<input class="hidden" type="file" accept="image/*" '+(multiple?'multiple':'')+' data-v47-file="'+esc(cmd)+'"></label><div class="v47-photos">'+htmlPreview+'</div></div>';}
  function modal(){var b=qs('#v47Backdrop'),m=qs('#v47Modal');if(!b){b=document.createElement('div');b.id='v47Backdrop';document.body.appendChild(b);b.addEventListener('click',closeModal);}if(!m){m=document.createElement('div');m.id='v47Modal';m.setAttribute('role','dialog');m.setAttribute('aria-modal','true');document.body.appendChild(m);}return m;}
  function openLogo(){var mod=moduleKey();try{if(mod==='diagnostic'&&typeof setDiagV59LogoClick==='function')setDiagV59LogoClick();else if(typeof chooseLogoForTab==='function')chooseLogoForTab(mod);}catch(e){}}
  function openModal(kind,index){
    if(kind==='logo'){openLogo();return;}
    index=Number(index||0);var mod=moduleKey(),cfg=config(mod,kind,index);if(!cfg)return;
    var m=modal();m.innerHTML='<div class="v47-head"><div class="v47-title"><span class="ico">'+cfg.ico+'</span><div><strong>'+cfg.title+'</strong><small>'+cfg.sub+'</small></div></div><button type="button" class="v47-close" data-v47-close>Fermer</button></div><div class="v47-body">'+cfg.body+'</div><div class="v47-foot"><span class="hint">Modification directe depuis l’aperçu.</span><button type="button" class="primary" data-v47-close>OK</button></div>';
    qs('#v47Backdrop').classList.add('open');m.classList.add('open');bind(m,mod,kind,index);var first=m.querySelector('input,textarea,select,button');if(first)setTimeout(function(){first.focus();},40);
  }
  function closeModal(){var b=qs('#v47Backdrop'),m=qs('#v47Modal');if(b)b.classList.remove('open');if(m)m.classList.remove('open');renderActive();commit(false);}
  function config(mod,kind,index){var d=getData(mod),st,body='';
    if(mod==='consigne'){
      st=(d.steps||[])[index]||{};
      if(kind==='identity')body='<div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Titre de trame','headerTitle',d.headerTitle||'INFO ATELIER')+field('Sous-titre','headerSubtitle',d.headerSubtitle||'')+'</div><div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Secteur','sector',d.sector||'')+field('Poste','poste',d.poste||'')+'</div><div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Rédacteur','author',d.author||'')+field('Date','date',d.date||today(),'date')+'</div>';
      if(kind==='title')body=selectField('Type de consigne','typeConsigne',d.typeConsigne||'',['','Nouvelle Consigne','Bonnes Pratiques','Consigne Provisoire','Consigne Qualité'])+field('Titre principal','displayTitle',d.displayTitle||d.title||'')+field('Sous-titre','subtitle',d.subtitle||'')+field('Cartouche à droite','tagLabel',d.tagLabel||'SOYEZ INFORMÉ');
      if(kind==='photo')body=fileBox('Photo principale','consigneMain',photoPreview((d.mainPhotos||[]).map(function(x){return x.src||x;}),'consigneMainRemove'),false);
      if(kind==='objectif')body=area('Objectif','objectif',d.objectif||'','Pourquoi cette consigne existe ?');
      if(kind==='retain')body=lines('À retenir','retenir',d.retenir,'Une ligne = un point affiché.');
      if(kind==='security')body=lines('Risques identifiés','safetyRisks',d.safetyRisks)+lines('EPI spécifiques','epi',d.epi);
      if(kind==='keypoints')body=lines('Points clés','keyPoints',d.keyPoints);
      if(kind==='quality')body=lines('Contrôles qualité','qualityChecks',d.qualityChecks);
      if(kind==='special')body=field('Titre du bloc','specialTitle',d.specialTitle||'CAS PARTICULIERS')+area('Texte','specialText',d.specialText||'')+fileBox('Image cas particulier','consigneSpecial',photoPreview(d.specialImage?[d.specialImage]:[],'consigneSpecialRemove'),false);
      if(kind==='footer')body=area('Texte du pied de page','doubtText',d.doubtText||'');
      if(kind==='step')body=field('Titre de l’étape','steps.'+index+'.title',st.title||'')+area('Texte de l’étape','steps.'+index+'.text',st.text||'')+area('Alerte / point rouge','steps.'+index+'.warning',st.warning||'')+fileBox('Photo(s) de l’étape','consigneStep:'+index,photoPreview((st.photos||[]),'consigneStepRemove:'+index),true)+'<div class="v47-row"><button type="button" class="yellow" data-v47-action="consigneStepAddAfter" data-v47-index="'+index+'">+ Ajouter une étape après</button><button type="button" class="danger" data-v47-action="consigneStepDelete" data-v47-index="'+index+'">Supprimer cette étape</button></div>';
      return {ico:kind==='step'?'➊':'✍️',title:kind==='step'?'Étape '+(index+1):labelFor(kind),sub:'Nouvelle consigne',body:body};
    }
    if(mod==='maintenance'){
      st=(d.rows||[])[index]||{};
      if(kind==='maint-header')body='<div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Titre principal','title',d.title||'')+field('Machine','machine',d.machine||'')+'</div>'+field('Sous-titre','subtitle',d.subtitle||'')+'<div class="v47-grid3">'+field('Secteur','secteur',d.secteur||'')+field('Poste','poste',d.poste||'')+field('Durée','duree',d.duree||'')+'</div>';
      if(kind==='maint-machine')body=fileBox('Image machine','maintMachine',photoPreview(d.machineImage?[d.machineImage]:[],'maintMachineRemove'),false);
      if(kind==='maint-safety')body=field('Bandeau sécurité','footer',d.footer||'')+area('Phrase sécurité','slogan',d.slogan||'')+fileBox('Pictos EPI bandeau','maintEpi',photoPreview(d.epiImages||[],'maintEpiRemove'),true);
      if(kind==='maint-row')body='<div class="v47-grid2">'+field('N°','rows.'+index+'.number',st.number||'')+field('Titre du contrôle','rows.'+index+'.title',st.title||'')+'</div>'+area('Contrôles à effectuer','rows.'+index+'.controls',st.controls||'')+area('Pourquoi','rows.'+index+'.why',st.why||'')+area('Risque','rows.'+index+'.risk',st.risk||'')+fileBox('Illustration(s)','maintRow:'+index,photoPreview(st.illustrations||[],'maintRowRemove:'+index),true)+'<div class="v47-row"><button type="button" class="yellow" data-v47-action="maintRowAddAfter" data-v47-index="'+index+'">+ Ajouter un contrôle après</button><button type="button" class="danger" data-v47-action="maintRowDelete" data-v47-index="'+index+'">Supprimer ce contrôle</button></div>';
      return {ico:'🛠️',title:kind==='maint-row'?'Contrôle '+(index+1):labelFor(kind),sub:'Maintenance 1er niveau',body:body};
    }
    if(mod==='fiche'){
      st=(d.risks||[])[index]||{};
      if(kind==='fiche-identity')body='<div class="v47-grid3">'+field('N° fiche','number',d.number||'')+field('Date','date',d.date||'','date')+field('Machine','machine',d.machine||'')+'</div><div class="v47-grid2">'+field('N° GMAO','gmao',d.gmao||'')+field('Marque / Type','brandType',d.brandType||'')+'</div>'+field('Produit / matériaux','material',d.material||'')+field('EPI spécifique','epi',d.epi||'')+area('Qualification et autorisation','qualification',d.qualification||'', '', true);
      if(kind==='fiche-photos')body=fileBox('Photo(s) machine','ficheMachinePhotos',photoPreview(d.machinePhotos||[],'ficheMachinePhotoRemove'),true);
      if(kind==='fiche-risk')body=area('Tâche exposante','risks.'+index+'.task',st.task||'')+lines('Risques / dangers','risks.'+index+'.selected',st.selected||[],'Une ligne par risque affiché.')+area('Mesures de prévention','risks.'+index+'.prevention',st.prevention||'', '', true)+'<div class="v47-row"><button type="button" class="yellow" data-v47-action="ficheRiskAddAfter" data-v47-index="'+index+'">+ Ajouter un risque après</button><button type="button" class="danger" data-v47-action="ficheRiskDelete" data-v47-index="'+index+'">Supprimer ce risque</button></div>';
      if(kind==='fiche-alerts')body=area('Message accident','accident',d.accident||'', '', true)+area('Message incendie','incendie',d.incendie||'', '', true);
      return {ico:'🦺',title:kind==='fiche-risk'?'Risque '+(index+1):labelFor(kind),sub:'Fiche sécurité machine',body:body};
    }
    if(mod==='securite'){
      st=(d.cards||[])[index]||{};
      if(kind==='sec-header')body='<div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Titre','title',d.title||'')+field('Sous-titre','subtitle',d.subtitle||'')+'</div><div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Date','date',d.date||'','date')+field('Rédigé par','author',d.author||'')+'</div><div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Équipement / ligne / zone','equipment',d.equipment||'')+field('Localisation','localisation',d.localisation||'')+'</div>';
      if(kind==='sec-danger')body=field('Titre situation dangereuse','dangerTitle',d.dangerTitle||'')+field('Sous-titre situation','dangerSubtitle',d.dangerSubtitle||'')+fileBox('Photo(s) zone danger','secPhotos',photoPreview(d.photos||[],'secPhotoRemove'),true)+area('Bas de page / slogan','footer',d.footer||'');
      if(kind==='sec-card')body=selectField('Type d’encart','cards.'+index+'.type',st.type||'risks',['risks','never','mandatory'])+field('Titre affiché','cards.'+index+'.title',st.title||'')+lines('Lignes de l’encart','cards.'+index+'.items',st.items||[])+'<div class="v47-row"><button type="button" class="yellow" data-v47-action="secCardAddAfter" data-v47-index="'+index+'">+ Ajouter un encart après</button><button type="button" class="danger" data-v47-action="secCardDelete" data-v47-index="'+index+'">Supprimer cet encart</button></div>';
      if(kind==='sec-epi')body=lines('EPI obligatoires','epi',d.epi||[],'Une ligne par EPI. Les pictos de bibliothèque restent gérés par le volet avancé.');
      if(kind==='sec-bottom')body=lines('Conduite à tenir','incident',d.incident||[])+field('Texte accident / urgence','accidentText',d.accidentText||'')+field('Numéro urgence','emergencyNumber',d.emergencyNumber||'')+field('Titre déjà arrivé','dejaTitle',d.dejaTitle||'')+area('Texte déjà arrivé','dejaText',d.dejaText||'');
      return {ico:'🚨',title:kind==='sec-card'?'Encart sécurité '+(index+1):labelFor(kind),sub:'Consigne sécurité',body:body};
    }
    if(mod==='diagnostic'){
      var sy=(d.symptoms||[])[index]||{},ds=(d.steps||[])[index]||{};
      if(kind==='diag-header')body='<div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Titre','title',d.title||'')+field('Sous-titre','subtitle',d.subtitle||'')+'</div><div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Secteur','sector',d.sector||'')+field('Machine','machine',d.machine||'')+'</div><div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Rédacteur','author',d.author||'')+field('Date','date',d.date||'','date')+'</div>';
      if(kind==='diag-symptom')body='<div class="v47-grid2">'+field('Icône','symptoms.'+index+'.icon',sy.icon||'❓')+field('Libellé','symptoms.'+index+'.label',sy.label||'')+'</div>'+field('Type','symptoms.'+index+'.type',sy.type||'')+fileBox('Photo(s) symptôme','diagSymptom:'+index,photoPreview(sy.photos||[],'diagSymptomRemove:'+index),true)+'<div class="v47-row"><button type="button" class="yellow" data-v47-action="diagSymptomAddAfter" data-v47-index="'+index+'">+ Ajouter un symptôme après</button><button type="button" class="danger" data-v47-action="diagSymptomDelete" data-v47-index="'+index+'">Supprimer ce symptôme</button></div>';
      if(kind==='diag-cause')body=field('Cause probable','causeTitle',d.causeTitle||'')+'<div class="v47-grid3">'+selectField('Gravité','gravity',d.gravity||'Moyenne',['Faible','Moyenne','Élevée','Critique'])+selectField('Fréquence','frequency',d.frequency||'Occasionnelle',['Rare','Occasionnelle','Fréquente','Permanente'])+selectField('Impact','impact',d.impact||'Qualité',['Mineur','Qualité','Production','Sécurité','Arrêt machine'])+'</div>';
      if(kind==='diag-step')body=field('Action / contrôle','steps.'+index+'.title',ds.title||'')+area('Pourquoi ?','steps.'+index+'.why',ds.why||'')+area('Question de validation','steps.'+index+'.question',ds.question||'')+'<div class="v47-grid2">'+area('Si OUI','steps.'+index+'.ifYes',ds.ifYes||'Passer à l’étape suivante.')+area('Si NON / action corrective','steps.'+index+'.ifNo',ds.ifNo||'')+'</div>'+fileBox('Photo(s) du contrôle','diagStep:'+index,photoPreview(ds.photos||[],'diagStepRemove:'+index),true)+'<div class="v47-row"><button type="button" class="yellow" data-v47-action="diagStepAddAfter" data-v47-index="'+index+'">+ Ajouter une étape après</button><button type="button" class="danger" data-v47-action="diagStepDelete" data-v47-index="'+index+'">Supprimer cette étape</button></div>';
      if(kind==='diag-bottom')body='<div class="v47-grid3">'+field('Service','service',d.service||'')+field('Téléphone / poste','phone',d.phone||'')+field('Priorité','priority',d.priority||'')+'</div>'+field('Titre sécurité','safetyTitle',d.safetyTitle||'')+area('Texte sécurité','safetyText',d.safetyText||'');
      return {ico:'🧭',title:kind==='diag-step'?'Étape diagnostic '+(index+1):kind==='diag-symptom'?'Symptôme '+(index+1):labelFor(kind),sub:'Aide au diagnostic',body:body};
    }
  }
  function labelFor(k){return ({identity:'Identité',title:'Titre et bandeau',photo:'Photo principale',objectif:'Objectif',retain:'À retenir',security:'Sécurité et EPI',keypoints:'Points clés',quality:'Qualité',special:'Cas particuliers',footer:'En cas de doute','maint-header':'En-tête','maint-machine':'Image machine','maint-safety':'Bandeau sécurité','fiche-identity':'Identification machine','fiche-photos':'Photos machine','fiche-alerts':'Alertes','sec-header':'En-tête','sec-danger':'Situation dangereuse','sec-epi':'EPI','sec-bottom':'Conduite à tenir','diag-header':'En-tête','diag-cause':'Cause / criticité','diag-bottom':'Escalade / sécurité'})[k]||'Modifier';}
  function bind(root,mod,kind,index){
    qsa('[data-v47-close]',root).forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',closeModal);});
    qsa('[data-v47-path]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){var d=getData(mod),path=el.getAttribute('data-v47-path');setPath(d,path,el.value);if(mod==='consigne'&&path==='displayTitle')d.title=el.value;if(mod==='consigne'&&path==='typeConsigne')d.level=el.value;commit(false);});el.addEventListener('change',function(){el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));});});
    qsa('[data-v47-htmlpath]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){setPath(getData(mod),el.getAttribute('data-v47-htmlpath'),nl2br(el.value));commit(false);});});
    qsa('[data-v47-lines]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){setPath(getData(mod),el.getAttribute('data-v47-lines'),toLines(el.value));commit(false);});});
    qsa('[data-v47-file]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('change',async function(){if(!el.files||!el.files.length)return;await handleFiles(mod,el.getAttribute('data-v47-file'),el.files,index);openModal(kind,index);});});
    qsa('[data-v47-action]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('click',function(){handleAction(mod,el.getAttribute('data-v47-action'),Number(el.getAttribute('data-v47-index')||index||0),kind,index);});});
  }
  async function handleFiles(mod,cmd,files,index){var d=getData(mod),arr=Array.from(files||[]),i;
    if(cmd==='consigneMain'){d.mainPhotos=[{src:await readFile(arr[0]),caption:''}];d.machinePhoto=d.mainPhotos[0].src;}
    else if(cmd==='consigneSpecial'){d.specialImage=await readFile(arr[0]);}
    else if(cmd.indexOf('consigneStep:')===0){i=Number(cmd.split(':')[1]);if(!d.steps[i])d.steps[i]={title:'',text:'',warning:'',photos:[]};if(!Array.isArray(d.steps[i].photos))d.steps[i].photos=[];for(var f1 of arr)d.steps[i].photos.push(await readFile(f1));d.steps[i].photo=d.steps[i].photos[0]||'';}
    else if(cmd==='maintMachine'){d.machineImage=await readFile(arr[0]);}
    else if(cmd==='maintEpi'){if(!Array.isArray(d.epiImages))d.epiImages=[];for(var f2 of arr)d.epiImages.push(await readFile(f2));}
    else if(cmd.indexOf('maintRow:')===0){i=Number(cmd.split(':')[1]);if(!d.rows[i])d.rows[i]={number:'',title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustrations:[]};if(!Array.isArray(d.rows[i].illustrations))d.rows[i].illustrations=[];for(var f3 of arr)d.rows[i].illustrations.push({src:await readFile(f3),w:100});}
    else if(cmd==='ficheMachinePhotos'){if(!Array.isArray(d.machinePhotos))d.machinePhotos=[];for(var f4 of arr)d.machinePhotos.push({src:await readFile(f4),caption:''});d.machinePhoto=(d.machinePhotos[0]&&d.machinePhotos[0].src)||'';}
    else if(cmd==='secPhotos'){if(!Array.isArray(d.photos))d.photos=[];for(var f5 of arr)d.photos.push(await readFile(f5));d.mainPhoto=d.photos[0]||'';}
    else if(cmd.indexOf('diagSymptom:')===0){i=Number(cmd.split(':')[1]);if(!d.symptoms[i])d.symptoms[i]={type:'Autre',icon:'❓',label:'Autre symptôme',photos:[]};if(!Array.isArray(d.symptoms[i].photos))d.symptoms[i].photos=[];for(var f6 of arr)d.symptoms[i].photos.push(await readFile(f6));}
    else if(cmd.indexOf('diagStep:')===0){i=Number(cmd.split(':')[1]);if(!d.steps[i])d.steps[i]={title:'',photos:[],why:'',question:'',ifYes:'Passer à l’étape suivante.',ifNo:''};if(!Array.isArray(d.steps[i].photos))d.steps[i].photos=[];for(var f7 of arr)d.steps[i].photos.push(await readFile(f7));}
    commit(true);
  }
  function handleAction(mod,act,idx,kind,index){var d=getData(mod),parts=act.split(':'),pi=idx;
    if(parts.length>1){act=parts[0];idx=Number(parts[1]);}
    if(act==='consigneMainRemove'){d.mainPhotos.splice(pi,1);d.machinePhoto=(d.mainPhotos[0]&&d.mainPhotos[0].src)||'';}
    else if(act==='consigneSpecialRemove'){d.specialImage='';}
    else if(act==='consigneStepRemove'){d.steps[idx].photos.splice(pi,1);d.steps[idx].photo=d.steps[idx].photos[0]||'';}
    else if(act==='consigneStepAddAfter'){d.steps.splice(idx+1,0,{title:'Nouvelle étape',text:'',warning:'',photos:[]});openModal('step',idx+1);commit(true);return;}
    else if(act==='consigneStepDelete'){if(confirm('Supprimer cette étape ?')){d.steps.splice(idx,1);closeModal();}}
    else if(act==='maintMachineRemove'){d.machineImage='';}
    else if(act==='maintEpiRemove'){d.epiImages.splice(pi,1);}
    else if(act==='maintRowRemove'){d.rows[idx].illustrations.splice(pi,1);}
    else if(act==='maintRowAddAfter'){d.rows.splice(idx+1,0,{number:String(idx+2).padStart(2,'0'),title:'Nouveau contrôle',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustrations:[]});openModal('maint-row',idx+1);commit(true);return;}
    else if(act==='maintRowDelete'){if(confirm('Supprimer ce contrôle ?')){d.rows.splice(idx,1);closeModal();}}
    else if(act==='ficheMachinePhotoRemove'){d.machinePhotos.splice(pi,1);d.machinePhoto=(d.machinePhotos[0]&&d.machinePhotos[0].src)||'';}
    else if(act==='ficheRiskAddAfter'){d.risks.splice(idx+1,0,{task:'',selected:[],prevention:''});openModal('fiche-risk',idx+1);commit(true);return;}
    else if(act==='ficheRiskDelete'){if(confirm('Supprimer ce risque ?')){d.risks.splice(idx,1);closeModal();}}
    else if(act==='secPhotoRemove'){d.photos.splice(pi,1);d.mainPhoto=d.photos[0]||'';}
    else if(act==='secCardAddAfter'){d.cards.splice(idx+1,0,{type:'risks',title:'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX',items:['']});openModal('sec-card',idx+1);commit(true);return;}
    else if(act==='secCardDelete'){if(confirm('Supprimer cet encart ?')){d.cards.splice(idx,1);closeModal();}}
    else if(act==='diagSymptomRemove'){d.symptoms[idx].photos.splice(pi,1);}
    else if(act==='diagStepRemove'){d.steps[idx].photos.splice(pi,1);}
    else if(act==='diagSymptomAddAfter'){d.symptoms.splice(idx+1,0,{type:'Autre',icon:'❓',label:'Autre symptôme',photos:[]});openModal('diag-symptom',idx+1);commit(true);return;}
    else if(act==='diagSymptomDelete'){if(confirm('Supprimer ce symptôme ?')){d.symptoms.splice(idx,1);closeModal();}}
    else if(act==='diagStepAddAfter'){d.steps.splice(idx+1,0,{title:'Nouveau contrôle',photos:[],why:'',question:'',ifYes:'Passer à l’étape suivante.',ifNo:''});openModal('diag-step',idx+1);commit(true);return;}
    else if(act==='diagStepDelete'){if(confirm('Supprimer cette étape ?')){d.steps.splice(idx,1);closeModal();}}
    commit(true);openModal(kind,index);
  }
  function tag(el,kind,label,index){if(!el)return;el.classList.add('v47-zone');el.setAttribute('data-v47-kind',kind);el.setAttribute('data-v47-label',label);if(index!==undefined)el.setAttribute('data-v47-index',String(index));}
  function clearTags(host){qsa('.v47-zone',host).forEach(function(el){el.classList.remove('v47-zone');el.removeAttribute('data-v47-kind');el.removeAttribute('data-v47-label');el.removeAttribute('data-v47-index');});}
  function markPreview(){var host=qs('#previewHost');if(!host)return;var on=localStorage.getItem(STORE)!=='0';var mod=moduleKey();host.classList.toggle('v47-on',on);clearTags(host);if(!on)return;
    if(mod==='consigne'){tag(qs('.nc-logo',host),'logo','Logo');tag(qs('.nc-titlebox',host),'identity','Identité');qsa('.nc-meta',host).forEach(function(e){tag(e,'identity','Identité');});tag(qs('.nc-blackbar',host),'title','Titre');tag(qs('.nc-main-photo',host),'photo','Photo principale');tag(qs('.nc-objectif > p',host),'objectif','Objectif');tag(qs('.nc-retain',host),'retain','À retenir');qsa('.nc-step',host).forEach(function(e,i){tag(e,'step','Étape '+(i+1),i);});var cards=qsa('.nc-bottom .nc-card',host);if(cards[0])tag(cards[0],'security','Sécurité');if(cards[1])tag(cards[1],'keypoints','Points clés');if(cards[2])tag(cards[2],'quality','Qualité');if(cards[3])tag(cards[3],'special','Cas particuliers');tag(qs('.nc-footer',host),'footer','Doute');}
    else if(mod==='maintenance'){tag(qs('.maint-v2-logo-cell,.maint-v2-logo',host),'logo','Logo');tag(qs('.maint-v2-title-cell',host),'maint-header','En-tête');tag(qs('.maint-v2-machine-cell,.maint-v2-machine-img',host),'maint-machine','Image machine');tag(qs('.maint-v2-meta-table',host),'maint-header','Secteur / poste / durée');tag(qs('.maint-v2-safety-table',host),'maint-safety','Sécurité / EPI');qsa('.maint-v2-table tbody tr',host).forEach(function(e,i){tag(e,'maint-row','Contrôle '+(i+1),i);});}
    else if(mod==='fiche'){tag(qs('.machine-photo-box',host),'fiche-photos','Photos machine');tag(qs('.machine-head',host),'fiche-identity','Identification');var bl=qsa('.doc-outline > .block, .machine-layout + .block',host);if(bl[0])tag(bl[0],'fiche-risk','Risques');qsa('.risk-table tbody tr',host).forEach(function(e,i){tag(e,'fiche-risk','Risque '+(i+1),i);});tag(qs('.alert-box',host),'fiche-alerts','Alertes');}
    else if(mod==='securite'){tag(qs('.sec-logo',host),'logo','Logo');tag(qs('.sec-top',host),'sec-header','En-tête');tag(qs('.sec-meta',host),'sec-header','Équipement / localisation');tag(qs('.sec-danger',host),'sec-danger','Situation dangereuse');qsa('.sec-side .sec-box',host).forEach(function(e,i){tag(e,'sec-card','Encart '+(i+1),i);});tag(qs('.sec-epi',host),'sec-epi','EPI');tag(qs('.sec-bottom',host),'sec-bottom','Conduite à tenir');tag(qs('.sec-footer',host),'sec-danger','Pied de page');}
    else if(mod==='diagnostic'){tag(qs('.diag59-logo',host),'logo','Logo');tag(qs('.diag59-top',host),'diag-header','En-tête');qsa('.diag60-symptom',host).forEach(function(e,i){tag(e,'diag-symptom','Symptôme '+(i+1),i);});tag(qs('.diag60-cause',host),'diag-cause','Cause / criticité');qsa('.diag60-step',host).forEach(function(e,i){tag(e,'diag-step','Étape '+(i+1),i);});tag(qs('.diag60-bottom',host),'diag-bottom','Escalade / sécurité');}
  }
  function ensureToggle(){var bar=qs('.preview-hud-bar');if(!bar)return;var old=qs('#v45FixedToggle');if(old)old.style.display='none';var btn=qs('#v47PreviewToggle');if(!btn){btn=document.createElement('button');btn.type='button';btn.id='v47PreviewToggle';var label=qs('.preview-hud-label',bar);if(label&&label.nextSibling)bar.insertBefore(btn,label.nextSibling);else bar.insertBefore(btn,bar.firstChild);}function refresh(){var on=localStorage.getItem(STORE)!=='0';btn.classList.toggle('off',!on);btn.innerHTML='<span class="v47-dot"></span>'+(on?'Preview remplissable':'Preview verrouillée');markPreview();}btn.onclick=function(){var on=localStorage.getItem(STORE)!=='0';localStorage.setItem(STORE,on?'0':'1');refresh();toast(on?'Édition dans l’aperçu coupée.':'Clique sur une zone de la preview.');};refresh();}
  function toast(msg){var t=qs('#v47Toast');if(!t){t=document.createElement('div');t.id='v47Toast';document.body.appendChild(t);}t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('show');clearTimeout(t._timer);t._timer=setTimeout(function(){t.classList.remove('show');},2200);}
  function closeFormSoon(){setTimeout(function(){document.body.classList.remove('ws-form-open');},60);setTimeout(function(){document.body.classList.remove('ws-form-open');},220);setTimeout(function(){document.body.classList.remove('ws-form-open');},700);}
  function ensureNote(){['consigne','maintenance','fiche','securite','diagnostic'].forEach(function(mod){var p=qs('#panel-'+mod);if(!p||qs('.v47-note',p))return;var sheet=p.querySelector('.sheet');if(!sheet)return;var n=document.createElement('div');n.className='v47-note';n.innerHTML='<b>Preview remplissable :</b> clique directement dans la feuille à droite pour modifier cette zone. Le volet reste seulement pour les réglages avancés.';sheet.insertBefore(n,sheet.firstChild);});}
  function install(){try{localStorage.setItem(OLD_STORE,'0');}catch(e){}ensureToggle();ensureNote();markPreview();if(!document.body.dataset.v47Installed){document.body.dataset.v47Installed='1';document.addEventListener('click',function(ev){var tab=ev.target.closest('[data-tab]');if(tab)closeFormSoon();var host=qs('#previewHost');if(!host||!host.contains(ev.target))return;if(localStorage.getItem(STORE)==='0')return;var zone=ev.target.closest('.v47-zone');if(!zone||!host.contains(zone))return;ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();openModal(zone.getAttribute('data-v47-kind'),zone.getAttribute('data-v47-index')||0);},true);document.addEventListener('keydown',function(ev){if(ev.key==='Escape')closeModal();},true);var host=qs('#previewHost');if(host&&window.MutationObserver)new MutationObserver(function(){setTimeout(markPreview,0);}).observe(host,{childList:true,subtree:true});}}
  function boot(){closeFormSoon();install();setTimeout(install,200);setTimeout(install,900);setTimeout(closeFormSoon,1200);}
  if(document.readyState==='loading')document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot);else boot();window.addEventListener('load',boot);
})();
</script>

<!-- ============================================================
     V52 — Correctif sain depuis V49
     • Assistant lisible blanc/noir/jaune.
     • Aides "?" restaurées sans injection dans les templates d'export.
     • Pictos sélectionnables dans les boîtes de dialogue preview pour :
       - Fiche sécurité machine > Risques
       - Consigne sécurité > EPI
       - Consigne sécurité > encarts risques
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="v52-clean-theme-help-pictos-style">
  /* Assistant unique lisible */
  html body #l43AssistFab{
    background:#ffffff !important;
    color:#101010 !important;
    border:2px solid #101010 !important;
    box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.22) !important;
  }
  html body #l43AssistFab .l43-orb{
    background:#ffd21f !important;
    color:#101010 !important;
    border:1px solid #101010 !important;
  }
  html body #l43AssistFab .l43-mini{color:#7a6a1a !important;}
  html body #l43AssistPanel{
    background:#ffffff !important;
    color:#101010 !important;
    border:2px solid #101010 !important;
    box-shadow:0 24px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.32) !important;
  }
  html body #l43AssistPanel .l43-ap-head{
    background:#101010 !important;

  }
  html body #l43AssistPanel .l43-ap-title b,

  html body #l43AssistPanel .l43-ap-close{
    background:#ffffff !important;

  }

  }

    transform:translateY(-1px) !important;
  }

  }

  /* Boutons d'aide ? */

  }

  html body .v52-help-pop{

  }
  html body .v52-help-pop b{display:block;margin-bottom:5px;color:#101010 !important;}

  /* Pictos dans les modales V52 */
  html body #v47Modal .v52-picto-field select,

  html body #v47Modal .v52-picto-pill{
    display:inline-flex !important;

<script id="v52-clean-help-pictos-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V52_CLEAN_HELP_PICTOS__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V52_CLEAN_HELP_PICTOS__ = true;

  function qs(s,r){return (r||document).querySelector(s);} 
  function qsa(s,r){return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s));}
  function esc(v){
    try{ if(typeof escapeHtml==='function') return escapeHtml(String(v==null?'':v)); }catch(e){}
    return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];});
  }
  function strip(v){try{if(typeof stripHtml==='function')return stripHtml(String(v||''));}catch(e){}return String(v||'').replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi,'\n').replace(/<[^>]+>/g,'').trim();}
  function nl2br(v){return esc(v).replace(/\n/g,'<br>');}
  function labelPicto(name){try{return pictoLabel(name);}catch(e){return String(name||'');}}
  function active(){try{return state.active||'consigne';}catch(e){return 'consigne';}}
  function getData(mod){
    mod=mod||active();
    try{
      if(mod==='fiche' && typeof ensureFicheSecuriteMachine==='function') return ensureFicheSecuriteMachine();
      if(mod==='securite' && typeof ensureSecurityData==='function') return ensureSecurityData();
      return state[mod] || (state[mod]={});
    }catch(e){return {};}
  }
  function pathGet(obj,path){return String(path||'').split('.').reduce(function(o,k){return o&&o[k]!=null?o[k]:'';},obj);}
  function pathSet(obj,path,val){var p=String(path||'').split('.'),o=obj;for(var i=0;i<p.length-1;i++){var k=p[i];if(o[k]==null)o[k]=/^\d+$/.test(p[i+1])?[]:{};o=o[k];}o[p[p.length-1]]=val;}
  function persistSoft(){try{if(typeof persist==='function')persist();}catch(e){} }
  function updateSoft(){try{if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();}catch(e){} try{if(typeof render==='function')render();}catch(e){} }
  function commit(){persistSoft();updateSoft();setTimeout(function(){try{if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();}catch(e){}},20);}

  /* Aide contextuelle "?" */
  var helpMap=[
    [/titre|title/i,'Le titre doit dire tout de suite ce que la personne va apprendre ou vérifier. Exemple : “Contrôle démarrage machine”.'],
    [/sous.?titre|subtitle/i,'Le sous-titre précise le contexte : machine, poste, famille produit ou moment d’utilisation.'],
    [/secteur/i,'Zone de l’atelier concernée. Évite les abréviations si tout le monde ne les connaît pas.'],
    [/poste/i,'Poste réel de travail ou nom utilisé par les opérateurs.'],
    [/machine/i,'Nom machine clair, idéalement celui affiché dans l’atelier.'],
    [/durée|duree/i,'Temps attendu pour faire l’action. Reste simple : “2 min max”, “30 s”, “à chaque démarrage”.'],
    [/objectif/i,'Explique pourquoi cette consigne existe : éviter un défaut, sécuriser, gagner du temps, standardiser.'],
    [/risque|danger/i,'Sélectionne les dangers visibles pour l’opérateur. Un picto doit correspondre à un vrai risque terrain.'],
    [/epi/i,'Équipements à porter spécifiquement pour cette opération. Ne mets pas toute la panoplie si elle n’est pas utile ici.'],
    [/prévention|prevention|mesure/i,'Ce que l’opérateur doit faire concrètement pour éviter le danger. Phrase courte, action observable.'],
    [/pourquoi|why/i,'Raison de contrôle : défaut évité, panne évitée, sécurité, qualité ou cadence.'],
    [/contrôle|controle|check/i,'Garde un critère vérifiable : “voyant vert”, “absence de fuite”, “cote conforme”.'],
    [/photo|image/i,'Une bonne photo doit montrer la zone utile, pas tout l’environnement. Recadre si possible.'],
    [/date/i,'Date de création ou de mise à jour du document.'],
    [/rédacteur|redacteur|author/i,'Personne qui crée ou met à jour la consigne.']
  ];
  function helpFor(txt){txt=String(txt||'');for(var i=0;i<helpMap.length;i++){if(helpMap[i][0].test(txt))return helpMap[i][1];}return 'Remplis uniquement ce qui aide l’opérateur à comprendre et à agir sans hésiter. Phrase courte, mot terrain, pas de roman.';}
  function closeHelp(){var p=qs('.v52-help-pop');if(p)p.remove();}
  function openHelp(btn,label){
    closeHelp();
    var r=btn.getBoundingClientRect(),pop=document.createElement('div');
    pop.className='v52-help-pop';
    pop.innerHTML='<b>'+esc(label||'Aide champ')+'</b>'+esc(helpFor(label))+'<small>Astuce : si un champ ne sert pas à l’opérateur, il peut rester vide.</small>';
    document.body.appendChild(pop);
    var top=Math.min(window.innerHeight-pop.offsetHeight-12, Math.max(12,r.bottom+8));
    var left=Math.min(window.innerWidth-pop.offsetWidth-12, Math.max(12,r.left));
    pop.style.top=top+'px';pop.style.left=left+'px';
  }
  function enhanceHelp(root){
    qsa('#v47Modal label, .panel.active .field > label, #editorArea .field > label',root||document).forEach(function(label){
      if(label.dataset.v52Help==='1')return;
      var txt=(label.childNodes[0]&&label.childNodes[0].nodeValue?label.childNodes[0].nodeValue:label.textContent||'').trim();
      if(!txt || label.closest('.rich-toolbar'))return;
      label.dataset.v52Help='1';
      var b=document.createElement('button');b.type='button';b.className='v52-help-btn';b.textContent='?';b.title='Aide : '+txt;
      b.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();openHelp(b,txt);},true);
      label.appendChild(b);
    });
  }

  /* Modale picto saine */
  function modal(){
    var b=qs('#v47Backdrop'),m=qs('#v47Modal');
    if(!b){b=document.createElement('div');b.id='v47Backdrop';document.body.appendChild(b);} 
    if(!m){m=document.createElement('div');m.id='v47Modal';m.setAttribute('role','dialog');m.setAttribute('aria-modal','true');document.body.appendChild(m);} 
    if(!b.dataset.v52Close){b.dataset.v52Close='1';b.addEventListener('click',closeModal,true);} 
    return m;
  }
  function closeModal(){var b=qs('#v47Backdrop'),m=qs('#v47Modal');if(b)b.classList.remove('open');if(m)m.classList.remove('open');commit();}
  function field(label,path,val){return '<div class="field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><input type="text" data-v52-path="'+esc(path)+'" value="'+esc(val||'')+'"></div>';}
  function area(label,path,val,html){return '<div class="field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><textarea '+(html?'data-v52-htmlpath':'data-v52-path')+'="'+esc(path)+'">'+esc(html?strip(val||''):(val||''))+'</textarea></div>';}
  function lines(label,path,arr,help){return '<div class="field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><textarea data-v52-lines="'+esc(path)+'">'+esc((Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).join('\n'))+'</textarea>'+(help?'<div class="v52-note">'+esc(help)+'</div>':'')+'</div>';}
  function pictoPicker(label,path,arr,help){
    arr=Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[];
    var pictos=(typeof state!=='undefined'&&state.pictos)?state.pictos:{};
    var names=Object.keys(pictos||{}).sort(function(a,b){return labelPicto(a).localeCompare(labelPicto(b),'fr');});
    var opts=names.map(function(n){return '<option value="'+esc(n)+'">'+esc(labelPicto(n))+'</option>';}).join('');
    var pills=arr.filter(Boolean).map(function(n){var src=pictos[n]||'';return '<span class="v52-picto-pill">'+(src?'<img src="'+esc(src)+'" alt="">':'')+'<span>'+esc(labelPicto(n))+'</span><button type="button" data-v52-picto-remove="'+esc(path)+'" data-v52-picto-value="'+esc(n)+'">×</button></span>';}).join('');
    if(!pills)pills='<span class="v52-note">Aucun picto sélectionné.</span>';
    return '<div class="field v52-picto-field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><div class="v52-picto-row"><select '+(!names.length?'disabled ':'')+'data-v52-picto-add="'+esc(path)+'"><option value="">'+(names.length?'Choisir un picto…':'Aucun picto chargé')+'</option>'+opts+'</select><button type="button" class="v52-load-pictos" data-v52-load-pictos>Charger pictos</button></div><div class="v52-picto-pills">'+pills+'</div><div class="v52-note">'+esc(help||'Les pictos viennent de la bibliothèque chargée avec le bouton Pictos.')+'</div></div>';
  }
  function openPictoModal(kind,index){
    index=Number(index||0);
    var mod=active(),d=getData(mod),body='',title='Modification',sub=mod,ico='✍';
    if(mod==='fiche' && kind==='fiche-risk'){
      if(!Array.isArray(d.risks))d.risks=[]; if(!d.risks[index])d.risks[index]={task:'',selected:[],prevention:''};
      var r=d.risks[index]; title='Risque '+(index+1); sub='Fiche sécurité machine'; ico='⚠️';
      body=area('Tâche exposante','risks.'+index+'.task',r.task||'',false)+pictoPicker('Risques / dangers','risks.'+index+'.selected',r.selected||[],'Sélectionne les pictos risques chargés dans la bibliothèque.')+area('Mesures de prévention','risks.'+index+'.prevention',r.prevention||'',true)+'<div class="v47-row"><button type="button" class="v52-yellow-btn" data-v52-action="ficheRiskAddAfter" data-v52-index="'+index+'">+ Ajouter un risque après</button><button type="button" class="danger" data-v52-action="ficheRiskDelete" data-v52-index="'+index+'">Supprimer ce risque</button></div>';
    }else if(mod==='securite' && kind==='sec-epi'){
      if(!Array.isArray(d.epi))d.epi=[]; title='EPI obligatoires'; sub='Consigne sécurité'; ico='🦺';
      body=pictoPicker('EPI obligatoires','epi',d.epi||[],'Sélectionne les pictos EPI chargés dans la bibliothèque.');
    }else if(mod==='securite' && kind==='sec-card'){
      if(!Array.isArray(d.cards))d.cards=[]; if(!d.cards[index])d.cards[index]={type:'risks',title:'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX',items:[]};
      var c=d.cards[index]; title='Encart '+(index+1); sub='Consigne sécurité'; ico='⚠️';
      var type=c.type||'risks';
      body='<div class="field"><label>Type d’encart</label><select data-v52-cardtype="cards.'+index+'.type"><option value="risks" '+(type==='risks'?'selected':'')+'>Risques / pictos</option><option value="never" '+(type==='never'?'selected':'')+'>À ne jamais faire</option><option value="mandatory" '+(type==='mandatory'?'selected':'')+'>Obligatoire</option></select></div>'+field('Titre affiché','cards.'+index+'.title',c.title||'')+(type==='risks'?pictoPicker('Risques / pictos','cards.'+index+'.items',c.items||[],'Sélectionne les pictos risques à afficher dans cet encart.'):lines('Lignes de l’encart','cards.'+index+'.items',c.items||[],'Une ligne par point affiché.'))+'<div class="v47-row"><button type="button" class="v52-yellow-btn" data-v52-action="secCardAddAfter" data-v52-index="'+index+'">+ Ajouter un encart après</button><button type="button" class="danger" data-v52-action="secCardDelete" data-v52-index="'+index+'">Supprimer cet encart</button></div>';
    }else{return;}
    var m=modal();
    m.innerHTML='<div class="v47-head"><div class="v47-title"><span class="ico">'+ico+'</span><div><strong>'+esc(title)+'</strong><small>'+esc(sub)+'</small></div></div><button type="button" class="v47-close" data-v52-close>Fermer</button></div><div class="v47-body">'+body+'</div><div class="v47-foot"><span class="hint">Modification directe depuis l’aperçu.</span><button type="button" class="primary" data-v52-close>OK</button></div>';
    qs('#v47Backdrop').classList.add('open');m.classList.add('open');
    bindModal(m,mod,kind,index);enhanceHelp(m);
  }
  function bindModal(root,mod,kind,index){
    qsa('[data-v52-close]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('click',closeModal,true);});
    qsa('[data-v52-load-pictos]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();var input=qs('#pictoFolder');if(input)input.click();else alert('Bouton Pictos introuvable. Utilise le volet Remplir puis le bouton Pictos.');},true);});
    qsa('[data-v52-path]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){var d=getData(mod);pathSet(d,el.getAttribute('data-v52-path'),el.value);persistSoft();try{if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();}catch(e){};},false);});
    qsa('[data-v52-htmlpath]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){var d=getData(mod);pathSet(d,el.getAttribute('data-v52-htmlpath'),nl2br(el.value));persistSoft();try{if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();}catch(e){};},false);});
    qsa('[data-v52-lines]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){var d=getData(mod);pathSet(d,el.getAttribute('data-v52-lines'),String(el.value||'').split(/\n+/).map(function(x){return x.trim();}).filter(Boolean));persistSoft();try{if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();}catch(e){};},false);});
    qsa('[data-v52-cardtype]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('change',function(){var d=getData(mod);pathSet(d,el.getAttribute('data-v52-cardtype'),el.value);var p=String(el.getAttribute('data-v52-cardtype')).match(/cards\.(\d+)\.type/);if(p&&d.cards&&d.cards[+p[1]]){if(!Array.isArray(d.cards[+p[1]].items))d.cards[+p[1]].items=[];}persistSoft();openPictoModal(kind,index);},false);});
    qsa('[data-v52-picto-add]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('change',function(){var val=el.value;if(!val)return;var d=getData(mod),path=el.getAttribute('data-v52-picto-add'),arr=pathGet(d,path);if(!Array.isArray(arr)){arr=[];pathSet(d,path,arr);}if(arr.indexOf(val)===-1)arr.push(val);persistSoft();try{if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();}catch(e){};openPictoModal(kind,index);},false);});
    qsa('[data-v52-picto-remove]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();var d=getData(mod),path=el.getAttribute('data-v52-picto-remove'),val=el.getAttribute('data-v52-picto-value'),arr=pathGet(d,path);if(Array.isArray(arr)){var i=arr.indexOf(val);if(i>-1)arr.splice(i,1);}persistSoft();try{if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();}catch(e){};openPictoModal(kind,index);},true);});
    qsa('[data-v52-action]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();handleAction(mod,el.getAttribute('data-v52-action'),Number(el.getAttribute('data-v52-index')||0),kind,index);},true);});
  }
  function handleAction(mod,act,idx,kind,index){
    var d=getData(mod);
    if(mod==='fiche'){
      if(!Array.isArray(d.risks))d.risks=[];
      if(act==='ficheRiskAddAfter'){d.risks.splice(idx+1,0,{task:'',selected:[],prevention:''});commit();openPictoModal('fiche-risk',idx+1);return;}
      if(act==='ficheRiskDelete'){if(confirm('Supprimer ce risque ?')){d.risks.splice(idx,1);commit();closeModal();}return;}
    }
    if(mod==='securite'){
      if(!Array.isArray(d.cards))d.cards=[];
      if(act==='secCardAddAfter'){d.cards.splice(idx+1,0,{type:'risks',title:'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX',items:[]});commit();openPictoModal('sec-card',idx+1);return;}
      if(act==='secCardDelete'){if(confirm('Supprimer cet encart ?')){d.cards.splice(idx,1);commit();closeModal();}return;}
    }
  }

  function interceptPreview(ev){
    var host=qs('#previewHost'); if(!host || !host.contains(ev.target))return;
    var zone=ev.target.closest('.v47-zone'); if(!zone || !host.contains(zone))return;
    var mod=active(),kind=zone.getAttribute('data-v47-kind');
    var can=(mod==='fiche'&&kind==='fiche-risk')||(mod==='securite'&&(kind==='sec-card'||kind==='sec-epi'));
    if(!can)return;
    ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
    openPictoModal(kind,zone.getAttribute('data-v47-index')||0);
  }

  function boot(){
    enhanceHelp(document);
    document.addEventListener('click',function(ev){if(!ev.target.closest('.v52-help-pop,.v52-help-btn'))closeHelp();},true);
    document.addEventListener('keydown',function(ev){if(ev.key==='Escape')closeHelp();},true);
    window.addEventListener('click',interceptPreview,true);
    if(window.MutationObserver){new MutationObserver(function(){setTimeout(function(){enhanceHelp(document);},0);}).observe(document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true});}
  }
  if(document.readyState==='loading')document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot);else boot();
})();
</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V59 — Kiosque réparé : accueil réel + preview figée + JSON auto
     Injection au dernier </body> uniquement. Base V52 saine.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="v59-kiosk-repare-style">
  :root{--v59-black:#080808;--v59-yellow:#ffd200;--v59-paper:#f4f1e6;--v59-white:#fffdf7;--v59-line:#d7ceb2;--v59-text:#141414;--v59-muted:#655f50;}
  #v59Landing{position:fixed!important;inset:0!important;z-index:2147483000!important;display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;gap:24px!important;overflow:auto!important;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fffdf7 0%,#f4f0de 48%,#ffffff 100%)!important;color:var(--v59-text)!important;padding:34px 40px!important;font-family:'DM Sans',Arial,sans-serif!important;}

<script id="v59-kiosk-repare-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V59_KIOSK_REPARE__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V59_KIOSK_REPARE__ = true;
  var PIN_KEY='labodoc_v59_support_pin';
  var pendingModel=null;
  var selected=false;
  var labels={consigne:'Nouvelle consigne',maintenance:'Maintenance 1er niveau',diagnostic:'Aide au diagnostic',fiche:'Fiche sécurité machine',securite:'Consigne sécurité'};
  function $(s,r){return (r||document).querySelector(s);} function qsa(s,r){return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s));}
  function safe(fn){try{return fn();}catch(e){console.warn('[V59]',e);}}
  function clickId(id){var el=document.getElementById(id); if(el){try{el.click();return true;}catch(e){console.warn('[V59 click '+id+']',e);}} return false;}
  function getPin(){try{return localStorage.getItem(PIN_KEY)||'0000';}catch(e){return '0000';}}
  function setPreviewFlags(){try{localStorage.setItem('labodoc-v47-preview-fill','1');localStorage.setItem('labodoc-v45-fixed-preview-fill','0');localStorage.setItem('labodoc_ws_epure','0');}catch(e){}}
  function refreshText(){var m=$('#v59CurrentModule'); if(m){var a=safe(function(){return state.active;})||'consigne';m.textContent=labels[a]||'Document atelier';} var z=$('#v59ZoomVal'), old=$('#zoomVal'); if(z&&old) z.textContent=old.textContent||'100%';}
  function showHome(){selected=false;setPreviewFlags();document.body.classList.remove('v59-doc','ws-form-open','ws-nav-open','ws-epure');document.body.classList.add('v59-home');var land=$('#v59Landing');if(land)land.style.display='flex';}
  function enforceDoc(){document.body.classList.remove('v59-home','ws-form-open','ws-nav-open','ws-epure');document.body.classList.add('v59-doc');var land=$('#v59Landing');if(land)land.style.display='none';setPreviewFlags();refreshText();}
  function openPin(id){pendingModel=id;var p=$('#v59PinBackdrop'),i=$('#v59PinInput'),m=$('#v59PinMsg');if(m)m.textContent='';if(i)i.value='';if(p)p.classList.add('open');setTimeout(function(){if(i)i.focus();},30);}
  function closePin(){var p=$('#v59PinBackdrop');if(p)p.classList.remove('open');pendingModel=null;}
  function validatePin(){var i=$('#v59PinInput'),m=$('#v59PinMsg'),v=i?i.value:'';if(v===getPin()){var id=pendingModel;closePin();openModel(id);}else{if(m)m.textContent='Code incorrect.';if(i)i.select();}}
  function chooseModel(id){if(id==='consigne')openModel(id);else openPin(id);}
  function openModel(id){
    selected=true;setPreviewFlags();
    safe(function(){state.active=id;state.currentArchiveId=null;persist();});
    safe(function(){if(typeof render==='function')render();});
    safe(function(){if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();});
    enforceDoc();
    setTimeout(function(){safe(function(){if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();});enforceDoc();},80);
    setTimeout(enforceDoc,400);
  }
  function changePin(){var cur=prompt('Code support actuel :');if(cur===null)return;if(cur!==getPin()){alert('Code actuel incorrect.');return;}var next=prompt('Nouveau code support :');if(!next)return;try{localStorage.setItem(PIN_KEY,next);alert('Code support modifié.');}catch(e){alert('Impossible d’enregistrer le code.');}}
  function choosePictos(){var src=$('#pictoFolderV1')||$('#pictoFolder');if(src)src.click();}
  async function importJson(file){if(!file)return;try{if(typeof importCurrentJson==='function'){await importCurrentJson(file);}else{alert('Import JSON indisponible.');return;}selected=true;setTimeout(function(){enforceDoc();safe(function(){if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();});},220);}catch(e){alert('Import JSON impossible : '+(e.message||e));}}
  async function saveJsonBeforePrint(){
    safe(function(){if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();});
    if(window._labodocDirHandle && typeof window.saveJsonCompanionV78==='function'){
      await window.saveJsonCompanionV78();
    }else if(typeof exportCurrentJson==='function'){
      exportCurrentJson(true);
    }else if(typeof window.saveJsonCompanionV78==='function'){
      await window.saveJsonCompanionV78();
    }
  }
  async function printWithJson(btn){
    var old=btn?btn.textContent:''; if(btn){btn.textContent='⏳ JSON + PDF…';btn.disabled=true;}
    try{await saveJsonBeforePrint();}catch(e){console.warn('[V59 JSON]',e);try{if(typeof exportCurrentJson==='function')exportCurrentJson(true);}catch(_){}}
    setTimeout(function(){
      try{ if(typeof exportPdf==='function') exportPdf(); else if(!clickId('hudPrintBtn')){ if(!clickId('pdfBtn')) window.print(); } }
      finally{ if(btn){setTimeout(function(){btn.textContent=old||'🖨️ Imprimer / PDF';btn.disabled=false;},900);} }
    },260);
  }
  function handleAction(a,btn){
    if(a==='home')return showHome();
    if(a==='new'){clickId('newBtn');setTimeout(enforceDoc,120);return;}
    if(a==='save'){clickId('saveBtn');setTimeout(enforceDoc,120);return;}
    if(a==='import'){var inp=$('#v59ImportJson');if(inp)inp.click();return;}
    if(a==='export'){if(typeof exportCurrentJson==='function')exportCurrentJson(false);else clickId('exportCurrentJsonBtn');return;}
    if(a==='folder'){if(typeof window.chooseWorkingFolderV78==='function')window.chooseWorkingFolderV78();else clickId('hudChooseFolderBtn');return;}
    if(a==='print')return printWithJson(btn);
    if(a==='zoomout'){clickId('zoomOut');setTimeout(refreshText,40);return;}
    if(a==='zoomin'){clickId('zoomIn');setTimeout(refreshText,40);return;}
    if(a==='zoomreset'){clickId('zoomReset');setTimeout(refreshText,40);return;}
  }
  function wire(){
    var landing=$('#v59Landing'); if(landing&&!landing.dataset.v59Wire){landing.dataset.v59Wire='1';landing.addEventListener('click',function(ev){var c=ev.target.closest('[data-v59-model]');if(c){ev.preventDefault();chooseModel(c.getAttribute('data-v59-model'));return;}if(ev.target.closest('[data-v59-change-pin]')){ev.preventDefault();changePin();}},true);landing.addEventListener('keydown',function(ev){if((ev.key==='Enter'||ev.key===' ')&&ev.target.closest('[data-v59-model]')){ev.preventDefault();chooseModel(ev.target.closest('[data-v59-model]').getAttribute('data-v59-model'));}},true);}
    var pin=$('#v59PinBackdrop'); if(pin&&!pin.dataset.v59Wire){pin.dataset.v59Wire='1';pin.addEventListener('click',function(ev){if(ev.target===pin||ev.target.closest('[data-v59-pin-cancel]'))closePin();if(ev.target.closest('[data-v59-pin-ok]'))validatePin();},true);pin.addEventListener('keydown',function(ev){if(ev.key==='Enter')validatePin();if(ev.key==='Escape')closePin();},true);}
    var bar=$('#v59ActionBar'); if(bar&&!bar.dataset.v59Wire){bar.dataset.v59Wire='1';bar.addEventListener('click',function(ev){var b=ev.target.closest('[data-v59-act]');if(!b)return;ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();handleAction(b.getAttribute('data-v59-act'),b);},true);}
    var imp=$('#v59ImportJson'); if(imp&&!imp.dataset.v59Wire){imp.dataset.v59Wire='1';imp.addEventListener('change',function(){var f=this.files&&this.files[0];this.value='';importJson(f);});}
    var pic=$('#v59PictoProxy'); if(pic&&!pic.dataset.v59Wire){pic.dataset.v59Wire='1';pic.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();choosePictos();},true);}
  }
  function suppressOld(){
    document.addEventListener('click',function(ev){if(!document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc'))return;if(ev.target.closest('#wsFormBtn,#wsNavBtn,#wsFab,#wsMoreBtn,.ws-cmdbar,.ws-fab,#v47PreviewToggle,#v45FixedToggle')){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();}},true);
    document.addEventListener('keydown',function(ev){if(!document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc'))return;var t=ev.target;if(t&&(t.closest&&t.closest('input,textarea,select,[contenteditable="true"],.v66-modal,.v47-modal,.v45f-modal')))return;var k=(ev.key||'').toLowerCase();if(k==='e'||k==='m'){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();enforceDoc();}},true);
  }
  function boot(){wire();suppressOld();setPreviewFlags();showHome();setTimeout(function(){if(!selected&&!document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc'))showHome();},300);setTimeout(function(){if(!selected&&!document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc'))showHome();},1200);}
  if(document.readyState==='loading')document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot);else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(function(){wire();if(!selected&&!document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc'))showHome();},80);});
})();
</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V64 — Barre kiosque remplacée + JSON PDF robuste

     sans conflit d'événements. Le bouton jaune V64 génère le JSON
     directement puis lance l'impression avec un délai long.
   ============================================================ -->
