<script id="v64-toolbar-json-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V64_TOOLBAR_JSON__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V64_TOOLBAR_JSON__ = true;

  var labels={consigne:'Nouvelle consigne',maintenance:'Maintenance 1er niveau',diagnostic:'Aide au diagnostic',fiche:'Fiche sécurité machine',securite:'Consigne sécurité'};
  var lastBuilt=null;
  function qs(s,r){return (r||document).querySelector(s);} 
  function safe(fn,fallback){try{return fn();}catch(e){console.warn('[V64]',e);return fallback;}}
  function clone(obj){try{return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj||{}));}catch(e){return {};}}
  function sanitize(v){return String(v||'document').trim().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').replace(/[\\/:*?"<>|]+/g,'_').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/g,'_').replace(/_+/g,'_').replace(/^_|_$/g,'').slice(0,90)||'document';}

  function ensureBar(){
    if(qs('#v64Topbar')) return;
    var bar=document.createElement('div');
    bar.id='v64Topbar';
    bar.setAttribute('aria-label','Actions document');
    bar.innerHTML = ''+
      '<div class="v64-brand"><strong><span>LABO</span>.DOC</strong><small>Preview remplissable</small></div>'+
      '<div id="v64CurrentModule" class="v64-module">Document atelier</div>'+
      '<span class="v64-zoom"><button type="button" data-v64-act="zoomout" title="Réduire">−</button><span id="v64ZoomVal">100%</span><button type="button" data-v64-act="zoomin" title="Agrandir">+</button><button type="button" data-v64-act="zoomreset" title="100%">⊙</button></span>'+
      '<div class="v64-actions">'+
        '<button type="button" data-v64-act="home">⌂ Modèles</button>'+
        '<label data-v64-act="pictos">⊞ Pictos</label>'+
        '<button type="button" data-v64-act="new">⊕ Nouveau</button>'+
        '<button type="button" data-v64-act="save">⊙ Sauvegarder</button>'+
        '<button type="button" data-v64-act="import">📂 Importer JSON</button>'+
        '<button type="button" data-v64-act="export">↧ Exporter JSON</button>'+
        '<button type="button" data-v64-act="folder">📁 Dossier auto</button>'+
        '<button type="button" class="v64-print" id="v64PrintPdfBtn" data-v64-act="print">🖨️ Imprimer / PDF</button>'+
      '</div>'+
      '<input id="v64ImportJson" type="file" accept="application/json" style="display:none">';
    document.body.appendChild(bar);
  }

  function updateBarHeight(){
    var bar=qs('#v64Topbar');
    var h=(bar && getComputedStyle(bar).display!=='none') ? Math.ceil(bar.getBoundingClientRect().height) : 78;
    if(!h || h<55) h=78;
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--v64-bar-h', h+'px');
  }
  function updateModule(){
    var type=safe(function(){return state.active;},'consigne')||'consigne';
    var m=qs('#v64CurrentModule'); if(m)m.textContent=labels[type]||'Document atelier';
    var z=qs('#v64ZoomVal'), old=qs('#zoomVal'); if(z) z.textContent=(old && old.textContent) ? old.textContent : (z.textContent||'100%');
    updateBarHeight();
  }
  function notice(msg, detail, linkName){
    var el=qs('#v64JsonNotice');
    if(!el){el=document.createElement('div');el.id='v64JsonNotice';document.body.appendChild(el);}
    function esc(x){return String(x||'').replace(/[<>&]/g,function(c){return {'<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','&':'&amp;'}[c];});}
    var html=esc(msg)+(detail?'<small>'+esc(detail)+'</small>':'');
    if(lastBuilt && linkName){
      var blob=new Blob([lastBuilt.text],{type:'application/json;charset=utf-8'});
      var url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      setTimeout(function(){try{URL.revokeObjectURL(url);}catch(e){}},90000);
      html += '<br><a download="'+esc(lastBuilt.name)+'" href="'+url+'">Télécharger le JSON</a>';
    }
    el.innerHTML=html;
    el.classList.add('show');
    clearTimeout(el._t); el._t=setTimeout(function(){el.classList.remove('show');},9000);
  }

  function currentType(){return safe(function(){return state.active;},'document')||'document';}
  function currentTitleSafe(type){
    var t=safe(function(){return (typeof currentTitle==='function') ? currentTitle() : '';},'');
    if(t) return t;
    var d=safe(function(){return state[type]||{};},{});
    return d.displayTitle||d.title||d.titre||d.machine||d.poste||d.secteur||labels[type]||type||'document';
  }
  function buildJson(){
    safe(function(){if(typeof updatePreview==='function') updatePreview();});
    safe(function(){if(typeof persist==='function') persist();});
    var type=currentType(), title=currentTitleSafe(type);
    var payload={
      app:'LABO.DOC',
      exportMode:'source-json-auto-before-pdf',
      version:'V64',
      type:type,
      title:title,
      exportedAt:new Date().toLocaleString('fr-FR'),
      exportedAtIso:new Date().toISOString(),
      logos:safe(function(){return clone(state.logos);},{}),
      pictos:safe(function(){return clone(state.pictos);},{}),
      data:safe(function(){return (typeof currentData==='function') ? currentData() : clone(state[type]);},{})
    };
    var date=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
    var name=sanitize(type)+'_'+sanitize(title)+'_'+date+'_source_auto.json';
    return {name:name,text:JSON.stringify(payload,null,2),payload:payload};
  }
  function downloadJson(built){
    lastBuilt=built;
    var blob=new Blob([built.text],{type:'application/json;charset=utf-8'});
    var url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    var a=document.createElement('a');
    a.href=url; a.download=built.name; a.rel='noopener';
    a.style.position='fixed'; a.style.left='-9999px'; a.style.top='-9999px';
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window}));
    setTimeout(function(){try{URL.revokeObjectURL(url);}catch(e){} try{a.remove();}catch(e){}},7000);
    safe(function(){localStorage.setItem('labodoc_v64_last_auto_json',JSON.stringify({name:built.name,text:built.text,savedAt:new Date().toISOString()}));});
    safe(function(){localStorage.setItem('creation_documents_atelier_last_source_v27',JSON.stringify({name:built.name,text:built.text,savedAt:new Date().toISOString()}));});
  }
  async function saveFolderIfPossible(built){
    var dir=safe(function(){return window._labodocDirHandle || null;},null);
    if(!dir) return false;
    try{var fh=await dir.getFileHandle(built.name,{create:true});var w=await fh.createWritable();await w.write(built.text);await w.close();return true;}catch(e){console.warn('[V64 dossier auto]',e);return false;}
  }
  function launchPdf(){
    // On appelle le moteur PDF si présent, sinon l'impression navigateur.
    try{if(typeof exportPdf==='function'){exportPdf();return;}}catch(e){console.warn('[V64 exportPdf]',e);}
    try{var hp=qs('#hudPrintBtn'); if(hp){hp.click();return;}}catch(e){}
    try{window.print();}catch(e){console.warn('[V64 print]',e);}
  }

  function doJsonOnly(){
    var built=buildJson();
    downloadJson(built);
    saveFolderIfPossible(built).then(function(ok){notice(ok?'✓ JSON téléchargé et copié dans le dossier auto':'✓ JSON téléchargé', built.name, true);});
  }
  function doPrint(btn){
    var old=btn ? btn.textContent : '';
    if(btn){btn.disabled=true;btn.textContent='⏳ JSON…';}
    var built=null;
    try{
      built=buildJson();
      downloadJson(built);
      notice('✓ JSON source lancé avant PDF', built.name, true);
      saveFolderIfPossible(built).then(function(ok){if(ok) notice('✓ JSON aussi copié dans le dossier auto', built.name, true);});
    }catch(e){console.error('[V64 JSON]',e);notice('⚠ JSON non généré',e && e.message ? e.message : 'Erreur inconnue',false);}
    // Délai volontaire : laisse Chrome lancer le téléchargement avant la boîte d’impression.
    setTimeout(function(){
      try{launchPdf();}
      finally{setTimeout(function(){if(btn){btn.disabled=false;btn.textContent=old||'🖨️ Imprimer / PDF';}},900);}
    },1400);
  }

  function clickId(id){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){try{el.click();return true;}catch(e){console.warn('[V64 click '+id+']',e);}}return false;}
  function goHome(){document.body.classList.remove('v59-doc','ws-form-open','ws-nav-open','ws-epure');document.body.classList.add('v59-home');var land=qs('#v59Landing');if(land)land.style.display='flex';updateBarHeight();}
  function stayDoc(){document.body.classList.remove('v59-home','ws-form-open','ws-nav-open','ws-epure');document.body.classList.add('v59-doc');var land=qs('#v59Landing');if(land)land.style.display='none';safe(function(){if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();});updateModule();}
  async function importJson(file){if(!file)return;try{if(typeof importCurrentJson==='function') await importCurrentJson(file);else alert('Import JSON indisponible.');setTimeout(stayDoc,260);}catch(e){alert('Import JSON impossible : '+(e.message||e));}}
  function choosePictos(){var src=qs('#pictoFolderV1')||qs('#pictoFolder');if(src)src.click();}

  function handleAction(act, btn){
    if(act==='home') return goHome();
    if(act==='pictos') return choosePictos();
    if(act==='new'){clickId('newBtn');return setTimeout(stayDoc,120);}
    if(act==='save'){clickId('saveBtn');return setTimeout(stayDoc,120);}
    if(act==='import'){var inp=qs('#v64ImportJson');if(inp)inp.click();return;}
    if(act==='export') return doJsonOnly();
    if(act==='folder'){if(typeof window.chooseWorkingFolderV78==='function')window.chooseWorkingFolderV78();else clickId('hudChooseFolderBtn');return;}
    if(act==='print') return doPrint(btn);
    if(act==='zoomout'){clickId('zoomOut');return setTimeout(updateModule,60);}
    if(act==='zoomin'){clickId('zoomIn');return setTimeout(updateModule,60);}
    if(act==='zoomreset'){clickId('zoomReset');return setTimeout(updateModule,60);}
  }

  function wire(){
    ensureBar();
    var bar=qs('#v64Topbar');
    if(bar && !bar.dataset.v64Wire){
      bar.dataset.v64Wire='1';
      bar.addEventListener('click',function(ev){var b=ev.target.closest('[data-v64-act]');if(!b)return;ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();handleAction(b.getAttribute('data-v64-act'),b);},true);
    }
    var inp=qs('#v64ImportJson');
    if(inp && !inp.dataset.v64Wire){inp.dataset.v64Wire='1';inp.addEventListener('change',function(){var f=this.files&&this.files[0];this.value='';importJson(f);});}
    updateModule();
  }
  function boot(){wire();updateBarHeight();setTimeout(updateModule,250);setTimeout(updateModule,900);}
  if(document.readyState==='loading')document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot);else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(boot,80);setTimeout(updateBarHeight,600);});
  window.addEventListener('resize',function(){setTimeout(updateBarHeight,60);});
  if(window.MutationObserver){new MutationObserver(function(){if(document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc'))setTimeout(updateModule,40);}).observe(document.body,{attributes:true,attributeFilter:['class']});}
})();
</script>

<!-- ============================================================
     V65 — Correctif réel JSON auto avant PDF
     Cause corrigée : l'ancien moteur V34 intercepte tous les boutons
     contenant "PDF" avant la barre V64. Il appelle window.saveJsonAuto(),
     mais cette fonction n'était pas exposée globalement. Ici on l'expose
     proprement : le bouton jaune utilise donc le même flux, sans toucher
     à l'interface multi-écrans de la V64.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="v65-json-auto-style">
  #v65JsonToast{
    position:fixed;right:18px;top:calc(var(--v64-bar-h, 92px) + 14px);z-index:2147483646;
    max-width:min(520px,calc(100vw - 36px));background:#111;color:#fff;border:2px solid #ffd200;border-radius:16px;
    padding:13px 15px;box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.30);font-family:'DM Sans',Arial,sans-serif;
    font-size:13px;font-weight:950;line-height:1.35;opacity:0;transform:translateY(-8px);pointer-events:none;transition:.18s ease;
  }
  #v65JsonToast.show{opacity:1;transform:none;pointer-events:auto;}
  #v65JsonToast small{display:block;color:#ffe56b;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
  #v65JsonToast a{display:inline-block;margin-top:8px;color:#111!important;background:#ffd200!important;border-radius:999px;padding:7px 11px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:950;}
  @media print{#v65JsonToast{display:none!important;}}
</style>
<script id="v65-json-auto-global-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V65_JSON_AUTO_GLOBAL__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V65_JSON_AUTO_GLOBAL__ = true;

  function safe(fn, fallback){try{return fn();}catch(e){console.warn('[V65 JSON]',e);return fallback;}}
  function clone(obj){try{return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj||{}));}catch(e){return {};}}
  function stripHtml(v){return String(v||'').replace(/<[^>]*>/g,' ').replace(/&nbsp;/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}
  function sanitize(v){
    return String(v||'document').trim()
      .normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'')
      .replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'')
      .replace(/[\\/:*?"<>|]+/g,'_')
      .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/g,'_')
      .replace(/_+/g,'_').replace(/^_|_$/g,'')
      .slice(0,90) || 'document';
  }
  function activeType(){return safe(function(){return state.active;},'document') || 'document';}
  function activeTitle(type){
    var t=safe(function(){return (typeof currentTitle==='function') ? currentTitle() : '';},'');
    if(t) return stripHtml(t);
    var d=safe(function(){return state[type] || {};},{});
    return stripHtml(d.displayTitle||d.title||d.titre||d.machine||d.poste||d.secteur||type||'document');
  }
  function activeData(type){
    var d=safe(function(){return (typeof currentData==='function') ? currentData() : null;},null);
    if(d) return clone(d);
    return safe(function(){return clone(state[type]);},{});
  }
  function buildPayload(){
    safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview==='function') updatePreview(); });
    safe(function(){ if(typeof persist==='function') persist(); });
    var type=activeType();
    var title=activeTitle(type);
    return {
      type:type,
      title:title,
      exportedAt:new Date().toLocaleString('fr-FR'),
      exportedAtIso:new Date().toISOString(),
      logos:safe(function(){return clone(state.logos);},{}),
      pictos:safe(function(){return clone(state.pictos);},{}),
      data:activeData(type)
    };
  }
  function buildFile(){
    var payload=buildPayload();
    var date=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
    var base=[date, payload.type, payload.title || 'document'].map(sanitize).filter(Boolean).join('_');
    return {name:base + '.json', text:JSON.stringify(payload,null,2), payload:payload};
  }
  function getToast(){
    var el=document.getElementById('v65JsonToast');
    if(!el){el=document.createElement('div');el.id='v65JsonToast';document.body.appendChild(el);} return el;
  }
  function showToast(msg, file){
    var el=getToast();
    function esc(x){return String(x||'').replace(/[<>&]/g,function(c){return {'<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','&':'&amp;'}[c];});}
    var html=esc(msg);
    if(file){
      var blob=new Blob([file.text],{type:'application/json;charset=utf-8'});
      var url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      setTimeout(function(){try{URL.revokeObjectURL(url);}catch(e){}},120000);
      html+='<small>'+esc(file.name)+'</small><a download="'+esc(file.name)+'" href="'+url+'">Télécharger le JSON</a>';
    }
    el.innerHTML=html;
    el.classList.add('show');
    clearTimeout(el._t); el._t=setTimeout(function(){el.classList.remove('show');},10000);
  }
  function forceDownload(file){
    var blob=new Blob([file.text],{type:'application/json;charset=utf-8'});
    var url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    var a=document.createElement('a');
    a.href=url;
    a.download=file.name;
    a.rel='noopener';
    a.style.position='fixed';
    a.style.left='-10000px';
    a.style.top='-10000px';
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    /* click() simple : c'est celui qui fonctionne le mieux avec Chrome local */
    a.click();
    setTimeout(function(){try{URL.revokeObjectURL(url);}catch(e){} try{a.remove();}catch(e){}},15000);
  }
  async function writeFolderIfPossible(file){
    var dir=safe(function(){return window._labodocDirHandle || null;},null);
    if(!dir || !dir.getFileHandle) return false;
    try{
      var fh=await dir.getFileHandle(file.name,{create:true});
      var w=await fh.createWritable();
      await w.write(file.text);
      await w.close();
      return true;
    }catch(e){console.warn('[V65 dossier auto]',e);return false;}
  }

  window.labodocBuildSourceJsonV65 = buildFile;
  window.labodocDownloadSourceJsonV65 = function(){
    var file=buildFile();
    forceDownload(file);
    safe(function(){localStorage.setItem('labodoc_last_source_json_v65', JSON.stringify({name:file.name,text:file.text,savedAt:new Date().toISOString()}));});
    writeFolderIfPossible(file).then(function(ok){showToast(ok?'✓ JSON généré et copié dans le dossier auto':'✓ JSON généré avant PDF', file);});
    return file;
  };

  /* POINT IMPORTANT : c'est LA fonction appelée par l'ancien moteur PDF V34.
     Avant elle n'existait pas sur window, donc rien ne se sauvegardait. */
  window.saveJsonAuto = async function(){
    var file=buildFile();
    forceDownload(file);
    safe(function(){localStorage.setItem('labodoc_last_source_json_v65', JSON.stringify({name:file.name,text:file.text,savedAt:new Date().toISOString()}));});
    var ok=await writeFolderIfPossible(file);
    showToast(ok?'✓ JSON généré et copié dans le dossier auto':'✓ JSON généré avant PDF', file);
    /* On attend volontairement pour laisser Chrome déclencher le téléchargement avant la fenêtre PDF. */
    await new Promise(function(resolve){setTimeout(resolve,850);});
    return file;
  };

  /* Le bouton Exporter JSON de la barre V64 garde aussi un secours fiable. */
  document.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var b=ev.target && ev.target.closest ? ev.target.closest('[data-v64-act="export"]') : null;
    if(!b) return;
    ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation(); ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
    window.labodocDownloadSourceJsonV65();
  }, true);
})();
</script>

<script id="v66-additive-editor-script">
(function(){
  if(window.__LABODOC_V66_ADDITIVE__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V66_ADDITIVE__ = true;

  var $ = function(s,r){return (r||document).querySelector(s);};
  var $$ = function(s,r){return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s));};
  function safe(fn,fallback){try{return fn();}catch(e){console.warn('[V66]',e);return fallback;}}
  function esc(v){return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/[<>&"]/g,function(c){return {'<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','&':'&amp;','"':'&quot;'}[c];});}
  function br(v){return esc(v||'').split(/\n+/).filter(Boolean).join('<br>');}
  function linesHtml(a){return (Array.isArray(a)?a:[]).filter(function(x){return String(x||'').trim();}).map(function(x){return '<li>'+esc(x)+'</li>';}).join('');}
  function toLines(v){return String(v||'').split(/\n+/).map(function(x){return x.trim();}).filter(Boolean);}
  function readFile(file){return new Promise(function(resolve,reject){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(){resolve(r.result);};r.onerror=reject;r.readAsDataURL(file);});}
  function commit(){safe(function(){persist();});safe(function(){updatePreview();});setTimeout(retagPreview,40);}
  function active(){return safe(function(){return state.active;},'consigne');}

  // 1) Modèles de départ plus légers : on ajoute au lieu de retirer.
  function maintenanceStarter(){
    return {
      title:'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIVEAU', machine:'', subtitle:'CONTRÔLES DÉMARRAGE MACHINE', secteur:'', poste:'', duree:'',
      slogan:'', footer:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT !', machineImage:'', epiImages:[],
      rows:[{number:'01',title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustration:'',illustrations:[]}],
      _v66Starter:true
    };
  }
  window.makeMaintenanceDefault = maintenanceStarter;
  try{ makeMaintenanceDefault = maintenanceStarter; }catch(e){}

  function consigneStarter(){
    return {title:'',author:'',date:'',intro:'',footer:'SOYEZ INFORMÉ',posts:[],headerTitle:'INFO ATELIER',headerSubtitle:'INFORMER • STANDARDISER • SÉCURISER',displayTitle:'',subtitle:'',sector:'',poste:'',typeConsigne:'',level:'',tagLabel:'SOYEZ INFORMÉ',objectif:'',retenir:[],mainPhotos:[],steps:[{title:'',text:'',photo:'',photos:[],warning:''}],safetyRisks:[],epi:[],keyPoints:[],qualityChecks:[],specialTitle:'CAS PARTICULIERS',specialText:'',specialImage:'',doubtText:'',ncCardEnabled:{security:false,keypoints:false,quality:false,special:false},_v66Starter:true};
  }
  function diagLib(){return [['⚠️','Pièce trop courte'],['📏','Pièce trop longue'],['💧','Défaut étanchéité'],['🧴','Mauvais encollage'],['⚙️','Blocage machine'],['🔊','Bruit anormal'],['🚫','Cycle impossible'],['🎯','Mauvais positionnement'],['✂️','Coupe incorrecte'],['📐','Angle faux'],['🟠','Capteur absent'],['!','Autre']];}
  window.diag60Lib = diagLib; try{diag60Lib = diagLib;}catch(e){}
  window.diag60PickIcon = function(type){var f=diagLib().find(function(x){return x[1]===type;});return f?f[0]:'!';}; try{diag60PickIcon = window.diag60PickIcon;}catch(e){}
  function diagStarter(){return {logo:'',title:'AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC',subtitle:"Identifier rapidement l’origine du problème",sector:'',machine:'',author:'',date:'',symptoms:[{type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]}],causeTitle:'',gravity:'Moyenne',frequency:'Occasionnelle',impact:'Qualité',steps:[{title:'',photos:[],why:'',question:'',ifYes:'Passer au contrôle suivant.',ifNo:''}],service:'',phone:'',priority:'',safetyTitle:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT',safetyText:'',_v66Starter:true};}
  window.makeDiagnosticDefaultV59 = diagStarter; try{makeDiagnosticDefaultV59 = diagStarter;}catch(e){}
  window.diag60Default = diagStarter; try{diag60Default = diagStarter;}catch(e){}

  var oldEnsureConsigne = window.ensureConsigneV4 || (typeof ensureConsigneV4==='function'?ensureConsigneV4:null);
  window.ensureConsigneV4 = function(){
    var d = oldEnsureConsigne ? oldEnsureConsigne() : (state.consigne || (state.consigne={}));
    if(!d.ncCardEnabled) d.ncCardEnabled = {
      security:!!((d.safetyRisks&&d.safetyRisks.length)||(d.epi&&d.epi.length)),
      keypoints:!!(d.keyPoints&&d.keyPoints.length),
      quality:!!(d.qualityChecks&&d.qualityChecks.length),
      special:!!(String(d.specialText||'').trim()||d.specialImage)
    };
    if(!Array.isArray(d.steps) || !d.steps.length) d.steps=[{title:'',text:'',photo:'',photos:[],warning:''}];
    return d;
  };
  try{ ensureConsigneV4 = window.ensureConsigneV4; }catch(e){}

  var oldEnsureDiag = window.ensureDiagnostic60 || (typeof ensureDiagnostic60==='function'?ensureDiagnostic60:null);
  window.ensureDiagnostic60 = function(){
    var d = oldEnsureDiag ? oldEnsureDiag() : (state.diagnostic || (state.diagnostic=diagStarter()));
    if(!Array.isArray(d.symptoms)) d.symptoms=[];
    if(!d.symptoms.length) d.symptoms=[{type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]}];
    d.symptoms.forEach(function(s){if(!Array.isArray(s.photos))s.photos=[]; if(!s.type)s.type=s.label||'Autre'; if(s.type==='Autre')s.icon='!'; else s.icon=window.diag60PickIcon(s.type); if(s.label==null)s.label=s.type==='Autre'?'':s.type;});
    if(!Array.isArray(d.steps) || !d.steps.length) d.steps=[{title:'',photos:[],why:'',question:'',ifYes:'Passer au contrôle suivant.',ifNo:''}];
    return d;
  };
  try{ ensureDiagnostic60 = window.ensureDiagnostic60; }catch(e){}

  function looksOldMaintenance(d){return d && Array.isArray(d.rows) && d.rows.length>=8 && /VÉRIFICATION DU PROGRAMME/i.test(String(d.rows[0].title||''));}
  function looksOldDiagnostic(d){return d && Array.isArray(d.symptoms) && d.symptoms.length>1 && d.symptoms.some(function(s){return /Pièce trop courte/i.test(s.label||'');}) && d.symptoms.some(function(s){return /Blocage machine/i.test(s.label||'');});}
  function normalizeStarterIfDemo(){
    var a=active();
    if(a==='maintenance' && looksOldMaintenance(state.maintenance)){state.maintenance = maintenanceStarter(); safe(function(){persist();});}
    if(a==='diagnostic' && looksOldDiagnostic(state.diagnostic)){state.diagnostic = diagStarter(); safe(function(){persist();});}
    if(a==='consigne') window.ensureConsigneV4();
  }

  var oldNew = window.newCurrentDocument || (typeof newCurrentDocument==='function'?newCurrentDocument:null);
  window.newCurrentDocument = function(){
    var a=active();
    safe(function(){state.currentArchiveId=null;});
    if(a==='maintenance') state.maintenance=maintenanceStarter();
    else if(a==='diagnostic') state.diagnostic=diagStarter();
    else if(a==='consigne') state.consigne=consigneStarter();
    else if(oldNew) return oldNew();
    safe(function(){persist();});safe(function(){render();});safe(function(){updatePreview();});setTimeout(retagPreview,60);
  };
  try{ newCurrentDocument = window.newCurrentDocument; }catch(e){}

  // 2) Previews allégées / dynamiques.
  window.previewConsigne = function(){
    var d=window.ensureConsigneV4();
    var logo=safe(function(){return getLogoForTab('consigne');},'');
    var main=(d.mainPhotos&&d.mainPhotos[0]&&d.mainPhotos[0].src)||'';
    var steps=(d.steps||[]).slice(0,8);
    var cols=Math.max(1,Math.min(6,steps.length||1));
    var dateTxt=d.date?new Date(d.date+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'):'';
    var enabled=d.ncCardEnabled||{};
    function cardOn(k,has){return !!enabled[k] || !!has;}
    var cards=[];
    if(cardOn('security',(d.safetyRisks&&d.safetyRisks.length)||(d.epi&&d.epi.length)))cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="security"><div class="nc-card-head nc-red">⚠ SÉCURITÉ</div><div class="nc-card-body"><b style="color:#c5161d">RISQUES IDENTIFIÉS</b><ul>'+linesHtml(d.safetyRisks)+'</ul><div style="height:1px;background:#efb4b4;margin:3mm 0"></div><b style="color:#c5161d">EPI SPÉCIFIQUES</b>'+safe(function(){return ncEpiHtml(d.epi);},'<ul>'+linesHtml(d.epi)+'</ul>')+'</div></div>');
    if(cardOn('keypoints',d.keyPoints&&d.keyPoints.length))cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="keypoints"><div class="nc-card-head nc-orange">🔑 POINTS CLÉS</div><div class="nc-card-body"><ul>'+linesHtml(d.keyPoints)+'</ul></div></div>');
    if(cardOn('quality',d.qualityChecks&&d.qualityChecks.length))cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="quality"><div class="nc-card-head nc-green">☑ CONTRÔLE QUALITÉ</div><div class="nc-card-body">'+(d.qualityChecks||[]).map(function(x){return '<div class="nc-check-row"><span class="nc-box"></span><span>'+esc(x)+'</span></div>';}).join('')+'</div></div>');
    if(cardOn('special',String(d.specialText||'').trim()||d.specialImage))cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="special"><div class="nc-card-head nc-red">❗ '+esc(d.specialTitle||'CAS PARTICULIERS')+'</div><div class="nc-card-body"><div class="nc-special">'+(d.specialImage?'<img src="'+d.specialImage+'">':'')+'<div>'+br(d.specialText||'')+'</div></div></div></div>');
    return '<div class="nc-a4"><div class="nc-top"><div class="nc-logo"><div class="nc-logo-inner">'+(logo?'<img src="'+logo+'" alt="Logo">':'<div class="nc-logo-fallback">WIBAIE<small>PRODUCTION</small></div>')+'</div></div><div class="nc-titlebox"><div class="nc-infoicon">i</div><div><div class="nc-titlemain">'+esc(d.headerTitle||'INFO ATELIER')+'</div><div class="nc-subline">'+esc(d.headerSubtitle||'INFORMER • STANDARDISER • SÉCURISER')+'</div></div></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>SECTEUR</small><b>'+esc(d.sector||'')+'</b></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>POSTE</small><b>'+esc(d.poste||'')+'</b></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>RÉDACTEUR</small><b>'+esc(d.author||'')+'</b></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>DATE</small><b>'+esc(dateTxt)+'</b></div></div><div class="nc-blackbar" style="'+(!d.typeConsigne?'grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 38mm':'')+'">'+(d.typeConsigne?'<div class="nc-type-pill '+safe(function(){return ncConsigneTypeClass(d.typeConsigne);},'')+'">'+esc(safe(function(){return ncConsigneTypeLabel(d.typeConsigne);},d.typeConsigne))+'</div>':'')+'<div DOUTE<small>'+esc(d.doubtText||'')+'</small></div></div></div></div>';
  };
  try{ previewConsigne = window.previewConsigne; }catch(e){}

  window.previewMaintenance = function(){
    var d=safe(function(){return normalizeMaintenanceData();},state.maintenance||maintenanceStarter());
    var logo=safe(function(){return getLogoForTab('maintenance');},'');
    var rows=(d.rows&&d.rows.length?d.rows:[{number:'01',title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustrations:[]}]);
    return '<div class="maint-v2-sheet"><table class="maint-v2-head-table" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0"><tr><td class="maint-v2-logo-cell"><div class="maint-v2-logo">'+(logo?'<img class="ico">▦</span><span><strong>SECTEUR</strong>'+esc(d.secteur||'')+'</span></td><td><span class="ico">♟</span><span><strong>POSTE</strong>'+esc(d.poste||'')+'</span></td><td><span class="ico">◷</span><span><strong>DURÉE</strong>'+esc(d.duree||'')+'</span></td></tr></table><table class="maint-v2-safety-table" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0"><tr><td class="maint-v2-safety-left"><span class="tri">⚠️</span><span>'+esc(d.footer||'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT !')+'</span></td><td class="maint-v2-safety-mid">'+esc(d.slogan||'')+'</td><td class="maint-v2-epis">'+safe(function(){return maintenanceEpiHtml();},'')+'</td></tr></table><table class="maint-v2-table" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0"><colgroup><col class="maint-v2-col-num"><col class="maint-v2-col-control"><col class="maint-v2-col-img"><col class="maint-v2-col-why"><col class="maint-v2-col-check"></colgroup><thead><tr><th></th><th>CONTRÔLES À EFFECTUER</th><th>ILLUSTRATION</th><th>POURQUOI / RISQUES</th><th>JOURS À COCHER</th></tr></thead><tbody>'+rows.map(function(row){return '<tr><td class="maint-v2-num">'+esc(row.number||'')+'</td><td><div class="maint-v2-row-title">'+esc(row.title||'')+'</div><div class="maint-v2-controls">'+safe(function(){return maintenanceTextToHtml(row.controls||'');},br(row.controls||''))+'</div></td><td><div class="maint-v2-illustration">'+((row.illustrations&&row.illustrations.length)?row.illustrations.map(function(ph){return '<img src="'+ph.src+'" style="width:'+(ph.w||100)+'%">';}).join(''):'Illustration')+'</div></td><td><div class="maint-v2-why">'+safe(function(){return maintenanceTextToHtml(row.why||'');},br(row.why||''))+'</div><div class="maint-v2-risk">'+safe(function(){return maintenanceTextToHtml(row.risk||'');},br(row.risk||''))+'</div></td><td class="maint-v2-check-cell">'+safe(function(){return maintenanceCheckGrid();},'')+'</td></tr>';}).join('')+'</tbody></table><table class="maint-v2-bottom-table" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0"><tr><td class="maint-v2-bottom-box"><div class="maint-v2-bottom-title">⚠ Anomalies constatées / actions à réaliser</div><div class="maint-v2-lines"><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div></div></td><td class="maint-v2-bottom-box"><div class="maint-v2-bottom-title blue">Action réalisée</div><div class="maint-v2-action-list"><div><span class="maint-v2-square"></span>Correction immédiate</div><div><span class="maint-v2-square"></span>Demande d\'intervention maintenance</div><div><span class="maint-v2-square"></span>Signalement chef d\'équipe</div></div></td><td class="maint-v2-bottom-box"><div class="maint-v2-bottom-title orange">Niveau de criticité (à cocher)</div><div class="maint-v2-critical-list"><div><span class="maint-v2-dot crit-red"></span>CRITIQUE — Arrêt machine immédiat</div><div><span class="maint-v2-dot crit-orange"></span>MAJEUR — Intervention rapide</div><div><span class="maint-v2-dot crit-yellow"></span>MINEUR — À surveiller</div><div><span class="maint-v2-dot crit-green"></span>OK — Conforme</div></div></td></tr></table></div>';
  };
  try{ previewMaintenance = window.previewMaintenance; }catch(e){}

  // 3) Modal unique V66 pour les zones à modifier. Fiche sécurité machine non interceptée.
  function modal(){
    var b=$('#v66Backdrop'); if(!b){b=document.createElement('div');b.id='v66Backdrop';b.className='v66-modal-backdrop';b.innerHTML='<div class="v66-modal"><div class="v66-head"><div><b id="v66Title">Modifier</b><small id="v66Sub">Modification directe depuis l’aperçu</small></div><button type="button" data-v66-close>Fermer</button></div><div class="v66-body" id="v66Body"></div><div class="v66-foot"><span class="v66-help">Les changements alimentent l’aperçu directement.</span><button type="button" class="v66-btn yellow" data-v66-close>OK</button></div></div>';document.body.appendChild(b);b.addEventListener('click',function(ev){if(ev.target===b||ev.target.closest('[data-v66-close]'))close();});}
    return b;
  }
  function open(title,sub,html,bind){var b=modal();$('#v66Title').textContent=title;$('#v66Sub').textContent=sub||'Modification directe depuis l’aperçu';$('#v66Body').innerHTML=html;b.classList.add('open');if(bind)bind($('#v66Body'));var first=$('#v66Body input,#v66Body textarea,#v66Body select,#v66Body button');if(first)setTimeout(function(){first.focus();},40);}
  function close(){var b=$('#v66Backdrop');if(b)b.classList.remove('open');commit();}
  function field(label,key,val,type){return '<div class="v66-field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><input type="'+(type||'text')+'" data-v66-key="'+esc(key)+'" value="'+esc(val||'')+'"></div>';}
  function area(label,key,val){return '<div class="v66-field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><textarea data-v66-key="'+esc(key)+'">'+esc(val||'')+'</textarea></div>';}
  function lineArea(label,key,arr){return '<div class="v66-field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><textarea data-v66-lines="'+esc(key)+'">'+esc((arr||[]).join('\n'))+'</textarea></div>';}
  function select(label,key,val,opts){return '<div class="v66-field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><select data-v66-key="'+esc(key)+'">'+opts.map(function(o){return '<option value="'+esc(o)+'" '+(String(o)===String(val)?'selected':'')+'>'+esc(o||'—')+'</option>';}).join('')+'</select></div>';}
  function photoGrid(arr,cmd){arr=arr||[];return '<div class="v66-photos">'+(arr.length?arr.map(function(ph,i){var src=typeof ph==='string'?ph:(ph&&ph.src)||'';return '<div class="v66-photo"><img src="'+src+'"><button type="button" class="v66-btn danger" data-v66-photo-remove="'+cmd+':'+i+'">Suppr.</button></div>';}).join(''):'<div class="v66-help">Aucune image pour le moment.</div>')+'</div>';}
  function bindPaths(root,obj){$$('[data-v66-key]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){setPathV(obj,el.dataset.v66Key,el.value);commit();});el.addEventListener('change',function(){setPathV(obj,el.dataset.v66Key,el.value);commit();});});$$('[data-v66-lines]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){setPathV(obj,el.dataset.v66Lines,toLines(el.value));commit();});});}
  function setPathV(obj,path,val){var parts=String(path).split('.'),o=obj;for(var i=0;i<parts.length-1;i++){var p=parts[i];if(/^\d+$/.test(parts[i]))p=Number(parts[i]);if(!o[p])o[p]={};o=o[p];}var k=parts[parts.length-1];if(/^\d+$/.test(k))k=Number(k);o[k]=val;}
  function removePhoto(cmd){var parts=cmd.split(':'),d;if(parts[0]==='consigneMain'){d=window.ensureConsigneV4();d.mainPhotos.splice(Number(parts[1]),1);d.machinePhoto='';}
    if(parts[0]==='consigneStep'){d=window.ensureConsigneV4();var st=d.steps[Number(parts[1])];if(st&&st.photos)st.photos.splice(Number(parts[2]),1);}
    if(parts[0]==='maintMachine'){state.maintenance.machineImage='';}
    if(parts[0]==='maintRow'){d=state.maintenance;var r=d.rows[Number(parts[1])];if(r&&r.illustrations)r.illustrations.splice(Number(parts[2]),1);}
    if(parts[0]==='diagSymptom'){d=window.ensureDiagnostic60();var s=d.symptoms[Number(parts[1])];if(s&&s.photos)s.photos.splice(Number(parts[2]),1);}
    if(parts[0]==='diagStep'){d=window.ensureDiagnostic60();var step=d.steps[Number(parts[1])];if(step&&step.photos)step.photos.splice(Number(parts[2]),1);}
    commit();close();}

  function openConsigne(kind,index){var d=window.ensureConsigneV4(),e=d.ncCardEnabled||(d.ncCardEnabled={});index=Number(index||0);
    if(kind==='identity')return open('Identité du document','Nouvelle consigne','<div class="v66-grid2">'+field('Titre de trame','headerTitle',d.headerTitle)+field('Sous-titre','headerSubtitle',d.headerSubtitle)+'</div><div class="v66-grid2">'+field('Secteur','sector',d.sector)+field('Poste','poste',d.poste)+'</div><div class="v66-grid2">'+field('Rédacteur','author',d.author)+field('Date','date',d.date,'date')+'</div>',function(r){bindPaths(r,d);});
    if(kind==='title')return open('Titre et bandeau','Nouvelle consigne',select('Type de consigne','typeConsigne',d.typeConsigne||'',['','Nouvelle Consigne','Bonnes Pratiques','Consigne Provisoire','Consigne Qualité'])+field('Titre principal','displayTitle',d.displayTitle||d.title)+field('Sous-titre','subtitle',d.subtitle)+field('Cartouche à droite','tagLabel',d.tagLabel),function(r){bindPaths(r,d);r.addEventListener('input',function(){d.title=d.displayTitle;d.level=d.typeConsigne;});r.addEventListener('change',function(){d.title=d.displayTitle;d.level=d.typeConsigne;});});
    if(kind==='photo')return open('Photo principale','Nouvelle consigne','<div class="v66-field"><label>Photo principale</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" data-v66-file="consigneMain"></div>'+photoGrid(d.mainPhotos||[],'consigneMain'),bindFiles);
    if(kind==='objectif')return open('Objectif','Nouvelle consigne',area('Objectif','objectif',d.objectif||''),function(r){bindPaths(r,d);});
    if(kind==='retain')return open('À retenir','Nouvelle consigne',lineArea('À retenir','retenir',d.retenir),function(r){bindPaths(r,d);});
    if(kind==='step'){var st=d.steps[index]||(d.steps[index]={title:'',text:'',warning:'',photos:[]});return open('Étape '+(index+1),'Nouvelle consigne',field('Titre','steps.'+index+'.title',st.title)+area('Texte','steps.'+index+'.text',st.text)+area('Alerte / point rouge','steps.'+index+'.warning',st.warning)+'<div class="v66-field"><label>Photo(s)</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple data-v66-file="consigneStep:'+index+'"></div>'+photoGrid(st.photos||[],'consigneStep:'+index)+'<div class="v66-actions"><button class="v66-btn yellow" data-v66-add-step="'+index+'">+ Ajouter une étape après</button><button class="v66-btn danger" data-v66-del-step="'+index+'">Supprimer cette étape</button></div>',function(r){bindPaths(r,d);bindFiles(r);});}
    if(kind==='security')return open('Encart sécurité','Nouvelle consigne',lineArea('Risques identifiés','safetyRisks',d.safetyRisks)+lineArea('EPI spécifiques','epi',d.epi)+'<div class="v66-actions"><button class="v66-btn danger" data-v66-card-off="security">Retirer cet encart</button></div>',function(r){e.security=true;bindPaths(r,d);});
    if(kind==='keypoints')return open('Encart points clés','Nouvelle consigne',lineArea('Points clés','keyPoints',d.keyPoints)+'<div class="v66-actions"><button class="v66-btn danger" data-v66-card-off="keypoints">Retirer cet encart</button></div>',function(r){e.keypoints=true;bindPaths(r,d);});
    if(kind==='quality')return open('Encart contrôle qualité','Nouvelle consigne',lineArea('Contrôles qualité','qualityChecks',d.qualityChecks)+'<div class="v66-actions"><button class="v66-btn danger" data-v66-card-off="quality">Retirer cet encart</button></div>',function(r){e.quality=true;bindPaths(r,d);});
    if(kind==='special')return open('Encart cas particuliers','Nouvelle consigne',field('Titre','specialTitle',d.specialTitle)+area('Texte','specialText',d.specialText)+'<div class="v66-field"><label>Image</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" data-v66-file="consigneSpecial"></div>'+photoGrid(d.specialImage?[d.specialImage]:[],'consigneSpecial')+'<div class="v66-actions"><button class="v66-btn danger" data-v66-card-off="special">Retirer cet encart</button></div>',function(r){e.special=true;bindPaths(r,d);bindFiles(r);});
    if(kind==='footer')return open('En cas de doute / encarts','Nouvelle consigne',area('Texte du pied de page','doubtText',d.doubtText)+'<div class="v66-field"><label>Encarts à afficher</label><div class="v66-checks">'+[['security','Sécurité / EPI'],['keypoints','Points clés'],['quality','Contrôle qualité'],['special','Cas particuliers']].map(function(x){return '<label class="v66-check"><input type="checkbox" data-v66-toggle-card="'+x[0]+'" '+(e[x[0]]?'checked':'')+'><span>'+x[1]+'</span></label>';}).join('')+'</div></div>',function(r){bindPaths(r,d);});
  }

  function openMaintenance(kind,index){var d=state.maintenance||maintenanceStarter();if(!Array.isArray(d.rows)||!d.rows.length)d.rows=[{number:'01',title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustrations:[]}];index=Number(index||0);
    if(kind==='maint-header')return open('En-tête','Maintenance 1er niveau','<div class="v66-grid2">'+field('Titre principal','title',d.title)+field('Machine','machine',d.machine)+'</div>'+field('Sous-titre','subtitle',d.subtitle)+'<div class="v66-grid3">'+field('Secteur','secteur',d.secteur)+field('Poste','poste',d.poste)+field('Durée','duree',d.duree)+'</div>',function(r){bindPaths(r,d);});
    if(kind==='maint-machine')return open('Image machine','Maintenance 1er niveau','<div class="v66-field"><label>Image machine</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" data-v66-file="maintMachine"></div>'+photoGrid(d.machineImage?[d.machineImage]:[],'maintMachine'),bindFiles);
    if(kind==='maint-safety')return open('Bandeau sécurité / EPI','Maintenance 1er niveau',field('Bandeau sécurité','footer',d.footer)+area('Phrase sécurité','slogan',d.slogan)+'<div class="v66-field"><label>Pictos EPI</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple data-v66-file="maintEpi"></div>'+photoGrid(d.epiImages||[],'maintEpi'),function(r){bindPaths(r,d);bindFiles(r);});
    if(kind==='maint-row'){var row=d.rows[index]||(d.rows[index]={number:String(index+1).padStart(2,'0'),title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustrations:[]});return open('Contrôle '+(index+1),'Maintenance 1er niveau','<div class="v66-grid2">'+field('N°','rows.'+index+'.number',row.number)+field('Titre du contrôle','rows.'+index+'.title',row.title)+'</div>'+area('Contrôles à effectuer','rows.'+index+'.controls',row.controls)+area('Pourquoi','rows.'+index+'.why',row.why)+area('Risque','rows.'+index+'.risk',row.risk)+'<div class="v66-field"><label>Illustration(s)</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple data-v66-file="maintRow:'+index+'"></div>'+photoGrid(row.illustrations||[],'maintRow:'+index)+'<div class="v66-actions"><button class="v66-btn yellow" data-v66-add-maint="'+index+'">+ Ajouter un contrôle après</button><button class="v66-btn danger" data-v66-del-maint="'+index+'">Supprimer ce contrôle</button></div>',function(r){bindPaths(r,d);bindFiles(r);});}
  }

  function symptomSelectHtml(i,s){var options=diagLib().map(function(x){var selected=(s.type===x[1] || (!s.type&&s.label===x[1]));return '<option value="'+esc(x[1])+'" '+(selected?'selected':'')+'>'+esc(x[1])+'</option>';}).join('');return '<div class="v66-grid2"><div class="v66-field"><label>Libellé</label><select data-v66-symptom-select="'+i+'">'+options+'</select></div><div class="v66-field"><label>Icône associée</label><input value="'+esc(s.icon||'!')+'" readonly></div></div>'+(s.type==='Autre'?field('Libellé personnalisé','symptoms.'+i+'.label',s.label||''):'');}
  function openDiagnostic(kind,index){var d=window.ensureDiagnostic60();index=Number(index||0);
    if(kind==='diag-header')return open('En-tête','Aide au diagnostic','<div class="v66-grid2">'+field('Titre','title',d.title)+field('Sous-titre','subtitle',d.subtitle)+'</div><div class="v66-grid2">'+field('Secteur','sector',d.sector)+field('Machine','machine',d.machine)+'</div><div class="v66-grid2">'+field('Rédacteur','author',d.author)+field('Date','date',d.date,'date')+'</div>',function(r){bindPaths(r,d);});
    if(kind==='diag-symptom'){var s=d.symptoms[index]||(d.symptoms[index]={type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]});return open('Symptôme '+(index+1),'Aide au diagnostic',symptomSelectHtml(index,s)+'<div class="v66-field"><label>Photo(s) du défaut</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple data-v66-file="diagSymptom:'+index+'"></div>'+photoGrid(s.photos||[],'diagSymptom:'+index)+'<div class="v66-actions"><button class="v66-btn yellow" data-v66-add-symptom="'+index+'">+ Ajouter un symptôme après</button><button class="v66-btn danger" data-v66-del-symptom="'+index+'">Supprimer ce symptôme</button></div>',function(r){bindPaths(r,d);bindFiles(r);});}
    if(kind==='diag-cause')return open('Cause / criticité','Aide au diagnostic',field('Cause probable','causeTitle',d.causeTitle)+'<div class="v66-grid3">'+select('Gravité','gravity',d.gravity,['Faible','Moyenne','Élevée','Critique'])+select('Fréquence','frequency',d.frequency,['Rare','Occasionnelle','Fréquente','Permanente'])+select('Impact','impact',d.impact,['Mineur','Qualité','Production','Sécurité','Arrêt machine'])+'</div>',function(r){bindPaths(r,d);});
    if(kind==='diag-step'){var st=d.steps[index]||(d.steps[index]={title:'',photos:[],why:'',question:'',ifYes:'Passer au contrôle suivant.',ifNo:''});return open('Étape diagnostic '+(index+1),'Aide au diagnostic',field('Action / contrôle','steps.'+index+'.title',st.title)+area('Pourquoi ?','steps.'+index+'.why',st.why)+area('Question de validation','steps.'+index+'.question',st.question)+'<div class="v66-grid2">'+area('Si OUI','steps.'+index+'.ifYes',st.ifYes)+area('Si NON / action corrective','steps.'+index+'.ifNo',st.ifNo)+'</div><div class="v66-field"><label>Photo(s)</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple data-v66-file="diagStep:'+index+'"></div>'+photoGrid(st.photos||[],'diagStep:'+index)+'<div class="v66-actions"><button class="v66-btn yellow" data-v66-add-diagstep="'+index+'">+ Ajouter une étape après</button><button class="v66-btn danger" data-v66-del-diagstep="'+index+'">Supprimer cette étape</button></div>',function(r){bindPaths(r,d);bindFiles(r);});}
    if(kind==='diag-bottom')return open('Escalade / sécurité','Aide au diagnostic','<div class="v66-grid3">'+field('Service','service',d.service)+field('Téléphone / poste','phone',d.phone)+field('Priorité','priority',d.priority)+'</div>'+field('Titre sécurité','safetyTitle',d.safetyTitle)+area('Texte sécurité','safetyText',d.safetyText),function(r){bindPaths(r,d);});
  }
  function bindFiles(root){root=root||$('#v66Body');$$('[data-v66-file]',root).forEach(function(inp){inp.addEventListener('change',async function(){var cmd=inp.dataset.v66File,files=Array.from(inp.files||[]);if(!files.length)return;await addFiles(cmd,files);inp.value='';commit();close();setTimeout(function(){openKindAgain(cmd);},60);});});}
  async function addFiles(cmd,files){var d,i;if(cmd==='consigneMain'){d=window.ensureConsigneV4();d.mainPhotos=[{src:await readFile(files[0]),caption:''}];d.machinePhoto=d.mainPhotos[0].src;}
    else if(cmd==='consigneSpecial'){d=window.ensureConsigneV4();d.specialImage=await readFile(files[0]);d.ncCardEnabled.special=true;}
    else if(cmd.indexOf('consigneStep:')===0){d=window.ensureConsigneV4();i=Number(cmd.split(':')[1]);if(!d.steps[i])d.steps[i]={title:'',text:'',warning:'',photos:[]};if(!Array.isArray(d.steps[i].photos))d.steps[i].photos=[];for(var f of files)d.steps[i].photos.push(await readFile(f));d.steps[i].photo=d.steps[i].photos[0]||'';}
    else if(cmd==='maintMachine'){state.maintenance.machineImage=await readFile(files[0]);}
    else if(cmd==='maintEpi'){if(!Array.isArray(state.maintenance.epiImages))state.maintenance.epiImages=[];for(var f2 of files)state.maintenance.epiImages.push(await readFile(f2));}
    else if(cmd.indexOf('maintRow:')===0){i=Number(cmd.split(':')[1]);var r=state.maintenance.rows[i];if(!Array.isArray(r.illustrations))r.illustrations=[];for(var f3 of files)r.illustrations.push({src:await readFile(f3),w:100});}
    else if(cmd.indexOf('diagSymptom:')===0){d=window.ensureDiagnostic60();i=Number(cmd.split(':')[1]);if(!Array.isArray(d.symptoms[i].photos))d.symptoms[i].photos=[];for(var f4 of files)d.symptoms[i].photos.push(await readFile(f4));}
    else if(cmd.indexOf('diagStep:')===0){d=window.ensureDiagnostic60();i=Number(cmd.split(':')[1]);if(!Array.isArray(d.steps[i].photos))d.steps[i].photos=[];for(var f5 of files)d.steps[i].photos.push(await readFile(f5));}}
  function openKindAgain(cmd){if(cmd==='consigneMain')openConsigne('photo',0);else if(cmd==='consigneSpecial')openConsigne('special',0);else if(cmd.indexOf('consigneStep:')===0)openConsigne('step',Number(cmd.split(':')[1]));else if(cmd==='maintMachine')openMaintenance('maint-machine',0);else if(cmd==='maintEpi')openMaintenance('maint-safety',0);else if(cmd.indexOf('maintRow:')===0)openMaintenance('maint-row',Number(cmd.split(':')[1]));else if(cmd.indexOf('diagSymptom:')===0)openDiagnostic('diag-symptom',Number(cmd.split(':')[1]));else if(cmd.indexOf('diagStep:')===0)openDiagnostic('diag-step',Number(cmd.split(':')[1]));}

  document.addEventListener('click',function(ev){var root=$('#v66Body');if(!root)return;var t=ev.target;if(t.closest('[data-v66-photo-remove]')){ev.preventDefault();removePhoto(t.closest('[data-v66-photo-remove]').dataset.v66PhotoRemove);return;}var off=t.closest('[data-v66-card-off]');if(off){ev.preventDefault();var d=window.ensureConsigneV4();d.ncCardEnabled[off.dataset.v66CardOff]=false;commit();close();return;}var addStep=t.closest('[data-v66-add-step]');if(addStep){ev.preventDefault();var d1=window.ensureConsigneV4(),i=Number(addStep.dataset.v66AddStep);d1.steps.splice(i+1,0,{title:'',text:'',photo:'',photos:[],warning:''});commit();close();setTimeout(function(){openConsigne('step',i+1);},50);return;}var delStep=t.closest('[data-v66-del-step]');if(delStep){ev.preventDefault();var d2=window.ensureConsigneV4(),j=Number(delStep.dataset.v66DelStep);if(confirm('Supprimer cette étape ?')){d2.steps.splice(j,1);if(!d2.steps.length)d2.steps.push({title:'',text:'',photo:'',photos:[],warning:''});commit();close();}return;}var addM=t.closest('[data-v66-add-maint]');if(addM){ev.preventDefault();var iM=Number(addM.dataset.v66AddMaint),dm=state.maintenance;dm.rows.splice(iM+1,0,{number:String(iM+2).padStart(2,'0'),title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustrations:[]});commit();close();setTimeout(function(){openMaintenance('maint-row',iM+1);},50);return;}var delM=t.closest('[data-v66-del-maint]');if(delM){ev.preventDefault();var jM=Number(delM.dataset.v66DelMaint),dm2=state.maintenance;if(confirm('Supprimer ce contrôle ?')){dm2.rows.splice(jM,1);if(!dm2.rows.length)dm2.rows.push({number:'01',title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustrations:[]});commit();close();}return;}var addS=t.closest('[data-v66-add-symptom]');if(addS){ev.preventDefault();var dd=window.ensureDiagnostic60(),is=Number(addS.dataset.v66AddSymptom);dd.symptoms.splice(is+1,0,{type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]});commit();close();setTimeout(function(){openDiagnostic('diag-symptom',is+1);},50);return;}var delS=t.closest('[data-v66-del-symptom]');if(delS){ev.preventDefault();var ds=window.ensureDiagnostic60(),js=Number(delS.dataset.v66DelSymptom);if(confirm('Supprimer ce symptôme ?')){ds.symptoms.splice(js,1);if(!ds.symptoms.length)ds.symptoms.push({type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]});commit();close();}return;}var addD=t.closest('[data-v66-add-diagstep]');if(addD){ev.preventDefault();var dg=window.ensureDiagnostic60(),id=Number(addD.dataset.v66AddDiagstep);dg.steps.splice(id+1,0,{title:'',photos:[],why:'',question:'',ifYes:'Passer au contrôle suivant.',ifNo:''});commit();close();setTimeout(function(){openDiagnostic('diag-step',id+1);},50);return;}var delD=t.closest('[data-v66-del-diagstep]');if(delD){ev.preventDefault();var dgg=window.ensureDiagnostic60(),jd=Number(delD.dataset.v66DelDiagstep);if(confirm('Supprimer cette étape ?')){dgg.steps.splice(jd,1);if(!dgg.steps.length)dgg.steps.push({title:'',photos:[],why:'',question:'',ifYes:'Passer au contrôle suivant.',ifNo:''});commit();close();}return;}var tog=t.closest('[data-v66-toggle-card]');if(tog){var dc=window.ensureConsigneV4();dc.ncCardEnabled[tog.dataset.v66ToggleCard]=tog.checked;commit();return;}var sym=t.closest('[data-v66-symptom-select]');if(sym){var di=window.ensureDiagnostic60(),si=Number(sym.dataset.v66SymptomSelect),val=sym.value,ss=di.symptoms[si];ss.type=val;if(val==='Autre'){ss.icon='!';ss.label='';}else{ss.icon=window.diag60PickIcon(val);ss.label=val;}commit();openDiagnostic('diag-symptom',si);return;}},true);

  function retagPreview(){
    var host=$('#previewHost');if(!host)return;var a=active();
    if(a==='consigne'){
      $$('.nc-card[data-v66-card]',host).forEach(function(card){var k=card.dataset.v66Card;card.classList.add('v47-zone');card.setAttribute('data-v47-kind',k==='keypoints'?'keypoints':k==='quality'?'quality':k==='special'?'special':'security');card.setAttribute('data-v47-label','Encart');});
      var foot=$('.nc-footer',host);if(foot){foot.classList.add('v47-zone');foot.setAttribute('data-v47-kind','footer');foot.setAttribute('data-v47-label','En cas de doute / encarts');}
    }
    if(a==='maintenance'){$$('.maint-v2-table tbody tr',host).forEach(function(tr,i){tr.classList.add('v47-zone');tr.setAttribute('data-v47-kind','maint-row');tr.setAttribute('data-v47-index',String(i));});}
    if(a==='diagnostic'){$$('.diag60-symptom',host).forEach(function(el,i){el.classList.add('v47-zone');el.setAttribute('data-v47-kind','diag-symptom');el.setAttribute('data-v47-index',String(i));});$$('.diag60-step',host).forEach(function(el,i){el.classList.add('v47-zone');el.setAttribute('data-v47-kind','diag-step');el.setAttribute('data-v47-index',String(i));});}
  }
  window.addEventListener('click',function(ev){var host=$('#previewHost');if(!host||!host.contains(ev.target))return;var z=ev.target.closest('.v47-zone,[data-v47-kind]');if(!z||!host.contains(z))return;var mod=active(),kind=z.getAttribute('data-v47-kind'),idx=Number(z.getAttribute('data-v47-index')||0);if(mod==='fiche'||mod==='securite')return;ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();if(mod==='consigne')openConsigne(kind,idx);else if(mod==='maintenance')openMaintenance(kind,idx);else if(mod==='diagnostic')openDiagnostic(kind,idx);},true);

  function boot(){normalizeStarterIfDemo();safe(function(){updatePreview();});setTimeout(retagPreview,80);setTimeout(retagPreview,600);} 
  if(document.readyState==='loading')document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot);else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(boot,120);});
  if(window.MutationObserver){new MutationObserver(function(){setTimeout(function(){normalizeStarterIfDemo();retagPreview();},40);}).observe(document.body,{attributes:true,attributeFilter:['class']});var ph=$('#previewHost');if(ph)new MutationObserver(function(){setTimeout(retagPreview,30);}).observe(ph,{childList:true,subtree:true});}
})();
</script>

<script id="v68-targeted-fixes-script">
(function(){
  if(window.__LABODOC_V68_TARGETED__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V68_TARGETED__ = true;

  var HARD_PIN='1234';
  var PIN_KEY='labodoc_v59_support_pin';
  function qs(s,r){return (r||document).querySelector(s)}
  function qsa(s,r){return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s))}
  function safe(fn,fb){try{return fn()}catch(e){console.warn('[V68]',e);return fb}}
  function esc(v){return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/[<>&"]/g,function(c){return {'<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','&':'&amp;','"':'&quot;'}[c]})}
  function br(v){return esc(v||'').split(/\n+/).filter(Boolean).join('<br>')}
  function lines(v){return String(v||'').split(/\n+/).map(function(x){return x.trim()}).filter(Boolean)}
  function ul(arr){return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).filter(Boolean).map(function(x){return '<li>'+esc(x)+'</li>'}).join('')}
  function active(){return safe(function(){return state.active},'consigne')}
  function commit(){safe(function(){persist()});safe(function(){updatePreview()});setTimeout(tagSecurityBottom,30)}
  function readFile(file){return new Promise(function(resolve,reject){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(){resolve(r.result)};r.onerror=reject;r.readAsDataURL(file)})}

  function enforceHardPin(){
    safe(function(){localStorage.setItem(PIN_KEY,HARD_PIN)});
    qsa('[data-v59-change-pin]').forEach(function(b){b.style.display='none';b.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');b.tabIndex=-1});
    var inp=qs('#v59PinInput'); if(inp) inp.setAttribute('placeholder','0000');
  }
  window.addEventListener('click',function(ev){
    if(ev.target && ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('[data-v59-change-pin]')){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();enforceHardPin();}
  },true);

  function modal(){
    var b=qs('#v68Backdrop');
    if(!b){
      b=document.createElement('div'); b.id='v68Backdrop'; b.className='v68-modal-backdrop';
      b.innerHTML='<div class="v68-modal"><div class="v68-head"><div><b id="v68Title">Modifier</b><small id="v68Sub">Modification directe depuis l’aperçu</small></div><button type="button" class="v68-close" data-v68-close>Fermer</button></div><div class="v68-body" id="v68Body"></div><div class="v68-foot"><span>Les changements alimentent l’aperçu directement.</span><button type="button" data-v68-close>OK</button></div></div>';
      document.body.appendChild(b);
      b.addEventListener('click',function(ev){if(ev.target===b || ev.target.closest('[data-v68-close]')) closeModal()},true);
    }
    return b;
  }
  function openModal(title,sub,body,bind){
    var b=modal(); qs('#v68Title').textContent=title; qs('#v68Sub').textContent=sub||'Modification directe depuis l’aperçu'; qs('#v68Body').innerHTML=body; b.classList.add('open'); if(bind) bind(qs('#v68Body')); var first=qs('#v68Body input,#v68Body textarea,#v68Body select,#v68Body button'); if(first) setTimeout(function(){first.focus()},40);
  }
  function closeModal(){var b=qs('#v68Backdrop'); if(b)b.classList.remove('open'); commit()}
  function field(label,val,attr){return '<div class="v68-field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><input type="'+(attr&&attr.type||'text')+'" '+(attr&&attr.name?'data-v68-field="'+esc(attr.name)+'"':'')+' value="'+esc(val||'')+'"></div>'}
  function area(label,val,attr){return '<div class="v68-field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><textarea '+(attr&&attr.name?'data-v68-field="'+esc(attr.name)+'"':'')+'>'+esc(val||'')+'</textarea></div>'}
  function check(name,label,on){return '<label class="v68-check"><input type="checkbox" data-v68-check="'+esc(name)+'" '+(on?'checked':'')+'><span>'+esc(label)+'</span></label>'}
  function bindObj(root,obj){qsa('[data-v68-field]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){obj[el.getAttribute('data-v68-field')]=el.value;commit()},false);el.addEventListener('change',function(){obj[el.getAttribute('data-v68-field')]=el.value;commit()},false)})}
  function photoGrid(arr,cmd){arr=arr||[];return '<div class="v68-photos">'+(arr.length?arr.map(function(ph,i){return '<div class="v68-photo"><img src="'+(typeof ph==='string'?ph:ph.src||'')+'"><button type="button" class="v68-btn danger" data-v68-photo-remove="'+esc(cmd)+':'+i+'">Suppr.</button></div>'}).join(''):'<div class="v68-note">Aucune image pour le moment.</div>')+'</div>'}

  // Nouvelle consigne : restaurer des accès directs solides à Objectif, À retenir, et encarts bas de page.
  function ensureConsigne(){return safe(function(){return window.ensureConsigneV4 ? window.ensureConsigneV4() : state.consigne},state.consigne||{})}
  function openConsigneObjectif(){var d=ensureConsigne(); openModal('Objectif','Nouvelle consigne',area('Objectif',d.objectif||'',{name:'objectif'}),function(r){bindObj(r,d)})}
  function openConsigneRetain(){var d=ensureConsigne(); openModal('À retenir','Nouvelle consigne','<div class="v68-field"><label>À retenir</label><textarea data-v68-lines="retenir">'+esc((d.retenir||[]).join('\n'))+'</textarea></div>',function(r){var t=qs('[data-v68-lines="retenir"]',r); if(t)t.addEventListener('input',function(){d.retenir=lines(t.value);commit()},false)})}
  function openConsigneFooter(){
    var d=ensureConsigne(); d.ncCardEnabled=d.ncCardEnabled||{};
    openModal('En cas de doute / encarts','Nouvelle consigne',area('Texte du pied de page',d.doubtText||'',{name:'doubtText'})+'<div><div class="v68-label" style="margin-bottom:8px">Encarts à afficher / masquer</div><div class="v68-checks">'+[
      ['security','Sécurité / EPI'],['keypoints','Points clés'],['quality','Contrôle qualité'],['special','Cas particuliers']
    ].map(function(x){return check(x[0],x[1],!!d.ncCardEnabled[x[0]])}).join('')+'</div></div>',function(r){
      bindObj(r,d);
      qsa('[data-v68-check]',r).forEach(function(c){c.addEventListener('change',function(){d.ncCardEnabled[c.getAttribute('data-v68-check')]=!!c.checked;commit()},false)})
    })
  }

  // Aide au diagnostic : remplacer la modale du symptôme par une version stable, sans champ Type.
  function diagLib(){
    return (window.diag60Lib ? window.diag60Lib() : [['⚠️','Pièce trop courte'],['⚙️','Blocage machine'],['💧','Défaut étanchéité'],['📏','Cote incorrecte'],['🔊','Bruit anormal'],['🚫','Cycle impossible'],['!','Autre']]);
  }
  function pickIcon(label){var f=diagLib().find(function(x){return x[1]===label});return f?f[0]:'!'}
  function ensureDiag(){return safe(function(){return window.ensureDiagnostic60 ? window.ensureDiagnostic60() : state.diagnostic},state.diagnostic||{})}
  function openDiagSymptom(index){
    var d=ensureDiag(); index=Number(index||0); if(!Array.isArray(d.symptoms)) d.symptoms=[]; var s=d.symptoms[index]||(d.symptoms[index]={type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]}); if(!Array.isArray(s.photos))s.photos=[];
    var current=s.type||s.label||'Autre'; if(!diagLib().some(function(x){return x[1]===current})) current='Autre';
    var opts=diagLib().map(function(x){return '<option value="'+esc(x[1])+'" '+(current===x[1]?'selected':'')+'>'+esc(x[1])+'</option>'}).join('');
    var custom=(current==='Autre')?field('Libellé personnalisé',s.label||'',{name:'customLabel'}):'';
    openModal('Symptôme '+(index+1),'Aide au diagnostic','<div class="v68-grid2"><div class="v68-field"><label>Libellé</label><select data-v68-diag-select="'+index+'">'+opts+'</select></div><div class="v68-field"><label>Icône associée</label><input data-v68-diag-icon readonly value="'+esc(current==='Autre'?'!':pickIcon(current))+'"></div></div><div id="v68DiagCustom">'+custom+'</div><div class="v68-field"><label>Photo(s) du défaut</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple data-v68-diag-file="'+index+'"></div>'+photoGrid(s.photos,'diagSymptom:'+index)+'<div class="v68-actions"><button type="button" class="v68-btn yellow" data-v68-add-symptom="'+index+'">+ Ajouter un symptôme après</button><button type="button" class="v68-btn danger" data-v68-del-symptom="'+index+'">Supprimer ce symptôme</button></div>',function(root){
      var sel=qs('[data-v68-diag-select]',root), customBox=qs('#v68DiagCustom',root), icon=qs('[data-v68-diag-icon]',root);
      if(sel) sel.addEventListener('change',function(){
        var val=sel.value; s.type=val;
        if(val==='Autre'){s.icon='!'; s.label=''; if(icon)icon.value='!'; if(customBox)customBox.innerHTML=field('Libellé personnalisé','',{name:'customLabel'}); var inp=qs('[data-v68-field="customLabel"]',customBox); if(inp) inp.addEventListener('input',function(){s.label=inp.value;s.icon='!';commit()},false)}
        else{s.icon=pickIcon(val); s.label=val; if(icon)icon.value=s.icon; if(customBox)customBox.innerHTML='';}
        commit();
      },false);
      var inp=qs('[data-v68-field="customLabel"]',root); if(inp) inp.addEventListener('input',function(){s.label=inp.value;s.icon='!';commit()},false);
      var file=qs('[data-v68-diag-file]',root); if(file) file.addEventListener('change',async function(){var fs=Array.from(file.files||[]); for(var i=0;i<fs.length;i++)s.photos.push(await readFile(fs[i])); file.value=''; commit(); openDiagSymptom(index)},false);
      qsa('[data-v68-photo-remove]',root).forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.preventDefault(); var parts=b.getAttribute('data-v68-photo-remove').split(':'); var pos=Number(parts[2]); s.photos.splice(pos,1); commit(); openDiagSymptom(index)},false)});
      var add=qs('[data-v68-add-symptom]',root); if(add)add.addEventListener('click',function(){d.symptoms.splice(index+1,0,{type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]});commit();openDiagSymptom(index+1)},false);
      var del=qs('[data-v68-del-symptom]',root); if(del)del.addEventListener('click',function(){if(confirm('Supprimer ce symptôme ?')){d.symptoms.splice(index,1); if(!d.symptoms.length)d.symptoms.push({type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]}); commit(); closeModal()}},false);
    })
  }

  // Consigne sécurité : ajouter/retirer les trois encarts de bas de page.
  var oldEnsureSec = window.ensureSecurityData || (typeof ensureSecurityData==='function'?ensureSecurityData:null);
  window.ensureSecurityData=function(){
    var d=oldEnsureSec?oldEnsureSec():(state.securite||(state.securite={}));
    if(!d.bottomEnabled)d.bottomEnabled={incident:true,accident:true,deja:true};
    if(d.incident==null)d.incident=['Stopper immédiatement la machine','Alerter le responsable','Ne pas redémarrer sans validation','Appliquer les premiers secours si nécessaire'];
    if(d.accidentText==null)d.accidentText='PRÉVENIR IMMÉDIATEMENT'; if(d.emergencyNumber==null)d.emergencyNumber='112'; if(d.dejaTitle==null)d.dejaTitle='DÉJÀ ARRIVÉ !'; if(d.dejaText==null)d.dejaText='Accident / presqu’accident déjà constaté dans l’atelier';
    return d;
  };
  try{ensureSecurityData=window.ensureSecurityData}catch(e){}
  function labelPicto(x){return safe(function(){return typeof pictoLabel==='function'?pictoLabel(x):x},x)}
  function secLines(items,cls){return '<ul class="'+(cls||'')+'">'+ul(items)+'</ul>'}
  function secRiskLines(items){return '<ul>'+((Array.isArray(items)?items:[]).filter(Boolean).map(function(x){var src=safe(function(){return state.pictos&&state.pictos[x]},'');return '<li>'+(src?'<img src="'+src+'" style="width:18px;height:18px;object-fit:contain;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;margin-right:5px">':'')+esc(labelPicto(x))+'</li>'}).join(''))+'</ul>'}
  function secEpiIconLocal(name){return safe(function(){return secEpiIcon(name)},'●')}
  window.previewSecurite=function(){
    var d=window.ensureSecurityData(); var logo=safe(function(){return getLogoForTab('securite')},''); var dateTxt=d.date?new Date(d.date+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'):''; var bottom=[];
    if(d.bottomEnabled.incident) bottom.push('<div class="sec-box sec-incident"><div class="sec-box-head sec-head-green">✚ Conduite à tenir</div><div class="sec-box-body"><ol>'+ul(d.incident)+'</ol></div></div>');
    if(d.bottomEnabled.accident) bottom.push('<div class="sec-box sec-accident"><div class="sec-box-head sec-head-red">☎ En cas d’accident</div><div class="sec-box-body">'+esc(d.accidentText)+'<div class="sec-phone">'+esc(d.emergencyNumber)+'</div></div></div>');
    if(d.bottomEnabled.deja) bottom.push('<div class="sec-box sec-deja"><div class="sec-box-head sec-head-black">⚠ '+esc(d.dejaTitle)+'</div><div class="sec-box-body">'+esc(d.dejaText)+'</div></div>');
    var bottomHtml=bottom.length?bottom.join(''):'<div class="v68-empty-bottom">+ Ajouter un encart bas de page</div>'; var bottomCols=Math.max(1,bottom.length||1);
    return '<div class="sec-a4"><div class="sec-top"><div class="sec-logo"><div class="sec-logo-inner">'+(logo?'<img src="'+logo+'">':'<div class="sec-logo-fallback">LOGO<br>ENTREPRISE</div>')+'</div></div><div class="sec-title"><h1>'+esc(d.title)+'</h1><div>'+esc(d.subtitle)+'</div></div><div class="sec-date"><b>DATE :</b><div class="line">'+esc(dateTxt)+'</div><b>RÉDIGÉ PAR :</b><div class="line">'+esc(d.author||'')+'</div></div></div><div class="sec-meta"><div class="sec-meta-card"><div class="sec-meta-ico">📍</div><div><b>Localisation</b><span>'+esc(d.localisation)+'</span></div></div></div><div class="sec-main"><div class="sec-danger"><div class="sec-danger-head">📷 <div>'+esc(d.dangerTitle)+'<br><span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:800;text-transform:none">'+esc(d.dangerSubtitle)+'</span></div></div><div class="sec-danger-photo">'+((d.photos&&d.photos.length)?'<div class="sec-preview-photo-grid">'+d.photos.map(function(ph){return '<div class="sec-preview-photo-cell"><img src="'+ph+'"></div>'}).join('')+'</div>':'<div class="sec-photo-placeholder">Photo / zone dangereuse</div>')+'</div></div><div class="sec-side">'+((d.cards||[]).map(function(c){var head=c.type==='never'?'sec-head-red':c.type==='mandatory'?'sec-head-blue':'sec-head-yellow';var icon=c.type==='never'?'⛔':c.type==='mandatory'?'✅':'⚠';var cls=c.type==='never'?'sec-x':c.type==='mandatory'?'sec-ok':'';return '<div class="sec-box"><div class="sec-box-head '+head+'">'+icon+' '+esc(c.title||'')+'</div><div class="sec-box-body">'+(c.type==='risks'?secRiskLines(c.items):secLines(c.items,cls))+'</div></div>'}).join(''))+'</div></div><div class="sec-epi"><div class="sec-epi-title">EPI<br>spécifiques</div><div class="sec-epi-items">'+((d.epi||[]).filter(Boolean).map(function(x){var src=safe(function(){return state.pictos&&state.pictos[x]},'');return '<div class="sec-epi-item"><div class="sec-epi-icon">'+(src?'<img src="'+src+'">':secEpiIconLocal(x))+'</div>'+esc(labelPicto(x))+'</div>'}).join(''))+'</div></div><div class="sec-bottom" data-v68-bottom="1" style="grid-template-columns:repeat('+bottomCols+',minmax(0,1fr))">'+bottomHtml+'</div><div class="sec-footer">⚠ '+esc(d.footer)+' ⚠</div></div>'
  };
  try{previewSecurite=window.previewSecurite}catch(e){}
  function tagSecurityBottom(){var host=qs('#previewHost'); if(!host||active()!=='securite')return; var b=qs('.sec-bottom',host); if(b){b.setAttribute('data-v68-bottom','1'); b.classList.add('v47-zone'); b.setAttribute('data-v47-kind','sec-bottom'); b.setAttribute('data-v47-label','Encarts bas de page')}}
  function openSecurityBottom(){
    var d=window.ensureSecurityData();
    openModal('Encarts bas de page','Consigne sécurité','<div class="v68-note">Décoche un encart pour le retirer de la preview. Recoche-le pour l’ajouter.</div><div class="v68-checks">'+check('incident','Conduite à tenir',!!d.bottomEnabled.incident)+check('accident','En cas d’accident',!!d.bottomEnabled.accident)+check('deja','Déjà arrivé',!!d.bottomEnabled.deja)+'</div><div class="v68-grid2">'+area('Conduite à tenir',Array.isArray(d.incident)?d.incident.join('\n'):d.incident,{name:'incidentLines'})+('<div>'+field('Texte accident / urgence',d.accidentText,{name:'accidentText'})+field('Numéro urgence',d.emergencyNumber,{name:'emergencyNumber'})+'</div>')+'</div>'+field('Titre déjà arrivé',d.dejaTitle,{name:'dejaTitle'})+area('Texte déjà arrivé',d.dejaText,{name:'dejaText'}),function(root){
      qsa('[data-v68-check]',root).forEach(function(c){c.addEventListener('change',function(){d.bottomEnabled[c.getAttribute('data-v68-check')]=!!c.checked;commit()},false)});
      qsa('[data-v68-field]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){var k=el.getAttribute('data-v68-field'); if(k==='incidentLines')d.incident=lines(el.value); else d[k]=el.value; commit()},false)})
    })
  }

  // Capture avant les vieux listeners document : uniquement nos cas problématiques.
  window.addEventListener('click',function(ev){
    var host=qs('#previewHost'); if(!host||!host.contains(ev.target))return; var a=active();
    if(a==='diagnostic'){
      var sy=ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('.diag60-symptom');
      if(sy&&host.contains(sy)){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();openDiagSymptom(Number(sy.getAttribute('data-v47-index')||qsa('.diag60-symptom',host).indexOf(sy)||0));return;}
    }
    if(a==='securite'){
      var bot=ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('.sec-bottom,.sec-incident,.sec-accident,.sec-deja,.v68-empty-bottom');
      if(bot&&host.contains(bot)){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();openSecurityBottom();return;}
    }
    if(a==='consigne'){
      var obj=ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('.nc-objectif');
      if(obj&&host.contains(obj)){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();openConsigneObjectif();return;}
      var ret=ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('.nc-retain');
      if(ret&&host.contains(ret)){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();openConsigneRetain();return;}
      var foot=ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('.nc-footer');
      if(foot&&host.contains(foot)){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();openConsigneFooter();return;}
    }
  },true);

  function boot(){enforceHardPin(); if(active()==='securite') safe(function(){updatePreview()}); setTimeout(tagSecurityBottom,80);}
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot); else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(boot,120)});
  if(window.MutationObserver){new MutationObserver(function(){enforceHardPin();setTimeout(tagSecurityBottom,30)}).observe(document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true});}
})();
</script>
