<script id="v69-corrections-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V69_CORRECTIONS__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V69_CORRECTIONS__ = true;

  var HARD_PIN='1234';
  var PIN_KEY='labodoc_v59_support_pin';
  function qs(s,r){return (r||document).querySelector(s);}
  function qsa(s,r){return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s));}
  function safe(fn,fb){try{return fn();}catch(e){console.warn('[V69]',e);return fb;}}
  function esc(v){return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/[<>&"]/g,function(c){return {'<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','&':'&amp;','"':'&quot;'}[c];});}
  function br(v){return esc(v||'').split(/\n+/).filter(Boolean).join('<br>');}
  function lines(v){return String(v||'').split(/\n+/).map(function(x){return x.trim();}).filter(Boolean);}
  function ul(arr){return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).filter(Boolean).map(function(x){return '<li>'+esc(x)+'</li>';}).join('');}
  function active(){return safe(function(){return state.active;},'consigne');}
  function commit(){safe(function(){persist();});safe(function(){updatePreview();});setTimeout(afterPreview,50);}
  function readFile(file){return new Promise(function(resolve,reject){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(){resolve(r.result);};r.onerror=reject;r.readAsDataURL(file);});}
  function consigne(){return safe(function(){return window.ensureConsigneV4 ? window.ensureConsigneV4() : state.consigne;},state.consigne||{});}

  function setHardPin(){
    safe(function(){localStorage.setItem(PIN_KEY,HARD_PIN);});
    qsa('[data-v59-change-pin]').forEach(function(b){b.style.display='none';b.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');b.tabIndex=-1;});
    var inp=qs('#v59PinInput'); if(inp){inp.setAttribute('placeholder','0000');}
  }

  /* Modale V69, isolée des anciennes modales. */
  function modal(){
    var b=qs('#v69Backdrop');
    if(!b){
      b=document.createElement('div'); b.id='v69Backdrop'; b.className='v69-modal-backdrop';
      b.innerHTML='<div class="v69-modal"><div class="v69-head"><div><b id="v69Title">Modifier</b><small id="v69Sub">Modification directe depuis l’aperçu</small></div><button type="button" class="v69-close" data-v69-close>Fermer</button></div><div class="v69-body" id="v69Body"></div><div class="v69-foot"><span>Les changements alimentent l’aperçu directement.</span><button type="button" data-v69-close>OK</button></div></div>';
      document.body.appendChild(b);
      b.addEventListener('click',function(ev){if(ev.target===b || ev.target.closest('[data-v69-close]')) closeModal();},true);
      b.addEventListener('keydown',function(ev){ev.stopPropagation();},true);
      b.addEventListener('keyup',function(ev){ev.stopPropagation();},true);
      b.addEventListener('keypress',function(ev){ev.stopPropagation();},true);
    }
    return b;
  }
  function openModal(title,sub,body,bind){var b=modal(); qs('#v69Title').textContent=title; qs('#v69Sub').textContent=sub||'Modification directe depuis l’aperçu'; qs('#v69Body').innerHTML=body; b.classList.add('open'); if(bind)bind(qs('#v69Body')); var first=qs('#v69Body input,#v69Body textarea,#v69Body select,#v69Body button'); if(first)setTimeout(function(){first.focus();},40);}
  function closeModal(){var b=qs('#v69Backdrop'); if(b)b.classList.remove('open'); commit();}
  function area(label,val,name){return '<div class="v69-field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><textarea data-v69-field="'+esc(name||'')+'">'+esc(val||'')+'</textarea></div>';}
  function field(label,val,name,type){return '<div class="v69-field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><input type="'+(type||'text')+'" data-v69-field="'+esc(name||'')+'" value="'+esc(val||'')+'"></div>';}
  function check(name,label,on){return '<label class="v69-check"><input type="checkbox" data-v69-check="'+esc(name)+'" '+(on?'checked':'')+'><span>'+esc(label)+'</span></label>';}
  function bindFields(root,obj){qsa('[data-v69-field]',root).forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('input',function(){obj[el.getAttribute('data-v69-field')]=el.value;commit();},false);el.addEventListener('change',function(){obj[el.getAttribute('data-v69-field')]=el.value;commit();},false);});}
  function photoGrid(arr,cmd){arr=arr||[];return '<div class="v69-photos">'+(arr.length?arr.map(function(ph,i){var src=typeof ph==='string'?ph:(ph&&ph.src)||'';return '<div class="v69-photo"><img src="'+src+'"><button type="button" class="v69-btn danger" data-v69-photo-remove="'+esc(cmd+':'+i)+'">Suppr.</button></div>';}).join(''):'<div class="v69-note">Aucune image pour le moment.</div>')+'</div>';}

  function ncStarter(){
    return {title:'',author:'',date:'',intro:'',footer:'SOYEZ INFORMÉ',posts:[],headerTitle:'INFO ATELIER',headerSubtitle:'INFORMER • STANDARDISER • SÉCURISER',displayTitle:'',subtitle:'',sector:'',poste:'',typeConsigne:'',level:'',tagLabel:'SOYEZ INFORMÉ',objectif:'',retainEnabled:false,retenir:[],mainPhotos:[],steps:[{title:'',text:'',photo:'',photos:[],warning:''}],safetyRisks:[],epi:[],keyPoints:[],qualityChecks:[],specialTitle:'CAS PARTICULIERS',specialText:'',specialImage:'',doubtText:'',ncCardEnabled:{security:false,keypoints:false,quality:false,special:false},_v69Starter:true};
  }
  function resetModel(id){
    if(!window.state) return;
    if(id==='consigne') state.consigne=ncStarter();
    else if(id==='maintenance') state.maintenance = (typeof window.makeMaintenanceDefault==='function') ? window.makeMaintenanceDefault() : {title:'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIVEAU',machine:'',subtitle:'CONTRÔLES DÉMARRAGE MACHINE',secteur:'',poste:'',duree:'',slogan:'',footer:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT !',machineImage:'',epiImages:[],rows:[{number:'01',title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustrations:[]}]};
    else if(id==='diagnostic') state.diagnostic = (typeof window.makeDiagnosticDefaultV59==='function') ? window.makeDiagnosticDefaultV59() : {title:'AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC',subtitle:"Identifier rapidement l’origine du problème",symptoms:[{type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]}],steps:[{title:'',photos:[],why:'',question:'',ifYes:'Passer au contrôle suivant.',ifNo:''}]};
    else if(id==='securite'){
      state.securite = (typeof makeSecurityDefault==='function') ? makeSecurityDefault() : (state.securite||{});
      if(state.securite) state.securite.bottomEnabled={incident:false,accident:false,deja:false};
    }
    else if(id==='fiche'){
      if(typeof makeDefault==='function') state.fiche = makeDefault().fiche || state.fiche;
    }
    safe(function(){state.active=id;state.currentArchiveId=null;persist();});
  }

  /* Nouvelle consigne : preview séparée et encarts facultatifs. */
  window.previewConsigne = function(){
    var d=consigne();
    if(d.retainEnabled===undefined) d.retainEnabled=!!(d.retenir&&d.retenir.length);
    if(!d.ncCardEnabled) d.ncCardEnabled={security:false,keypoints:false,quality:false,special:false};
    var logo=safe(function(){return getLogoForTab('consigne');},'');
    var main=(d.mainPhotos&&d.mainPhotos[0]&&d.mainPhotos[0].src)||'';
    var steps=(d.steps&&d.steps.length?d.steps:[{title:'',text:'',photos:[],warning:''}]).slice(0,8);
    var cols=Math.max(1,Math.min(6,steps.length||1));
    var dateTxt=d.date?new Date(d.date+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'):'';
    var enabled=d.ncCardEnabled||{};
    function cardOn(k,has){return !!enabled[k] || !!has;}
    var cards=[];
    if(cardOn('security',(d.safetyRisks&&d.safetyRisks.length)||(d.epi&&d.epi.length)))cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="security"><div class="nc-card-head nc-red">⚠ SÉCURITÉ</div><div class="nc-card-body"><b style="color:#c5161d">RISQUES IDENTIFIÉS</b><ul>'+ul(d.safetyRisks)+'</ul><div style="height:1px;background:#efb4b4;margin:3mm 0"></div><b style="color:#c5161d">EPI SPÉCIFIQUES</b>'+safe(function(){return ncEpiHtml(d.epi);},'<ul>'+ul(d.epi)+'</ul>')+'</div></div>');
    if(cardOn('keypoints',d.keyPoints&&d.keyPoints.length))cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="keypoints"><div class="nc-card-head nc-orange">🔑 POINTS CLÉS</div><div class="nc-card-body"><ul>'+ul(d.keyPoints)+'</ul></div></div>');
    if(cardOn('quality',d.qualityChecks&&d.qualityChecks.length))cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="quality"><div class="nc-card-head nc-green">☑ CONTRÔLE QUALITÉ</div><div class="nc-card-body">'+(d.qualityChecks||[]).map(function(x){return '<div class="nc-check-row"><span class="nc-box"></span><span>'+esc(x)+'</span></div>';}).join('')+'</div></div>');
    if(cardOn('special',String(d.specialText||'').trim()||d.specialImage))cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="special"><div class="nc-card-head nc-red">❗ '+esc(d.specialTitle||'CAS PARTICULIERS')+'</div><div class="nc-card-body"><div class="nc-special">'+(d.specialImage?'<img src="'+d.specialImage+'">':'')+'<div>'+br(d.specialText||'')+'</div></div></div></div>');
    var retain=(d.retainEnabled || (d.retenir&&d.retenir.length)) ? '<div class="nc-retain-v69 v69-zone"><div class="nc-retain-title">À RETENIR</div><ul>'+ul(d.retenir)+'</ul></div>' : '<div class="v69-edit-placeholder v69-edit-only v69-zone" data-v69-add="retain">+ Ajouter “À retenir”</div>';
    var bottom = cards.length ? '<div class="nc-bottom" style="grid-template-columns:repeat('+cards.length+',minmax(0,1fr))">'+cards.join('')+'</div>' : '<div class="v69-card-placeholder v69-edit-only v69-zone" data-v69-add="cards">+ Ajouter un encart bas de page</div>';
    return '<div class="nc-a4"><div class="nc-top"><div class="nc-logo"><div class="nc-logo-inner">'+(logo?'<img src="'+logo+'" alt="Logo">':'<div class="nc-logo-fallback">WIBAIE<small>PRODUCTION</small></div>')+'</div></div><div class="nc-titlebox"><div class="nc-infoicon">i</div><div><div class="nc-titlemain">'+esc(d.headerTitle||'INFO ATELIER')+'</div><div class="nc-subline">'+esc(d.headerSubtitle||'INFORMER • STANDARDISER • SÉCURISER')+'</div></div></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>SECTEUR</small><b>'+esc(d.sector||'')+'</b></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>POSTE</small><b>'+esc(d.poste||'')+'</b></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>RÉDACTEUR</small><b>'+esc(d.author||'')+'</b></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>DATE</small><b>'+esc(dateTxt)+'</b></div></div><div class="nc-blackbar" style="'+(!d.typeConsigne?'grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 38mm':'')+'">'+(d.typeConsigne?'<div class="nc-type-pill '+safe(function(){return ncConsigneTypeClass(d.typeConsigne);},'')+'">'+esc(safe(function(){return ncConsigneTypeLabel(d.typeConsigne);},d.typeConsigne))+'</div>':'')+'<div class="nc-hero-title"><h1>'+esc(d.displayTitle||d.title||'')+'</h1><div>'+esc(d.subtitle||'')+'</div></div><div class="nc-tag '+safe(function(){return ncConsigneTypeClass(d.typeConsigne);},'')+'"><span class="bulb">💡</span><span>'+esc(d.tagLabel||'SOYEZ INFORMÉ')+'</span></div></div><div class="nc-main"><div class="nc-main-photo">'+(main?'<img src="'+main+'">':'<div class="nc-placeholder">Photo principale</div>')+'</div><div class="nc-main-info-v69"><div class="nc-objective-v69 v69-zone"><div class="nc-section-title"><span class="ico">◎</span> OBJECTIF</div><p>'+br(d.objectif||'')+'</p></div>'+retain+'</div></div><div class="nc-mode"><div class="nc-mode-head"><span class="gear">⚙</span> MODE OPÉRATOIRE</div><div class="nc-steps" style="--nc-cols:'+cols+'">'+steps.map(function(st,i){var ps=(st.photos&&st.photos.length)?st.photos:(st.photo?[st.photo]:[]);return '<div class="nc-step"><div class="nc-step-h"><div class="nc-num">'+(i+1)+'</div><div class="nc-step-title">'+esc(st.title||'')+'</div></div><div class="nc-step-img">'+(ps.length?'<div class="nc-step-photo-grid">'+ps.map(function(ph){return '<img src="'+ph+'" style="display:block;width:auto;height:auto;max-width:100%;max-height:100%;object-fit:contain;object-position:center center;margin:auto;background:#eef2f7;">';}).join('')+'</div>':'Illustration')+'</div><div class="nc-step-textwrap"><div class="nc-step-txt">'+br(st.text||'')+'</div>'+(st.warning?'<div class="nc-step-warn">⚠ '+br(st.warning)+'</div>':'')+'</div></div>';}).join('')+'</div></div><div class="nc-bottom-wrap">'+bottom+'<div class="nc-footer"><span class="people">👥</span><div>EN CAS DE DOUTE<small>'+esc(d.doubtText||'')+'</small></div></div></div></div>';
  };
  try{ previewConsigne = window.previewConsigne; }catch(e){}

  /* Diagnostic : rend les symptômes avec une classe qui évite les anciens click handlers. */
  window.previewDiagnostic60 = function(){
    var d=safe(function(){return ensureDiagnostic60();},state.diagnostic||{}),date=d.date?d.date.split('-').reverse().join('/'):'';
    function keep(x){return safe(function(){return diagTextKeepSpaces(x);},esc(x));}
    function imgs(a){return safe(function(){return diag60Imgs(a);},'');}
    function level(x){return safe(function(){return diag60LevelClass(x);},'');}
    function matrix(g,f){return safe(function(){return diag74Matrix(g,f);},'');}
    return '<div class="diag59-a4 v60"><div class="diag59-top"><div class="diag59-logo">'+(d.logo?'<img src="'+d.logo+'">':'<div class="diag59-logo-fallback">WIBAIE<small>PRODUCTION</small></div>')+'</div><div class="diag59-title"><div class="ico">🛠️</div><div><h1>'+keep(d.title)+'</h1><p>'+keep(d.subtitle)+'</p></div></div><div class="diag59-meta"><small>Secteur</small><b>'+keep(d.sector)+'</b></div><div class="diag59-meta"><small>Machine</small><b>'+keep(d.machine)+'</b></div><div class="diag59-meta"><small>Rédacteur</small><b>'+keep(d.author)+'</b></div><div class="diag59-meta"><small>Date</small><b>'+keep(date)+'</b></div></div><div class="diag60-content"><div class="diag59-sec-title"><span class="diag59-num">1</span> Que&nbsp;se&nbsp;passe-t-il&nbsp;?</div><div class="diag59-sub">Symptôme&nbsp;observé&nbsp;et&nbsp;illustration&nbsp;du&nbsp;défaut</div><div class="diag60-symptoms">'+(d.symptoms||[]).map(function(s,i){return '<div class="diag60-symptom-v69" data-v69-diag-index="'+i+'"><div class="diag60-symptom-icon">'+esc(s.icon||'❓')+'</div><b>'+keep(s.label||'')+'</b>'+((s.photos||[]).length?'<div class="diag60-symptom-imgs">'+imgs(s.photos)+'</div>':'')+'</div>';}).join('')+'</div><div class="diag59-sec-title"><span class="diag59-num">2</span> Cause probable / niveau de criticité</div><div class="diag60-cause"><div class="diag60-cause-box diag60-cause-main"><h3>Cause probable</h3><b>'+esc(d.causeTitle)+'</b></div><div class="diag60-cause-box"><h3>Gravité</h3><div class="diag60-level '+level(d.gravity)+'">'+esc(d.gravity)+'</div></div><div class="diag60-cause-box"><h3>Fréquence</h3><div class="diag60-level '+level(d.frequency)+'">'+esc(d.frequency)+'</div></div><div class="diag60-cause-box"><h3>Impact</h3><div class="diag60-level '+level(d.impact)+'">'+esc(d.impact)+'</div></div>'+matrix(d.gravity,d.frequency)+'</div><div class="diag59-sec-title"><span class="diag59-num">3</span> Démarche diagnostic</div><div class="diag59-sub">Si OUI : passer au contrôle suivant. Si NON : appliquer l’action corrective.</div><div class="diag60-flow">'+(d.steps||[]).map(function(st,i){return '<div class="diag60-step"><div class="diag60-step-num">'+(i+1)+'</div><div class="diag60-step-photos">'+imgs(st.photos)+'</div><div class="diag60-step-body"><h3>'+esc(st.title)+'</h3>'+(st.why?'<div class="diag60-why"><b>Pourquoi ?</b><br>'+esc(st.why)+'</div>':'')+'<div class="diag60-question">'+esc(st.question||'')+'</div><div class="diag60-actions"><div class="diag60-ifok">✅ SI OUI<br>'+esc(st.ifYes||'Passer à l’étape suivante.')+'</div><div class="diag60-ifno">❌ SI NON<br>'+esc(st.ifNo||'')+'</div></div></div></div>';}).join('')+'</div><div class="diag60-bottom"><div class="diag60-escalade"><div class="diag60-box-title">☎️ Si le problème persiste</div><div class="diag60-escalade-grid"><div class="diag60-phone">☎</div><div><b>APPELER LE SERVICE COMPÉTENT</b> &nbsp;·&nbsp; Service : '+esc(d.service)+' &nbsp;·&nbsp; Poste : '+esc(d.phone)+' &nbsp;·&nbsp; Priorité : '+esc(d.priority)+'</div></div></div><div class="diag60-security"><div class="diag60-box-title">🛡️ '+esc(d.safetyTitle)+'</div><div style="color:#111827;font-size:10px;font-weight:700">'+esc(d.safetyText)+'</div></div></div></div></div>';
  };
  try{ previewDiagnostic60 = window.previewDiagnostic60; }catch(e){}

  function openObjective(){var d=consigne(); openModal('Objectif','Nouvelle consigne',area('Objectif',d.objectif||'','objectif'),function(root){bindFields(root,d);});}
  function openRetain(){var d=consigne(); if(d.retainEnabled===undefined)d.retainEnabled=!!(d.retenir&&d.retenir.length); openModal('À retenir','Nouvelle consigne','<div class="v69-checks">'+check('retainEnabled','Afficher l’encart À retenir',!!d.retainEnabled)+'</div><div class="v69-field"><label>Lignes à retenir</label><textarea data-v69-retain-lines>'+esc((d.retenir||[]).join('\n'))+'</textarea></div><div class="v69-actions"><button type="button" class="v69-btn danger" data-v69-remove-retain>Retirer l’encart</button></div>',function(root){var c=qs('[data-v69-check="retainEnabled"]',root); if(c)c.addEventListener('change',function(){d.retainEnabled=!!c.checked;commit();},false); var t=qs('[data-v69-retain-lines]',root); if(t)t.addEventListener('input',function(){d.retenir=lines(t.value);d.retainEnabled=true; if(c)c.checked=true;commit();},false); var rem=qs('[data-v69-remove-retain]',root); if(rem)rem.addEventListener('click',function(){d.retainEnabled=false;commit();closeModal();},false);});}
  function openCards(){var d=consigne(); d.ncCardEnabled=d.ncCardEnabled||{}; openModal('Encarts bas de page','Nouvelle consigne','<div class="v69-note">Coche uniquement les encarts utiles. Ils sont ajoutés à la preview, et les zones “+ Ajouter” n’apparaissent pas à l’impression.</div><div class="v69-checks">'+check('security','Sécurité / EPI',!!d.ncCardEnabled.security)+check('keypoints','Points clés',!!d.ncCardEnabled.keypoints)+check('quality','Contrôle qualité',!!d.ncCardEnabled.quality)+check('special','Cas particuliers',!!d.ncCardEnabled.special)+'</div>'+area('Texte du pied de page',d.doubtText||'','doubtText'),function(root){qsa('[data-v69-check]',root).forEach(function(c){c.addEventListener('change',function(){d.ncCardEnabled[c.getAttribute('data-v69-check')]=!!c.checked;commit();},false);});bindFields(root,d);});}
  function openDiagSymptom(i){var d=safe(function(){return ensureDiagnostic60();},state.diagnostic), s=d.symptoms[i]||(d.symptoms[i]={type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]}); var lib=safe(function(){return diag60Lib();},[['!','Autre']]); var opts=lib.map(function(x){var label=x[1]; var selected=(s.type===label || s.label===label || (!s.type && label==='Autre')); return '<option value="'+esc(label)+'" '+(selected?'selected':'')+'>'+esc(label)+'</option>';}).join(''); var custom=(s.type==='Autre'||!s.type)?field('Libellé personnalisé',s.label||'','customLabel'):''; openModal('Symptôme '+(i+1),'Aide au diagnostic','<div class="v69-grid2"><div class="v69-field"><label>Libellé</label><select data-v69-diag-select>'+opts+'</select></div><div class="v69-field"><label>Icône associée</label><input data-v69-diag-icon readonly value="'+esc(s.icon||'!')+'"></div></div><div id="v69DiagCustom">'+custom+'</div><div class="v69-field"><label>Photo(s) du défaut</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" multiple data-v69-diag-file></div>'+photoGrid(s.photos||[],'diag:'+i)+'<div class="v69-actions"><button type="button" class="v69-btn yellow" data-v69-add-symptom>+ Ajouter un symptôme après</button><button type="button" class="v69-btn danger" data-v69-del-symptom>Supprimer ce symptôme</button></div>',function(root){var sel=qs('[data-v69-diag-select]',root), icon=qs('[data-v69-diag-icon]',root), box=qs('#v69DiagCustom',root); function bindCustom(){var inp=qs('[data-v69-field="customLabel"]',root); if(inp)inp.addEventListener('input',function(){s.type='Autre';s.icon='!';s.label=inp.value;if(icon)icon.value='!';commit();},false);} bindCustom(); if(sel)sel.addEventListener('change',function(){var val=sel.value; s.type=val; if(val==='Autre'){s.icon='!';s.label='';if(icon)icon.value='!'; if(box)box.innerHTML=field('Libellé personnalisé','','customLabel'); bindCustom();}else{s.icon=safe(function(){return diag60PickIcon(val);},'!');s.label=val;if(icon)icon.value=s.icon;if(box)box.innerHTML='';} commit();},false); var file=qs('[data-v69-diag-file]',root); if(file)file.addEventListener('change',async function(){var fs=Array.from(file.files||[]); if(!Array.isArray(s.photos))s.photos=[]; for(var n=0;n<fs.length;n++)s.photos.push(await readFile(fs[n])); file.value=''; commit(); openDiagSymptom(i);},false); qsa('[data-v69-photo-remove]',root).forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',function(){var parts=b.getAttribute('data-v69-photo-remove').split(':');s.photos.splice(Number(parts[2]),1);commit();openDiagSymptom(i);},false);}); var add=qs('[data-v69-add-symptom]',root); if(add)add.addEventListener('click',function(){d.symptoms.splice(i+1,0,{type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]});commit();openDiagSymptom(i+1);},false); var del=qs('[data-v69-del-symptom]',root); if(del)del.addEventListener('click',function(){if(confirm('Supprimer ce symptôme ?')){d.symptoms.splice(i,1);if(!d.symptoms.length)d.symptoms.push({type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]});commit();closeModal();}},false);});}

  function wireNewButton(){
    var b=qs('#v64Topbar [data-v64-act="new"],#v64Topbar [data-v69-act="newhome"]');
    if(b){b.removeAttribute('data-v64-act');b.setAttribute('data-v69-act','newhome');if(!b.dataset.v69Wire){b.dataset.v69Wire='1';b.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();showHomeOnly();},true);}}
  }
  function showHomeOnly(){
    document.body.classList.remove('v59-doc','ws-form-open','ws-nav-open','ws-epure');
    document.body.classList.add('v59-home');
    var land=qs('#v59Landing'); if(land)land.style.display='flex';
  }
  function rewriteLanding(){
    qsa('#v59Landing [data-v59-model],#v59Landing [data-v69-model]').forEach(function(card){var id=card.getAttribute('data-v69-model')||card.getAttribute('data-v59-model'); if(!id)return; card.removeAttribute('data-v59-model'); card.setAttribute('data-v69-model',id);});
    var land=qs('#v59Landing'); if(land&&!land.dataset.v69Wire){land.dataset.v69Wire='1';land.addEventListener('click',function(ev){var c=ev.target.closest('[data-v69-model]'); if(!c)return; ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation(); ev.stopImmediatePropagation(); chooseV69(c.getAttribute('data-v69-model'));},true); land.addEventListener('keydown',function(ev){var c=ev.target.closest&&ev.target.closest('[data-v69-model]'); if(c&&(ev.key==='Enter'||ev.key===' ')){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();chooseV69(c.getAttribute('data-v69-model'));}},true);}
  }
  function chooseV69(id){if(id==='consigne') return openV69(id); var p=qs('#v59PinBackdrop'), input=qs('#v59PinInput'), msg=qs('#v59PinMsg'); if(msg)msg.textContent=''; if(input){input.value=''; input.placeholder='0000';} if(p){p.classList.add('open'); p.dataset.v69Pending=id; setTimeout(function(){if(input)input.focus();},30);} }
  function validatePinV69(){var p=qs('#v59PinBackdrop'); if(!p||!p.classList.contains('open')||!p.dataset.v69Pending)return false; var i=qs('#v59PinInput'), msg=qs('#v59PinMsg'), val=i?i.value:''; if(val===HARD_PIN){var id=p.dataset.v69Pending; delete p.dataset.v69Pending; p.classList.remove('open'); openV69(id); return true;} if(msg)msg.textContent='Code incorrect.'; if(i)i.select(); return true;}
  function openV69(id){resetModel(id); safe(function(){if(typeof render==='function')render();}); safe(function(){if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();}); document.body.classList.remove('v59-home','ws-form-open','ws-nav-open','ws-epure'); document.body.classList.add('v59-doc'); var land=qs('#v59Landing'); if(land)land.style.display='none'; setTimeout(afterPreview,120);}

  function afterPreview(){
    setHardPin(); wireNewButton(); rewriteLanding();
    if(active()==='consigne'){
      var host=qs('#previewHost'); if(host){qsa('.nc-objective-v69,.nc-retain-v69,.v69-edit-placeholder,.v69-card-placeholder',host).forEach(function(el){el.classList.add('v69-zone');});}
    }
    if(active()==='diagnostic'){
      var host2=qs('#previewHost'); if(host2){qsa('.diag60-symptom',host2).forEach(function(el,i){el.classList.remove('diag60-symptom','v47-zone');el.classList.add('diag60-symptom-v69');el.removeAttribute('data-v47-kind');el.removeAttribute('data-v47-index');el.setAttribute('data-v69-diag-index',i);});}
    }
  }

  window.addEventListener('click',function(ev){
    var pinBtn=ev.target.closest&&ev.target.closest('[data-v59-pin-ok]'); if(pinBtn && validatePinV69()){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();return;}
    var host=qs('#previewHost'); if(!host||!host.contains(ev.target))return;
    if(active()==='consigne'){
      var obj=ev.target.closest('.nc-objective-v69'); if(obj&&host.contains(obj)){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();openObjective();return;}
      var ret=ev.target.closest('.nc-retain-v69,[data-v69-add="retain"]'); if(ret&&host.contains(ret)){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();openRetain();return;}
      var cards=ev.target.closest('[data-v69-add="cards"]'); if(cards&&host.contains(cards)){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();openCards();return;}
    }
    if(active()==='diagnostic'){
      var sy=ev.target.closest('.diag60-symptom-v69'); if(sy&&host.contains(sy)){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();openDiagSymptom(Number(sy.getAttribute('data-v69-diag-index')||0));return;}
    }
  },true);
  window.addEventListener('click',function(ev){if(ev.target.closest&&ev.target.closest('[data-v59-change-pin]')){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();setHardPin();}},true);
  window.addEventListener('click',function(ev){var b=ev.target.closest&&ev.target.closest('[data-v69-photo-remove]'); if(!b)return; var parts=b.getAttribute('data-v69-photo-remove').split(':'); if(parts[0]==='diag'){var d=safe(function(){return ensureDiagnostic60();},state.diagnostic),s=d.symptoms[Number(parts[1])]; if(s&&s.photos)s.photos.splice(Number(parts[2]),1); commit(); openDiagSymptom(Number(parts[1]));}},true);
  window.addEventListener('click',function(ev){var p=qs('#v59PinBackdrop'); if(!p||!p.dataset.v69Pending)return; if(ev.target.closest&&ev.target.closest('[data-v59-pin-cancel]')){delete p.dataset.v69Pending;}},true);

  function boot(){setHardPin();wireNewButton();rewriteLanding();afterPreview();safe(function(){if(active()==='consigne'||active()==='diagnostic')updatePreview();});setTimeout(afterPreview,150);setTimeout(afterPreview,800);} 
  if(document.readyState==='loading')document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot); else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(boot,80);setTimeout(afterPreview,500);});
  if(window.MutationObserver){new MutationObserver(function(){setTimeout(afterPreview,40);}).observe(document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true});}
})();
</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V71 — Bases minimales au choix du modèle / Nouveau
     - Corrige V70 sans toucher au moteur V65 : bouton jaune, PDF, JSON auto, toolbar.
     - Chaque miniature ouvre son vrai modèle avec une base légère.
     - Nouveau / Modèles renvoient à l'accueil ; le prochain choix repart minimal.
   ============================================================ -->
<script id="v71-empty-starters-routing">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V71_EMPTY_STARTERS__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V71_EMPTY_STARTERS__ = true;

  var HARD_PIN = '1234';
  var PIN_KEY = 'labodoc_v59_support_pin';
  var labels = {
    consigne:'NOUVELLE CONSIGNE',
    maintenance:'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIVEAU',
    diagnostic:'AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC',
    fiche:'FICHE SÉCURITÉ MACHINE',
    securite:'CONSIGNE SÉCURITÉ'
  };

  function qs(s,r){ return (r||document).querySelector(s); }
  function qsa(s,r){ return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s)); }
  function safe(fn, fb){ try { return fn(); } catch(e) { console.warn('[V71]', e); return fb; } }
  function hasState(){ return safe(function(){ return typeof state !== 'undefined' && state; }, false); }
  function setHardPin(){
    safe(function(){ localStorage.setItem(PIN_KEY, HARD_PIN); });
    var input = qs('#v59PinInput');
    if(input){ input.placeholder = '0000'; input.setAttribute('autocomplete','off'); input.value = input.value || ''; }
    qsa('[data-v59-change-pin]').forEach(function(b){
      b.style.display='none'; b.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true'); b.tabIndex = -1;
    });
  }

  function clone(obj){ return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj || {})); }

  function consigneStarter(){
    return {
      title:'', author:'', date:'', intro:'', footer:'SOYEZ INFORMÉ', posts:[],
      headerTitle:'INFO ATELIER', headerSubtitle:'INFORMER • STANDARDISER • SÉCURISER',
      displayTitle:'', subtitle:'', sector:'', poste:'', typeConsigne:'', level:'', tagLabel:'SOYEZ INFORMÉ',
      objectif:'', retainEnabled:false, retenir:[], mainPhotos:[],
      steps:[{title:'', text:'', photo:'', photos:[], warning:''}],
      safetyRisks:[], epi:[], keyPoints:[], qualityChecks:[],
      specialTitle:'CAS PARTICULIERS', specialText:'', specialImage:'', doubtText:'',
      ncCardEnabled:{security:false,keypoints:false,quality:false,special:false},
      _v71Starter:true
    };
  }

  function maintenanceStarter(){
    return {
      title:'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIVEAU',
      machine:'',
      subtitle:'CONTRÔLES DÉMARRAGE MACHINE',
      secteur:'', poste:'', duree:'',
      slogan:'',
      footer:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT !',
      machineImage:'',
      epiImages:[],
      rows:[{number:'01', title:'', controls:'', illustration:'', illustrations:[], why:'', risk:''}],
      _v71Starter:true
    };
  }

  function diagnosticStarter(){
    return {
      logo:'', title:'AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC', subtitle:"Identifier rapidement l’origine du problème",
      sector:'', machine:'', author:'', date:'',
      symptoms:[{type:'Autre', icon:'!', label:'', photos:[]}],
      causeTitle:'', gravity:'Moyenne', frequency:'Occasionnelle', impact:'Qualité',
      steps:[{title:'', photos:[], why:'', question:'', ifYes:'Passer au contrôle suivant.', ifNo:''}],
      service:'', phone:'', priority:'',
      safetyTitle:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT', safetyText:'',
      _v71Starter:true
    };
  }

  function securiteStarter(){
    var d = null;
    // On conserve la structure métier de la consigne sécurité, mais sans encarts bas déjà affichés.
    d = safe(function(){ return (typeof makeSecurityDefault === 'function') ? makeSecurityDefault() : null; }, null);
    if(!d && hasState()) d = clone(state.securite || {});
    d = d || {};
    // Garde les grands blocs utiles de la fiche sécurité, mais les encarts bas repartent cachés.
    if(!Array.isArray(d.cards)){
      d.cards = [
        {type:'never', title:'NE JAMAIS', items:[]},
        {type:'mandatory', title:'OBLIGATOIRE', items:[]},
        {type:'risks', title:'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX', items:[]}
      ];
    }
    if(!Array.isArray(d.epi)) d.epi = [];
    if(!Array.isArray(d.photos)) d.photos = [];
    d.bottomEnabled = {incident:false, accident:false, deja:false};
    d._v71Starter = true;
    return d;
  }

  function ficheStarter(){
    // Demande utilisateur : fiche sécurité machine, on ne touche pas.
    var d = safe(function(){ return (typeof makeDefault === 'function') ? (makeDefault().fiche || null) : null; }, null);
    if(!d && hasState()) d = clone(state.fiche || {});
    d = d || {};
    d._v71Starter = true;
    return d;
  }

  function forceMinimal(id){
    if(!hasState()) return false;
    id = String(id || 'consigne');
    if(id === 'consigne') state.consigne = consigneStarter();
    else if(id === 'maintenance') state.maintenance = maintenanceStarter();
    else if(id === 'diagnostic') state.diagnostic = diagnosticStarter();
    else if(id === 'securite') state.securite = securiteStarter();
    else if(id === 'fiche') state.fiche = ficheStarter();
    state.active = id;
    state.currentArchiveId = null;
    safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
    return true;
  }

  function forceDocMode(){
    document.body.classList.remove('v59-home','ws-form-open','ws-nav-open','ws-epure');
    document.body.classList.add('v59-doc');
    var land = qs('#v59Landing');
    if(land) land.style.display = 'none';
    var module = qs('#v64CurrentModule') || qs('#v59CurrentModule');
    if(module && hasState()) module.textContent = labels[state.active] || labels.consigne;
  }

  function refresh(){
    safe(function(){ if(typeof render === 'function') render(); });
    safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
    forceDocMode();
    setTimeout(function(){ safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); }); forceDocMode(); }, 80);
    setTimeout(forceDocMode, 260);
  }

  function openMinimal(id){
    id = String(id || 'consigne');
    forceMinimal(id);
    refresh();
  }

  function showHome(){
    setHardPin();
    document.body.classList.remove('v59-doc','ws-form-open','ws-nav-open','ws-epure');
    document.body.classList.add('v59-home');
    var land = qs('#v59Landing');
    if(land){
      land.style.display = 'flex';
      qsa('[data-v59-model],[data-v69-model],[data-v70-model],[data-v71-model]', land).forEach(function(card){
        var id = card.getAttribute('data-v71-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v70-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v69-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v59-model');
        if(id){
          card.setAttribute('data-v71-model', id);
          card.removeAttribute('data-v70-model');
        }
      });
    }
  }

  function openPin(id){
    setHardPin();
    var p = qs('#v59PinBackdrop'), i = qs('#v59PinInput'), m = qs('#v59PinMsg');
    if(!p){ openMinimal(id); return; }
    delete p.dataset.v69Pending;
    delete p.dataset.v70Pending;
    p.dataset.v71Pending = id;
    p.classList.add('open');
    if(i){ i.value=''; i.placeholder='0000'; setTimeout(function(){ i.focus(); }, 40); }
    if(m) m.textContent = '';
  }

  function closePin(){
    var p = qs('#v59PinBackdrop');
    if(p){ delete p.dataset.v71Pending; p.classList.remove('open'); }
  }

  function validatePin(){
    var p = qs('#v59PinBackdrop');
    if(!p || !p.dataset.v71Pending) return false;
    var input = qs('#v59PinInput'), msg = qs('#v59PinMsg');
    var value = input ? input.value : '';
    if(value === HARD_PIN){
      var id = p.dataset.v71Pending;
      closePin();
      openMinimal(id);
      return true;
    }
    if(msg) msg.textContent = 'Code incorrect.';
    if(input) input.select();
    return true;
  }

  function choose(id){
    id = String(id || 'consigne');
    if(id === 'consigne') openMinimal(id);
    else openPin(id);
  }

  function intercept(e){
    var t = e.target;
    if(!t || !t.closest) return;

    // Nouveau / Modèles : retour à l’accueil, pas création directe d'une consigne complète.
    var topHome = t.closest('#v64Topbar [data-v64-act="home"],#v64Topbar [data-v64-act="new"],#v64Topbar [data-v69-act="newhome"],#v59ActionBar [data-v59-act="home"],#v59ActionBar [data-v59-act="new"]');
    if(topHome){
      e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation();
      showHome();
      return;
    }

    var ok = t.closest('[data-v59-pin-ok]');
    if(ok && validatePin()){
      e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation();
      return;
    }
    var cancel = t.closest('[data-v59-pin-cancel]');
    if(cancel && qs('#v59PinBackdrop') && qs('#v59PinBackdrop').dataset.v71Pending){
      e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation();
      closePin();
      return;
    }

    var landing = qs('#v59Landing');
    if(landing && landing.contains(t)){
      var card = t.closest('[data-v71-model],[data-v70-model],[data-v69-model],[data-v59-model]');
      if(card){
        var id = card.getAttribute('data-v71-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v70-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v69-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v59-model');
        if(id){
          e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation();
          choose(id);
          return;
        }
      }
      if(t.closest('[data-v59-change-pin]')){
        e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation();
        setHardPin();
      }
    }
  }

  function keyIntercept(e){
    var p = qs('#v59PinBackdrop');
    if(p && p.dataset.v71Pending && p.classList.contains('open')){
      if(e.key === 'Enter'){
        e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation();
        validatePin();
      } else if(e.key === 'Escape'){
        e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation();
        closePin();
      }
      return;
    }
    var landing = qs('#v59Landing');
    var card = landing && e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest('[data-v71-model],[data-v70-model],[data-v69-model],[data-v59-model]');
    if(card && landing.contains(card) && (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ')){
      e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation();
      choose(card.getAttribute('data-v71-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v70-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v69-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v59-model'));
    }
  }

  function boot(){
    setHardPin();
    var land = qs('#v59Landing');
    if(land){
      qsa('[data-v59-model],[data-v69-model],[data-v70-model],[data-v71-model]', land).forEach(function(card){
        var id = card.getAttribute('data-v71-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v70-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v69-model') || card.getAttribute('data-v59-model');
        if(id) card.setAttribute('data-v71-model', id);
      });
    }
  }

  window.addEventListener('click', intercept, true);
  window.addEventListener('keydown', keyIntercept, true);
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);
  else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(boot,80); });

  // Petit accès de secours pour tests et futures corrections, sans modifier le PDF/JSON.
  window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71 = openMinimal;
  window.labodocShowHomeV71 = showHome;
})();
</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V72 — Nouveau = reset du modèle courant / suppression réelle des encarts
     Ne touche PAS au moteur V65/V64 : bouton jaune, PDF, JSON auto, toolbar.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="v72-reset-delete-style">
  #v64Topbar [data-v72-act="reset"]{background:#fff!important;color:#111!important;border:1px solid #d6c77c!important;}
  #v64Topbar [data-v72-act="reset"]:hover{background:#ffd200!important;color:#111!important;border-color:#111!important;}
  .v72-toast{position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:22px;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:2147483647;background:#111;color:#fff;border:2px solid #ffd200;border-radius:999px;padding:10px 16px;font-weight:950;box-shadow:0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.35);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .18s ease;}
  .v72-toast.show{opacity:1;}
  @media print{.v72-toast,.v69-card-placeholder,.v69-edit-placeholder,.v69-edit-only,.v68-empty-bottom{display:none!important;}}
</style>
<script id="v72-reset-delete-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V72_RESET_DELETE__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V72_RESET_DELETE__ = true;

  function qs(s,r){return (r||document).querySelector(s);} 
  function qsa(s,r){return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s));}
  function safe(fn,fb){try{return fn();}catch(e){console.warn('[V72]',e);return fb;}}
  function esc(v){return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/[<>&"]/g,function(c){return {'<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','&':'&amp;','"':'&quot;'}[c];});}
  function br(v){return esc(v||'').split(/\n+/).filter(Boolean).join('<br>');}
  function ul(arr){return (Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).filter(function(x){return String(x||'').trim();}).map(function(x){return '<li>'+esc(x)+'</li>';}).join('');}
  function active(){return safe(function(){return state.active || 'consigne';},'consigne');}
  function commit(){safe(function(){if(typeof persist==='function')persist();});safe(function(){if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();});setTimeout(tagPreview,50);}
  function ensureConsigne(){return safe(function(){return window.ensureConsigneV4 ? window.ensureConsigneV4() : state.consigne;},state.consigne||{});}
  function toast(msg){var t=qs('#v72Toast');if(!t){t=document.createElement('div');t.id='v72Toast';t.className='v72-toast';document.body.appendChild(t);}t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('show');clearTimeout(t._t);t._t=setTimeout(function(){t.classList.remove('show');},1600);}

  // 1) Le bouton Nouveau ne doit plus ouvrir les modèles. Il remet le modèle courant à l'état vierge.
  function neutralizeNewButton(){
    var buttons=qsa('#v64Topbar button,#v59ActionBar button');
    buttons.forEach(function(b){
      var txt=(b.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase();
      var isNew = txt.indexOf('nouveau')>-1 || b.getAttribute('data-v64-act')==='new' || b.getAttribute('data-v69-act')==='newhome' || b.getAttribute('data-v59-act')==='new';
      if(!isNew) return;
      b.removeAttribute('data-v64-act');
      b.removeAttribute('data-v69-act');
      b.removeAttribute('data-v59-act');
      b.setAttribute('data-v72-act','reset');
      b.title='Remettre le document courant à zéro';
      if(!/nouveau/i.test(b.textContent||'')) b.textContent='⊕ Nouveau';
    });
  }

  function resetCurrentDocument(){
    var id=active();
    safe(function(){ if(state) state.currentArchiveId=null; });
    if(typeof window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71==='function'){
      window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71(id);
    }else{
      // secours léger si V71 n'est pas disponible
      if(id==='consigne' && state) state.consigne={title:'',author:'',date:'',intro:'',footer:'SOYEZ INFORMÉ',posts:[],headerTitle:'INFO ATELIER',headerSubtitle:'INFORMER • STANDARDISER • SÉCURISER',displayTitle:'',subtitle:'',sector:'',poste:'',typeConsigne:'',level:'',tagLabel:'SOYEZ INFORMÉ',objectif:'',retainEnabled:false,retenir:[],mainPhotos:[],steps:[{title:'',text:'',photo:'',photos:[],warning:''}],safetyRisks:[],epi:[],keyPoints:[],qualityChecks:[],specialTitle:'CAS PARTICULIERS',specialText:'',specialImage:'',doubtText:'',ncCardEnabled:{security:false,keypoints:false,quality:false,special:false}};
      if(id==='maintenance' && state) state.maintenance={title:'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIVEAU',machine:'',subtitle:'CONTRÔLES DÉMARRAGE MACHINE',secteur:'',poste:'',duree:'',slogan:'',footer:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT !',machineImage:'',epiImages:[],rows:[{number:'01',title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustrations:[]}]};
      if(id==='diagnostic' && state) state.diagnostic={title:'AIDE AU DIAGNOSTIC',subtitle:"Identifier rapidement l’origine du problème",sector:'',machine:'',author:'',date:'',symptoms:[{type:'Autre',icon:'!',label:'',photos:[]}],causeTitle:'',gravity:'Moyenne',frequency:'Occasionnelle',impact:'Qualité',steps:[{title:'',photos:[],why:'',question:'',ifYes:'Passer au contrôle suivant.',ifNo:''}],service:'',phone:'',priority:'',safetyTitle:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT',safetyText:''};
      if(id==='securite' && state){ var d=safe(function(){return typeof makeSecurityDefault==='function'?makeSecurityDefault():{};},{}); d.bottomEnabled={incident:false,accident:false,deja:false}; state.securite=d; }
      safe(function(){if(state)state.active=id;}); safe(function(){if(typeof persist==='function')persist();}); safe(function(){if(typeof render==='function')render();}); safe(function(){if(typeof updatePreview==='function')updatePreview();});
      document.body.classList.remove('v59-home','ws-form-open','ws-nav-open','ws-epure');document.body.classList.add('v59-doc');var land=qs('#v59Landing');if(land)land.style.display='none';
    }
    setTimeout(function(){neutralizeNewButton();tagPreview();},120);
    toast('Document remis à zéro');
  }

  // Capture AU-DESSUS de V71 : la clé est de retirer les data-v64/data-v69 avant le clic.
  function wireResetButton(){
    neutralizeNewButton();
    qsa('#v64Topbar [data-v72-act="reset"],#v59ActionBar [data-v72-act="reset"]').forEach(function(b){
      if(b.dataset.v72Wire) return;
      b.dataset.v72Wire='1';
      b.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();resetCurrentDocument();},true);
    });
  }

  // 2) Preview Nouvelle consigne : un encart affiché uniquement si son drapeau est actif. Le contenu seul ne le réaffiche pas.
  window.previewConsigne = function(){
    var d=ensureConsigne();
    if(d.retainEnabled===undefined) d.retainEnabled=false;
    if(!d.ncCardEnabled) d.ncCardEnabled={security:false,keypoints:false,quality:false,special:false};
    var logo=safe(function(){return getLogoForTab('consigne');},'');
    var main=(d.mainPhotos&&d.mainPhotos[0]&&d.mainPhotos[0].src)||'';
    var steps=(d.steps&&d.steps.length?d.steps:[{title:'',text:'',photos:[],warning:''}]).slice(0,8);
    var cols=Math.max(1,Math.min(6,steps.length||1));
    var dateTxt=d.date?new Date(d.date+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('fr-FR'):'';
    var enabled=d.ncCardEnabled||{};
    var cards=[];
    if(!!enabled.security)cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="security"><div class="nc-card-head nc-red">⚠ SÉCURITÉ</div><div class="nc-card-body"><b style="color:#c5161d">RISQUES IDENTIFIÉS</b><ul>'+ul(d.safetyRisks)+'</ul><div style="height:1px;background:#efb4b4;margin:3mm 0"></div><b style="color:#c5161d">EPI SPÉCIFIQUES</b>'+safe(function(){return ncEpiHtml(d.epi);},'<ul>'+ul(d.epi)+'</ul>')+'</div></div>');
    if(!!enabled.keypoints)cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="keypoints"><div class="nc-card-head nc-orange">🔑 POINTS CLÉS</div><div class="nc-card-body"><ul>'+ul(d.keyPoints)+'</ul></div></div>');
    if(!!enabled.quality)cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="quality"><div class="nc-card-head nc-green">☑ CONTRÔLE QUALITÉ</div><div class="nc-card-body">'+(d.qualityChecks||[]).map(function(x){return '<div class="nc-check-row"><span class="nc-box"></span><span>'+esc(x)+'</span></div>';}).join('')+'</div></div>');
    if(!!enabled.special)cards.push('<div class="nc-card" data-v66-card="special"><div class="nc-card-head nc-red">❗ '+esc(d.specialTitle||'CAS PARTICULIERS')+'</div><div class="nc-card-body"><div class="nc-special">'+(d.specialImage?'<img src="'+d.specialImage+'">':'')+'<div>'+br(d.specialText||'')+'</div></div></div></div>');
    var retain=!!d.retainEnabled ? '<div class="nc-retain-v69 v69-zone"><div class="nc-retain-title">À RETENIR</div><ul>'+ul(d.retenir)+'</ul></div>' : '<div class="v69-edit-placeholder v69-edit-only v69-zone" data-v69-add="retain">+ Ajouter “À retenir”</div>';
    var bottom = cards.length ? '<div class="nc-bottom" style="grid-template-columns:repeat('+cards.length+',minmax(0,1fr))">'+cards.join('')+'</div>' : '<div class="v69-card-placeholder v69-edit-only v69-zone" data-v69-add="cards">+ Ajouter un encart bas de page</div>';
    return '<div class="nc-a4"><div class="nc-top"><div class="nc-logo"><div class="nc-logo-inner">'+(logo?'<img src="'+logo+'" alt="Logo">':'<div class="nc-logo-fallback">WIBAIE<small>PRODUCTION</small></div>')+'</div></div><div class="nc-titlebox"><div class="nc-infoicon">i</div><div><div class="nc-titlemain">'+esc(d.headerTitle||'INFO ATELIER')+'</div><div class="nc-subline">'+esc(d.headerSubtitle||'INFORMER • STANDARDISER • SÉCURISER')+'</div></div></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>SECTEUR</small><b>'+esc(d.sector||'')+'</b></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>POSTE</small><b>'+esc(d.poste||'')+'</b></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>RÉDACTEUR</small><b>'+esc(d.author||'')+'</b></div><div class="nc-meta"><small>DATE</small><b>'+esc(dateTxt)+'</b></div></div><div class="nc-blackbar" style="'+(!d.typeConsigne?'grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 38mm':'')+'">'+(d.typeConsigne?'<div class="nc-type-pill '+safe(function(){return ncConsigneTypeClass(d.typeConsigne);},'')+'">'+esc(safe(function(){return ncConsigneTypeLabel(d.typeConsigne);},d.typeConsigne))+'</div>':'')+'<div class="nc-hero-title"><h1>'+esc(d.displayTitle||d.title||'')+'</h1><div>'+esc(d.subtitle||'')+'</div></div><div class="nc-tag '+safe(function(){return ncConsigneTypeClass(d.typeConsigne);},'')+'"><span class="bulb">💡</span><span>'+esc(d.tagLabel||'SOYEZ INFORMÉ')+'</span></div></div><div class="nc-main"><div class="nc-main-photo">'+(main?'<img src="'+main+'">':'<div class="nc-placeholder">Photo principale</div>')+'</div><div class="nc-main-info-v69"><div class="nc-objective-v69 v69-zone"><div class="nc-section-title"><span class="ico">◎</span> OBJECTIF</div><p>'+br(d.objectif||'')+'</p></div>'+retain+'</div></div><div class="nc-mode"><div class="nc-mode-head"><span class="gear">⚙</span> MODE OPÉRATOIRE</div><div class="nc-steps" style="--nc-cols:'+cols+'">'+steps.map(function(st,i){var ps=(st.photos&&st.photos.length)?st.photos:(st.photo?[st.photo]:[]);return '<div class="nc-step"><div class="nc-step-h"><div class="nc-num">'+(i+1)+'</div><div class="nc-step-title">'+esc(st.title||'')+'</div></div><div class="nc-step-img">'+(ps.length?'<div class="nc-step-photo-grid">'+ps.map(function(ph){return '<img src="'+ph+'" style="display:block;width:auto;height:auto;max-width:100%;max-height:100%;object-fit:contain;object-position:center center;margin:auto;background:#eef2f7;">';}).join('')+'</div>':'Illustration')+'</div><div class="nc-step-textwrap"><div class="nc-step-txt">'+br(st.text||'')+'</div>'+(st.warning?'<div class="nc-step-warn">⚠ '+br(st.warning)+'</div>':'')+'</div></div>';}).join('')+'</div></div><div class="nc-bottom-wrap">'+bottom+'<div class="nc-footer"><span class="people">👥</span><div>EN CAS DE DOUTE<small>'+esc(d.doubtText||'')+'</small></div></div></div></div>';
  };
  try{ previewConsigne = window.previewConsigne; }catch(e){}

  function removeConsigneCard(k){
    var d=ensureConsigne(); d.ncCardEnabled=d.ncCardEnabled||{}; d.ncCardEnabled[k]=false;
    if(k==='security'){ d.safetyRisks=[]; d.epi=[]; }
    if(k==='keypoints'){ d.keyPoints=[]; }
    if(k==='quality'){ d.qualityChecks=[]; }
    if(k==='special'){ d.specialText=''; d.specialImage=''; }
    commit(); closeKnownModals(); toast('Encart supprimé');
  }
  function removeRetain(){ var d=ensureConsigne(); d.retainEnabled=false; d.retenir=[]; commit(); closeKnownModals(); toast('À retenir supprimé'); }
  function closeKnownModals(){qsa('#v66Backdrop,#v68Backdrop,#v69Backdrop,#v47Backdrop').forEach(function(m){m.classList.remove('open');});}

  function tagPreview(){
    var host=qs('#previewHost'); if(!host) return;
    if(active()==='consigne'){
      qsa('.nc-objective-v69,.nc-retain-v69,.v69-edit-placeholder,.v69-card-placeholder',host).forEach(function(el){el.classList.add('v69-zone');});
      qsa('.nc-card[data-v66-card]',host).forEach(function(card){var k=card.getAttribute('data-v66-card');card.classList.add('v47-zone');card.setAttribute('data-v47-kind',k==='keypoints'?'keypoints':k==='quality'?'quality':k==='special'?'special':'security');card.setAttribute('data-v47-label','Encart');});
      var foot=qs('.nc-footer',host); if(foot){foot.classList.add('v47-zone');foot.setAttribute('data-v47-kind','footer');foot.setAttribute('data-v47-label','En cas de doute / encarts');}
    }
  }

  // Captures de suppression AVANT les anciens listeners document.
  window.addEventListener('click',function(ev){
    var t=ev.target;
    if(!t || !t.closest) return;
    var reset=t.closest('#v64Topbar [data-v72-act="reset"],#v59ActionBar [data-v72-act="reset"]');
    if(reset){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();resetCurrentDocument();return;}
    var off=t.closest('[data-v66-card-off]');
    if(off){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();removeConsigneCard(off.getAttribute('data-v66-card-off'));return;}
    var rem=t.closest('[data-v69-remove-retain]');
    if(rem){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();ev.stopImmediatePropagation();removeRetain();return;}
    var chk=t.closest('[data-v66-toggle-card],[data-v68-check],[data-v69-check]');
    if(chk && active()==='consigne'){
      // Laisser la checkbox changer son état natif, puis appliquer en dur. Ne pas bloquer le modal.
      setTimeout(function(){
        var k=chk.getAttribute('data-v66-toggle-card')||chk.getAttribute('data-v68-check')||chk.getAttribute('data-v69-check');
        if(['security','keypoints','quality','special'].indexOf(k)>-1){ var d=ensureConsigne(); d.ncCardEnabled=d.ncCardEnabled||{}; d.ncCardEnabled[k]=!!chk.checked; commit(); }
        if(k==='retainEnabled'){ var d2=ensureConsigne(); d2.retainEnabled=!!chk.checked; if(!chk.checked)d2.retenir=[]; commit(); }
      },0);
    }
  },true);

  function boot(){wireResetButton();tagPreview();}
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot); else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(boot,80);setTimeout(boot,400);});
  if(window.MutationObserver){new MutationObserver(function(){setTimeout(boot,30);}).observe(document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true,attributes:true,attributeFilter:['class']});}

  window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72 = resetCurrentDocument;
})();
</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V73 — Phrase sécurité maintenance par défaut
     Patch ciblé : NE TOUCHE PAS au moteur bouton jaune / PDF / JSON auto / toolbar.
   ============================================================ -->
<script id="v73-maintenance-slogan-default">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V73_MAINT_SLOGAN__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V73_MAINT_SLOGAN__ = true;

  var DEFAULT_SLOGAN = 'Un contrôle rigoureux garanti votre sécurité, la qualité de nos produits et la disponibilité de nos machines.';

  function safe(fn, fb){ try { return fn(); } catch(e) { console.warn('[V73 maintenance slogan]', e); return fb; } }
  function hasState(){ return safe(function(){ return typeof state !== 'undefined' && state; }, false); }
  function clone(obj){ return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj || {})); }
  function esc(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).replace(/[<>&"]/g, function(c){ return {'<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','&':'&amp;','"':'&quot;'}[c]; }); }

  function minimalMaintenance(){
    return {
      title:'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIVEAU',
      machine:'',
      subtitle:'CONTRÔLES DÉMARRAGE MACHINE',
      secteur:'',
      poste:'',
      duree:'',
      slogan:DEFAULT_SLOGAN,
      footer:'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT !',
      machineImage:'',
      epiImages:[],
      rows:[{number:'01', title:'', controls:'', illustration:'', illustrations:[], why:'', risk:''}],
      _v73Starter:true
    };
  }

  function ensureMaintenanceSlogan(forceDefault){
    if(!hasState()) return false;
    if(!state.maintenance || typeof state.maintenance !== 'object') state.maintenance = minimalMaintenance();
    if(forceDefault || !String(state.maintenance.slogan || '').trim()) state.maintenance.slogan = DEFAULT_SLOGAN;
    if(!Array.isArray(state.maintenance.rows) || !state.maintenance.rows.length){
      state.maintenance.rows = [{number:'01', title:'', controls:'', illustration:'', illustrations:[], why:'', risk:''}];
    }
    return true;
  }

  // Corrige les créations vierges qui utilisaient encore une phrase vide.
  window.makeMaintenanceDefault = minimalMaintenance;
  safe(function(){ makeMaintenanceDefault = minimalMaintenance; });

  // Corrige le rendu preview, même si un ancien objet maintenance était vide.
  var oldPreview = window.previewMaintenance || safe(function(){ return previewMaintenance; }, null);
  if(typeof oldPreview === 'function'){
    window.previewMaintenance = function(){
      ensureMaintenanceSlogan(false);
      var html = oldPreview.apply(this, arguments) || '';
      // Sécurité supplémentaire : si le rendu hérité sort encore une cellule vide, on l'alimente.
      html = String(html).replace(/(<td\s+class=["']maint-v2-safety-mid["'][^>]*>)\s*(<\/td>)/i, '$1' + esc(DEFAULT_SLOGAN) + '$2');
      return html;
    };
    safe(function(){ previewMaintenance = window.previewMaintenance; });
  }

  // Corrige le flux de sélection de modèle minimal V71 et le bouton Nouveau V72 sans toucher au PDF/JSON.
  var oldOpenMinimal = window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71;
  if(typeof oldOpenMinimal === 'function'){
    window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71 = function(id){
      var r = oldOpenMinimal.apply(this, arguments);
      if(String(id || '') === 'maintenance'){
        ensureMaintenanceSlogan(true);
        safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
        safe(function(){ if(typeof render === 'function') render(); });
        safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
      }
      return r;
    };
  }

  var oldReset = window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72;
  if(typeof oldReset === 'function'){
    window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72 = function(){
      var wasMaintenance = hasState() && state.active === 'maintenance';
      var r = oldReset.apply(this, arguments);
      if(wasMaintenance){
        ensureMaintenanceSlogan(true);
        safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
        safe(function(){ if(typeof render === 'function') render(); });
        safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
      }
      return r;
    };
  }

  // Au chargement d'une ancienne sauvegarde maintenance, on alimente uniquement si le champ est vide.
  function boot(){
    if(hasState() && state.active === 'maintenance'){
      ensureMaintenanceSlogan(false);
      safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
      safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
    }
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);
  else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(boot, 80); setTimeout(boot, 400); });
})();
</script>
<!-- ============================================================
     V74 — Maintenance : preview = source de saisie, plus d'écrasement par le volet caché
     Ne touche PAS au moteur V65/V64 : bouton jaune, PDF, JSON auto, toolbar.
   ============================================================ -->
<script id="v74-maintenance-preview-sync-fix">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V74_MAINT_SYNC_FIX__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V74_MAINT_SYNC_FIX__ = true;

  var DEFAULT_SLOGAN = 'Un contrôle rigoureux garanti votre sécurité, la qualité de nos produits et la disponibilité de nos machines.';

  function safe(fn, fb){ try { return fn(); } catch(e) { console.warn('[V74 maintenance sync]', e); return fb; } }
  function qs(s,r){ return (r||document).querySelector(s); }
  function qsa(s,r){ return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s)); }
  function hasState(){ return safe(function(){ return typeof state !== 'undefined' && state; }, false); }

  function ensureMaintenanceBase(forceSlogan){
    if(!hasState()) return null;
    if(!state.maintenance || typeof state.maintenance !== 'object') state.maintenance = {};
    var d = state.maintenance;
    if(!String(d.title || '').trim()) d.title = 'MAINTENANCE 1ER NIVEAU';
    if(d.machine == null) d.machine = '';
    if(d.subtitle == null) d.subtitle = 'CONTRÔLES DÉMARRAGE MACHINE';
    if(d.secteur == null) d.secteur = '';
    if(d.poste == null) d.poste = '';
    if(d.duree == null) d.duree = '';
    if(forceSlogan || !String(d.slogan || '').trim()) d.slogan = DEFAULT_SLOGAN;
    if(!String(d.footer || '').trim()) d.footer = 'SÉCURITÉ AVANT TOUT !';
    if(d.machineImage == null) d.machineImage = '';
    if(!Array.isArray(d.epiImages)) d.epiImages = [];
    if(!Array.isArray(d.rows) || !d.rows.length){
      d.rows = [{number:'01', title:'', controls:'', illustration:'', illustrations:[], why:'', risk:''}];
    }
    d.rows = d.rows.map(function(r,i){
      r = r || {};
      if(!String(r.number || '').trim()) r.number = String(i+1).padStart(2,'0');
      if(r.title == null) r.title = '';
      if(r.controls == null) r.controls = '';
      if(r.why == null) r.why = '';
      if(r.risk == null) r.risk = '';
      if(!Array.isArray(r.illustrations)) r.illustrations = [];
      return r;
    });
    return d;
  }

  function kioskPreviewMode(){
    return !!(document.body && document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc') && !document.body.classList.contains('ws-form-open'));
  }

  function dialogOpen(){
    return !!qs('#v47Modal.open,#v66Backdrop.open,#v68Backdrop.open,#v69Backdrop.open');
  }

  // Cause réelle du bug : updatePreview() appelait syncMaintenanceFromEditor(),
  // qui relisait les anciens champs du volet masqué et écrasait les modifications faites dans la preview.
  var previousSync = safe(function(){ return window.syncMaintenanceFromEditor || syncMaintenanceFromEditor; }, null);
  window.syncMaintenanceFromEditor = function(){
    if(!hasState() || state.active !== 'maintenance') return;
    ensureMaintenanceBase(false);

    // En mode kiosque / preview remplissable, la preview est la source de vérité.
    // Le volet classique étant masqué, on ne le relit plus.
    if(kioskPreviewMode() || dialogOpen()) return;

    if(typeof previousSync === 'function' && previousSync !== window.syncMaintenanceFromEditor){
      return previousSync.apply(this, arguments);
    }
  };
  safe(function(){ syncMaintenanceFromEditor = window.syncMaintenanceFromEditor; });

  function tagMaintenancePreview(){
    if(!hasState() || state.active !== 'maintenance') return;
    var host = qs('#previewHost');
    if(!host) return;
    function tag(el, kind, label, index){
      if(!el) return;
      el.classList.add('v47-zone');
      el.setAttribute('data-v47-kind', kind);
      el.setAttribute('data-v47-label', label || 'Modifier');
      if(index !== undefined) el.setAttribute('data-v47-index', String(index));
    }
    tag(qs('.maint-v2-logo-cell,.maint-v2-logo',host),'logo','Logo');
    tag(qs('.maint-v2-title-cell',host),'maint-header','En-tête');
    tag(qs('.maint-v2-machine-cell,.maint-v2-machine-img',host),'maint-machine','Image machine');
    tag(qs('.maint-v2-meta-table',host),'maint-header','Secteur / poste / durée');
    tag(qs('.maint-v2-safety-table',host),'maint-safety','Phrase sécurité / EPI');
    qsa('.maint-v2-table tbody tr',host).forEach(function(tr,i){ tag(tr,'maint-row','Contrôle '+(i+1),i); });
  }

  // Renforce le rendu maintenance : si la phrase sécurité est vide, on l'affiche quand même.
  var oldPreview = safe(function(){ return window.previewMaintenance || previewMaintenance; }, null);
  if(typeof oldPreview === 'function'){
    window.previewMaintenance = function(){
      ensureMaintenanceBase(false);
      var html = oldPreview.apply(this, arguments) || '';
      html = String(html).replace(/(<td\s+class=["']maint-v2-safety-mid["'][^>]*>)\s*(<\/td>)/i, '$1' + DEFAULT_SLOGAN.replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];}) + '$2');
      return html;
    };
    safe(function(){ previewMaintenance = window.previewMaintenance; });
  }

  // Corrige les bases vierges quand on choisit Maintenance ou quand on clique Nouveau.
  var oldOpenMinimal = window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71;
  if(typeof oldOpenMinimal === 'function' && !oldOpenMinimal.__v74Wrapped){
    var wrappedOpen = function(id){
      var r = oldOpenMinimal.apply(this, arguments);
      if(String(id || '') === 'maintenance'){
        ensureMaintenanceBase(true);
        safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
        safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
        setTimeout(tagMaintenancePreview, 40);
      }
      return r;
    };
    wrappedOpen.__v74Wrapped = true;
    window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71 = wrappedOpen;
  }

  var oldReset = window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72;
  if(typeof oldReset === 'function' && !oldReset.__v74Wrapped){
    var wrappedReset = function(){
      var wasMaint = hasState() && state.active === 'maintenance';
      var r = oldReset.apply(this, arguments);
      if(wasMaint){
        ensureMaintenanceBase(true);
        safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
        safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
        setTimeout(tagMaintenancePreview, 40);
      }
      return r;
    };
    wrappedReset.__v74Wrapped = true;
    window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72 = wrappedReset;
  }

  // Capture préventive : si le bouton Nouveau local de V72 est cliqué en Maintenance,
  // on repasse juste après pour garantir la phrase sécurité et la source preview.
  window.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var t = ev.target;
    if(!t || !t.closest) return;
    if(t.closest('#v64Topbar [data-v72-act="reset"],#v59ActionBar [data-v72-act="reset"]')){
      var wasMaint = hasState() && state.active === 'maintenance';
      if(wasMaint){ setTimeout(function(){ ensureMaintenanceBase(true); safe(function(){ if(typeof persist==='function') persist(); }); safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview==='function') updatePreview(); }); tagMaintenancePreview(); }, 120); }
    }
  }, true);

  function boot(){
    if(hasState() && state.active === 'maintenance'){
      ensureMaintenanceBase(false);
      safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
    }
    setTimeout(tagMaintenancePreview, 60);
    setTimeout(tagMaintenancePreview, 300);
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);
  else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(boot, 100); setTimeout(boot, 500); });
  if(window.MutationObserver){
    var host = qs('#previewHost');
    if(host) new MutationObserver(function(){ setTimeout(tagMaintenancePreview, 30); }).observe(host, {childList:true, subtree:true});
  }
})();
</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V75 — Fiche sécurité machine : mapping preview + initiales par défaut
     Ne touche PAS au moteur V65/V64 : bouton jaune, PDF, JSON auto, toolbar.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="v75-fiche-sync-style">
  .v75-fiche-backdrop{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2147483600;background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);display:none;backdrop-filter:blur(2px);}
  .v75-fiche-backdrop.open{display:block;}
  .v75-fiche-modal{position:fixed;left:50%;top:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:2147483601;width:min(720px,calc(100vw - 24px));max-height:calc(100vh - 28px);display:none;grid-template-rows:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto;background:#fff;color:#111;border:2px solid #111;border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.35);overflow:hidden;font-family:'DM Sans',Arial,sans-serif;}

  .v75-foot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;background:#fff9dc;border-top:1px solid #e4d692;padding:12px 16px;color:#111;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:800;}
  .v75-foot .primary{background:#111!important;color:#ffd200!important;border-color:#111!important;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.v75-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.v75-fiche-modal{top:12px;transform:translateX(-50%);max-height:calc(100vh - 24px)}}
  @media print{.v75-fiche-backdrop,.v75-fiche-modal{display:none!important}}
