<script id="v75-fiche-sync-script">
/* ============================================================
   V75 — Fiche sécurité machine : preview = source + initiales défaut
   Ne touche PAS au moteur V65/V64 : bouton jaune, PDF, JSON auto, toolbar.
   ============================================================ */
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V75_FICHE_SYNC_FIX__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V75_FICHE_SYNC_FIX__ = true;

  var DEFAULT_INITIALS = 'SUP';

  function safe(fn, fb){ try { return fn(); } catch(e) { console.warn('[V75 fiche sync]', e); return fb; } }
  function qs(s,r){ return (r||document).querySelector(s); }
  function qsa(s,r){ return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||document).querySelectorAll(s)); }
  function hasState(){ return safe(function(){ return typeof state !== 'undefined' && state; }, false); }
  function esc(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];}); }
  function strip(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).replace(/<br\s*\/?\s*>/gi,'\n').replace(/<[^>]+>/g,'').trim(); }
  function nl2br(v){ return esc(v).replace(/\n/g,'<br>'); }

  function ensureFicheBase(forceInitials){
    if(!hasState()) return null;
    if(!state.fiche || typeof state.fiche !== 'object') state.fiche = {};
    var d = state.fiche;
    if(!String(d.number || '').trim()) d.number = '001';
    if(d.date == null) d.date = '';
    if(forceInitials || !String(d.initials || '').trim()) d.initials = DEFAULT_INITIALS;
    if(d.machine == null) d.machine = '';
    if(d.gmao == null) d.gmao = '';
    if(d.brandType == null) d.brandType = '';
    if(d.material == null) d.material = '';
    if(d.epi == null) d.epi = '';
    if(d.qualification == null) d.qualification = '';
    if(d.machinePhoto == null) d.machinePhoto = '';
    if(!Array.isArray(d.machinePhotos)) d.machinePhotos = d.machinePhoto ? [{src:d.machinePhoto, caption:''}] : [];
    if(!Array.isArray(d.risks) || !d.risks.length){
      var risk = safe(function(){ return typeof makeRisk === 'function' ? makeRisk() : null; }, null) || {task:'', selected:[], prevention:''};
      d.risks = [risk];
    }
    d.risks = d.risks.map(function(r){
      r = r || {};
      return {
        task: r.task || '',
        danger: r.danger || '',
        gravity: r.gravity || '',
        prevention: r.prevention || '',
        picto: r.picto || '',
        selected: Array.isArray(r.selected) ? r.selected : []
      };
    });
    if(!String(d.accident || '').trim()) d.accident = "En cas d'accident, alerter un secouriste du travail et/ou le chef d'équipe et/ou le Team Leader.";
    if(!String(d.incendie || '').trim()) d.incendie = "En cas d'incendie, alerter le chef d'équipe et/ou le Team Leader.";
    if(d.accidentIcon == null) d.accidentIcon = '';
    if(d.incendieIcon == null) d.incendieIcon = '';
    return d;
  }

  var previousEnsure = safe(function(){ return window.ensureFicheSecuriteMachine || ensureFicheSecuriteMachine; }, null);
  window.ensureFicheSecuriteMachine = function(){
    if(typeof previousEnsure === 'function' && previousEnsure !== window.ensureFicheSecuriteMachine){
      safe(function(){ previousEnsure.apply(this, arguments); });
    }
    return ensureFicheBase(false);
  };
  safe(function(){ ensureFicheSecuriteMachine = window.ensureFicheSecuriteMachine; });

  function kioskPreviewMode(){
    return !!(document.body && document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc') && !document.body.classList.contains('ws-form-open'));
  }
  function dialogOpen(){
    return !!qs('#v47Modal.open,#v66Backdrop.open,#v68Backdrop.open,#v69Backdrop.open,#v75FicheModal.open');
  }

  // Même bug que la maintenance : updatePreview() relisait le volet masqué et réécrasait la fiche.
  var previousSync = safe(function(){ return window.syncFicheFromEditor || syncFicheFromEditor; }, null);
  window.syncFicheFromEditor = function(){
    if(!hasState() || state.active !== 'fiche') return;
    ensureFicheBase(false);
    if(kioskPreviewMode() || dialogOpen()) return;
    if(typeof previousSync === 'function' && previousSync !== window.syncFicheFromEditor){
      return previousSync.apply(this, arguments);
    }
  };
  safe(function(){ syncFicheFromEditor = window.syncFicheFromEditor; });

  // Ajoute Initiales dans la preview, sans réécrire tout le rendu fiche.
  var oldPreview = safe(function(){ return window.previewFiche || previewFiche; }, null);
  if(typeof oldPreview === 'function' && !oldPreview.__v75Wrapped){
    var wrappedPreview = function(){
      var d = ensureFicheBase(false) || {};
      var html = String(oldPreview.apply(this, arguments) || '');
      if(html.indexOf('<strong>Initiales</strong>') === -1){
        html = html.replace('<div><strong>Machine</strong>', '<div><strong>Initiales</strong><div>'+esc(d.initials || DEFAULT_INITIALS)+'</div></div><div><strong>Machine</strong>');
      }
      return html;
    };
    wrappedPreview.__v75Wrapped = true;
    window.previewFiche = wrappedPreview;
    safe(function(){ previewFiche = window.previewFiche; });
  }

  // Boîte dédiée à l'en-tête fiche : ajoute Initiales et évite les anciens chemins fragiles.
  function modal(){
    var b = qs('#v75FicheBackdrop');
    var m = qs('#v75FicheModal');
    if(!b){
      b = document.createElement('div');
      b.id = 'v75FicheBackdrop';
      b.className = 'v75-fiche-backdrop';
      document.body.appendChild(b);
      b.addEventListener('click', closeModal, true);
    }
    if(!m){
      m = document.createElement('div');
      m.id = 'v75FicheModal';
      m.className = 'v75-fiche-modal';
      m.setAttribute('role','dialog');
      m.setAttribute('aria-modal','true');
      document.body.appendChild(m);
    }
    return m;
  }
  function commit(){
    safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
    safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
    setTimeout(tagFichePreview, 40);
  }
  function closeModal(){
    var b=qs('#v75FicheBackdrop'), m=qs('#v75FicheModal');
    if(b) b.classList.remove('open');
    if(m) m.classList.remove('open');
    commit();
  }
  function input(label,path,value,type){
    return '<div class="field"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><input type="'+esc(type||'text')+'" data-v75-fiche-path="'+esc(path)+'" value="'+esc(value||'')+'"></div>';
  }
  function area(label,path,value){
    return '<div class="field" style="grid-column:1/-1"><label>'+esc(label)+'</label><textarea data-v75-fiche-html="'+esc(path)+'">'+esc(strip(value||''))+'</textarea></div>';
  }
  function openIdentityModal(){
    var d = ensureFicheBase(false) || {};
    var m = modal();
    m.innerHTML = ''+
      '<div class="v75-head"><div><strong>Identification machine</strong><small>Fiche sécurité machine</small></div><button type="button" data-v75-close>Fermer</button></div>'+
      '<div class="v75-body"><div class="v75-grid">'+
        input('N° fiche','number',d.number||'001')+
        input('Date','date',d.date||'','date')+
        input('Initiales','initials',d.initials||DEFAULT_INITIALS)+
        input('Machine','machine',d.machine||'')+
        input('N° GMAO','gmao',d.gmao||'')+
        input('Marque / Type','brandType',d.brandType||'')+
        input('Produit / matériaux','material',d.material||'')+
        input('EPI spécifique','epi',d.epi||'')+
        area('Qualification et autorisation','qualification',d.qualification||'')+
      '</div></div>'+
      '<div class="v75-foot"><span>Initiales préremplies : '+esc(DEFAULT_INITIALS)+'.</span><button type="button" class="primary" data-v75-close>OK</button></div>';
    qsa('[data-v75-close]',m).forEach(function(el){ el.addEventListener('click', closeModal, true); });
    qsa('[data-v75-fiche-path]',m).forEach(function(el){
      el.addEventListener('input', function(){ var data=ensureFicheBase(false); data[el.getAttribute('data-v75-fiche-path')] = el.value; commit(); }, false);
      el.addEventListener('change', function(){ var data=ensureFicheBase(false); data[el.getAttribute('data-v75-fiche-path')] = el.value; commit(); }, false);
    });
    qsa('[data-v75-fiche-html]',m).forEach(function(el){
      el.addEventListener('input', function(){ var data=ensureFicheBase(false); data[el.getAttribute('data-v75-fiche-html')] = nl2br(el.value); commit(); }, false);
    });
    qs('#v75FicheBackdrop').classList.add('open');
    m.classList.add('open');
    var first=m.querySelector('input,textarea'); if(first) setTimeout(function(){ first.focus(); }, 30);
  }

  function tagFichePreview(){
    if(!hasState() || state.active !== 'fiche') return;
    var host = qs('#previewHost');
    if(!host) return;
    function tag(el, kind, label, index){
      if(!el) return;
      el.classList.add('v47-zone');
      el.setAttribute('data-v47-kind', kind);
      el.setAttribute('data-v47-label', label || 'Modifier');
      if(index !== undefined) el.setAttribute('data-v47-index', String(index));
    }
    tag(qs('.machine-photo-box',host),'fiche-photos','Photos machine');
    tag(qs('.machine-head',host),'fiche-identity','Identification');
    qsa('.risk-table tbody tr',host).forEach(function(tr,i){ tag(tr,'fiche-risk','Risque '+(i+1),i); });
    tag(qs('.alert-box',host),'fiche-alerts','Alertes');
  }

  // Interception uniquement pour l'identification : les risques/pictos restent gérés par les systèmes existants.
  window.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    if(!hasState() || state.active !== 'fiche') return;
    var host = qs('#previewHost');
    if(!host || !host.contains(ev.target)) return;
    var zone = ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('.v47-zone');
    if(!zone || !host.contains(zone)) return;
    if(zone.getAttribute('data-v47-kind') !== 'fiche-identity') return;
    ev.preventDefault();
    ev.stopPropagation();
    ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
    openIdentityModal();
  }, true);

  // Corrige les bases vierges au choix du modèle et au bouton Nouveau.
  var oldOpenMinimal = window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71;
  if(typeof oldOpenMinimal === 'function' && !oldOpenMinimal.__v75FicheWrapped){
    var wrappedOpen = function(id){
      var r = oldOpenMinimal.apply(this, arguments);
      if(String(id || '') === 'fiche'){
        ensureFicheBase(true);
        safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
        safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
        setTimeout(tagFichePreview, 60);
      }
      return r;
    };
    wrappedOpen.__v75FicheWrapped = true;
    window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71 = wrappedOpen;
  }

  var oldReset = window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72;
  if(typeof oldReset === 'function' && !oldReset.__v75FicheWrapped){
    var wrappedReset = function(){
      var wasFiche = hasState() && state.active === 'fiche';
      var r = oldReset.apply(this, arguments);
      if(wasFiche){
        ensureFicheBase(true);
        safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
        safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
        setTimeout(tagFichePreview, 60);
      }
      return r;
    };
    wrappedReset.__v75FicheWrapped = true;
    window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72 = wrappedReset;
  }

  window.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var t = ev.target;
    if(!t || !t.closest) return;
    if(t.closest('#v64Topbar [data-v72-act="reset"],#v59ActionBar [data-v72-act="reset"]')){
      var wasFiche = hasState() && state.active === 'fiche';
      if(wasFiche){
        setTimeout(function(){ ensureFicheBase(true); safe(function(){ if(typeof persist==='function') persist(); }); safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview==='function') updatePreview(); }); tagFichePreview(); }, 140);
      }
    }
  }, true);

  function boot(){
    if(hasState() && state.active === 'fiche'){
      ensureFicheBase(false);
      safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
      safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
    }
    setTimeout(tagFichePreview, 80);
    setTimeout(tagFichePreview, 350);
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);
  else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(boot, 120); setTimeout(boot, 500); });
  if(window.MutationObserver){
    var host = qs('#previewHost');
    if(host) new MutationObserver(function(){ setTimeout(tagFichePreview, 30); }).observe(host, {childList:true, subtree:true});
  }
})();

</script>

<script id="v76-securite-sync-fix-script">
/* ============================================================
   V76 — Consigne sécurité : preview = source + rédacteur défaut
   Ne touche PAS au moteur V65/V64 : bouton jaune, PDF, JSON auto, toolbar.
   ============================================================ */
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V76_SECURITE_SYNC_FIX__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V76_SECURITE_SYNC_FIX__ = true;

  var DEFAULT_AUTHOR = 'SUP';

  function safe(fn, fb){ try { return fn(); } catch(e) { console.warn('[V76 securite sync]', e); return fb; } }
  function qs(s,r){ return (r||document).querySelector(s); }
  function hasState(){ return safe(function(){ return typeof state !== 'undefined' && state; }, false); }
  function active(){ return safe(function(){ return state.active || ''; }, ''); }
  function kioskPreviewMode(){
    return !!(document.body && document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc') && !document.body.classList.contains('ws-form-open'));
  }
  function dialogOpen(){
    return !!qs('#v47Modal.open,#v68Backdrop.open,#v69Backdrop.open,#v75FicheModal.open');
  }
  function isOldUserInitials(v){
    return String(v == null ? '' : v).trim().toUpperCase() === 'CL';
  }

  function normalizeSecurityData(forceAuthor){
    if(!hasState()) return null;
    if(!state.securite || typeof state.securite !== 'object') state.securite = {};
    var d = state.securite;

    if(d.title == null || d.title === '') d.title = 'CONSIGNE SÉCURITÉ';
    if(d.subtitle == null || d.subtitle === '') d.subtitle = 'À RESPECTER IMPÉRATIVEMENT';
    if(d.date == null) d.date = '';

    // Évite de sortir des documents au nom de l'utilisateur par défaut.
    if(forceAuthor || !String(d.author || '').trim() || isOldUserInitials(d.author)) d.author = DEFAULT_AUTHOR;

    if(d.equipment == null) d.equipment = '';
    if(d.localisation == null) d.localisation = '';
    if(d.dangerTitle == null || d.dangerTitle === '') d.dangerTitle = 'SITUATION DANGEREUSE';
    if(d.dangerSubtitle == null || d.dangerSubtitle === '') d.dangerSubtitle = 'Repérer la zone de danger';
    if(d.mainPhoto == null) d.mainPhoto = '';
    if(!Array.isArray(d.photos)) d.photos = d.mainPhoto ? [d.mainPhoto] : [];
    d.photos = d.photos.filter(Boolean);
    if(d.mainPhoto && !d.photos.length) d.photos.push(d.mainPhoto);

    if(!Array.isArray(d.cards)) d.cards = [];
    d.cards = d.cards.map(function(c){
      c = c || {};
      return {
        type: c.type || 'risks',
        title: c.title || (c.type === 'never' ? 'NE JAMAIS' : c.type === 'mandatory' ? 'OBLIGATOIRE' : 'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX'),
        items: Array.isArray(c.items) ? c.items : []
      };
    });
    if(!Array.isArray(d.epi)) d.epi = [];
    if(!d.bottomEnabled || typeof d.bottomEnabled !== 'object') d.bottomEnabled = {incident:false, accident:false, deja:false};
    if(!Array.isArray(d.incident)) d.incident = [];
    if(d.accidentText == null) d.accidentText = 'PRÉVENIR IMMÉDIATEMENT';
    if(d.emergencyNumber == null) d.emergencyNumber = '112';
    if(d.dejaTitle == null) d.dejaTitle = 'DÉJÀ ARRIVÉ !';
    if(d.dejaText == null) d.dejaText = 'Accident / presqu’accident déjà constaté dans l’atelier';
    if(d.footer == null || d.footer === '') d.footer = 'CONSIGNE SÉCURITÉ À RESPECTER';
    return d;
  }

  // Corrige la fonction globale utilisée par les rendus et les modales.
  var previousEnsure = safe(function(){ return window.ensureSecurityData || ensureSecurityData; }, null);
  window.ensureSecurityData = function(){
    var d = null;
    if(typeof previousEnsure === 'function' && previousEnsure !== window.ensureSecurityData){
      d = safe(function(){ return previousEnsure.apply(this, arguments); }, null);
    }
    return normalizeSecurityData(false) || d;
  };
  safe(function(){ ensureSecurityData = window.ensureSecurityData; });

  // Même cause que Maintenance : updatePreview() relisait le volet masqué et écrasait la preview.
  var previousSync = safe(function(){ return window.syncSecuriteFromEditor || syncSecuriteFromEditor; }, null);
  window.syncSecuriteFromEditor = function(){
    if(!hasState() || state.active !== 'securite') return;
    normalizeSecurityData(false);
    // En mode kiosque/preview remplissable, les champs de la preview sont la source de vérité.
    // Le volet éditeur est masqué : il ne doit jamais réécrire par-dessus les données.
    if(kioskPreviewMode() || dialogOpen()) return;
    if(typeof previousSync === 'function' && previousSync !== window.syncSecuriteFromEditor){
      return previousSync.apply(this, arguments);
    }
  };
  safe(function(){ syncSecuriteFromEditor = window.syncSecuriteFromEditor; });

  function commit(){
    safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
    safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
  }

  // Au choix du modèle Consigne sécurité et au bouton Nouveau, repartir avec SUP, pas CL.
  var oldOpenMinimal = window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71;
  if(typeof oldOpenMinimal === 'function' && !oldOpenMinimal.__v76SecWrapped){
    window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71 = function(id){
      var r = oldOpenMinimal.apply(this, arguments);
      if(String(id || '') === 'securite'){
        normalizeSecurityData(true);
        commit();
      }
      return r;
    };
    window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71.__v76SecWrapped = true;
  }

  var oldReset = window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72;
  if(typeof oldReset === 'function' && !oldReset.__v76SecWrapped){
    window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72 = function(){
      var wasSec = hasState() && state.active === 'securite';
      var r = oldReset.apply(this, arguments);
      if(wasSec){
        normalizeSecurityData(true);
        commit();
      }
      return r;
    };
    window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72.__v76SecWrapped = true;
  }

  // Le bouton Nouveau de la barre peut aussi passer par un listener direct : double sécurité.
  window.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var t = ev.target;
    if(!t || !t.closest) return;
    if(t.closest('#v64Topbar [data-v72-act="reset"],#v59ActionBar [data-v72-act="reset"]')){
      var wasSec = hasState() && state.active === 'securite';
      if(wasSec){
        setTimeout(function(){ normalizeSecurityData(true); commit(); }, 120);
      }
    }
  }, true);

  function boot(){
    if(hasState() && state.active === 'securite'){
      normalizeSecurityData(false);
      safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
      safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
    }
  }

  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);
  else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(boot, 120); });
})();

</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V77 — Consigne sécurité : initiales par défaut SUP mais éditables
     NE TOUCHE PAS au moteur V65/V64 : bouton jaune, PDF, JSON auto, toolbar.
   ============================================================ -->
<script id="v77-securite-author-editable">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V77_SECURITE_AUTHOR_EDITABLE__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V77_SECURITE_AUTHOR_EDITABLE__ = true;

  var DEFAULT_AUTHOR = 'SUP';

  function safe(fn, fb){ try { return fn(); } catch(e) { console.warn('[V77 securite author]', e); return fb; } }
  function qs(sel, root){ return (root || document).querySelector(sel); }
  function qsa(sel, root){ return Array.prototype.slice.call((root || document).querySelectorAll(sel)); }
  function hasState(){ return safe(function(){ return typeof state !== 'undefined' && state; }, false); }
  function active(){ return safe(function(){ return state.active || ''; }, ''); }
  function commit(){
    safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
    safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
  }
  function isOldDefault(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).trim().toUpperCase() === 'CL'; }

  function ensureSecV77(opts){
    opts = opts || {};
    if(!hasState()) return {};
    if(!state.securite || typeof state.securite !== 'object') state.securite = {};
    var d = state.securite;

    if(d.title == null || d.title === '') d.title = 'CONSIGNE SÉCURITÉ';
    if(d.subtitle == null || d.subtitle === '') d.subtitle = 'À RESPECTER IMPÉRATIVEMENT';
    if(d.date == null) d.date = '';

    // Règle : SUP est seulement la valeur par défaut. Dès que l'utilisateur écrit autre chose,
    // on ne force plus jamais SUP par-dessus sa saisie.
    if(opts.forceDefaultAuthor){
      d.author = DEFAULT_AUTHOR;
      d.__authorTouchedV77 = false;
    } else if(!String(d.author || '').trim()){
      d.author = DEFAULT_AUTHOR;
      d.__authorTouchedV77 = false;
    } else if(isOldDefault(d.author) && !d.__authorTouchedV77){
      d.author = DEFAULT_AUTHOR;
      d.__authorTouchedV77 = false;
    }

    if(d.equipment == null) d.equipment = '';
    if(d.localisation == null) d.localisation = '';
    if(d.dangerTitle == null || d.dangerTitle === '') d.dangerTitle = 'SITUATION DANGEREUSE';
    if(d.dangerSubtitle == null || d.dangerSubtitle === '') d.dangerSubtitle = 'Repérer la zone de danger';
    if(d.mainPhoto == null) d.mainPhoto = '';
    if(!Array.isArray(d.photos)) d.photos = d.mainPhoto ? [d.mainPhoto] : [];
    d.photos = d.photos.filter(Boolean);
    if(d.mainPhoto && !d.photos.length) d.photos.push(d.mainPhoto);

    if(!Array.isArray(d.cards)) d.cards = [];
    d.cards = d.cards.map(function(c){
      c = c || {};
      return {
        type: c.type || 'risks',
        title: c.title || (c.type === 'never' ? 'NE JAMAIS' : c.type === 'mandatory' ? 'OBLIGATOIRE' : 'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX'),
        items: Array.isArray(c.items) ? c.items : []
      };
    });
    if(!Array.isArray(d.epi)) d.epi = [];
    if(!d.bottomEnabled || typeof d.bottomEnabled !== 'object') d.bottomEnabled = {incident:false, accident:false, deja:false};
    if(!Array.isArray(d.incident)) d.incident = [];
    if(d.accidentText == null) d.accidentText = 'PRÉVENIR IMMÉDIATEMENT';
    if(d.emergencyNumber == null) d.emergencyNumber = '112';
    if(d.dejaTitle == null) d.dejaTitle = 'DÉJÀ ARRIVÉ !';
    if(d.dejaText == null) d.dejaText = 'Accident / presqu’accident déjà constaté dans l’atelier';
    if(d.footer == null || d.footer === '') d.footer = 'CONSIGNE SÉCURITÉ À RESPECTER';
    return d;
  }

  // Remplace l'ancien ensure qui re-forçait SUP trop souvent. Ici SUP reste un défaut, pas un verrou.
  window.ensureSecurityData = function(){ return ensureSecV77({forceDefaultAuthor:false}); };
  safe(function(){ ensureSecurityData = window.ensureSecurityData; });

  // Quand on repart vraiment à zéro sur le modèle, on remet SUP comme défaut propre.
  if(typeof window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71 === 'function' && !window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71.__v77SecAuthorWrapped){
    var oldOpen = window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71;
    window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71 = function(id){
      var r = oldOpen.apply(this, arguments);
      if(String(id || '') === 'securite'){
        ensureSecV77({forceDefaultAuthor:true});
        commit();
      }
      return r;
    };
    window.labodocOpenMinimalModelV71.__v77SecAuthorWrapped = true;
  }
  if(typeof window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72 === 'function' && !window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72.__v77SecAuthorWrapped){
    var oldReset = window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72;
    window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72 = function(){
      var wasSec = hasState() && state.active === 'securite';
      var r = oldReset.apply(this, arguments);
      if(wasSec){
        ensureSecV77({forceDefaultAuthor:true});
        commit();
      }
      return r;
    };
    window.labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72.__v77SecAuthorWrapped = true;
  }

  // Capture spécifique du champ "Rédigé par" de la modale Consigne sécurité.
  // On écrit dans state.securite.author et on marque la saisie comme volontaire.
  document.addEventListener('input', function(ev){
    var el = ev.target;
    if(!el || !el.matches || !el.matches('#v47Modal [data-v47-path="author"],#v68Backdrop [data-v68-field="author"],#v69Backdrop [data-v69-field="author"]')) return;
    if(active() !== 'securite') return;
    if(!hasState()) return;
    var d = ensureSecV77({forceDefaultAuthor:false});
    d.author = el.value;
    d.__authorTouchedV77 = true;
    commit();
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('change', function(ev){
    var el = ev.target;
    if(!el || !el.matches || !el.matches('#v47Modal [data-v47-path="author"],#v68Backdrop [data-v68-field="author"],#v69Backdrop [data-v69-field="author"]')) return;
    if(active() !== 'securite') return;
    if(!hasState()) return;
    var d = ensureSecV77({forceDefaultAuthor:false});
    d.author = el.value;
    d.__authorTouchedV77 = true;
    commit();
  }, true);

  // Si une modale s'ouvre avec l'ancien CL dans le champ, on le remplace par la valeur réelle SUP.
  function syncAuthorInputs(){
    if(active() !== 'securite' || !hasState()) return;
    var d = ensureSecV77({forceDefaultAuthor:false});
    qsa('#v47Modal [data-v47-path="author"],#v68Backdrop [data-v68-field="author"],#v69Backdrop [data-v69-field="author"]').forEach(function(el){
      if((isOldDefault(el.value) && !d.__authorTouchedV77) || !String(el.value || '').trim()) el.value = d.author || DEFAULT_AUTHOR;
    });
  }

  function boot(){
    if(active() === 'securite'){
      ensureSecV77({forceDefaultAuthor:false});
      commit();
      setTimeout(syncAuthorInputs, 60);
    }
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);
  else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(boot, 120); });
  document.addEventListener('click', function(){ setTimeout(syncAuthorInputs, 80); }, true);
  if(window.MutationObserver){
    new MutationObserver(function(){ setTimeout(syncAuthorInputs, 30); }).observe(document.body, {childList:true, subtree:true});
  }
})();
</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V78 — Consigne sécurité : Rédigé par vraiment éditable
     Ne touche PAS au moteur V65 : bouton jaune, PDF, JSON auto, toolbar.
   ============================================================ -->
<script id="v78-securite-author-really-editable">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V78_SECURITE_AUTHOR_FIX__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V78_SECURITE_AUTHOR_FIX__ = true;

  var DEFAULT_AUTHOR = 'SUP';
  var manualAuthor = null; // null = pas de saisie volontaire en cours ; string = valeur utilisateur, même vide.

  function safe(fn, fb){ try { return fn(); } catch(e) { console.warn('[V78 securite author]', e); return fb; } }
  function qs(sel, root){ return (root || document).querySelector(sel); }
  function qsa(sel, root){ return Array.prototype.slice.call((root || document).querySelectorAll(sel)); }
  function hasState(){ return safe(function(){ return typeof state !== 'undefined' && state; }, false); }
  function isSec(){ return hasState() && state.active === 'securite'; }
  function isOldDefault(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).trim().toUpperCase() === 'CL'; }
  function currentSec(){
    if(!hasState()) return null;
    if(!state.securite || typeof state.securite !== 'object') state.securite = {};
    return state.securite;
  }
  function persistOnly(){ safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); }); }
  function redraw(){
    safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
    setTimeout(function(){ safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); }); }, 20);
  }
  function setAuthor(v, opts){
    opts = opts || {};
    var d = currentSec(); if(!d) return;
    d.author = String(v == null ? '' : v);
    d.__authorTouchedV78 = !!opts.touched;
    d.__authorTouchedV77 = !!opts.touched;
    if(opts.touched) manualAuthor = d.author;
    persistOnly();
  }
  function resetAuthorDefault(){
    manualAuthor = null;
    var d = currentSec(); if(!d) return;
    d.author = DEFAULT_AUTHOR;
    d.__authorTouchedV78 = false;
    d.__authorTouchedV77 = false;
    persistOnly();
  }
  function normalizeSec(opts){
    opts = opts || {};
    var d = currentSec(); if(!d) return {};

    // Champs de base : on complète les vrais vides, sans jamais écraser une saisie utilisateur.
    if(d.title == null || d.title === '') d.title = 'CONSIGNE SÉCURITÉ';
    if(d.subtitle == null || d.subtitle === '') d.subtitle = 'À RESPECTER IMPÉRATIVEMENT';
    if(d.date == null) d.date = '';

    // Règle correcte : SUP est un défaut de création/reset, pas une valeur imposée.
    if(opts.forceDefaultAuthor){
      resetAuthorDefault();
    } else if(manualAuthor !== null){
      d.author = manualAuthor;
      d.__authorTouchedV78 = true;
      d.__authorTouchedV77 = true;
    } else if(!String(d.author || '').trim() || isOldDefault(d.author)){
      d.author = DEFAULT_AUTHOR;
      d.__authorTouchedV78 = false;
      d.__authorTouchedV77 = false;
    }

    if(d.equipment == null) d.equipment = '';
    if(d.localisation == null) d.localisation = '';
    if(d.dangerTitle == null || d.dangerTitle === '') d.dangerTitle = 'SITUATION DANGEREUSE';
    if(d.dangerSubtitle == null || d.dangerSubtitle === '') d.dangerSubtitle = 'Repérer la zone de danger';
    if(d.mainPhoto == null) d.mainPhoto = '';
    if(!Array.isArray(d.photos)) d.photos = d.mainPhoto ? [d.mainPhoto] : [];
    d.photos = d.photos.filter(Boolean);
    if(d.mainPhoto && !d.photos.length) d.photos.push(d.mainPhoto);
    if(!Array.isArray(d.cards)) d.cards = [];
    d.cards = d.cards.map(function(c){
      c = c || {};
      return {
        type: c.type || 'risks',
        title: c.title || (c.type === 'never' ? 'NE JAMAIS' : c.type === 'mandatory' ? 'OBLIGATOIRE' : 'RISQUES PRINCIPAUX'),
        items: Array.isArray(c.items) ? c.items : []
      };
    });
    if(!Array.isArray(d.epi)) d.epi = [];
    if(!d.bottomEnabled || typeof d.bottomEnabled !== 'object') d.bottomEnabled = {incident:false, accident:false, deja:false};
    if(!Array.isArray(d.incident)) d.incident = [];
    if(d.accidentText == null) d.accidentText = 'PRÉVENIR IMMÉDIATEMENT';
    if(d.emergencyNumber == null) d.emergencyNumber = '112';
    if(d.dejaTitle == null) d.dejaTitle = 'DÉJÀ ARRIVÉ !';
    if(d.dejaText == null) d.dejaText = 'Accident / presqu’accident déjà constaté dans l’atelier';
    if(d.footer == null || d.footer === '') d.footer = 'CONSIGNE SÉCURITÉ À RESPECTER';
    return d;
  }

  // Override global : toutes les modales/rendus doivent passer par cette version.
  window.ensureSecurityData = function(){ return normalizeSec({forceDefaultAuthor:false}); };
  safe(function(){ ensureSecurityData = window.ensureSecurityData; });

  // Override du sync éditeur : en mode preview/dialogue, le vieux volet caché ne doit jamais réimposer SUP.
  var previousSync = safe(function(){ return window.syncSecuriteFromEditor || syncSecuriteFromEditor; }, null);
  window.syncSecuriteFromEditor = function(){
    if(!isSec()) return;
    var dialog = !!qs('#v47Modal.open,#v68Backdrop.open,#v69Backdrop.open,#v75FicheModal.open');
    var kiosk = !!(document.body && document.body.classList.contains('v59-doc') && !document.body.classList.contains('ws-form-open'));
    normalizeSec({forceDefaultAuthor:false});
    if(dialog || kiosk) return;
    if(typeof previousSync === 'function' && previousSync !== window.syncSecuriteFromEditor){
      return previousSync.apply(this, arguments);
    }
  };
  safe(function(){ syncSecuriteFromEditor = window.syncSecuriteFromEditor; });

  function authorInputs(){
    return qsa('#v47Modal [data-v47-path="author"], #v68Backdrop [data-v68-field="author"], #v69Backdrop [data-v69-field="author"]');
  }
  function syncInputsFromState(){
    if(!isSec()) return;
    var d = normalizeSec({forceDefaultAuthor:false});
    authorInputs().forEach(function(el){
      if(!el.matches(':focus')) el.value = d.author || '';
    });
  }

  // Capture AVANT les anciens handlers : on laisse l'utilisateur taper librement, sans re-rendu qui remet SUP.
  document.addEventListener('input', function(ev){
    var el = ev.target;
    if(!el || !el.matches || !el.matches('#v47Modal [data-v47-path="author"], #v68Backdrop [data-v68-field="author"], #v69Backdrop [data-v69-field="author"]')) return;
    if(!isSec()) return;
    setAuthor(el.value, {touched:true});
    // Empêche les anciens listeners de relancer updatePreview pendant la frappe et de remettre SUP dans le champ.
    ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('change', function(ev){
    var el = ev.target;
    if(!el || !el.matches || !el.matches('#v47Modal [data-v47-path="author"], #v68Backdrop [data-v68-field="author"], #v69Backdrop [data-v69-field="author"]')) return;
    if(!isSec()) return;
    setAuthor(el.value, {touched:true});
    ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
    redraw();
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('blur', function(ev){
    var el = ev.target;
    if(!el || !el.matches || !el.matches('#v47Modal [data-v47-path="author"], #v68Backdrop [data-v68-field="author"], #v69Backdrop [data-v69-field="author"]')) return;
    if(!isSec()) return;
    setAuthor(el.value, {touched:true});
    redraw();
  }, true);

  // Au clic OK/Fermer, on prend la valeur affichée dans la boîte, puis on met à jour la preview.
  document.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var btn = ev.target && ev.target.closest ? ev.target.closest('[data-v47-close], .v47-close, #v47Modal .primary') : null;
    if(!btn || !isSec()) return;
    var inp = qs('#v47Modal [data-v47-path="author"]');
    if(inp){ setAuthor(inp.value, {touched:true}); setTimeout(redraw, 30); }
  }, true);

  // Reset / nouveau modèle : là seulement, SUP redevient le défaut.
  ['labodocOpenMinimalModelV71','labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72'].forEach(function(name){
    var old = window[name];
    if(typeof old === 'function' && !old.__v78SecAuthorWrapped){
      window[name] = function(){
        var target = arguments[0];
        var wasSec = isSec();
        var r = old.apply(this, arguments);
        if(String(target || '') === 'securite' || (name === 'labodocResetCurrentDocumentV72' && wasSec)){
          resetAuthorDefault();
          redraw();
        }
        return r;
      };
      window[name].__v78SecAuthorWrapped = true;
    }
  });

  function boot(){
    if(isSec()){
      normalizeSec({forceDefaultAuthor:false});
      persistOnly();
      setTimeout(syncInputsFromState, 80);
    }
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot);
  else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load', function(){ setTimeout(boot, 150); });
  if(window.MutationObserver){
    new MutationObserver(function(){ setTimeout(syncInputsFromState, 35); }).observe(document.body, {childList:true, subtree:true});
  }
})();

</script>
<!-- ============================================================
     V79 — Aide au diagnostic : logo figé dans le dur
     • Le logo Diagnostic ne dépend plus d'un chargement utilisateur.
     • Le clic sur le logo ne déclenche plus l'import fichier.
     • Ne touche pas au moteur V65 : bouton jaune / PDF / JSON auto / toolbar.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="patch-v79-diagnostic-logo-fige-style">
  /* Le logo diagnostic est une donnée fixe : pas de survol d'édition. */
  .diag59-logo[data-v79-locked-logo="1"],
  .diag59-logo[data-v79-locked-logo="1"] *{
    cursor:default !important;
  }
  .diag59-logo[data-v79-locked-logo="1"]::after{
    content:'Logo fixe';
    display:none;
  }
</style>
<script id="patch-v79-diagnostic-logo-fige">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__v79DiagnosticLogoLocked) return;
  window.__v79DiagnosticLogoLocked = true;

  // Logo intégré dans le fichier : léger, autonome, ne nécessite plus de chargement.
  // Remplacement futur : modifier uniquement cette constante si l'identité visuelle change.
  var V79_DIAGNOSTIC_LOGO = 'data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,' + encodeURIComponent(
    '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 360 120" role="img" aria-label="WIBAIE Production">' +
      '<rect width="360" height="120" fill="#ffffff"/>' +
      '<g transform="translate(20 20)">' +
        '<circle cx="30" cy="40" r="20" fill="#0b2444"/>' +
        '<path d="M18 40h24M30 28v24" stroke="#f3c316" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>' +
        '<path d="M53 18c18 6 29 20 31 39" fill="none" stroke="#d01818" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>' +
      '</g>' +
      '<text x="110" y="56" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="34" font-weight="900" fill="#0b2444" letter-spacing="1">WIBAIE</text>' +
      '<text x="112" y="82" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="800" fill="#0b2444" letter-spacing="2">PRODUCTION</text>' +
    '</svg>'
  );
  window.V79_DIAGNOSTIC_LOGO = V79_DIAGNOSTIC_LOGO;

  function hasState(){ return typeof window.state !== 'undefined' && window.state; }
  function hardenDiagnosticLogo(){
    try{
      if(!hasState()) return;
      state.logos = state.logos || {};
      state.logos.diagnostic = V79_DIAGNOSTIC_LOGO;
      state.diagnostic = state.diagnostic || {};
      state.diagnostic.logo = V79_DIAGNOSTIC_LOGO;
      if(typeof persist === 'function'){
        try{ persist(); }catch(_e){}
      }
    }catch(e){}
  }
  window.v79HardenDiagnosticLogo = hardenDiagnosticLogo;

  function markLockedLogo(){
    try{
      document.querySelectorAll('.diag59-logo').forEach(function(el){
        el.setAttribute('data-v79-locked-logo','1');
        var img = el.querySelector('img');
        if(img && img.getAttribute('src') !== V79_DIAGNOSTIC_LOGO){
          img.setAttribute('src', V79_DIAGNOSTIC_LOGO);
        }
      });
    }catch(e){}
  }

  // getLogoForTab est utilisé par l'ancien rendu diagnostic.
  var oldGetLogoForTab = window.getLogoForTab;
  window.getLogoForTab = function(tabId){
    if(tabId === 'diagnostic') return V79_DIAGNOSTIC_LOGO;
    return oldGetLogoForTab ? oldGetLogoForTab.apply(this, arguments) : '';
  };

  // Le nouveau rendu diagnostic lit d.logo : on force la donnée avant chaque rendu.
  ['renderDiagnostic60','renderDiagnosticV59','previewDiagnostic','updatePreview','render','persist'].forEach(function(fnName){
    var oldFn = window[fnName];
    if(typeof oldFn !== 'function' || oldFn.__v79Wrapped) return;
    var wrapped = function(){
      if(fnName !== 'persist') hardenDiagnosticLogo();
      var ret = oldFn.apply(this, arguments);
      if(fnName !== 'persist'){
        hardenDiagnosticLogo();
        setTimeout(markLockedLogo, 0);
      }
      return ret;
    };
    wrapped.__v79Wrapped = true;
    window[fnName] = wrapped;
  });

  // Si un clic logo existe encore dans la preview, il ne doit plus ouvrir de sélecteur.
  var oldChooseLogoForTab = window.chooseLogoForTab;
  window.chooseLogoForTab = function(tabId){
    if(tabId === 'diagnostic'){
      hardenDiagnosticLogo();
      markLockedLogo();
      if(typeof window.toast === 'function'){
        try{ window.toast('Logo diagnostic figé dans le fichier.'); }catch(_e){}
      }
      return;
    }
    return oldChooseLogoForTab ? oldChooseLogoForTab.apply(this, arguments) : undefined;
  };
  window.setDiagV59LogoClick = function(){
    hardenDiagnosticLogo();
    markLockedLogo();
    if(typeof window.toast === 'function'){
      try{ window.toast('Logo diagnostic figé dans le fichier.'); }catch(_e){}
    }
  };
  window.setDiagV59Logo = async function(){
    hardenDiagnosticLogo();
    markLockedLogo();
  };

  // Sécurité : si l'input fichier logo est utilisé avec target diagnostic, on annule.
  document.addEventListener('change', function(ev){
    var t = ev.target;
    if(!t) return;
    if(t.id === 'diag59-logo-file' || (t.id === 'logoInput' && t.dataset && t.dataset.targetTab === 'diagnostic')){
      ev.preventDefault();
      ev.stopPropagation();
      t.value = '';
      hardenDiagnosticLogo();
      markLockedLogo();
    }
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var target = ev.target && ev.target.closest ? ev.target.closest('.diag59-logo,[data-preview-kind="logo"]') : null;
    if(!target) return;
    try{
      var mod = (typeof state !== 'undefined' && state && state.active) ? state.active : '';
      if(mod === 'diagnostic' || target.classList.contains('diag59-logo')){
        ev.preventDefault();
        ev.stopPropagation();
        hardenDiagnosticLogo();
        markLockedLogo();
      }
    }catch(e){}
  }, true);

  function boot(){
    hardenDiagnosticLogo();
    markLockedLogo();
    try{
      if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview();
    }catch(e){}
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot, {once:true});
  else boot();
})();
</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V80 — Logos métiers figés dans le dur
     • Production : Nouvelle consigne + Aide au diagnostic
     • Maintenance : Maintenance 1er niveau
     • Sécurité : Consigne sécurité
     • Qualité : Nouvelle consigne lorsque Type = Consigne Qualité
     • Ne touche pas au moteur V65 : bouton jaune / PDF / JSON auto / toolbar.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="patch-v80-logos-metiers-style">
  .nc-logo-inner img,
  .diag59-logo img,
  .maint-v2-logo img,
  .sec-logo-inner img{
    object-fit:contain !important;
    max-width:100% !important;
    max-height:100% !important;
  }
  .nc-logo,
  .diag59-logo,
  .maint-v2-logo,
  .sec-logo{
    cursor:default !important;
  }
  .nc-logo[data-v80-fixed-logo="1"]::after,
  .diag59-logo[data-v80-fixed-logo="1"]::after,
  .maint-v2-logo[data-v80-fixed-logo="1"]::after,
  .sec-logo[data-v80-fixed-logo="1"]::after{
    display:none !important;
    content:'' !important;
  }
</style>
<script id="patch-v80-logos-metiers-en-dur">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V80_LOGOS_METIERS__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V80_LOGOS_METIERS__ = true;

  var V80_LOGOS = {
    production: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    maintenance: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    securite: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    qualite: 'data:image/png;base64,'
  };
  window.LABODOC_V80_LOGOS = V80_LOGOS;

  function safe(fn, fallback){ try{ return fn(); }catch(e){ console.warn('[V80 logos]', e); return fallback; } }
  function hasState(){ return typeof window.state !== 'undefined' && window.state; }
  function norm(v){ return String(v||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g,'').trim(); }
  function isQualityConsigne(){
    return safe(function(){
      var d = state.consigne || {};
      var t = norm(d.typeConsigne || d.level || d.type || '');
      return t.indexOf('qualite') > -1;
    }, false);
  }
  function fixedLogoFor(tabId){
    if(tabId === 'maintenance') return V80_LOGOS.maintenance;
    if(tabId === 'securite') return V80_LOGOS.securite;
    if(tabId === 'diagnostic') return V80_LOGOS.production;
    if(tabId === 'consigne') return isQualityConsigne() ? V80_LOGOS.qualite : V80_LOGOS.production;
    return '';
  }
  function enforceLogos(){
    if(!hasState()) return;
    state.logos = state.logos || {};
    state.logos.consigne = V80_LOGOS.production;
    state.logos.maintenance = V80_LOGOS.maintenance;
    state.logos.securite = V80_LOGOS.securite;
    state.logos.diagnostic = V80_LOGOS.production;
    state.diagnostic = state.diagnostic || {};
    state.diagnostic.logo = V80_LOGOS.production;
  }
  window.v80EnforceHardLogos = enforceLogos;

  var oldGetLogoForTab = window.getLogoForTab;
  window.getLogoForTab = function(tabId){
    var fixed = fixedLogoFor(tabId);
    if(fixed) return fixed;
    return oldGetLogoForTab ? oldGetLogoForTab.apply(this, arguments) : '';
  };

  function setImgIn(container, src){
    if(!container || !src) return;
    container.setAttribute('data-v80-fixed-logo','1');
    var box = container;
    var inner = container.querySelector && container.querySelector('.nc-logo-inner,.sec-logo-inner') || container;
    var img = inner.querySelector && inner.querySelector('img');
    if(!img){
      inner.innerHTML = '<img alt="Logo métier" src="'+src+'">';
    }else if(img.getAttribute('src') !== src){
      img.setAttribute('src', src);
      img.setAttribute('alt','Logo métier');
    }
  }
  function applyDomLogos(){
    enforceLogos();
    safe(function(){
      var active = hasState() ? state.active : '';
      document.querySelectorAll('.nc-logo').forEach(function(el){ setImgIn(el, fixedLogoFor('consigne')); });
      document.querySelectorAll('.diag59-logo').forEach(function(el){ setImgIn(el, V80_LOGOS.production); });
      document.querySelectorAll('.maint-v2-logo').forEach(function(el){ setImgIn(el, V80_LOGOS.maintenance); });
      document.querySelectorAll('.sec-logo').forEach(function(el){ setImgIn(el, V80_LOGOS.securite); });
      // Sécurité supplémentaire : si le module actif est une consigne qualité, forcer aussi les logos génériques visibles.
      if(active === 'consigne') document.querySelectorAll('.nc-logo img').forEach(function(img){ img.src = fixedLogoFor('consigne'); });
    });
  }
  window.v80ApplyHardLogos = applyDomLogos;

  function lockLogoChooser(tabId){
    var fixed = fixedLogoFor(tabId);
    if(fixed){
      enforceLogos();
      applyDomLogos();
      if(typeof window.toast === 'function') safe(function(){ window.toast('Logo métier figé dans le fichier.'); });
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }
  var oldChooseLogoForTab = window.chooseLogoForTab;
  window.chooseLogoForTab = function(tabId){
    if(lockLogoChooser(tabId)) return;
    return oldChooseLogoForTab ? oldChooseLogoForTab.apply(this, arguments) : undefined;
  };

  // Compatibilité avec les anciennes fonctions diagnostic qui pouvaient encore ouvrir un sélecteur.
  window.setDiagV59LogoClick = function(){ lockLogoChooser('diagnostic'); };
  window.setDiagV59Logo = async function(){ lockLogoChooser('diagnostic'); };

  function wrap(fnName){
    var oldFn = window[fnName];
    if(typeof oldFn !== 'function' || oldFn.__v80LogoWrapped) return;
    var wrapped = function(){
      enforceLogos();
      var ret = oldFn.apply(this, arguments);
      // Si la fonction renvoie directement du HTML, corriger les anciens logos injectés dedans.
      if(typeof ret === 'string'){
        ret = ret
          .replace(/<div class="diag59-logo">[\s\S]*?<\/div><div class="diag59-title">/, '<div class="diag59-logo" data-v80-fixed-logo="1"><img src="'+V80_LOGOS.production+'" alt="Logo métier"></div><div class="diag59-title">')
          .replace(/<div class="sec-logo"><div class="sec-logo-inner">[\s\S]*?<\/div><\/div>/, '<div class="sec-logo" data-v80-fixed-logo="1"><div class="sec-logo-inner"><img src="'+V80_LOGOS.securite+'" alt="Logo métier"></div></div>')
          .replace(/<td class="maint-v2-logo-cell"><div class="maint-v2-logo">[\s\S]*?<\/div><\/td>/, '<td class="maint-v2-logo-cell"><div class="maint-v2-logo" data-v80-fixed-logo="1"><img src="'+V80_LOGOS.maintenance+'" alt="Logo métier"></div></td>');
      }
      enforceLogos();
      setTimeout(applyDomLogos, 0);
      return ret;
    };
    wrapped.__v80LogoWrapped = true;
    window[fnName] = wrapped;
  }
  ['render','updatePreview','persist','renderConsigne','renderMaintenance','renderSecurite','renderDiagnostic','renderDiagnosticV59','renderDiagnostic60','previewConsigne','previewMaintenance','previewSecurite','previewDiagnostic','previewDiagnosticV59','previewDiagnostic60','exportPdf','saveJsonAuto'].forEach(wrap);

  document.addEventListener('change', function(ev){
    var t = ev.target;
    if(!t) return;
    if(t.id === 'logoInput' || t.id === 'diag59-logo-file' || (t.dataset && /logo/i.test(String(t.dataset.targetTab||'')))){
      var tab = (t.dataset && t.dataset.targetTab) || (hasState() ? state.active : '');
      if(fixedLogoFor(tab) || t.id === 'diag59-logo-file'){
        ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation();
        t.value = '';
        lockLogoChooser(tab || 'diagnostic');
      }
    }
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var target = ev.target && ev.target.closest ? ev.target.closest('.nc-logo,.diag59-logo,.maint-v2-logo,.sec-logo,[data-preview-kind="logo"]') : null;
    if(!target) return;
    var tab = hasState() ? state.active : '';
    if(target.classList.contains('diag59-logo')) tab='diagnostic';
    else if(target.classList.contains('maint-v2-logo')) tab='maintenance';
    else if(target.classList.contains('sec-logo')) tab='securite';
    else if(target.classList.contains('nc-logo')) tab='consigne';
    if(fixedLogoFor(tab)){
      ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation(); ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
      lockLogoChooser(tab);
    }
  }, true);

  // Sur modification du type de consigne, le logo Production/Qualité bascule immédiatement.
  document.addEventListener('change', function(ev){
    var t = ev.target;
    if(t && (t.id === 'nc-typeConsigne-select' || t.id === 'nc-typeConsigne' || t.matches && t.matches('[data-v45f-type-select],[data-v45f-field="typeConsigne"]'))){
      setTimeout(function(){ enforceLogos(); if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') safe(function(){ updatePreview(); }); applyDomLogos(); }, 0);
    }
  }, true);
  document.addEventListener('input', function(ev){
    var t = ev.target;
    if(t && (t.id === 'nc-typeConsigne' || t.matches && t.matches('[data-v45f-field="typeConsigne"]'))){
      setTimeout(applyDomLogos, 0);
    }
  }, true);

  function boot(){
    enforceLogos();
    applyDomLogos();
    safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
    setTimeout(applyDomLogos, 250);
    setTimeout(applyDomLogos, 1000);
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', boot, {once:true});
  else boot();
})();
</script>

<style id="v82-hub-standards-style">
  #v59Landing .v59-model-grid{

  .v82-standards-flow b:nth-child(2){margin-left:12px;}

    pointer-events:none;
  }

<script id="v82-hub-standards-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V82_HUB_STANDARDS__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V82_HUB_STANDARDS__ = true;

  // Option 1 : local / dossier embarqué.
  window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_LOCAL_URL = window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_LOCAL_URL || './standards/index.html';

  // Option 3 : web / GitHub Pages / intranet.
  // Laisse vide tant que le SI n'a pas validé l'hébergement.
  window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_WEB_URL = window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_WEB_URL || '';
  window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_USE_WEB = window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_USE_WEB || false;

  function getStandardsUrl(){
    if(window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_USE_WEB && window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_WEB_URL){
      return window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_WEB_URL;
    }
    return window.LABODOC_STANDARDS_LOCAL_URL;
  }

  function openStandards(){
    var url = getStandardsUrl();
    try{
      window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener');
    }catch(e){
      window.location.href = url;
    }
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var card = ev.target && ev.target.closest ? ev.target.closest('[data-labodoc-external="standards"]') : null;
    if(!card) return;
    ev.preventDefault();
    ev.stopPropagation();
    ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
    openStandards();
  }, true);

  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(ev){
    if(ev.key !== 'Enter' && ev.key !== ' ') return;
    var card = ev.target && ev.target.closest ? ev.target.closest('[data-labodoc-external="standards"]') : null;
    if(!card) return;
    ev.preventDefault();
    ev.stopPropagation();
    ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
    openStandards();
  }, true);
})();
</script>

<style id="v85-scroll-fix-clean-style">
  :root{--labo-toolbar-offset:0px;}
  @media screen{
    html,body{min-height:100%;}
    body.v59-doc{overflow:auto!important;}
    body.v59-doc #v64Topbar{max-width:100vw!important;}
    body.v59-doc .v64-actions{max-width:100%!important;}

    /* Les arrière-plans de modales deviennent scrollables sous la barre haute */
    #v47Backdrop,
    .v66-modal-backdrop,
    .v68-modal-backdrop,
    #v85ModalBackdrop{
      align-items:flex-start!important;
      justify-content:center!important;
      overflow-y:auto!important;
      overflow-x:hidden!important;
      padding-top:calc(var(--labo-toolbar-offset,0px) + 10px)!important;
      padding-bottom:18px!important;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch!important;
    }

    /* La modale historique V47 n'est plus centrée verticalement sous la barre */
    #v47Modal{
      top:calc(var(--labo-toolbar-offset,0px) + 10px)!important;
      left:50%!important;
      transform:translateX(-50%)!important;
      width:min(760px,calc(100vw - 20px))!important;
      max-height:calc(100dvh - var(--labo-toolbar-offset,0px) - 20px)!important;
      grid-template-rows:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto!important;
      overflow:hidden!important;
    }
    #v47Modal.open{display:grid!important;}
    #v47Modal .v47-body{overflow-y:auto!important;min-height:0!important;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch!important;}
    #v47Modal .v47-head{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:3;}
    #v47Modal .v47-foot{position:sticky;bottom:0;z-index:3;background:inherit;}

    /* Modales V66/V68 : même principe, corps scrollable */
    .v66-modal,
    .v68-modal{
      width:min(840px,calc(100vw - 20px))!important;
      max-height:calc(100dvh - var(--labo-toolbar-offset,0px) - 20px)!important;
      display:grid!important;
      grid-template-rows:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto!important;
      overflow:hidden!important;
    }
    .v66-body,
    .v68-body{
      overflow-y:auto!important;
      min-height:0!important;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch!important;
      padding-bottom:12px!important;
    }
    .v66-head,.v68-head{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:3;}
    .v66-foot,.v68-foot{position:sticky;bottom:0;z-index:3;background:#fff;}

    /* Les grilles de champs passent en une colonne quand la fenêtre est trop petite */
    @media(max-width:900px), (max-height:760px){
      .v47-grid2,.v47-grid3,.v66-grid2,.v66-grid3,.v68-grid2,.v68-grid3{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
      .v47-body,.v66-body,.v68-body{padding:12px!important;}
      .v47-head,.v66-head,.v68-head{padding:10px 12px!important;}
      .v47-foot,.v66-foot,.v68-foot{padding:10px 12px!important;}
      .v47-title strong{font-size:.95rem!important;}
      .v47-title small{font-size:.72rem!important;}
    }
    @media(max-height:620px){
      #v47Modal,.v66-modal,.v68-modal{max-height:calc(100dvh - var(--labo-toolbar-offset,0px) - 10px)!important;}
      #v47Backdrop,.v66-modal-backdrop,.v68-modal-backdrop{padding-top:calc(var(--labo-toolbar-offset,0px) + 5px)!important;}
    }
  }
  @media print{
    #v85-scroll-fix-clean-style{display:none!important;}
  }
</style>
<script id="v85-scroll-fix-clean-script">
(function(){
  if(window.__LABODOC_V85_SCROLL_FIX_CLEAN__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V85_SCROLL_FIX_CLEAN__ = true;
  function setOffset(){
    try{
      var bar=document.getElementById('v64Topbar') || document.querySelector('.topbar');
      var h=bar ? Math.ceil(bar.getBoundingClientRect().height) : 0;
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--labo-toolbar-offset', h + 'px');
    }catch(e){}
  }
  ['DOMContentLoaded','load','resize'].forEach(function(ev){ window.addEventListener(ev,setOffset,{passive:true}); });
  document.addEventListener('click',function(){ setTimeout(setOffset,30); },true);
  setInterval(setOffset,800);
})();
</script>


<!-- ============================================================
     V82 — Maintenance 1er niveau : clic ligne fiable + photos drag/drop/paste
     NE TOUCHE PAS au moteur V65/V64 : bouton jaune, impression PDF, JSON auto, toolbar.
   ============================================================ -->
<style id="v82-maintenance-row-fix-style">
  .v82-maint-row{cursor:pointer!important;position:relative!important;}
  .v82-maint-row:hover{outline:3px solid rgba(255,210,0,.75)!important;outline-offset:-3px!important;background:rgba(255,210,0,.06)!important;}
  .v82-backdrop{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2147483630;background:rgba(0,0,0,.46);display:none;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding:calc(var(--labo-toolbar-offset, var(--v64-bar-h, 92px)) + 12px) 14px 14px;font-family:'DM Sans',Arial,sans-serif;}
  .v82-backdrop.open{display:flex;}
  .v82-modal{width:min(900px,calc(100vw - 28px));max-height:calc(100dvh - var(--labo-toolbar-offset, var(--v64-bar-h, 92px)) - 24px);background:#fff;color:#111;border:2px solid #111;border-radius:22px;box-shadow:0 26px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.38);display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto;overflow:hidden;}
  .v82-head{background:#111;color:#fff;border-bottom:5px solid #ffd200;padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;}
  .v82-head strong{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:950;display:block;}
  .v82-head small{color:#ffd200;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;display:block;margin-top:2px;}
  .v82-close{background:#fff!important;color:#111!important;border:1px solid #fff!important;border-radius:10px!important;font-weight:950!important;padding:7px 10px!important;}

  .v82-grid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:160px 1fr;gap:12px;}

  .v82-field textarea{min-height:92px;resize:vertical;line-height:1.35;}
  .v82-field input:focus,.v82-field textarea:focus{outline:none!important;border-color:#111!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(255,210,0,.35)!important;}
  .v82-drop{border:2px dashed #c9b454;background:#fffbea;border-radius:16px;padding:14px;display:grid;gap:10px;align-items:center;justify-items:center;text-align:center;color:#111;min-height:96px;}
  .v82-drop.drag{background:#fff3b8;border-color:#111;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(255,210,0,.28) inset;}
  .v82-drop b{font-size:.95rem;}
  .v82-drop small{color:#6b5b00;font-weight:700;}
  .v82-drop input[type=file]{display:none!important;}
  .v82-file-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#111!important;color:#ffd200!important;border:1px solid #111!important;border-radius:12px!important;padding:9px 14px!important;font-weight:950!important;cursor:pointer;}
  .v82-photos{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(112px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:10px;}
  .v82-photo{border:1px solid #d8d0a2;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;padding:7px;display:grid;gap:7px;}
  .v82-photo img{width:100%;height:96px;object-fit:contain;background:#f5f7fb;border-radius:8px;display:block;}
  .v82-photo button{background:#fff!important;color:#c5161d!important;border:1px solid #e6a5a5!important;border-radius:10px!important;padding:6px 8px!important;font-weight:900!important;}
  .v82-foot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:#fff9dc;border-top:1px solid #e4d692;padding:12px 16px;}
  .v82-left-actions,.v82-right-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
  .v82-btn{border-radius:12px!important;padding:9px 13px!important;font-weight:950!important;border:1px solid #111!important;background:#fff!important;color:#111!important;}
  .v82-btn.primary{background:#111!important;color:#ffd200!important;}
  .v82-btn.yellow{background:#ffd200!important;color:#111!important;border-color:#111!important;}
  .v82-btn.danger{background:#fff!important;color:#c5161d!important;border-color:#c5161d!important;}
  .v82-note{font-size:.8rem;color:#6b5b00;font-weight:800;}
  @media(max-width:720px), (max-height:720px){.v82-grid2{grid-template-columns:1fr}.v82-body{padding:12px}.v82-head,.v82-foot{padding:10px 12px}.v82-modal{border-radius:18px}}
  @media print{.v82-backdrop{display:none!important}}
</style>
<script id="v82-maintenance-row-fix-script">
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if(window.__LABODOC_V82_MAINT_ROWS_FIXED__) return;
  window.__LABODOC_V82_MAINT_ROWS_FIXED__ = true;

  var modalIndex = 0;
  var lastScrubAt = 0;

  function safe(fn, fallback){try{return fn();}catch(e){return fallback;}}
  function qs(sel, root){return (root||document).querySelector(sel);}
  function qsa(sel, root){return Array.prototype.slice.call((root||document).querySelectorAll(sel));}
  function esc(v){return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];});}
  function hasState(){return safe(function(){return typeof state==='object' && state;}, false);}
  function isMaintenance(){return hasState() && state.active === 'maintenance';}
  function getMaint(){
    if(!hasState()) return null;
    if(!state.maintenance || typeof state.maintenance !== 'object') state.maintenance = {};
    if(!Array.isArray(state.maintenance.rows)) state.maintenance.rows = [];
    if(!state.maintenance.rows.length) state.maintenance.rows.push(newRow(1));
    return state.maintenance;
  }
  function newRow(n){return {number:String(n||1).padStart(2,'0'),title:'',controls:'',why:'',risk:'',illustration:'',illustrations:[]};}
  function normalizeRow(r,n){
    r = r || newRow(n||1);
    if(!Array.isArray(r.illustrations)){
      if(r.illustrations) r.illustrations = [r.illustrations];
      else r.illustrations = [];
    }
    if(r.illustration && !r.illustrations.length) r.illustrations = [r.illustration];
    if(!r.number) r.number = String(n||1).padStart(2,'0');
    ['title','controls','why','risk'].forEach(function(k){if(r[k]==null) r[k]='';});
    return r;
  }
  function directMaintenanceRows(){
    var host = qs('#previewHost');
    if(!host) return [];
    var tables = qsa('.maint-v2-table', host).filter(function(t){return !t.classList.contains('maint-v2-checktable');});
    var table = tables[0];
    if(!table || !table.tBodies || !table.tBodies[0]) return [];
    return Array.prototype.slice.call(table.tBodies[0].children).filter(function(el){return el && el.tagName === 'TR';});
  }
  function scrubOldTags(){
    if(!isMaintenance()) return;
    var host = qs('#previewHost');
    if(!host) return;
    // Anciennes surcouches : elles taguaient aussi les TR internes du tableau de coche.
    qsa('.maint-v2-table tr', host).forEach(function(el){
      el.classList.remove('v47-zone');
      el.removeAttribute('data-v47-kind');
      el.removeAttribute('data-v47-label');
      el.removeAttribute('data-v47-index');
    });
    directMaintenanceRows().forEach(function(tr,i){
      tr.classList.add('v82-maint-row');
      tr.setAttribute('data-v82-maint-index', String(i));
      tr.setAttribute('title', 'Modifier le contrôle '+(i+1));
      tr.setAttribute('tabindex','0');
    });
    lastScrubAt = Date.now();
  }
  function commit(){
    safe(function(){ if(typeof persist === 'function') persist(); });
    safe(function(){ if(typeof updatePreview === 'function') updatePreview(); });
    setTimeout(scrubOldTags,30);
    setTimeout(scrubOldTags,180);
  }
  function srcOf(p){return (p && typeof p === 'object') ? (p.src || p.data || '') : String(p||'');}
  function htmlPhotos(row){
    var arr = Array.isArray(row.illustrations) ? row.illustrations : [];
    if(!arr.length) return '<div class="v82-note">Aucune illustration ajoutée.</div>';
    return '<div class="v82-photos">'+arr.map(function(p,i){var src=srcOf(p);return '<div class="v82-photo"><img src="'+esc(src)+'" alt="Illustration"><button type="button" data-v82-remove-photo="'+i+'">Retirer</button></div>';}).join('')+'</div>';
  }
  function ensureDom(){
    if(qs('#v82MaintBackdrop')) return;
    var wrap=document.createElement('div');
    wrap.id='v82MaintBackdrop';
    wrap.className='v82-backdrop';
    wrap.innerHTML='<div class="v82-modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Modifier un contrôle maintenance"><div class="v82-head"><div><strong id="v82Title">Contrôle</strong><small>Maintenance 1er niveau</small></div><button type="button" class="v82-close" data-v82-close>Fermer</button></div><div class="v82-body" id="v82Body"></div><div class="v82-foot"><div class="v82-left-actions"><button type="button" class="v82-btn yellow" data-v82-add-after>+ Ajouter un contrôle après</button><button type="button" class="v82-btn danger" data-v82-delete>Supprimer ce contrôle</button></div><div class="v82-right-actions"><span class="v82-note">Modification directe depuis l’aperçu.</span><button type="button" class="v82-btn primary" data-v82-ok>OK</button></div></div></div>';
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
  }
  function openRow(index){
    if(!isMaintenance()) return;
    var d=getMaint();
    index = Number(index||0);
    if(index < 0) index = 0;
    if(index >= d.rows.length) index = d.rows.length - 1;
    if(index < 0){d.rows.push(newRow(1)); index=0;}
    modalIndex=index;
    var row=normalizeRow(d.rows[index], index+1);
    d.rows[index]=row;
    ensureDom();
    qs('#v82Title').textContent='Contrôle '+(index+1);
    qs('#v82Body').innerHTML = ''+
      '<div class="v82-grid2">'+
        '<div class="v82-field"><label>N°</label><input id="v82Num" value="'+esc(row.number)+'"></div>'+
        '<div class="v82-field"><label>Titre du contrôle</label><input id="v82RowTitle" value="'+esc(row.title)+'"></div>'+
      '</div>'+
      '<div class="v82-field"><label>Contrôles à effectuer</label><textarea id="v82Controls">'+esc(row.controls)+'</textarea></div>'+
      '<div class="v82-field"><label>Pourquoi</label><textarea id="v82Why">'+esc(row.why)+'</textarea></div>'+
      '<div class="v82-field"><label>Risque</label><textarea id="v82Risk">'+esc(row.risk)+'</textarea></div>'+
      '<div class="v82-field"><label>Illustration(s)</label><div class="v82-drop" id="v82Drop" tabindex="0"><b>Charger / glisser / coller des photos</b><small>Sélectionne un fichier, glisse une ou plusieurs images ici, ou colle une capture avec Ctrl+V.</small><label class="v82-file-btn">Choisir des fichiers<input id="v82File" type="file" accept="image/*" multiple></label></div><div id="v82PhotoList">'+htmlPhotos(row)+'</div></div>';
    var back=qs('#v82MaintBackdrop');
    back.classList.add('open');
    setTimeout(function(){var t=qs('#v82RowTitle'); if(t) t.focus();},40);
    bindPhotoZone();
  }
  function close(){var b=qs('#v82MaintBackdrop'); if(b) b.classList.remove('open');}
  function writeModal(){
    var d=getMaint(); if(!d) return;
    var row=normalizeRow(d.rows[modalIndex], modalIndex+1);
    row.number = qs('#v82Num') ? qs('#v82Num').value : row.number;
    row.title = qs('#v82RowTitle') ? qs('#v82RowTitle').value : row.title;
    row.controls = qs('#v82Controls') ? qs('#v82Controls').value : row.controls;
    row.why = qs('#v82Why') ? qs('#v82Why').value : row.why;
    row.risk = qs('#v82Risk') ? qs('#v82Risk').value : row.risk;
    d.rows[modalIndex] = row;
  }
  function refreshPhotos(){
    var d=getMaint(); if(!d) return;
    var row=normalizeRow(d.rows[modalIndex], modalIndex+1);
    var box=qs('#v82PhotoList'); if(box) box.innerHTML=htmlPhotos(row);
  }
  function readFile(file){return new Promise(function(resolve,reject){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(){resolve(r.result);};r.onerror=reject;r.readAsDataURL(file);});}
  async function addPhotoFiles(files){
    files = Array.prototype.slice.call(files||[]).filter(function(f){return f && /^image\//.test(f.type||'');});
    if(!files.length) return;
    var d=getMaint(); if(!d) return;
    var row=normalizeRow(d.rows[modalIndex], modalIndex+1);
    for(var i=0;i<files.length;i++) row.illustrations.push({src:await readFile(files[i]),w:100});
    row.illustration = row.illustrations[0] ? srcOf(row.illustrations[0]) : '';
    d.rows[modalIndex]=row;
    refreshPhotos();
    commit();
  }
  function bindPhotoZone(){
    var drop=qs('#v82Drop'), file=qs('#v82File');
    if(file) file.addEventListener('change',function(){addPhotoFiles(file.files);file.value='';});
    if(drop){
      ['dragenter','dragover'].forEach(function(evName){drop.addEventListener(evName,function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();drop.classList.add('drag');});});
      ['dragleave','drop'].forEach(function(evName){drop.addEventListener(evName,function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();drop.classList.remove('drag');});});
      drop.addEventListener('drop',function(ev){addPhotoFiles(ev.dataTransfer && ev.dataTransfer.files);});
      drop.addEventListener('paste',function(ev){var items=ev.clipboardData && ev.clipboardData.items;if(!items)return;var files=[];Array.prototype.forEach.call(items,function(it){if(it.kind==='file'){var f=it.getAsFile(); if(f) files.push(f);}}); if(files.length){ev.preventDefault();addPhotoFiles(files);}});
    }
  }

  // Capture fiable sur les lignes de contrôle : on n'utilise plus data-v47-index qui comptait aussi les lignes internes du tableau de coche.
  document.addEventListener('click',function(ev){
    if(!isMaintenance()) return;
    var host=qs('#previewHost'); if(!host || !host.contains(ev.target)) return;
    scrubOldTags();
    var row=ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('.v82-maint-row');
    if(!row || !host.contains(row)) return;
    ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation(); ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
    openRow(Number(row.getAttribute('data-v82-maint-index')||0));
  },true);
  document.addEventListener('keydown',function(ev){
    if(ev.key==='Enter'){
      var row=ev.target && ev.target.closest && ev.target.closest('.v82-maint-row');
      if(row){ev.preventDefault();openRow(Number(row.getAttribute('data-v82-maint-index')||0));}
    }
    if(ev.key==='Escape'){close();}
  },true);

  document.addEventListener('click',function(ev){
    var t=ev.target; if(!t || !t.closest) return;
    if(t.closest('[data-v82-close]')){ev.preventDefault();close();return;}
    if(t.closest('[data-v82-ok]')){ev.preventDefault();writeModal();commit();close();return;}
    if(t.closest('[data-v82-add-after]')){ev.preventDefault();writeModal();var d=getMaint();d.rows.splice(modalIndex+1,0,newRow(modalIndex+2));commit();close();setTimeout(function(){openRow(modalIndex+1);},80);return;}
    if(t.closest('[data-v82-delete]')){ev.preventDefault();var d2=getMaint();if(d2.rows.length<=1){d2.rows[0]=newRow(1);commit();close();return;} if(confirm('Supprimer ce contrôle ?')){d2.rows.splice(modalIndex,1);commit();close();}return;}
    var rem=t.closest('[data-v82-remove-photo]');
    if(rem){ev.preventDefault();var d3=getMaint(), row=normalizeRow(d3.rows[modalIndex], modalIndex+1), idx=Number(rem.getAttribute('data-v82-remove-photo')||0);row.illustrations.splice(idx,1);row.illustration=row.illustrations[0]?srcOf(row.illustrations[0]):'';d3.rows[modalIndex]=row;refreshPhotos();commit();return;}
    var back=qs('#v82MaintBackdrop'); if(back && t===back){close();}
  },true);

  // Coller des images même si le focus est dans un champ de la modale.
  document.addEventListener('paste',function(ev){
    var back=qs('#v82MaintBackdrop'); if(!back || !back.classList.contains('open')) return;
    var items=ev.clipboardData && ev.clipboardData.items; if(!items) return;
    var files=[]; Array.prototype.forEach.call(items,function(it){if(it.kind==='file'){var f=it.getAsFile(); if(f && /^image\//.test(f.type||'')) files.push(f);}});
    if(files.length){ev.preventDefault();addPhotoFiles(files);}
  },true);

  function boot(){scrubOldTags();setTimeout(scrubOldTags,80);setTimeout(scrubOldTags,400);}
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot); else boot();
  window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(boot,120);setTimeout(boot,800);});
  if(window.MutationObserver){
    var host=qs('#previewHost');
    if(host) new MutationObserver(function(){setTimeout(scrubOldTags,10);}).observe(host,{childList:true,subtree:true,attributes:true,attributeFilter:['data-v47-kind','class']});
  }
  setInterval(function(){ if(isMaintenance() && Date.now()-lastScrubAt>400) scrubOldTags(); }, 500);
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
